◆ Event Rules ◆
Trailblazers can receive daily rewards in the Travel Log after logging in to the game each day.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
The rewards will be unlocked in sequential order according to the Trailblazer's accrued login days. Daily rewards will be refreshed at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM (server time) every day.

C: 为当前血量百分比最低的前台目标提供能够抵消等同于三月七<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>防御力+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>伤害的护盾，并使相邻目标获得等同于该护盾值<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的护盾，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>回合。\n若该目标当前生命值百分比大于等于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>，被敌方目标攻击的概率大幅提高。
E: Provides a Shield for the On-Field target with the lowest HP percentage that can offset DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's DEF plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> DMG, and grants adjacent targets a Shield equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of this Shield Effect for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).\nIf the target's current HP percentage is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> or higher, they have a greatly increased chance of being attacked by enemy targets.

C: 我方前台目标受到伤害或消耗生命值时，刃消耗等同于生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值并获得1层充能，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>层，该效果每次行动只可触发一次，任意单位行动后重置。\n当充能叠加至上限时，立即对敌方全体施放1次追加攻击，造成等同于刃<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的风属性伤害并回复等同于刃生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值，施放追加攻击后，消耗所有充能。
E: When an on-field ally target takes DMG or consumes HP, Blade consumes HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP and gains 1 stack of Charge, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> times. This effect can only be triggered once per action. Resets after any unit takes their action.\nWhen Charge stack reaches maximum, he immediately launches 1 Follow-Up ATK on all enemies, dealing Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Blade's Max HP. At the same time, restores Blade's HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of his Max HP. After the Follow-Up ATK, all Charges are consumed.

C: 对敌方全体造成等同于忘归人<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的火属性伤害，并使所有敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>受到的伤害</color>增加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>回合。本次攻击无视弱点属性削减敌方全体目标的韧性，击破弱点时，触发火属性的弱点击破效果。
E: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fugue's ATK to all enemies, and increases <color=#f29e38ff>DMG taken</color> by all enemy targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s). This attack ignores Weakness Type to reduce all enemies' Toughness. And when breaking Weakness, triggers the Fire Weakness Break effect.

C:
阮•梅展开结界，结界关闭前不会进入自己的回合且无法行动。处于结界中时我方小队全属性抗性穿透提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>，羁绊内队员提高双倍。且攻击后会对敌方目标施加【残梅绽】。
【残梅绽】会在敌方目标尝试从<u>弱点击破状态</u>恢复时触发，延长目标的<u>弱点击破状态</u>并使其<u>行动延后</u>，延后数值等同于阮•梅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的击破特攻+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>，并对其造成等同于阮•梅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>冰属性击破伤害的<u>击破伤害</u>。
敌方目标从<u>弱点击破状态</u>恢复前不可被再次附加【残梅绽】。
行动序列上出现【绽放】倒计时，倒计时回合开始时阮梅关闭结界并恢复行动，倒计时固定拥有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>点速度。
E:
Ruan Mei creates a Zone. Before the Zone deactivates, she will not being her own turn and cannot take action. While inside the Zone, increases the ally squad's All-Type RES PEN by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and is doubled for Bond members. Additionally, inflicts "Thanatoplum Rebloom" on enemies after an attack.
"Thanatoplum Rebloom" will be triggered when the target attempts to recover from <u>Weakness Break state</u>, prolonging the duration of their <u>Weakness Break</u> and <u>delaying their action</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ruan Mei's Break Effect plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, while also dealing <u>Break DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ruan Mei's Ice Break DMG.
Enemy targets who haven't recovered from their <u>Weakness Broken states</u> cannot be inflicted with "Thanatoplum Rebloom" again.
A "Bloom" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Ruan Mei deactivates the Zone and restores her ability to move. The countdown timer has a fixed SPD of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 该技能自动选择目标施放。使指定我方单体前台角色成为【同袍】，成为【同袍】的目标攻击力提高，提高数值等同于丹恒•腾荒<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力，并为我方全体前台提供能够抵消等同于丹恒•腾荒<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>攻击力+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>伤害的护盾，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>回合。重复获得丹恒•腾荒的护盾时，护盾量可以叠加，最高不超过当前战技提供的护盾量的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>。\n【同袍】仅对丹恒•腾荒战技最新施放的目标生效。
E: This ability automatically selects targets to use. Designates one on-field ally character as the "Bondmate." The target who becomes the "Bondmate" gains increased ATK equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK, and provides all on-field allies with a Shield that can offset DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s). When repeatedly receiving Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Shield, the Shield Effect stacks, but it will not exceed <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Shield Effect provided by the current Skill.\n"Bondmate" only applies to the most recent target of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Skill.

C: 希露瓦轻车熟路地带着你们来到了能源中枢前，却被老相识邓恩抓了个正着。经过一番苦战，你们终于摆脱了这名铁卫，却也触发了整个禁区的警报。
E: Serval leads you to the energy hub, only to run into her nemesis, Dunn. After a tough battle, you overcome the Silvermane Guard but inadvertently trigger alarms throughout the entire zone.

C: 泄密一事没能瞒过阿格莱雅。她冷酷地以极端手段逼供、确认你们的来意。历此险境，你们对翁法罗斯的印象大打折扣，但在白厄的诚恳请求下，你们进入创世涡心了解了黄金裔的救世苦旅，并最终决定留在翁法罗斯，帮助黄金裔们讨伐尼卡多利、夺取火种。
E: This leak does not go unnoticed by Aglaea. Through vicious means, she compels you to confess and confirm your intentions. After experiencing this, your impression of Amphoreus suffers a major hit, but at Phainon's earnest request, you enter the Vortex of Genesis to learn about the arduous journey for salvation conducted by the Chrysos Heirs. Thus, you ultimately decide to stay in Amphoreus and aid the Chrysos Heirs to confront Nikador and seize the Coreflames.

C: 距离白厄进入创世涡心挑战「纷争」试炼已过去很长时间，在等待中试炼突生变故。情急之下，你们介入试炼，将为心魔所困的白厄救出。白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——黄金裔万敌的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，万敌却对接过神权表现出了怪异的犹疑与抗拒，似乎悬锋的荣耀反而成为了他的心魔。
E: It's been a long while since Phainon had entered the Vortex of Genesis to challenge the Strife trial. With a sudden incident in the trial, you intervened, saving Phainon from his inner demon. With Phainon's Coreflame trial ending in failure, the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to Chrysos Heir Mydei, the lone crown prince of the Kremnos. Yet even as the true heir to "Strife," Mydei seems to exhibit an odd trepidation and resistance, as if the glory of Kremnos had become his inner demon.

C: 如果做出了另一种选择，人生会变成何种模样？音符小姐在哭泣中为你们编制幻梦，可即便如此，总有人要踏上前路，成为想成为的自己。老奥帝的阴谋不出意外地被打破，当星星再度在天空闪烁，梦中的人们或许会回想起，此地也曾有英雄来过。
E: If a different choice had been made, what kind of life would it have led to? Miss Note weaves illusions for you through her tears, and yet, someone must still step forward and become the self they long to be. Old Oti's scheme was unsurprisingly foiled, and as the stars once again shine in the sky, those who dreamed may one day remember, a hero once walked this land.

C: 你已经通过了擂台上的考验，并从史考特处讨要他承诺过的奖金（的一部分）。
E: You passed the test in the arena and claimed (a portion of) the promised prize money from Scott.

C: 你帮助希莉儿获得了安息，也得知了她为何变成饱受折磨的幻影。\n愿她这次合上双眼时能与凄凉的命运彻底诀别；愿她能微笑着进入梦乡。
E: You uncovered the reason behind Cyrille's tormented existence and helped her find peace.\nHopefully, she can bid farewell to her bleak fate and find solace in eternal sleep.

C: 你以自己认为恰当的方式彻底结束了推销员的无尽骚扰，还碰巧得知「查宝」的归宿在何处，并将它送回了它该在的地方。\n这一不起眼的小小意外将会给贝洛伯格带来何种深远影响？好吧，还是别想得太远了。
E: You handled the salesperson's harassment in a way you saw fit and successfully returned Findie to its rightful place.\nWhat impact will this insignificant incident have on Belobog? Well, the fate remains beyond anyone's reach.

C: 通过布洛妮娅的关系网，你们定位到了疑似文物失窃案背后的组织者。\n那位胆大包天的少爷居然敢让手下冒充银鬃铁卫包庇罪行，是时候将其绳之以法了。
E: Bronya's network helped you locate the organizer behind the exhibit theft.\nThis audacious young man disguised his men as Silvermane Guards to conceal his crime. Now it is time to bring him to justice.

C: 被金丝缠住箭矢的天谴造物，最终是否挣脱了束缚，唯有塞纳托斯能得知。她被一场浪漫的谎言欺骗，欺骗她的人，也是被欺骗者。
E: The creation of fury with her arrows ensnared by golden threads. Only Thanatos knows whether she ultimately broke free from those bindings. She was deceived by a romantic lie, and the one who deceived her was also the deceived.

C: 本幕所有事件卡<color=#f29e38ff>感动</color>获取量×#2
E: In this act, <color=#f29e38ff>Drama</color> obtained from Event Card ×#2

C: 钟表小子拿出来罗盘号上的许多财宝，这个贪财鬼直接给哈努兄弟磕起了头。\n「滴答，为啥不给我磕？」
E: Clockie takes out some of the many treasures from aboard The Compass, and this covetous one bows down deeply to Brother Hanu.\n"Tick-tock, why do you never do that to me?"

C: 但钟表小子相信自己的伙伴是正确的，他决心要帮助哈努兄弟捍卫小镇的太平。\n「滴答，即使苏乐达已被喝完，你也要当上噩梦小镇的老大。」
E: But Clockie trusts that his partner is right, and is determined to help Brother Hanu defend the town.\n"Tick-tock, even once all the SoulGlad in the world has been drunk, you still have to be the top dog of Nightmareville."

C: 钟表小子的表针转来转去，还是没想到什么好点子。\n「滴答，不管了，干就完了！」
E: Clockie's hands are spinning around and around, but he still isn't able to think up a good idea.\n"Tick-tock, don't worry — let's just do it!"

C: 哈努兄弟将自己锁在门中，好几天都没有出门。\n「滴答，不要安慰他，更不要跟他提野花姐姐。」
E: Brother Hanu locks himself away at home and doesn't come out for days.\n"Tick-tock, don't console him. And definitely don't mention Sister Wildflower around him."

C: 罗盘号收到了钟表小子的消息，他们庆幸钟表小子现在一切平安，答应了他的请求，将广告发到了其他小镇。\n「小镇宾馆了解一下，小镇宾馆了解一下。」
E: Clockie's letter successfully reached The Compass. The crew members were delighted to know that Clockie was safe. They agreed to help him by distributing the promotional flyers in other towns.\n"Visit the Town Hotel! Visit the Town Hotel!"

C: 钟表小子提议在美梦小镇建设十二条不同的街道，让不同喜好的宾客都能有喜欢的景点。\n「滴答，猫头鹰老师，木头老爷会给批预算的…应该会！」
E: Clockie thus proposed the construction of twelve different streets in Dreamville to cater to guests with different preferences.\n"Tick-tock, Professor Owl and Old Man Wood will approve the budget for this... I'm sure they will!"

C: 钢琴大叔让美梦小镇只能听钢琴曲，大家再也看不到漂亮的花朵摇曳，感到十分无聊……\n「滴答，我现在一闭眼就能听到钢琴的声音，受不了了！」
E: Uncle Piano only allowed people in Dreamville to listen to piano songs. Life became dull as the sight of the swaying flowers was no longer available...\n"Tick-tock, the sound of piano lingers in my ears once I close my eyes. I can't stand it anymore!"

C: 钟表小子开来了自己的大船，把蓝调街的海水泼到了街上，浇灭了火焰，\n「滴答，怎么在美梦小镇老得灭火啊！」
E: Clockie drove his ship into the town and poured the seawater from Blues Street all over the streets, extinguishing the fire.\n"Tick-tock, why am I always putting out fires in Dreamville?"

C: 钟表小子试图说服他们，但黑狗却将钟表小子丢出了安谧街。不过有几位部下被钟表小子的话语打动，愿意为钟表小子提供情报……\n「滴答，你们真是哈努兄弟的骄傲！」
E: Clockie tried to persuade them, but Black Dog drove him out of Serenity Street. Still, some of Hanu's old underlings were moved by Clockie's words and offered to provide him with intel...\n"Tick-tock, Hanu would be proud of you guys!"

C: 不，美梦小镇没有人捉弄其他人。\n「因为他教所有人尊重彼此。」
E: No. There were no pranksters in Dreamville.\n"Because he teaches everyone to respect each other."

C: 满足条件生效
E: Effective when condition met

C: 哈努兄弟坚持作战，引起了许多镇民的不满，过去簇拥在他身边的伙伴也开始背叛他……
E: Brother Hanu keeps fighting, causing a rift among some of the townsfolk. Even his old mates, who once rallied around him, are now beginning to turn against him...

C: 木头老爷可以让防风树的种子快速发芽，也可以让流星被大树吞噬。但钟表小子需要为大树提供养料，那便是珍贵的情感与记忆……
E: Old Man Wood can get the windbreak hedge seeds to quickly sprout, and can also let the shooting star be swallowed up by the Great Tree. But Clockie needs to provide nutrients to the great tree — in other words, precious memory and emotions...

C: 钟表小子希望缓和事态，他选择走入牛仔中倾听他们的意见。他相信只要有足够的时间，他可以说服牛仔们放弃暴力。
E: Clockie wishes to alleviate the tension, so he chooses to venture into the cowboys' territory and hear their perspectives. He believes that given ample time, he can persuade the cowboys to give up violence.

C: 木头老爷开始大力打压牛仔的团体，他封锁了牛仔们的资源，让他们在荒原中忍饥挨饿，这让钟表小子十分失望……
E: In response, Old Man Wood launches campaigns to suppress the cowboys with relentless vigor. He cuts off the cowboys' resources and leaves them to starve in the unforgiving wasteland. Clockie is deeply disappointed by his actions...

且说自{NICKNAME}完成试炼，受持明英灵指引寻得龙卵，接引龙尊丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝降世，便得到了强援力助。众人常见得一位英武{F#少女}{M#少年}，携一位手持长枪，脚踏祥云的英俊小娃娃行侠仗义；又结交罗浮内外英豪，一意为仙舟铲除药王乱党，建木邪祟。

却说那一日{NICKNAME}与丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝来到鳞渊境中，但见水光粼粼，浩瀚古海恰如玉界琼田，古今无限事，尽付滔浪中。众位看官需知晓，这罗浮持明一族自古海中来，又归于古海。丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝重返故园，自是欣喜非常，忍不住放落手中长枪，解下腰间所围三尺红绫，来到水边嬉戏起来。

这龙脉一族，遇水而得灵明。小龙尊浣洗红绫，肆意逐水，却在不经意间发动云吟奇术，直搅得这片灵境天地变色，巨浪掣空。藏匿此处的孽物们终是打熬不过，纷至沓来，原以为是什么撼地巨灵发威，却只见一名小小稚童，顿时恶向胆边生：

「小小年纪便有这般本事，若教这孩子再长大些个，我等焉能有命存活？」念及此节，这些建木所生的妖物恶兽顿时逞凶露爪，逼近丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝，誓要将这株幼苗掐灭在此。

{NICKNAME}见状心焦，大声喝道：「莫要伤我孩儿！」

丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝却不慌不忙，大喝一声「分！」。手中红绫一扬，这鳞渊境中的海潮好似有性命的活物一般，哗啦啦应声分开，久久不曾合拢。那些意欲逞凶的孽物无不跌入这道无底深壑中去，尸骨无存！众位若有机缘，去鳞渊境中观瞧，仍可看见那不曾合拢的海潮昭示小小龙尊深不可测的威能！

After {NICKNAME} completed the trial and found the dragon egg under the guidance of the wise Vidyadhara spirits, Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe descended and subsequently provided powerful support for the group. The people often saw a heroic and dashing {F#girl}{M#boy} carrying out justice together with an adorable child, who wielded a long lance and stood floating on fortuitous clouds. This hero also joined hands with many a valiant leader on the Luofu and beyond, determined to eradicate the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and the evil of the Ambrosial Arbor.

One day {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe came to Scalegorge Waterscape and gazed there upon the shimmering waters of the vast ancient sea, like a drop of empyreal jade, where all things that ever were are lost to the billowing waves. It should be known that the Vidyadhara are born from the ancient sea, and to the ancient sea they are destined to return. The sight of their old home filled Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe with elation, and they could hardly wait to put down the lance, untie their red silk sash at their waist, and go frolic at the water's edge.

Being of the dragon race, visiting the water gives the Vidyadhara quietude, clarity, and even epiphany. The young High Elder began playing with their red silk sash in the sea, enjoying the water as if it were second nature. However, it unintentionally started to cast a cloudhymn, its magical notes stirring this heavenscape into gloomy darkness and lifting giant waves into the air. The Abominations hiding nearby could not endure the relentless barrage, and they came out in droves expecting to face the wrath of an earth-shattering giant. Instead, they saw a small child, and they were filled with an indomitable rage:

"If this small child is already capable of such feats, how can we hope to survive when they are fully grown!?" And then these fiends born from the Arbor showed their claws and approached Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe, vowing to exterminate the hatchling right there and then.

{NICKNAME} rose up anxiously to protect the young one, shouting: "Harm not my child!"

Yet Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe remained calmed and composed, and simply shouted: "Part!" With the raising of Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe's red sash, the tides of Scalegorge Waterscape moved as though they were alive, obeying the command to part and never to close back. The Abominations, with their murderous fury, were all pulled into the bottomless ravine between the waters — even their bones were torn out of existence! If any of you have the opportunity to visit Scalegorge Waterscape, the tide that parted and never closed back is a living testament to the unfathomable power of this little Vidyadhara!

...

C: 失落的盗寇之都多洛斯，三百侠盗纵情游戏，横行无忌。\n捷足的贼星赛法利娅，戏弄「诡计」火种的黄金裔，奔走吧。愿你的谎言随风同行，吹遍此世大地——\n「呵，还想诓我？没门！」
E: In the fallen city of bandits, Dolos, the 300 Rogues run wild and free.\nRace onward, fleet-footed Thief Star Cifera, Chrysos Heir of the "Trickery" Coreflame. May your web of lies spread with the breeze throughout all lands—\n"Tryna trick me? Not a chance!"

C: 你踏上「同谐」命途后所生成的星魂投影，无尽可能中的一种。
E: Eidolon Projection generated when you tread on the Path of Harmony. One of the countless existing possibilities.

C: 唱片转呀转呀，嘶哑的叫喊被热气浸润。 她看似毫无防备，沉醉在迷人的旋律中： 先由恳求与期待引入， 再是激烈真挚的倾诉， 跃过一个又一个高潮… 直到唱片停转，嘶哑的叫喊也失了声息。 「任务结束。」
E: The phonograph record is being played, spinning nonstop. Even the sounds of all those hoarse shrieks cannot escape the heatwave and are dampened by its tepidity. She seemed unprepared and utterly enthralled by the fascinating melodies: It started with sincerity and anticipation... ...followed by a passionate catharsis... ...with one climax after another... ...until the record's spinning came to a final stop and those hoarse shrieks were no longer audible. "Mission accomplished."

C: 泰坦眷属磅礴的战吼席卷战场，两道电光般的身影在其中拼杀出一条血路。 「我一个人便能把它们都收拾了。」 战士每一次出拳，蔓延的血刺贯穿敌人的身体。 「蛮力罢了，看我的剑！」 银白的剑甩出漂亮的弧度，怪物如落叶飘零。 「比比速度么？」 两人同时朝对面攻去—— 哀嚎声传来，那背后偷袭的怪物即刻殒命。 两道声音撞在一起—— 「是我给了它最后一击！」
E: The Titankins' all-consuming roars sweep across the battlefield. Two lightning-quick figures slaughter their way out of combat. "I alone will be enough to handle them." Every punch unleashed by the warrior sends spears of blood through the bodies of the enemy. "Brute force and nothing more. Watch my blade!" As a blade of pale silver slices in a curve, monsters drop like falling leaves. "A contest of speed?" The two charge at the other side simultaneously. Howls of anguish sound as the stealthy beasts behind them are struck down at once. Two voices can be heard at the same time. "That was my kill!"

C: 男孩在如星的雨滴中奔跑，为那久旱之后的甘霖欢呼。 那一场雨下了很久很久，大篷车停驻在遍布绿意的土地。 「母亲，姐姐，我们不会再挨饿受冻了！」 埃维金人的篝火温暖了漫长的夜，男孩听着姐姐的故事，等待着晨曦。 「卡卡瓦夏，你也会带着母神恩赐的幸运，去做到我们做不到的事…愿你的旅途永远坦然，诡计永不败露……」 金色的阳光从梦中倒映在现实的居所，交易与数字再次映入眼帘。 他松开紧握的手—— 仿佛什么也没能抓住，又仿佛还有余温跳动。
E: The boy ran amongst the star-like raindrops and cheered for the blissful rain that arrived after a long drought. The rain fell for a long, long time, and the covered wagon stopped on the land covered by budding green. "Mom! Big sis! We'll never go cold or hungry again!" The Avgins' campfire warmed the long night, as the boy listened to his big sister's stories and waited for the dawn. "Kakavasha... You, too, will go forth with your good luck blessed by the Mother Goddess, and achieve what we could not achieve... May your journey be forever peaceful, and your schemes forever concealed..." Golden sunlight reflects from his dreams into his real-life abode, and transactions and numbers are once again mirrored in his eyes. He lets go of the hand that was clutched into a fist — It's as if he did not manage to grab onto anything... yet there's still a throbbing, lingering warmth.

C: 冰冷的露水凝结在锋刃，滑落血色的痕迹。 铁锈味的荒野，鏖战燃起的火焰仍在灰烬上跳跃。 「迈德漠斯，刚才真是神一样的战斗啊！」 赤裸上身的战士擦拭武器，兴奋地喊道。 「万敌，以后我也要像你一样百战百胜！」 孩子崇敬地看着他，手中捏着一把断剑。 「王储，我们回到悬锋指日可待啊。」 沧桑的老人笑着，举起酒杯向他致意。 他点点头，兀自走到了营地边。 重生的疼痛仍在皮肤上滚动，明日，他将带领悬锋孤军再次出发，迁往异乡。 流离将停于何处，他不知道，他唯一能确定的是——他将背负王的职责，直至血火燃尽。 夜色渐深，他独自痛饮血酿，过路的吟游诗人拉动琴弦，不着调的歌声在空中晃荡—— 「家乡是梦想之地呐，不是可以抵达的地方。」
E: Cold dew congealed on the blade, sliding down in crimson streaks. The rust-tainted wilderness still flickered with embers of battle, flames leaping upon the ashes. "Mydeimos, that was a godlike fight just now!" A bare-chested warrior wiped his weapon clean, shouting in exhilaration. "Mydei, one day, I'll be as invincible as you!" A child gazed at him with reverence, clutching a broken sword in small hands. "Crown Prince, our return to Castrum Kremnos is within sight." An aged man smiled, raising his cup in a toast to him. He nodded silently and walked to the edge of the camp. The pain of rebirth still coursed across his skin. Tomorrow, he would lead the Kremnoan Detachment forth once again, migrating to foreign lands. Where this wandering would end, he did not know. The only certainty was this — he would bear the duty of a king until the blood and flames consumed him. As night deepened, he drank the bloodwine alone. A passing bard plucked at his strings, a wandering melody drifting through the air— "Home is the land of dreams, not a place one can ever reach."

C: 幻境中，少女的耳畔回响起那日的对谈。 「梅林，这柄剑一点儿也不难拔。」 「的确如此。对你来说，成为大家期待中的王，一点儿也不困难。毕竟有我在指导你嘛。但，阿尔托莉雅…真正困难的是，你不可能永远都符合大家的期待。」 「到时候，他们可以选一个更合适的王。我不会有意见。」 「如果这种人根本就不存在呢？」 「…那我会努力回应大家的期待。」 如今，少女早已明白这将是何等的悲剧。如果此刻便是最初的那个时刻，她是否会选择放弃？ 王无言。她只是握紧了剑。 岩石再度发出拔剑的轰鸣。
E: The girl's ears rang in the fantasia with the words conversed on that day. "This sword wasn't hard to pull out at all, Merlin." "Indeed. Becoming the king everyone wishes for won't be hard for you at all, given that I'm guiding you. However, Altria... The hard part is that you can't always meet everyone's expectations." "Then they can choose a more fitting king by that time. I won't protest." "But what if such a person will never exist?" "...Then I'll do my best to meet everyone's expectations." Now, the girl had long since become aware of how profound that tragedy would be. Would she have chosen to give up if she were to return to that moment where everything began? The king does not speak and simply grasps the sword tightly. The stone again gives out a thundering roar as the sword is pulled out.

C: 厚重的胸甲装饰着净庭教会鲜明的符号，关节处也都密不透风。
E: A heavy breastplate decorated with the distinctive symbols of the Church of Purity Palace. Even the joints are airtight.

C: 深度强化感官信号的钢铁战盔，将格拉默铁骑的意识与装甲融为一体。

C: 紧密贴合战士腿部的护胫，曲线优雅而坚固，蕴藏着决不退缩的信念。
E: Tight-fitting shinguards around a warrior's legs, its contours elegant and durable, imbued with the spirit to never retreat.

C: 陶土捏制的笛哨，代表着小妖精们和两个小孩子的约定。当小男孩和小女孩吹起笛哨的时候，「迷？」的一声，妖精们就会打开通往迷境的树洞，欢迎他们来做客！
E: A flute whistle, shaped from clay. It symbolizes the promise between the little fairies and the two children. Whenever the boy and girl blew into it — "Mem?" — the tree hole leading to the maze would open, and the fairies would welcome them back with joy.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《欢呼响彻云霄》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Hosanna in Excelsis."

C: 栖宿于银河列车引擎中的虚数之力，庇佑着行于「开拓」命途的旅人。\n\n「探索、了解、建立与连结——这就是开拓。纵然阿基维利陨落，祂的遗志仍在前行！」
E: The Imaginary power residing in the engines of the Astral Express that protects travelers on the Path of Trailblaze.\n\n"Explore, understand, establish, and connect — that is what it means to trailblaze. Akivili may have fallen, but THEIR legacy continues!"

C: 种子萌发，枝芽交错，如突触般传递信号。在岁月的流逝中，这些枝芽有的枯萎，有的生长，直到能承载生命，成为某个灵魂的躯壳。\n\n「我们没有抛弃肉体，只是让它变成了一种…更长久的东西。」
E: The seeds take root and sprout. Branches and buds weave together, transmitting signals like a living network of synapses. Over the passage of years, some wither and fade, while others flourish, growing strong enough to bear life and form the vessel of a soul. \n\n"We did not abandon the flesh. We merely transformed it into something... more enduring."

C: 虚卒•践踏者体内高度凝缩的反物质，湮灭之刻正是文明毁灭的号角。\n\n「它们都在期许着湮灭之刻，与世界一同炼铸、同化。」
E: Highly condensed anti-matter within the body of the Voidranger: Trampler. The moment of obliteration is the trumpet call for civilizations' destruction.\n\n"They are all looking forward to the moment of obliteration, when they will be reforged and fused with the entire world."

C: 似乎是梅姐掉落的笔记。笔记上充满了潦草的笔迹，记录着家政工作交流的感受。
E: This seems to be a note that Mei had dropped. Messy writing fills the page with records of what she had learned from other housekeepers.

C: 铁桶中炖煮着贝洛伯格各色珍味，以小火慢炖熟制而成。 汤汁中漂浮着各类奇形怪状的食材，但闻起来真的很不错。 「装过标本又怎么了？不都是死去的动植物吗？」
E: The iron bucket contains all sorts of Belobog delicacies as a stew, and is simmered thoroughly using low heat. Ingredients with outlandish appearances float in the soup, but it smells very delicious. "What's wrong if they were once specimens? Aren't they dead animals and plants anyways?"

C:
一份《金槌府邸安全规范》。应该是花火为这场推理游戏现编的。内容如下：
「为避免歹人伤害伟大又可爱的花火大人，金槌府邸从即日起施行如下安全规范：
「1、所有家臣及访客需通过人脸识别系统出入金槌府邸。
「2、无法通过人脸识别系统者，将被当场击毙。
「3、本规范永久有效。」
E:
A copy of the Goldhammer Residence Security Regulations. Sparkle probably made it up on the spot just for this detective game. It says:
"To prevent criminals from hurting our great and lovely Miss Sparkle, the Goldhammer Residence shall abide by the following regulations from today onwards:
1. All retainers and visitors must enter and exit the Goldhammer Residence using the facial recognition system.
2. Those who cannot pass through the facial recognition system will be killed on the spot.
3. These regulations are in effect indefinitely."

C: 「斯坦威游隼」品牌的豪华私人车型，最为常见的出租款式。\n\n「斯坦威速度，助您圆梦路上快人一步！」
E: A luxurious private Steinway Falcon Speedster. The most commonly rented model.\n\n"Steinway Falcon Speedster: Making your dream come true faster!"

C: 波奇的同事似乎因为加班而对他颇有怨言。这件事似乎和费曼脱不开关系。
E: Bocchi's co-workers seem to have a grudge against him because they are forced to work overtime. Feinman seems to have something to do with this.

C: 一张被汗水渗得皱巴巴的树庭工作证，上面的名字是「科洛埃」。
E: A Grove of Epiphany work permit wrinkled with sweat with the name "Clio."

C: 只属于你的特调，出自调饮师加拉赫之手。 「用这杯『梦中之梦』向你致意，清醒之人—— 「——敬自掘坟墓的父辈。」
E: A special concoction tailored exclusively for you by the drinksmith Gallagher. "Raise this glass of 'Dream Within Dream' in your honor, sober one —" "To our forebearers who dug their own graves."

C: 只属于你的特调，出自调饮师加拉赫之手。 「用这杯『长眠不醒』向你致意，迷失的羔羊—— 「——敬往日的幽灵。」
E: A special concoction tailored exclusively for you by the drinksmith Gallagher. "Raise this glass of 'The Big Sleep' in your honor, lost sheep —" "Here's to the ghosts of the past."

C: 只属于你的特调，出自调饮师加拉赫之手。 「用这杯『到坟场的车票』向你致意，无名客—— 「——敬已死的和将死的人。」
E: A special concoction tailored exclusively for you by the drinksmith Gallagher. "Raise this glass of 'A Ticket to the Boneyard' in your honor, Nameless —" "To the dead and the dying."

C: 天门冬属的植物往往生长在陆地上，鳞渊天冬却与众不同，广泛分布于波月古海的海滨。尽管目前鳞渊天冬的人工养殖技术已经相当普及，但还有很多人迷信「野生的药效更强」，给护珠人们添了很多麻烦。\n\n「盗采天冬，幽囚押送。」
E: While plants of the Tian Dong genus typically grow on land, Tian Dong plants of Scalegorge Waterscape stand out by extensively inhabiting the coastal areas of the Lunarescent Depths. Although artificial cultivation techniques for Tian Dong have become quite prevalent, there are still many who believe in the superstition that "wild plants have stronger medicinal properties," causing significant trouble for the Pearlkeepers.\n\n"Plunderers of Tian Dong, to the Shackling Prison they will go."

E: Xin<unbreak>-41</unbreak> Homeward Cloud Messaging

E: Consumerism will always find a way to override your rationality.

C: 埋下金色的种子，收获金色的海洋。磨坊的风车滴溜溜转，把种子磨成粉末，烘焙成金色的饼干和面包。
E: Plant the golden seeds and harvest an ocean of gold. The windmill spins round and round, grinding the seeds into powder, baking them into golden cookies and bread.

C: 有着无瑕天空印象的颜色！驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大说，这种颜色让它觉得自己充满智慧。
E: The color of a flawless sky! Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas said this color made it feel full of wisdom.

C: 在各个文明间都有将黄金铸造成圆形货币的古老传统，即使在数字货币流行的今天，一枚沉甸甸的金币还是能给人们带来十足的安全感。
E: Throughout civilizations, there's an ancient tradition of minting gold into round coins. Even in today's era of digital currencies, a hefty gold coin still gives people a solid sense of security.

C: 根据互助协议内容提供给列车的材料。\n\n「既然是互助，那就不用客气啦。」
E: Materials provided to the Express in accordance with the mutual aid contract.\n\n"Since it's mutual aid, save your thanks."

C: 列车为开拓者们准备的支援物资，凭证领用。\n\n「列车长，咱能不能商量下别在卡上打孔呀，我还指着集齐一套收藏呢。」
E: Provisions prepared by the Express for Trailblazers. Claim with pass.\n\n"Dear conductor, can we not punch holes in the cards? I want to collect a whole collection of them."

C: 「于旅程中，邂逅新的伙伴吧。」
E: "Meet new companions in your journeys."

C: 琥珀2158纪初叶，武装考古学派在美勒姆基什的拱顶水晶寺遗址中挖掘出了一件特殊的文物——发行于寰宇蝗灾前的古典电子游戏，《星穹列车》。 这款游戏以星穹列车参与美勒姆基什独立战争的历史为蓝本，讲述了一段跌宕起伏的英雄冒险，其紧张刺激的回合制玩法更是令人欲罢不能。 「愿此行，终抵群星。」
E: A special relic from the Crystalline Temple's ruins on Memliche, unearthed by the Armed Archaeologists at the beginning of 2158 AE. It was a classic video game that predated the Swarm Disaster named Astral Express. This game is based on the historical event of the Express participating in the Memliche War of Independence, depicting a heroic tale of triumphs and defeats, with thrilling turn-based combat mechanics that left all players desperate to play more. "May this journey lead us starward."

C: 由黄石牛的碎肉与内脏调和赤云辣椒酱烹饪而成。菜名中的「乱斩」似乎只是因为发明这道菜的厨师武功很高。 「古国有诗云：『遥遥望牛斗，髻影杂云来。』这便是『牛杂』的由来。」 「你可少看点营销号讲历史吧。」
E: Made with yellow boulder beef chunks and offal together with redcloud chili sauce. The chef who invented this dish is very skilled in martial arts. "There was a poem from the Primeval Imperium days that went: 'Looking upon the bullfight from a distance, the shadow of the hair bun mixed with the clouds.' This is the origin of 'beef offal.'" "You could do with less marketing mumbo jumbo when recounting history."

C: 有一个心理学理论是这样的：当你听说某个陌生人的负面消息后，只会记得「此人身上存在负面消息」这件事，而不会记得负面消息本身。 只要应用这个原理，你就可以利用大众传媒给人们留下此人的负面印象，而根本不需要任何来源可信的负面新闻。 「恶利口之覆邦家者。」
E: There is a psychological theory that goes like this: When you hear negative news about a stranger, you only remember "there is negative news about this person," but not the negative news itself. By applying this principle, you can use the mass media to leave a negative impression of someone without needing any credible negative news sources. "Detest those who destroy entire countries with cunning words."

C: 铸之以猎杀怪物的铁球，上面的刻痕仿佛记录着死于其下的猎物之数。可小幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>巡猎</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: Iron pellets forged for hunting monsters. Each one bears scratches that seem to record the number of prey that perished because of it. Used to level up Traces slightly for <color=#f29e38ff>The Hunt</color> characters.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中随机生效1个效果：「镜子公主款」防御力提高<unbreak>36%</unbreak>；「音符小姐款」生命上限提高<unbreak>30%</unbreak>。

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中，首次施放攻击后，受到攻击的敌方目标会回复本次攻击内损失的生命值，敌方目标通过该方式每回复1%生命值，角色获得能够抵消等同于生命上限1%伤害的护盾，最多不超过角色生命上限的<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，持续2回合。
E: When used, after allies attack for the first time in the next battle, the attacked enemy target will heal for an amount equal to the HP it lost in this attack. For every 1% of HP the enemy target heals in this way, characters receive a Shield that can block DMG that is equal to 1% of the character's Max HP, up to <unbreak>100%</unbreak> of their Max HP, lasting for 2 turns.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中暴击伤害提高<unbreak>36%</unbreak>。

C: …… 「别让他们跑了！」鼹鼠队身后不断传来了集会者的喊叫声，这些贪婪的坏蛋已经追了过来。小鼹鼠们没有减慢速度，直接冲进了铁卫禁区。三只小鼹鼠回头张望，只见得这些鬼鬼祟祟的集会者们在禁区外气得捶胸顿足。 帕瓦的叔叔是银鬃铁卫的军官，在他的帮助下，小鼹鼠们在银鬃铁卫的保护下来到了军营的深处——也就是德雷克宝藏提到的地方。「帕瓦，并不是我不厚道，你难道不能叫你的叔叔把那些坏蛋都抓起来吗？」卡宾还有些生气。「他们过去将你抓走，这就已经违反法律了。」 「放心，他们逃不掉的。」帕瓦的叔叔曾经无数次帮助鼹鼠队化险为夷，他是鼹鼠队最可靠的伙伴。「这些事情就交给我们大人来处理吧，你们的冒险还差最后一步，去完成它吧。」 贝琪打开了德雷克最后的讯息：「勤勉又机智的士兵每天都会检查4处枪架，确保它们各自摆放着3把枪支，不多不少。」 「嗯…真的有人会在禁区里藏什么宝藏吗？」帕瓦的叔叔从来就不相信隐形的宝藏，因为这里是军队驻扎的地方，无论是几百年前的德雷克，还是几百年后的谁谁谁，都不可能在军队里藏起不为人知的宝藏。 「既然是隐形的宝藏，就一定有定位它的方法。」卡宾略作思考，他已经知道隐形的宝藏所在之地了。 ——亲爱的小读者们，你们知道他该找到宝藏了吗 鼹鼠提示： 仔细观看周围的符合「3把枪支」的摆设，自然可以找出答案。
E: ... "Don't let them get away!" The gathered crowd shouted incessantly from behind The Moles as these greedy criminals pursued them. The little moles rushed right into the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, not stopping at all. When the three little moles turned around, they saw the pursuers beyond the restricted zone stomping their feet in rage. Pava's uncle was a Silvermane Guards officer, and with his help, the little moles made their way to the camp's depths — the location where Drake's treasure had hinted. "I'm not heartless, Pava, but couldn't you get your uncle to arrest all those bad guys?" Carbine was still enraged. "They kidnapped you, which is against the law." "Don't worry. They're not getting away from it." Pava's uncle had helped the Moles countless times in perilous situations, and he was their most dependable collaborator. "Leave these things to us adults. Your adventure is still one step away from being completed. Go finish it." "The industrious and smart soldier will check the 4 gun stands every day to make sure there are exactly 3 guns per stand, no more and no less." Becky read from Drake's last message. "Hmm... would someone really bury treasure in a restricted zone?" Pava's uncle never believed in the invisible treasure because this was where the army was stationed. Neither Drake from hundreds of years ago nor anyone centuries in the future could have buried unknown treasures in the middle of the army. "Since it's an invisible treasure, there has to be a means to find it." Carbine paused for a moment, convinced that he already knew where the invisible treasure was hidden. — Have you got any ideas on how he will find the treasure, my young readers? Mole Tip: If you pay close attention to the decorations nearby that fit the description of "3 guns," you'll be able to figure out the answer on your own.

C: 图中画着一只躲在房间里的呜呜伯，找到它或许就能得到「电梯解锁密钥」。
E: The map depicts a Wubbaboo hiding inside a room. Finding it might grant access to the elevator encryption key.

C:
<align="center">播种莲子的贤人捧起池水，</align>
<align="center">她的身影与荷叶相映生辉。</align>

<align="center">照料奇兽的贤人居于枝头，</align>
<align="center">他的荣誉随作品<color=#dbc291ff>一同逝去</color>。</align>

<align="center">博学的贤人手捧书籍，</align>
<align="center">试图靠笔墨穷尽数理。</align>

<align="center">敬神的贤人奉献身心，</align>
<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>用生命</color>探索爱的真谛。</align>

<align="center">锻体的贤人拾起短矛，</align>
<align="center">与蛮邦战至<color=#dbc291ff>力竭身亡</color>。</align>

<align="center">感悟艺术的贤人与蝶共舞，</align>
<align="center">坚持用五感体察万物。</align>

<align="center">操使炼金的贤人手捧智果，</align>
<align="center">计划着亵渎神的王座。</align>
E:
<align="center">The sage who sowed the lotus seeds scoops up the pond water,</align>
<align="center">Her figure complementary in radiance to the lotus leaves.</align>

<align="center">The sage who cares for the chimeras dwells on the tree,</align>
<align="center">His glory <color=#dbc291ff>fading with</color> his numerous works.</align>

<align="center">The knowledgeable sage holds books in their hands,</align>
<align="center">Hoping to exhaust the laws of numbers with pen and ink.</align>

<align="center">The veneration sage offers their heart and body,</align>
<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>Using life</color> to explore the truth about love.</align>

<align="center">The sage who molds the flesh picks up the spear,</align>
<align="center">Fighting barbaric enemies till <color=#dbc291ff>they draw their last breath</color>.</align>

<align="center">The sage who feels art dances with the butterflies,</align>
<align="center">Insisting on using their senses to touch the world, to perceive.</align>

<align="center">And the sage who manipulates alchemy holds the fruit of wisdom,</align>
<align="center">Plotting to do sacrilege, and against the gods' throne they deceive.</align>

<align="center">羡得欢庆之神垂醉，</align>
<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>绕庭三度狂舞</color>，不得一处落席。</align>

<align="center">「你为我们献一首歌吧！」</align>

<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>「发西发西，唻哆西西！」</color></align>
<align="center">泰坦拨动风铃，欣然应允。</align>
E:
<align="center">At the climax of the symphony,</align>
<align="center">the sound of the strings plucks at the heart, and the melody is as sweet as honey.</align>
<align="center">The envy is so great that even the god of celebrations settles into indulgence,</align>
<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>taking to three, spiraling wild dances around the courtyard</color>, never holding to one place.</align>

<align="center">"Please perform a song for us!"</align>
<align="center">Thus, with great enthusiasm, the fae-like invites the divine.</align>
<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>"Fa-ti-fa-ti. Re-do-ti-ti!"</color></align>
<align="center">The Titan stirred the wind chimes and offered a cheerful assent.</align>

C: 生活物资需求征集 4月第一周 本周生活物资需求征集已开始。请有需求的工友们另附纸填写申请单，写明自己需要的生活物资，并投放在需求征集箱中。填写格式如下： 【姓 名】（此处填写自己的名字） 【需求物资】（此处填写你需要的物资） 【备 注】（此处填写你的需求细节） 【申请意见】（此处由矿队管理人员填写） 矿队管理人员会在本周周五将各位工友的申请单回收审核，批复申请意见后再重新粘贴至此处。请提出申请的工友在次周周一检查本通知，查看自己的申请是否通过。若申请通过，相关物资会于五个工作日内送至矿队管理人员办公室，届时请凭工作证领取物资。 *底下乱七八糟地贴着许多生活物资申请单* #1 【姓 名】 安德烈 【需求物资】 十字镐保养油 【备 注】 三瓶，最便宜的就行，牌子无所谓。 【申请意见】 批准。 #2 【姓 名】 奥尔加 【需求物资】 倍润矿脂 【备 注】 一瓶。这矿区实在干得很，受不了了。 【申请意见】 批准。大老爷们一个，还挺会保养。 #3 【姓 名】 穆夏 【需求物资】 牛奶 【备 注】 一打，最好是「哞哞」牌的。实在没有就算了，不要了。 【申请意见】 驳回。上面来的这个月物资里压根没有牛奶，上哪给你找去。你倒好，还开始挑牌子了。要不牵头牛给你自己挤？ #4 【姓 名】 史蒂夫 【需求物资】 饮料 【备 注】 我想喝点烈的。 【申请意见】 驳回。岩盐兑水还不够烈？ #5 【姓 名】 苏珊娜 【需求物资】 倍润矿脂 【备 注】 两瓶。 【申请意见】 批准。 #6 【姓 名】 阿列克斯 【需求物资】 贝洛伯格红肠 【备 注】 一箱。老样子，要蒜香味的。 【申请意见】 批准。偶尔也吃点其他的吧，自打来了矿区就没见过你吃红肠以外的东西。 #7 【姓 名】 阿尔乔姆 【需求物资】 矿毒清 【备 注】 两瓶。 【申请意见】 驳回。这个队里有，直接去和工头要吧。 #8 【姓 名】 瓦里安 【需求物资】 家用地髓暖炉 【备 注】  【申请意见】 驳回。自己去看生活守则，上面写了这玩意禁止在矿区里用。你这是嫌咱们爆破作业动静不够大是吧？

C:
……

且说那日府中，腾骁将军正自运筹推演，欲解步离围兵，却听得殿前一阵怪风，帘幕习习而动。

腾骁将军起身负手，向无人处道：「身为不期之客已是失礼，还要藏形匿影到什么时候？快快现身示人！」

一阵笑声在空殿中回荡不休，忽而虚空处一团无根碧火跳起，如一只幽幽鬼眼，盯着将军观瞧，情状极是骇异。

「闻得帝弓天将各有过人之处，今日得见将军状貌，果非虚言。

「吾未曾通报而登堂入室，请将军宽宥。但吾之来意，乃是助将军解围。

「步离人陈兵进逼，意在全歼罗浮。将军可用之兵寥寥，拒敌难如登天。」

这团碧火虽无口舌，却谈笑如人。它盘空进退，照亮殿陛深处幽暗。只见府中守卫们俱都面无表情，如堕梦中。

「阵前生死，凡人畏怖。但若被吾等岁阳凭附，便能不惧刀兵。破敌不过反掌事尔。」

「岁阳平白助我，必有求偿。我听闻帝弓曾以凡躯换得燧皇盟助，你索求之物，怕也是如此吧？」

「我『燎原』所欲者，正是阁下身为帝弓将军的身躯与情感。」碧火愈燃愈烈，身形较之前有百倍之大。「蛰伏千载，没有比这更能滋养吾等的血食祭物了！」

将军面不改色，示意燎原继续。

「今夜子时，我在绥园静候将军答复。院门有阴阳瓷瓶数只。若将军拒绝，便留下<color=#77ede5ff>青蓝瓷瓶</color>，<color=#dbc291ff>不令有损</color>。将<color=#eb4d3dff>朱红瓷瓶</color><color=#dbc291ff>尽数击碎</color>，代表将军力求血战。」

「如此一来，吾便知晓将军心意。此后将军若仍要见我，只需叩击门钹左三次，右三次。一次不可多，一次不可少。」

将军蹙眉叹息，「区区鬼蜮，竟敢夺人心魄，仿人行止。去吧，腾骁必定按时答复。」

……
E:
...

It is said that, in his mansion that day, General Teng Xiao was in deep thought, devising strategies and conducting simulations to break the encirclement of the borisin forces. Suddenly, a strange wind blew through the hall, causing the curtains to flutter.

General Teng Xiao stood up with his hands behind his back and spoke to the empty room. "It is impolite to be an uninvited guest, and even more so to hide in the shadows. Show yourself quickly!"

Laughter echoed through the empty hall and suddenly, a formless green flame appeared, resembling a ghostly eye, fixating its eerie gaze on the general.

"I've heard that each of the Reignbow's Arbiter-Generals possess exceptional abilities, and seeing you today confirm those rumors."

"I entered these halls without prior notice, and for that, I apologize. However, my purpose here is to assist you in breaking the encirclement."

"The borisin forces are closing in with the intention of completely annihilating the Luofu. Your troops are few, and resisting the enemy is as difficult as reaching the heavens."

Although the green flame had no mouth, it seemed to converse like a person. It hovered through the air, illuminating the dark corners of the hall. The guards in the hall stood expressionlessly, as if trapped in a dream.

"Facing life and death in battle, mortals tremble in fear. But if you allow us, the heliobi, to possess you, you'll have no fear of the blade or the enemy. Defeating them will be as easy as turning your hand."

"Your help freely offered must come with an exchange. I've heard that the Reignbow once exchanged their mortal body for aid from the Flint Emperor. I assume you have similar intentions?"

"I, Ignamar, seek nothing more than your body and emotions, General of the Reignbow." The jade flame burned brighter, growing to a size hundredfold bigger than before. "I have been dormant for a millennium, and there's no better corporeal offering for us than this!"

The general remained unfazed, signaling Ignamar to continue.

"At midnight tonight, I shall await your answer in Fyxestroll Garden. At the garden entrance, there will be several porcelain vases, some cerulean and some vermilion. If you refuse my offer, leave the <color=#77ede5ff>cerulean vases</color> pristine and <color=#dbc291ff>unharmed</color>. At the same time, with the <color=#eb4d3dff>vermilion vases</color>, you should <color=#dbc291ff>break them all</color> to indicate you accept my offer and wish for bloody battle."

"That is how I will be able to decipher your reply, general. After tonight, if you wish to meet me again, knock with the left door knocker three times, followed by the right knocker three times. No more, no less."

The general frowned and sighed, "A mere malevolent spirit dares to steal one's soul and mimic human behavior. Away, and I will respond in time."

C: 一张来自「蓝调的时刻」的宣传单，皱皱巴巴，似乎被许多人传看过。 传单上的情侣正凑在对方耳边亲昵低语，背景为航行在梦泡海中的「晖长石号」空艇。 黄昏，日落，街灯渐起 歌声不止，舞会不休 让我们逃离白日吧 一起跃入「{RUBY_B#蓝调}布鲁斯{RUBY_E#}之夜」
E: A flyer from the Blue Hour. It seems to have passed through many hands judging from how crumpled the paper is. On the flyer, an intimate couple is whispering sweet nothings to each other. The airship Radiant Feldspar sailing in the sea of a dream bubble is in the background. One by one, the streetlights click alight as the sun sets. Keep the song playing and don't let the party stop. Let's escape the day! And dive into the Night of {RUBY_B#Blues}Bruce{RUBY_E#}!

C: 编者按：本集由学者克瑞斯汇集整理，所收内容皆为树庭巨变之时的真实故事，经由瑟希斯神树保存。愿智慧与理性之光永驻。   永恒学院 多少个清晨，我们在慈爱之庭的石阶上背诵塞勒苏斯的教诲。晨露凝结在树叶上，滴落在我们的书页间。那时我总觉得，这些水珠里一定藏着智慧的火花，正如瑟希斯为每一个新生的思想凝结露水。 如今想来，那露水或许真的蕴含神性。否则，为何我们能在树庭度过如此漫长而美好的时光？为何即便是最愚钝的学子，也能在神树的庇护下渐渐开悟？   最后讲堂 那天原本是普通的一课。我们在逐星天井讨论赤陶学派与曳石学派的理念区别，争论究竟是感性先于理性，还是理性孕育感性。 突然有人喊道：「快看天上，那是什么？！」 所有人抬起头，看见群星在永夜中黯淡，仿佛被一层浓雾遮蔽。后来我们才知道，那是黑潮的先兆。 老师说：「…诸位，本学期的课程就此结束。愿你们记住，思考是最崇高的仪式。」 这是我在树庭听到的最后一课。   垂泪哀思 以下文字发现于净身室墙壁上 亲爱的母亲： 记得您说过，冰冷能让思维更清晰。现在我浸在这池水中，却只觉得麻木。 您离开那天，我没能见您最后一面。您随商队去奥赫玛，说要给我带回一本《论七情与三重爱》。黑潮来得太快了。 现在，我终于明白为何这里叫「垂泪净身室」。这池水不仅能洗净身体，更能洗去心中的悲伤。 我多希望能再尝一次您做的肉桂卷。 您的女儿 艾琳娜   临终絮语 记录源自一株垂死的仙女木 …那家伙说我们会死，但树木怎会畏惧死亡？我们的根系相连，记忆流淌。即便枝干腐朽，智慧的种子也会重生发芽。 我记得那些来来往往的学者，他们与我们对话，将我们视作智者。多么有趣，他们追求永恒的知识，却常常忘记生命本身的智慧。 黑潮侵蚀时，年轻的枝条最先枯萎。这让我想起瑟希斯教导的第一课：理性必须扎根于大地……   逃亡者的自白 我带着能带走的典籍逃离时，友爱之馆已被黑潮浸没大半。那些珍贵的手稿瞬间溶解，化作墨色的云朵。 一路上遇到许多同样在逃的学者。我们互相搀扶，分享仅存的口粮。感到恐惧时，便轮流讲述自己记得的典籍内容，生怕遗失了树庭的智慧。 最讽刺的是，正当我们逃离树庭时，脑中却不断浮现塞勒苏斯在《论巡礼》中的警句：「追赶群星时亦要留心脚下。」 或许这就是命运的玩笑。我们追逐知识至此，却在仓皇逃命时才真正理解了先贤的教诲。   最后的祷词 发现于一具遗骸旁的石板 伟大的瑟希斯啊，您教导我们理性与智慧， 却未曾提及死亡的恐惧。 当黑潮吞噬您的根系，我看见您枝干上的最后一片叶子，仍在努力舒展，向上生长。 若这就是终末，愿我如您般坚韧，直到最后一刻仍在思考。   编后记： 在整理这些内容时，我常常泪流不止。每一滴泪水落在纸上，都会晕开成一小片墨迹，仿佛那些逝去的生命在诉说他们未完的故事。 但我想，这便是瑟希斯留给我们最后的启示：即便在至暗时刻，理性的火种也永不熄灭。若有来者读到此集，愿你记住，树庭不仅是供千万学者求学的地方，这里更是大家理想与信念的见证。我们虽然倒下了，但我们的理想与信念长存于此，永不泯灭。
E: Editor: This collection was compiled by Kyros the scholar. All stories contained are true stories that occurred during the time of great change in the Grove and are preserved by the sacred tree of Cerces. May the light of intellect and reason shine on forevermore The School of Eternity For countless mornings we would recite the teachings of Thalesus on the stone steps of the Courtyard of Storge. As the morning dew condensed on the leaves above us, it would drip onto the pages of our books. I always believed back then that these water droplets must contain the sparks of wisdom, just as Cerces condenses every new thought into nourishing dew. Thinking back now, perhaps that dew really did contain some form of divinity. How else could we have enjoyed such wonderful moments inside the Grove for so long? How else would even the dullest of students have been able to gradually achieve enlightenment within it? The Final Lecture The lesson that day was meant to be like any other. We were discussing the differences between the ideals of Erythrokeramism and Helkolithism at the Star-Chase Atrium, to debate whether sensory knowledge supersedes reason or whether reason births sensory knowledge. Suddenly, someone shouted out: "Look! Up in the sky! What is that!?" We raised our heads to see that the stars in the sky had dimmed as if they were eclipsed by a layer of fog. Only later did we learn that this was the portent of the black tide's coming. The teacher calmly responded: "...Everyone, we shall terminate our teachings for this semester here. I hope that you will all remember that thought is the most noble form of ritual." That was the final lesson that I received within the Grove. Tears and Grief The following words were discovered on the wall of the Chamber of Purifying Tears Dearest mother: I remember that you once told me that the cold can clear our minds. Now, immersed in the cold of this pool, all I feel is numb. I never got to see you on the day that you left us. You followed the caravans to Okhema and said you would bring me back a copy of On the Seven Emotions and Three Forms of Love. But the black tide came too quickly. Now, I finally understand why this place is called "the Chamber of Purifying Tears." This pool is not only purifying my body, it is also washing away the sadness in my heart. Oh, how I wish I could taste your cinnamon rolls just one more time. Your daughter, Elina. Dying Ramblings Recorded from a dying White Dryad ...They said that we would die, but how could a tree fear death? Our root systems are connected and our memories flow between us. Even if our branches dry and rot, the seeds of intellect will sprout again. I remember the scholars who would come and go through this land. They would speak to us and see us as beings of wisdom. It was fascinating. They forget the wisdom of life itself in their pursuit of eternal knowledge. When the black tide breaks us down, it is the youngest branches that wither first. This reminds me of the first lesson of Cerces: Reason must be rooted in the earth... Confessions of a Fugitive As I escaped with all of the books I could carry, the Library of Philia had already been mostly overrun by the black tide. Those precious manuscripts dissipated into a cloud of black smoke in an instant. I came across many other scholars who were trying to escape along my way. We supported each other and shared what rations we had remaining. When we were overwhelmed with fear, we would take turns reciting the content of the works we could remember, so we wouldn't lose the wisdom of the Grove. As we were running away from the Grove, it was with uttermost irony that we kept remembering the warning Thalesus shared in Regarding Pilgrimages: "When you are chasing after the stars, make sure to pay attention to what lies underfoot." Perhaps this is some kind of cruel joke of fate. Though we have come to this place to pursue knowledge, it is only when we are running for our lives that we finally come to understand the teachings of the sages that came before us. Final Prayer A slate discovered next to a corpse Oh, great Cerces! You have taught us reason and intellect, but never the terror of death. As the black tide devoured your roots, I saw the final leaf on your branches still trying to stretch out and reach towards the skies. If this is truly the end, please grant me your tenacity and allow me to think until my final moment. Editor's Afterword: As I was compiling these stories, I often found myself unable to stop crying. As each tear fell onto the paper below, it would cause the ink to spread into a small pool. It was as if those who had passed were still trying to tell me their unfinished stories. However, I think that this is the final epiphany that Cerces has left us: That even in the darkest of times, the Coreflame of Reason will never be extinguished. If you are reading this in the distant future, please remember: The Grove was not merely a place that imparted knowledge to countless scholars, it is also a symbol of our ideals and beliefs. Though we have fallen, our ideals and faith will always remain here, never to be extinguished.

C:
你好，旅人。恭喜你，既然三次破解了谜题，想必你一定具备我所寻求的特质——欧洛尼斯认可的智慧与坚韧、富有冒险精神，以及最为重要的——是个活人。

可能你已经猜到了，所谓真正的宝物，便是不受岁月阻隔之物。于我，便是这份特殊的情谊。

自从我对灵魂的研究受阻，被教会当成异端驱赶出城，路途中遇到的这只若虫就变成了我唯一的谈话对象。我们一同历经千辛，来到这亡者的古城，一待便是数十个光历年。

如今我寿数将近，却突然对岁月的教导有了新的体悟——我布下这谜题，为我一生的积蓄能够被斯人识见，由此传承下去。而仍存挂念的，便是我这位超脱岁月桎梏的若虫伙伴——

不，我并非担心伙伴的安危，而是为很快将要无人供它解闷而忧虑。依我对它的了解，再过许久，它怕是会闲到操纵殿内的铁球横冲直撞——这可能是我夸张了，但还请理解，伙伴它就是有如此程度的顽皮。

或许…你已经被它撞过了？请原谅它吧。

不知您可否抽空将它带离此地，不管随您一同冒险，或是让它与其他若虫伙伴团聚——至少别让它再滋扰此地的亡者们，确实有些冒犯了。

当然，我深知提出此种要求实属无理，所以——如何决断全仰仗于您。愿您，与岁月长久同行。

附言：那只虫子总说「连你这个『冒牌祭司』都能学会祷言，那欧洛尼斯的神力也没什么了不起的」。这算是我的额外请求——烦请您为它讲解，欧洛尼斯祷言究竟是多么精妙的技巧！
E:
Greetings, traveler. Congratulations on solving the puzzle three times — you must possess the qualities I seek: Wisdom and resilience recognized by Oronyx, an adventurous spirit, and most importantly — being alive.

Perhaps you've already guessed it, but the real treasure is something beyond the reach of time. To me, it is this unique bond.

Since my soul research was interrupted and I was driven from the city as a heretic by the church, this nymph I met on my journey has become my sole companion. We have endured many hardships, journeying together to this ancient city of the dead, and have remained here for many Light Calendar years.

As my time comes to a close, I've gained new insights into the teachings of time. I set up this puzzle so that my life's accumulated knowledge could be seen by someone and passed on after I'm gone. What still troubles me is my eternal nymph companion—

No, I'm not worried about its safety, but about the fact that soon, no one will entertain it anymore. Based on my understanding of it, it will likely resort to playing with the iron balls in the hall, causing a ruckus. Perhaps I exaggerate, but please understand, it is quite mischievous.

Perhaps... it has already collided with you? Please forgive it.

I wonder if you might take it from here, whether on your travels or reuniting it with other nymph companions — just please don't allow it to disturb the spirits of the dead here anymore. It has been quite disrespectful.

Of course, I understand that this is an unreasonable request, so — how you choose to act is entirely up to you. May you walk with time for many years to come.

Notes: That insect keeps saying, "If even you, a 'fake priest,' can learn prayers, then Oronyx' divine power is nothing special." This is my extra request — please explain to it just how skilled one must be to master Oronyx's Prayers!

C:
致{NICKNAME}阁下：
 
<align="center">我曾为世界的变迭穿针引线，试图编织美好的命运，</align>
<align="center">我们孤独逐火，直到灰白的光自天外降临；</align>
 
<align="center">如今，我难得放下沉重的织机，为自己裁衣，</align>
<align="center">而你们却又将启程，渐远的行迹让丝线也无法追及。</align>
 
<align="center">赠你的饰品并未倾注神性，由我亲手穿制，贴身珍藏；</align>
<align="center">因我并不想让它变得沉重，而是如一片羽毛停在你的手腕，</align>
<align="center">点缀你的身体，衬映你的魂灵。</align>
 
<align="center">即便是我，也看不见你将踏上的未来，但我会为你祝祈——</align>
<align="center">「开拓」为宇宙带来交织如丝弦的星轨，</align>
<align="center">愿那些银色丝弦，为你引路，因你嗡鸣。</align>
 
 
<align="right">阿格莱雅</align>
E:
Dear {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME},

<align="center">I once threaded needles through the world's changes, trying to weave a beautiful destiny.</align>
<align="center">We chased the flames in solitude, until the ashen light descended from beyond the sky.</align>

<align="center">Now, I rarely set aside my heavy loom to weave for myself,</align>
<align="center">yet you are about to depart, your fading traces beyond even the reach of silk threads.</align>

<align="center">The ornament I gifted you bears no divine essence. It was handcrafted by me, something I had cherished and carried everywhere.</align>
<align="center">For I wished not to make it weighty, but rather like a feather resting on your wrist,</align>
<align="center">adorning your form, illuminating your soul.</align>

<align="center">Even I cannot see the future you will step into, I shall pray for you.</align>
<align="center">The Trailblaze weaves star rails that intertwine like silk strings for this universe.</align>
<align="center">May those silver strings guide your way and resonate for you.</align>


<align="right">Aglaea</align>

C:
致{NICKNAME}：
 
<align="center">我愿与你争锋于苍穹之上，但仍需肩负苍穹之下的使命，</align>
<align="center">因为即使战火止息，和平的道路仍需有人引领。</align>
 
<align="center">救世的恩义难以言表，我唯能奉上酒杯，</align>
<align="center">与你欢饮这鲜红的石榴蜜酿，</align>
<align="center">贺祝此世的胜利，遥敬星空的征途。</align>
 
<align="center">你的远征必有群狼环伺，毒蛇匿影，</align>
<align="center">若你需要纷争的怒火，我便将我的悬锋，连同血骨一齐奉上，</align>
<align="center">伴你行疆拓域，助你常战常胜。</align>
 
<align="center">当你凯旋之日，我将再度为你举杯。</align>
<align="right">迈德漠斯</align>
E:
To {NICKNAME}:

<align="center">I yearn to clash with you in the heavens above, yet I must still bear the duty that lies beneath,</align>
<align="center">for even when the flames of war subside, someone must lead the way to peace.</align>

<align="center">Words cannot express my gratitude for your salvation,</align>
<align="center">and I'd only raise this cup of crimson pomegranate honey brew,</align>
<align="center">to toast to our victory in this life, and our journey through the stars.</align>

<align="center">Your expedition will be surrounded by wolves and lurking vipers.</align>
<align="center">If you need the flames of Strife, I shall offer you my Kremnos, along with my blood and bones.</align>
<align="center">They'll accompany your conquest and aid in your endless victories.</align>

<align="center">When you return triumphant, I shall raise my glass to you once again.</align>
<align="right">Mydeimos</align>

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 雪衣大人在执行任务期间撞上了一个神秘的组织。他们将宝箱藏进魔方之中，再将魔方放置在路边，随后趁着没人注意悄悄离开…这伙人是否在做着什么不可告人的事情吗，或许只是误会？雪衣希望能听听你的看法——

Is this group of people up to no good, or is it just a misunderstanding? Xueyi hopes to hear what you think...

C: <color=#f29e38ff>真理医生</color>提出的问题很有挑战性…当然，若按照<color=#f29e38ff>阮•梅</color>女士的实验设计来的话，应该是十分合理的，再加之<color=#f29e38ff>托帕</color>小姐雇佣了专业的团队整理数据——就算是世界级课题也不在话下了吧。

C: 最适合填写歌词的作词人是谁？
E: Who is the best songwriter to write lyrics?

C:
星穹列车的历代领航员中，「晶石」朵莉可与你是同一类人。

根据列车记录，朵莉可是来自提亚芙的音乐家。
她听闻阿基维利的事迹，欣然登上列车，希望穿越星海为「开拓」谱写新的诗篇。
人们喜欢朵莉可有如晶石般清澈高雅的嗓音，不少搭车客为了倾听她的诗歌而登上列车。
据说，阿基维利也曾回到列车驻足聆听，并与朵莉可促膝长谈。
某日，于列车行驶途中，无名客们不言自明地感知到了「开拓」的陨落。也在那一刻，朵莉可出现了不可逆的结晶化异象。
在三日不绝的歌声后，她将领航员的身份交予他人，自己永远留在了星空下。
E:
Among all the past Navigators in the Astral Express, Dolly, AKA the "Crystal," and you belong to the same category.

According to the Express records, Dolly was a musician from Tiafoe.
After hearing about the exploits of Akivili, she gladly boarded the Express, hoping to travel across the starry seas to write a ballad for the "Trailblaze."
Many passengers loved Dolly's crystal-clear and elegant voice and boarded the Express just to listen to her ballad.
It was said that Akivili had also returned to the Express and stopped to listen to her ballad. They had a long talk with Dolly after that.
One day, while the Express was moving, the Nameless all sensed the fall of the Trailblaze. It was also from that moment that Dolly started her irreversible anomalous crystallization.
After three days of continuous singing, she handed over the Navigator's role and remained under the stars forever.

C: 首领幻影受到的伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破</color>后，行动额外延后，受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 提高效果抵抗或使用技能解除冻结状态。消灭召唤物可以降低首领幻影控制我方角色的频率。
E: Increase Effect RES or use abilities to dispel Freeze. Defeat summons to reduce the frequency of Boss Mirage Crowd controlling allies.

E: How to gain "Blood Surge" and quickly enter "Lunar Devourer" state

C: 所有敌方单位受到的伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，并在处于【课堂频道】状态时拥有<color=#f29e38ff><u>切换计数</u></color>。当首领幻影被<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破</color>后，受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。

After Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is Broken</color>, the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 将军景元的侍卫，不过总角之年的御剑天才。出现于此的是你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: General Jing Yuan's retainer. A gifted swordsman who hasn't even come of age. This entity is a phantom borne from your memories.

C: 犯尽十恶，永镇于幽狱之底的步离人首领。\n身负七百年苦狱仇恨，在脱出牢笼后，群狼之主向整个罗浮仙舟发起了挑战。但潜藏在疯狂之举的背后，似乎另有目标……
E: A borisin leader who committed the Ten Unpardonable Sins, eternally imprisoned at the bottom of The Shackling Prison.\nBearing the hatred of seven centuries of bitter confinement, the Lord of Wolves challenges the entire Xianzhou Luofu upon breaking free from his cage. Yet, there seems to be another objective hidden behind his maddened actions...

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为原本是搭载了谐乐学院教材的「十七分熟」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。舞台上的蕉燥之心酝酿炽焰的蕉响乐，誓要将不听从蕉诲的坏猴生烤为蕉碳。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referenced entity is a Beyond Overcooked loaded with the Charmony Academy syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. The banaxious heart on stage brews a banaphony of flames, vowing to barbeque bad banastudents who don't listen to banadvice to charbanas.

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。\n哀苦的回忆如炽焰灼心，当苦难褪去，怨恨化作的生命便会于灰烬中诞生，积聚无穷的盛怒。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.\nMemories of anguish burn like flames, scorching the heart. When the suffering fades away, the life born from resentment will rise from the ashes, accumulating boundless fury.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，能承载泰坦灵魂的强大造物。以巨剑抵挡黑潮的侵袭，亦会用巨剑带来战争的侵袭。\n天谴先锋会献祭弱小的眷属，以此暴行换得泰坦的天罚。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referenced entity is a Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are mighty constructs capable of housing a Titan's soul. With their greatswords, they stand ready to repel the rush of the black tide or turn their blade in a countering onslaught in times of war.\nFuriae Praetor will sacrifice their weaker kin, exchanging atrocity for divine punishments from the Titan.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为由星核力量幻造而成的虚影，执行着令裂界不断扩张的意志。\n智慧生命的欲求在裂界中投影形成的活体能量，犹如一颗沙砾在蚌壳中凝成了珠贝。这股力量四处徘徊，漫无目的，直到感受到其主的意志才会听令行事。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a shadow manifested by the power of Stellaron, carrying out the Fragmentum's unceasing will to expand.\nA physical manifestation of the desires of intelligent life in the Fragmentum, like a pearl created from a single grain of sand. This force wanders around aimlessly, acting only when executing the will of its master.

C: 死亡之后遭遇裂界侵蚀的躯壳残骸，其生命体征虽发生改变，但依然在执行抹消的指令。\n虚卒•抹消者会对命中的敌人添加标记，使其在攻击中受到额外的伤害。
E: Bodies that continued to be corroded by the Fragmentum after death. While their vital signs have changed, they continue to carry out their orders to eliminate.\nVoidranger: Eliminators will mark enemies they hit, causing them to take extra damage when attacked.

E: Vagrant

E: Deals minor Fire DMG to a single target, with a chance to Weaken them.

E: Increases DEF. Toughness cannot be reduced.

E: Regenerates Energy for a target. This ability can only be used while under the Surprise Channel state.

E: Switches the "Off-Class Channel" state to the "Classroom Channel" state.

E: Advances all targets' actions. This ability can only be used while under the "Rabid" state.

E: Deals Fire DMG to a single target.

E: Deals minor Fire DMG to a single target.

C: 使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害。若没有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」则本技能施放失败。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Makes all Echoes of Faded Dreams that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to a single target. If there are no Echoes of Faded Dreams that can take action, then this ability will fail to launch. After using this ability, restore Toughness for Echoes of Faded Dreams.

C: 使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害。若没有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」则本技能施放失败。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Makes all Echoes of Faded Dreams that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to a single target. If there are no Echoes of Faded Dreams that can take action, then this ability will fail to launch. After using this ability, restore Toughness for Echoes of Faded Dreams.

C: 对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害，并使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets, and makes all Echoes of Faded Dreams that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to all targets. After using this ability, restores Toughness for Echoes of Faded Dreams.

C: 吸收剩余的【征服或被征服】强化【蛮神，疯王，纷争的化身】，同时添加韧性保护并解除【蛮神，疯王，纷争的化身】身上的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态。
E: Absorbs remaining "Conquer or Be Conquered" to enhance "Savage God, Mad King, Incarnation of Strife." At the same time, adds Toughness Protection and dispels Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Break debuffs on "Savage God, Mad King, Incarnation of Strife."

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动施放【怒，焚晨昏日星】。为自身附加【<u>氦闪</u>】，并召唤【阳雷之鸦】。此状态下，我方施放攻击后，将根据本次攻击击中的敌方目标数量降低【<u>氦闪</u>】。
E: Enters a Charging state and uses "Fury, Incineration of Dawn and Dusk" with the next action. Applies "<u>Helium Flash</u>" to this unit and summons "Daythunder Raven." When in this state, after a target uses an attack, reduces "<u>Helium Flash</u>" based on the number of friendly units hit in this attack.

C: 对我方全体造成雷属性伤害，并消耗一定数量【<u>雷云</u>】。对随机我方目标造成对应次数的少量雷属性伤害，并<u>修复</u>【百眼之末】和【百眼之梢】。之后根据我方争夺的雷云数对自身造成对应次数的少量雷属性附加伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to all targets and consumes a certain amount "<u>Thundercloud(s)</u>." Deals a corresponding amount of minor Lightning DMG to random target and <u>reinstates</u> "Shoot of Hundred Eyes" and "Twig of Hundred Eyes." Afterward, deals a corresponding amount of minor Lightning Additional DMG to this unit based on the contested Thunderclouds between the targets and this unit.

C: 进入【暗潮将至】状态，下次行动施放【烬灰死寂•诸神屠灭】，并<u>修复</u>【枯槁的筛骨】和【干涸的泪骨】。
E: Enters "The Dark Tides Cometh" state. Uses "Unmaking Ashes: Godsfall" in the next action, and <u>reinstates</u> the "Languid Ethmoid Bone" and "Dried Lacrimal Bone".

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 对我方全体目标造成物理属性伤害，被击中目标降低生命值的一部分转化为<u>【侵蚀】</u>。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets. Converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to "<u>Corrosion</u>."

C: 对我方2个目标造成少量量子属性伤害，将目标行动提前并解除其控制状态。同时对目标施加<u>【二律背反】</u>效果。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to 2 targets, advances their actions, and dispels control states on them. Additionally, applies the <u>"Antinomy"</u> effect on them.

C: 受到致命攻击时，对敌方全体造成冰属性伤害。
E: When receiving a killing blow, deals Ice DMG to all friendly units.

C: 受到我方单位的攻击后，若【旋绕】层数不为0，则施放【扭矩反打】并失去1层【旋绕】。任意目标回合每个我方单位只能触发一次该效果，【旋绕】层数为0时解除蓄力状态。
E: After being hit by attacks from target units, if the "Whirl" stack is not 0, uses "Torque Counter" and loses 1 stack of "Whirl." During any unit's turn, each target unit can only trigger this effect once. When the "Whirl" stack reaches 0, the Charging state is dispelled.

C: 自身攻击后叠加1层【过热】，【过热】达到<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>层时消耗自身大量生命值并移除【过热】。消灭我方目标时移除【过热】。
E: After attacking, gains a stack of Overheat. When Overheat reaches <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s), consumes a massive amount of this unit's own HP and removes Overheat. Defeating a target will also remove Overheat.

C: 对指定我方单体造成伤害，并使受到攻击的我方目标行动延后。
E: Deals DMG to a single target and delays their action.

C: 解除场上所有真蛰虫群的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，并对我方目标造成风属性伤害，使我方目标每次受到攻击时大概率陷入1层风化状态。
E: Dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Breaks affecting True Stings. Deals Wind DMG to the target, and causes the target to have a high chance of being inflicted with 1 stack of Wind Shear every time they get attacked.

C: 召唤【「所有或一无所有」】并使我方全体进入赌局，每个【「所有或一无所有」】每次受到攻击时会使进行攻击的我方目标获得1个随机1到6的点数，并在生命值降为1后获得【<u>时来</u>】效果，首个【「所有或一无所有」】每次受到攻击时会使赌局的赔率翻倍。下次诡弈砂金行动时，点数低于诡弈砂金的我方目标视为输掉赌局并受到攻击；点数高于诡弈砂金的我方目标视为赢得赌局且终结技被激活。
E: Summons "All or Nothing" and makes all targets enter the gamble. Every time an "All or Nothing" is attacked, the target that launched the attack will receive a random number between 1 and 6. When HP is reduced to 1, gains <u>Influx of Fortuity</u>. Each time the first "All or Nothing" is attacked, doubles the odds of the Gamble. The next time "Aventurine of Stratagems" takes a turn, targets with numbers lower than "Aventurine of Stratagems" are considered to have lost the bet and will be attacked, while targets with numbers higher than "Aventurine of Stratagems" are considered to have won the bet and will have their Ultimates activated.

C: 七百年前的自动机兵流水线，贝洛伯格重工业最重要的组成部分之一——这些产业与技术早已被众人遗忘。
E: Seven hundred years ago, the automaton assembly lines were an essential part of Belobog's heavy industry — industries and technologies that have long been forgotten by the people.

C: 为了筹办星天演武仪典，罗浮仙舟将一艘军用巨舰加以改造，作为守擂争锋之地。
E: To prepare for the Luminary Wardance, the Xianzhou Luofu has transformed a military battleship into the venue for the competition.

C: 「血肉孱弱，而我心坚如辉石。若非如此，则『存护』之道无以立足。」 ——「钻石」，星际和平公司•战略投资部部门主管，P47级 公司部门山头林立，而「战略投资部」在其中负责眼界，他们的投资从不拘泥于短期回报，往往以数十甚至数百琥珀纪为周期，以完全的星系掌控为结果。尽管在纳努克与星核的连番打击下，部门的多笔投资沦为坏账，但现任主管「钻石」上台后，战略投资部却达成了诸多令星海瞩目的业绩—— 消除伽伦德星区的虫灾，完成新生态圈的商业化运行； 在星核事件后，对戈尔康达矿业世界联合体注资，为公司的筑材运输贸易带来新矿源； 重新回收失联世界雅利洛-VI，并注资其复兴工程； 与流光忆庭达成合作，进行对死灭世界忆质的打捞计划； …… 所有这些事件的背后，名为「石心十人」的团队异常活跃。这一岗位在公司内的正式名称是「不良资产清算专家」，是一支直属「钻石」的精英团队。其成员出身各异，职责也各不相同，甚至有多人轮替的记录。唯一的共性是他们均受「钻石」本人拔擢，并被授予了名为「基石」的身份凭证。 一些可信度较高的信息源显示，「石心十人」曾在某些场合展现过不可思议的「存护」伟力。尽管无法求证这种力量是来源于成员本人，还是他们持有的基石，但「钻石」作为公司少数被证实的「存护」令使，其能力很有可能与之相关。 「战略投资部」与「市场开拓部」的纠葛往事在公司内部早已不是秘密，人们称「石心十人」实为钻石的私兵，但也有人称他们只是纯粹的「存护」信徒，甚至认为他们「挖走自己的心，换上了克里珀的石头」。「石心十人」究竟效忠于谁？这暂时是个无法回答的问题。
E: "Mortal flesh is fragile, yet my heart is unyielding like the monolith. For without this resolve, the Way of Preservation would fade into oblivion." — Diamond, Rank P47, Director of the Strategic Investment Department, Interastral Peace Corporation Among the myriad IPC departments, the Strategic Investment Department is responsible for being visionaries. Their investments are never obsessed with short-term returns — They often operate investment rounds stretching across dozens or even hundreds of Amber Eras per round, and their goal is nothing less than total control of an entire star system. Though many investments made by the department were turned into bad debts due to the continuous setbacks caused by Nanook and Stellarons, the Strategic Investment Department have attained multiple stunning achievements ever since the current director "Diamond" took over — Eradicating the Swarm infestation in the Gallante sector and completing the commercialization of the new ecosphere. Conducting capital injection to the Golcondar Mining World Consortium following the Stellaron incident, securing fresh sources of minerals for IPC's construction materials logistics trade. Reclaiming the lost world Jarilo-VI and investing in its revitalization project. Cooperating with the Garden of Recollection to salvage the memoria in deadworlds. ... Behind all these events, the team named "The Ten Stonehearts" played a prominent role. Officially known as Non-Performing Asset Liquidation Specialists in the IPC, they are an elite team under Diamond's direct management. Its ever-changing list of members comes from a diverse range of backgrounds and holds a wide variety of responsibilities. The only thing they have in common is how they were all personally promoted to the role by Diamond and were granted a credential of their identity, known as the Cornerstone. Some credible sources suggest that the Ten Stonehearts have demonstrated on certain occasions unbelievable might that could be related to Preservation. Whether this power originates from the members themselves or the Cornerstones they possess remains uncertain. However, since Diamond is one of the few confirmed Emanators of Preservation within the IPC, this power is likely related to that fact. The troubled past between the Strategic Investment Department and the Marketing Development Department has long ceased to be a secret within the IPC. Some claim that the Ten Stonehearts are actually Diamond's private soldiers, while others believe they are purely followers of Preservation, even going so far as to say "they have carved out their own hearts and replaced it with Qlipoth's stone." The true allegiance of the Ten Stonehearts remains a mystery for now.

C: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯是被隐藏于深空之中的未知星域。它与外界隔绝，难以被观测或触及——寻常的星际航行难以察觉其存在，更遑论经过和到达。\n\n「开拓」阿基维利曾行遍诸界，开疆拓野，将无数的世界连接起来。对于祂的追随者们，探索银河深处的未知边界是至关紧要的使命。借助流光忆庭的特殊技术「忆庭之镜」，星穹列车成功抵达翁法罗斯，开启「开拓」之旅，并尽可能揭明三重命途的真相。
E: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land is a segmentum hidden deep in the cosmos. It is severed from the outside and is difficult for anyone to detect or encounter. Standard interstellar navigation can barely perceive its existence, let alone pass through or arrive at the world itself.\n\nAkivili the Trailblaze had traversed myriad worlds, pioneered into unknown lands, and connected countless worlds. For THEIR followers, exploring the edge of the unknown in the depths of the Cosmos is their paramount duty. Using the special technology from the Garden, "Garden of Recollection's Mirror," the Astral Express will arrive at Amphoreus for the first time to initiate their trailblazing journey and tries their best to reveal the truth behind the Three Paths.

C:
现今银河普遍使用的计时历法，由星际和平公司制定并推行。琥珀纪以「存护」星神的推定诞生时为元纪，以克里珀每次挥锤敲击为新一纪的启始。

由于克里珀挥锤的间隔不定，每一琥珀纪的长度存在较大浮动。以开拓历换算，1琥珀纪约为<unbreak>76</unbreak>～<unbreak>240</unbreak>年不等。

星穹列车重新起航时值琥珀<unbreak>2157</unbreak>纪。
E:
The calendar commonly used in the cosmos, created and promoted by the Interastral Peace Corporation. The Amber Era started at the estimated birth of Qlipoth as the Aeon of Preservation, and initiates a new Era every time Qlipoth swings their hammer during construction.

As Qlipoth swings their hammer at unpredictable intervals, the duration of every Amber Era varies significantly. The length of one Amber Era has been anywhere between <unbreak>76</unbreak> to <unbreak>240</unbreak> Trailblaze Years when converted.

The Astral Express restarted its journey on <unbreak>2157</unbreak> Amber Era (AE).

E: HooH the Equilibrium

E: Pathstrider (Phenomenon)
