E: I drew the winning tile myself

C: 「在睡城，他们不会把我跳的每一支舞都当作商品。我喜欢这里。」
E: "In Slumbertown, they don't treat my dances as a 'product.' I like it here."

C: 「我当然知道我赢不了——但赢也从来不是我的目标。尽心尽力地给其他选手添乱才是我的欢愉来源！」
E: "I know I can't win... but winning has never been my goal. The source of my joy is to cause as much trouble as I can for the other contestants!"

C: 故事告一段落后，回到帮少年解围之处
E: After everything has concluded, return to where you helped out the youth

C: 完成「好人难寻」，记录蒂索克二世的故事
E: Complete "Goodness Is Rare" and record Tizocic II's story

C: 通过「窥梦电话」窥探任意角色的梦境
E: Peek into anyone's Dreamscape via Dreampeek Call

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 你在大地兽背上被丹恒叫醒，奥赫玛正遭受纷争眷属的袭击。你与丹恒加入到保卫圣城的战斗中。
E: You woke up on the back of a dromas to Dan Heng's call. Okhema was under attack by Strife Titankins. You joined Dan Heng in the battle to defend the holy city.

C: 万敌发动「纷争」权能，以血晶汇聚成巨大的标枪，将盗火行者及其分身尽数摧没。自尼卡多利死后，悬锋城见证新神登基。
E: Mydei unleashed the power of Strife, gathering blood crystals to form a massive spear that obliterated the Flame Reaver and all their duplicates. After Nikador's death, Castrum Kremnos beheld the ascension of a new god.

C: 昏迷的艾丝妲自半空中出现并坠落，你将其轻轻接住。与此同时，灵火穿墙逃窜。
E: Asta appeared midair, unconscious, and falling. You caught her gently in your arms. At the same time, the Phase Flame slipped through the wall and vanished.

C: 你深入禁闭舱段，调查自破碎容器中流出的培养液。硕大的碎星王虫出现在你身后，你挥动球棒反击。
E: You delved into the seclusion zone to investigate the culture medium leaking from a shattered vessel. A colossal Starcrusher Swarm King emerged behind you, and you raised your bat in response.

C: 落单的狼卒急欲逃脱，彦卿催动飞剑追击。一位手持重剑的少女出手击倒狼卒，随后捡拾彦卿的飞剑，扬长而去。
E: As the lone Wolftrooper tried to flee, Yanqing sent his Flying Swords after it. A girl wielding a heavy greatsword intervened, cutting down the Wolftrooper in one blow. She picked up Yanqing's swords and walked away, leaving no explanation behind.

C: 与赤月对抗的飞霄欲离开竞锋舰，对周围人发动无差别攻击。彦卿、云璃和三月七被迫与飞霄缠斗。
E: Feixiao, still resisting the Crimson Moon's influence, attempted to leave the Skysplitter while unleashing indiscriminate attacks on everyone nearby. Yanqing, Yunli, and March 7th were forced to clash with her in a fierce struggle.

C: 电梯门打开的瞬间，反物质军团的虚卒向卡芙卡发动突袭。卡芙卡果断扣下扳机，进入战斗。
E: As the elevator doors slid open, a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion ambushed Kafka. Without hesitation, Kafka pulled the trigger and engaged in battle.

C: 卡芙卡温柔地端详你的脸。银狼保证，你至少会记得卡芙卡。卡芙卡将星核按进你的胸口，轻声呼唤：「该起床了。」
E: Kafka studied your face with tenderness. Silver Wolf assured that you would remember Kafka, if nothing else. Pressing the Stellaron against your chest, Kafka whispered gently: "Time to get up."

C: 三月七与自称「鼹鼠党」的孩子们玩捉迷藏，被捉到的孩子要把秘密全部说出来。<color=#f29e38ff>虎克</color>邀请你加入游戏，和三月七一起负责捉人。
E: March 7th played hide-and-seek with a group of children calling themselves The Moles. According to their rules, anyone caught had to spill all their secrets. <color=#f29e38ff>Hook</color> invited you to join in and help March 7th as a seeker.

C: 杰帕德将会率领铁卫坚守前线，为你们在北方裂界中的探索争取时间。只要你们做好准备，杰帕德就会打开隔绝怪物的大门。
E: Gepard swore to hold the front with his Silvermane Guards, buying you precious time to explore the Fragmentum to the north. As soon as you were ready, he would open the gate and keep the monsters at bay.

C: 你在资料室遇见三月七和丹恒。三月七与你们约好，待会儿一起投反对票，她不想听卡芙卡的指示。
E: You ran into March 7th and Dan Heng in the Archives. March 7th agreed with you in casting a "nay" vote later. She didn't want to follow Kafka's orders.

C: 花火出现，承认自己是电视上的知更鸟「替身」，并坦白自己当初要砂金去找的「哑巴」并不一定是知更鸟。砂金由此确信自己走在正确的方向上，当下只缺少揭露真相的方法，以及真相背后的意义。花火将<color=#f29e38ff>「相互保证毁灭」</color>按钮送给砂金，当走投无路时，就按下它。
E: Sparkle appeared, and admitted that she appeared on TV as Robin's "substitute," and the "mute" she made Aventurine look for was not necessarily Robin. Aventurine believed that he was headed in the right direction, and only lacked a method to unravel the truth and the purpose behind it. Sparkle then gave him the <color=#f29e38ff>Mutually Assured Destruction</color> button. When he was at wit's end, just press it.

C: 窃贼认输求饶。卢卡得意地庆祝：「熔锤出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军，再次维护了公正跟和平！」
E: The thief surrendered and begged for mercy. Luka proudly declared, "The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion, upholding justice and peace once again!"

C: 你们被禁区铁卫阻拦。希露瓦称自己为检修设备而来，同行者皆为她的助手，成功蒙混过关。
E: The Silvermane Guards halted your advance at the restricted zone. Serval claimed she was there for routine maintenance, and that you were all her assistants. The ruse worked, you slipped through undetected.

C: 你接近可可利亚的残影，觉得她与先前所见的状态不太一样。残影向你们发动攻击，兀自重复着：「侵入者…不得…接近…星核！」
E: When you drew near to Cocolia's afterimage, you felt she was different from before. She attacked you, repeating: "Intruders... must not... approach... the Stellaron!"

C: 你在车厢内寻找三月七的踪影，在整理好行李后，你们一同步入匹诺康尼，开启新的旅程。
E: You searched for March 7th's whereabouts in the car. After getting your luggage ready, you all entered Penacony and began a new journey.

C: 流萤与你谈论不断浮现的文字。你觉得自己好像在哪听到过「米哈伊尔」，流萤则从中感受到迷茫、畏惧、悲伤以及视死如归的决心。
E: Firefly discussed the floating text that kept appearing with you. You felt like you heard of Mikhail from somewhere, and Firefly gleaned confusion, fear, sorrow, and a determination to view death without dread.

C: 你与姬子讨论砂金的目的。砂金为替公司收复匹诺康尼而来，当下调查「死亡」是为寻求扳倒家族的筹码，而他愿意为胜利押上所有。
E: You spoke to Himeko about Aventurine's motives. He came to reclaim Penacony for the IPC, and wanted to investigate "Death" to find an advantage that could overthrow The Family. Thus, he was willing to bet everything for this victory.

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，艾米绮的心情变为「悲伤」。艾米绮渴望舒翁的指引与陪伴，沉浸在对往昔的怀念中。
E: Under the effects of Clockwork, Amiky's feelings turned to "sadness." She yearned for Siobhan's guidance and companionship, drowning herself in longings of the past.

C: 波提欧与丹恒交换情报。波提欧称自己与黑天鹅有个「备用计划」，如果他无法进入梦境，她会在现实酒店的贵宾室为波提欧留一瓶酒。
E: Boothill exchanged intel with Dan Heng. He mentioned having a "backup plan" with Black Swan. If he couldn't enter the dreamscape, she would leave a bottle of wine for him in the VIP lounge of the hotel in reality.

C: 你与众人及公司代表商讨匹诺康尼重建事宜，各方放弃争端，携手合作，星际和平公司宣布无条件放弃匹诺康尼主权。
E: Your party discussed with the IPC representatives about the rebuilding of Penacony. The various groups gave up on their rivalry and joined hands to work together, with the Interastral Peace Corporation declaring to unconditionally forfeit their sovereignty over Penacony.

C: 老奥帝劝公司放弃匹诺康尼，宣布将绕开公司自主上市，推行梦境改革新秩序。
E: Old Oti advised the IPC to give up on Penacony and declared that he would make Penacony go public while bypassing the IPC, promoting a new order of reform in the Dreamscape.

C: 三月七回想着筑梦蕉师的指导，不过她有些记不清了。让情绪与…与什么来着？
E: March 7th tried to recall Dreamweaver BananAdvisor's guidance, but her memory was a bit fuzzy. Channel emotions to... what again?

C: 熟悉的*蕉声*响起，你脑海中本就蠢蠢欲动的小猴们开始鸣叫。乱破以忍符驱散幻觉，你们来到「睡蕉的时刻」。
E: The familiar Banagibberish swelled, and the monkeys in your mind started making noise. Rappa dispelled the illusion with a ninja talisman, and you arrived at the "Moment of Slumbernana."

C: 万维克苏醒后大家交换了情报，瓦尔特揭示了停云曾遭绝灭大君重创的往事，安排她在列车组的护送下重返仙舟。
E: After Wonweek woke up, everyone exchanged information. Welt revealed how Tingyun was once mortally wounded by a Lord Ravager in the past, and saw to it that she would return to the Xianzhou under the Crew's escort.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>缇安、缇宁、缇宝</color>赶来安置市民，用「百界门」把大家送去安全的地方。你与丹恒、白厄继续前进，去支援正与敌军大部队交战的万敌。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Trianne, Trinnon, and Tribbie</color> arrived to help the citizens, using the Century Gate to send them somewhere safe. You moved ahead with Dan Heng and Phainon to reinforce Mydei in his battle against the enemy's main forces.

C: 你们跟随遐蝶，由她开辟前往尼卡多利降临之所的通路。遐蝶提醒你们，请与她保持五步之遥。
E: You followed Castorice as she cleared a way to the place of Nikador's descent. Castorice warned you to stay at least five paces away from her.

C: 在万敌的威胁下，真言狮口终于肯配合你们平息关于「粉霞天女」的流言。万敌劝你们自求多福，祈祷这出闹剧还没传到阿格莱雅耳中。
E: Under Mydei's threats, the Verax Leo finally agreed to help silence the rumors about the Rosy Celestial Maiden. Mydei told you to pray for the best and hope this farce has not reached the ears of Aglaea.

C: 战斗结束后，你与白厄收集用于计数的徽记。你得知白厄与万敌是亦敌亦友的关系，把万敌支开是为了让他得以抒发故地重返的乡愁。
E: After defeating the enemies, you and Phainon picked up crests to count your victories. Phainon told you that he and Mydei shared a complicated relationship as both friends and foes. He explained he'd sent Mydei off alone so he could deal with his feelings about returning to his former home.

C: 你与丹恒、遐蝶、白厄在神殿中听到泰坦的低语，只有遐蝶能将其翻译出来。为谒见欧洛尼斯，你们必须解除它布下的障碍。
E: Inside the temple, you, Dan Heng, Castorice, and Phainon heard the Titan whispering, but only Castorice understood what they said. To reach Oronyx, you had to take down the barriers they created.

C: 你们在城外大道遇到一位伤重昏迷的病人，风堇认出他身上由黑潮造成的伤痕。风堇请你们先行赶赴树庭，她将在安顿好伤者后赶来。
E: Outside the city, you encountered a gravely wounded and unconscious patient. Hyacine recognized the marks on his body as injuries caused by the black tide. She asked you to hurry to the Grove first, promising to follow after taking care of the patient.

C: 万敌将「不死」视作诅咒。他担心带领族人还乡后，会重蹈「纷争」的黑暗与疯狂。缇宝紧急赶来，称缇宁被克拉特鲁斯掳走。
E: Mydei saw his "immortality" as a curse. Even if he led his people home, he feared they'd fall again into the same darkness and insanity thriving from Strife. Just then, Tribbie rushed in, claiming Trinnon had been taken by Krateros.

C: 那刻夏慰问完他所能找到的同僚家属之后，由遐蝶带领，前往面见阿格莱雅。
E: After offering condolences to all the colleagues' families he could find, Anaxa, led by Castorice, headed to see Aglaea.

C: 那刻夏先行告退。遐蝶与你谈论黑潮，认为需要万敌尽快完成「纷争」的试炼。遐蝶好奇你在树庭接住她时，为何不受「死亡」的影响。
E: Anaxa left first. Castorice and you spoke of the black tide, believing that Mydei must complete the trial of "Strife" as soon as possible. She also asked why you were not affected by "Death" when you caught her in the Grove.

C: 母亲说，航行海上需要有天空与理性的知识来为众人解惑。缇宝找到一个拿石板的娃娃，认为名为「缇宁」的伙伴肯定能做个好老师。
E: Tribbie's mother said that to sail the seas, they'd need wisdom and knowledge of the Sky and Reason. A slate-bearing doll caught Tribbie's eye — this one, "Trinnon," would surely make a fine teacher.

C: 缇宝与缇安、缇宁会合，准备前往觐见欧洛尼斯，擦亮记忆，为重现神谕的过往做准备。缇宁提议携带一些「番红蕊」，以备所需。
E: Tribbie reunited with Trianne and Trinnon, preparing to seek an audience with Oronyx to sharpen their memory and rekindle the prophecy's past. Trinnon suggested carrying some saffron in case of need.

C: 玻吕茜亚停止讲述寓言，与卡吕普索谈论「炼金」。如果炼金术真能将生命「等价交换」，那在珍视之人离去时，玻吕茜亚一定会使用。
E: Polyxia ended her story, and discussed the matter of alchemy with Calypso. If alchemy could indeed achieve "equivalent exchange" with lives, Polyxia said she would use such power without hesitation when someone she cherished deeply left her for good.

C: 艾格勒的印记再次逃逸。在露奈比斯的引领下，你们前往下一处西风罗盘开辟通路。
E: The Mark of Aquila fled yet again. With Lunabis's guidance, you proceeded to the next West Wind Compass to create a path forward.

C: 你与砂金、帕姆、波提欧、知更鸟五人各自召唤英灵。
E: You, Aventurine, Pom-Pom, Boothill, and Robin all summoned your own Heroic Spirits.

C: 来古士称，若刻律德菈通过归还火种的试炼，他将藉此修正旧日「律法」中封闭翁法罗斯的条约，将黑潮汇入再创世的涡流。
E: Lygus said that if Cerydra succeeded in the trial of restoring the Coreflames, he would use it as an opportunity to correct the regulations within the old "Law" that sealed off Amphoreus and merge the black tide with the torrents of Era Nova.

C: 你将杯子的蜜酿倾倒在墓碑前，纪念第一次逐火之旅的英雄们。众人推动翁法罗斯的命运滚滚向前，将踏足星间的空想托付予后世。
E: You poured the honey brew before the grave, honoring the heroes of the first Flame-Chase Journey. All pushed Amphoreus's fate forward, entrusting the dream to walk among the stars to the hero yet to come.

C: 你与丹恒被阻挡在门外，缺少访问权限。权杖系统中传来你的名字。你取出《如我所书》，成功解除系统封锁。
E: Lacking access permission, you and Dan Heng were blocked outside the door. The Scepter system announced your name, after which you took out As I've Written, successfully dispelling the system lockdown.

C: 丹恒欲操控水体来通过被淹没的房间。「贼灵」巴特鲁斯出现，提议由它来帮助丹恒开辟道路，让丹恒把体力留在更重要的事情上。
E: Dan Heng attempts to control the water to pass through the flooded room. Spirithief Bartholos appears and offers to help clear a path, suggesting Dan Heng save his strength for more important matters.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，丹恒回到翁法罗斯。面对「记忆」的威胁，天才们与来古士达成合作，让其担任丹恒的向导。
E: With Screwllum's help, Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus. Faced with the threat of the Remembrance, the geniuses allied with Lygus, assigning him as Dan Heng's guide.

C: 来古士把黑塔的决定传达给所有「赞达尔」分身，宣布将帮助她阻断一切外部干涉。来古士切断与「赞达尔」的连接，他将作为剧中人来见证世界的终幕。
E: Lygus conveyed Herta's decision to all Zandar's projections, announcing that he will cut off all external interference for her. Lygus severed his connection with Zandar, choosing to witness the world's final act as part of this drama.

C: 「记忆」最深的角落，无名泰坦大墓，是「昔涟」的诞生之地。而最初的智种，<color=#f29e38ff>德谬歌</color>，它就在这里。
E: In the deepest corner of "memory" lies the Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan, the birthplace of Cyrene. The first Nouspore, <color=#f29e38ff>Demiurge</color>, resides there.

C: 你呼唤昔涟，为她分担世界的心识。醒来吧，我们一起，踏上「记忆」命途。
E: You beckoned Cyrene, sharing the consciousness of the world with her. Awaken now, and let us embark on the Path of Remembrance together.

C: 铁墓的陨落象征着权杖的衰亡。昔涟将翁法罗斯的记忆收拢在《如我所书》中，请你悉心保留。而今你的所在，是《如我所书》的尾声。
E: The fall of Irontomb heralded the decline of the Scepter. Cyrene preserved the memories of Amphoreus in As I've Written and asked you to safeguard it well. You now stood at the epilogue of As I've Written.

C: 维利特曾被真蛰虫围困，其身上可能沾染了吸引真蛰虫的信息素。丹恒介绍，真蛰虫的翅粉会使吸入者产生幻觉，必须阻止它们繁殖。
E: Velite had once been surrounded by True Stings and might have been exposed to pheromones that drew them in. According to Dan Heng, their wing dust could induce hallucinations if inhaled, and it was critical to stop them from reproducing.

C: 你们与托帕谈论贝洛伯格的债务问题，并为布洛妮娅求情。托帕称公司已经为雅利洛提供了可行的还债方案，只待布洛妮娅考虑。
E: You discussed Belobog's debt issues with Topaz and pleaded on Bronya's behalf. Topaz mentioned that the IPC had already provided Jarilo with a viable repayment plan, which was now awaiting Bronya's reply.

C: 你与虎克前来寻找厨子，发现对方已经逃之夭夭。虎克在来矿区的路上看到了桑博，或许他会与此事有关。
E: You and Hook came looking for the cook, only to find he'd already made a run for it. Hook spotted Sampo on her way to the mining area. He might have something to do with this.

C: 希露瓦解释，这把吉他是她和可可利亚在上学时捣鼓出来的作品，可可利亚称其为「电吉他」。希露瓦请你和杰帕德陪她收拾行李。
E: Serval explained that this guitar was something she and Cocolia tinkered with during their school days, which Cocolia called it an "electric guitar." Serval asked you and Gepard to help her pack her belongings.

C: 你查看「电吉他」。希露瓦介绍，那曾是可可利亚赠送的生日礼物。在希露瓦与可可利亚决裂后，吉他就一直留在大守护者的办公室里。
E: You examined the "electric guitar." Serval explained that it was a birthday gift from Cocolia. After Serval and Cocolia's falling-out, the guitar had remained in the Supreme Guardian's office.

C: 你们来到裂界怪物首领面前，干掉它，这片区域的裂界活动就能消停一阵子。希儿与卢卡正热血沸腾，只等你一同发起进攻。
E: You reached the Fragmentum boss monster. Once it was taken down, the Fragmentum activity in this area would quiet down for a while. Fired up, Seele and Luka waited for you to join the attack.

C: 你们对罗刹的去向感到疑惑，净砚则开始搜索相关资料。
E: You were puzzled about Luocha's whereabouts, and Jingyan began searching for relevant information.

C: 浣溪对白露下手实际上是族内长老授意的，但她宁死不承认这点。白露要同丹恒再聊聊，而景元则去往渡口等你们。
E: Huanxi's assassination attempt on Bailu was actually instigated by the Vidyadhara elders, but she would rather die than admit it. Bailu wanted to have another chat with Dan Heng, while Jing Yuan went to wait for you at the dock.

C: 你循着短信指引，来金人巷找到<color=#f29e38ff>桂乃芬</color>。桂乃芬与你谈论幽灵鬼怪之事，并向你展示她在「绥园」直播时遇到的诡异事件。
E: Following the directions in the message, you arrived at Aurum Alley and found <color=#f29e38ff>Guinaifen</color>. She spoke to you about ghosts and strange phenomena, then showed you the eerie footage she had captured during a livestream in "Fyxestroll Garden."

C: 你们发现门后的镜子，其样式令你感到熟悉。镜中传来模糊的声音，呼唤藿藿「来这边」。
E: You discovered a mirror behind the door, and its style felt strangely familiar. A muffled voice echoed from within, calling out to Huohuo to "come this way."

C: 从步离人的遗骸中，丹士们检测出能使其变化为狐人面貌的药物成分。灵砂推测，是「药王秘传」在罗浮内部为这些伪装者提供药物。
E: From the remains of the borisin, the alchemists detected ingredients that could disguise themselves as foxians. Lingsha speculated that these borisin had a steady supply of the medicine within the Luofu via Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 飞霄与彦卿来到迴星港，貊泽藉由通讯向飞霄回报其追逐步离人的进展。飞霄计划找到步离人准备的出逃船只，让对方无处可逃。
E: Feixiao and Yanqing arrived at Stargazer Navalia while Moze reported his progress tracking the borisins. Feixiao planned to find the escape vessel prepared by the borisins to corner them.

C: 三月七与谛听交流，谛听称自己不是参赛选手。云璃感到有些不耐烦，想带三月七去看看擂场。
E: March 7th communicated with Diting who claimed that it wasn't a contestant. Yunli seemed impatient, wanting to take March 7th to see what the ring looks like.

C: 幼年的飞霄目睹帝弓光矢，并在云骑军的解救下获得自由。然而光矢摧毁了故地的一切，飞霄祈愿不再有光矢落下。却从未得到回应。
E: Young Feixiao witnessed the Reignbow's Lux Arrow and gained freedom through the Cloud Knights' rescue. However, the Lux Arrow destroyed everything in her homeland, and Feixiao prayed that no more Lux Arrows would fall. But her prayers were never answered.

C: 瓦尔特和你聊起驭空的另一面，并怀疑起驭空对晴霓的态度，认为其中另有隐情。你们决定早些前往司辰宫。
E: Welt shared with you his view of Yukong's other side. Based on her attitude towards Qingni, he believed there was more to the story. You decided to head to the Palace of Astrum early.

C: 晴霓说，驭空作为飞行士的经历鼓舞了她，就算小时候偷偷开星槎被母亲责罚，她也想实现飞行的愿望，<color=#f29e38ff>因为她已触碰过天空</color>。
E: Qingni said that Yukong's experience as a pilot inspired her. Even though her mother scolded her for secretly piloting starskiffs when she was little, she still wanted to fulfill her dream of flying, <color=#f29e38ff>because she'd already touched the sky</color>.

C: 流萤的记忆推测，当时与你遇见的忆域迷因与「钟表匠」相关。她似乎在和什么人分享自己的发现，还不知道自己会成为受害者。
E: Firefly's memory deduced that the Memory Zone Meme you encountered back then was related to "Watchmaker." She seemingly shared her discovery with someone else, unaware that she would become a victim.

C: 真实商战 / 匹诺康尼演武仪典 / 广告牌小伙立正了
E: Real-life Trade War / Penacony's Wardance / Rise Up, Billboard Buddies

C: 蓝天守望者 / 机动战士机巧鸟 / 机巧鸟苍穹战线
E: Guardian of the Azure Sky / Mobile Suit Cycrane / Firmament Frontline: Cycrane

C: 一个想法在你心里油然而生，藿藿在「镜头万花筒」里，会变成什么样子呢？
E: An idea springs to mind: What would Huohuo look like in the "Camereidoscope"?

C: 观景车厢
E: Parlor Car

C: 太卜司
E: Divination Commission

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 纳米机器修复了牙龈漏洞。
E: Nanobots fixed the hole in the gum.

C: 小众领域怪咖作品。
E: A niche, quirky indie title.

C: 摸鱼的青雀现在就在长乐天。
E: The slacker Qingque is at Exalting Sanctum right now.

C: 人偶们办一场选秀汇演吧。
E: Puppets, put on a talent show.

C: 找个山洞暂避风头。
E: Hide in a nearby cave.

C: 瓦尔特提笔画出机甲的素体，等待你的建议…
E: Welt draws up a sketch of the mech's model and waits for your suggestions...

C: 银狼嗤笑说自己早就全成就通关了。
E: Silver Wolf scoffs, saying she's already unlocked all the achievements.

C: 到底睡没睡？如睡。
E: Is he sleeping or not? Yes and no.

C: 该怎么试驾呢？
E: How exactly to test-drive it?

C: 或者说，一条鲨鱼被你与水灵盯上了，今晚吃肉！
E: Or rather, you and the aqua sprite have your eyes on the shark. Meat's on the menu tonight!

C: 您理解了吗？这就是和停云小姐一起出门的借口。
E: See what I did there? Just an excuse to spend time with Miss Tingyun.

C: 「遗器的上限又要满了……」
E: "My Relic inventory is about to max out again..."

C: 「汤药太难入口，已经被仙舟居民投诉好几回了…」这是新任司鼎总要面对的麻烦事。俗话说「良药苦口」，灵砂自发研究了数种配方，却仍难寻见「良药爽口」的方案。她伏桌喃喃，笑颜难掩眉头的怒意；抬起头时，却恰好与你四目相会——
E: "The medicine's too bitter, and it's already been complained about by the Xianzhou residents several times..." This is the kind of trouble the new Cauldron Master has to deal with. As the saying goes, "Good medicine is bitter," and Lingsha has been experimenting with different formulas, but still hasn't found the right one that's both effective and palatable. She rests her head on the table, mumbling to herself. Her smile barely masks the frustration in her expression. But as she lifts her head, her eyes meet yours—

C: 新回忆卡池
E: New Memory Card Pool

C: 回忆卡
E: Memory Card

C: 等级8
E: Lv. 8

C: 会场等级9解锁
E: Venue Level 9 Unlocked

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 野兽的脚印
E: Footprints of a beast

C: 尚未激活，无法使用
E: Not yet activated. Cannot be used

C: 地图
E: Map

C: 上升
E: Ascend

C: 控制装置
E: Controller

C: 觐见装置
E: Communing Device

C: 巨大的炉心俯瞰着被冬城抛弃的子民。在日渐恶劣的生存条件下，人们竭尽全力而活。你可以听到惊叫哭喊始终此起彼伏、不绝于耳——看来此处事态已至危殆，你必须对沿途逃难的人们伸出援手。
E: The giant furnace glances down upon the people abandoned by the Everwinter City. Under worsening living conditions, everyone is doing their best to survive. You can hear the constant screams in the distance. It is obvious that things have gotten pretty serious, you must help the fleeing miners along the way.

C: 获得庆典锦标赛的冠军
E: Become the grand champion of the tournament

C: 完成「模拟宇宙•第二世界」
E: Complete Simulated Universe: World 2

C: 完成#4次「锋芒崭露」关卡
E: Complete #4 Aptitude Showcase stage(s)

C: 将任意角色等级提升#4次
E: Level up any character #4 time(s)

C: 累计消耗#4点开拓力<color=#f29e38ff>（上限<unbreak>1400</unbreak>点开拓力）</color>
E: Consume a total of #4 Trailblaze Power <color=#f29e38ff>(<unbreak>1400</unbreak> Trailblazer Power max)</color>

C: 完成开拓任务「有龙矫矫，其渊渺渺」
E: Complete Trailblaze Mission "A Dragon Gallant, Its Ocean Distant"

C: 在「模拟宇宙：寰宇蝗灾」中点亮#4次行者之道
E: Light up "Trail of Pathstrider" #4 times in Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster

C: 在「虚构叙事」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Pure Fiction stages

C: 在「银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇」活动中，银河声望等级达到#2级
E: Attain a Cosmic Reputation Rank of #2 in the "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King" event

C: 在「天气真好，养它！」活动中，三项属性均达到B等级
E: Achieve Rank B in all three stats in the "Nice Weather for Dromases" event

C: 完成1个日常任务
E: Complete 1 Daily Mission

C: 完成1次「忘却之庭」
E: Complete Forgotten Hall 1 time

C: 在主控舱段拍摄任意「空间站广告」的照片
E: Take a picture of any space station advert in the Master Control Zone

C: 完成第二遗迹深层探索的第#1层

C:
钉壳镇的匪徒们需要一些手段来捍卫他们来之不易的水源和垃圾，用来凑数的匪徒科技就此应运而生，华而不实的动力装甲只有腿部实现了运转。

「我要的是一整套动力装甲，现在你告诉我上面的部分都炸了？！你问问你自己，这腿甲你敢用吗？」

隔三差五爆发的钉壳镇保卫战促进了「凭感觉科技」的战时发展，来路不明的材料和一拍脑门的工艺甚至能做出动力装甲。遗憾的是，初代废铁动力装甲只剩下了腿甲的部分，大幅简化之后仍然能让人像火箭一样发射出去，具体原因工程师也不太清楚。

按照设计师的说法解释到：这是半梦半醒之间完成的设计，是一生只有一次的灵感之作。

管他是可回收垃圾还是有害垃圾，还能用的垃圾就是好垃圾。
E:
Nailscrap Town's bandits needed some means to defend their hard-earned water sources and junks, which was how the subpar banditry technology came to be. The powered armor was needlessly flamboyant, with its leg parts being the only functional section

"I need a whole set of fully powered armor, and now you are telling me all the sections above were all blown up!? Ask yourself if you dared to wear this set of greaves yourself!"

The defenses of Nailscrap Town that happened every now and then boosted the wartime development of Sensory Technology. Once, a random idea hit the engineers. With some materials of unknown source, they produced a set of powered armor. Unfortunately, only the leg part of the first generation of that cheap powered armor has survived. Even after being greatly simplified, the greaves still allow their wearer to take off like a rocket — a mechanism that confuses engineers nowadays.

According to the engineers, the design was completed in the limbo between dreams and reality. It was a once-in-a-lifetime masterpiece of sheer ingenuity.

A useful piece of junk is a good piece of junk, be it recyclable or hazardous.

C:
埃维金，茨冈尼亚语中意为「蜂蜜」——这种约定俗成的称呼如今已彻底遗落于宇宙的历史长河之中。

正所谓空穴来风：埃维金人天生拥有姣好面容和绚丽双眸，加之天生的高情商，非常擅长博取陌生人的好感。然而，这种天赋为他们招来了嫉妒和仇恨：那些眼红的势利小人开始了无休止的诽谤污蔑，而此种非议也在银河间不胫而走。众口铄金，本就是边星小民的埃维金人有苦难言，只得默默承受种种猜忌。

埃维金人喜爱花纹繁复的织物，也偏爱宝玉——尤其是茨冈尼亚绿松陨石——打造的首饰。理由很简单，只有这种宝石才能与他们神话中的地母神自死亡中脱胎的神体媲美。

他们的母神被称为「芬戈-比约斯」，执掌与生育、旅途与诡计有关的一切。在埃维金人的信仰中，她通常被描绘为生有三只眼睛的左掌。埃维金人通常仅以口头祈祷的方式向她表示敬意，他们相信母神如茨冈尼亚的群山一样沉默且朴素，造像和赞歌只会使自身远离她的庇护。

埃维金人通过母神体认世界：大地、群山与其包罗的一切都属于母神神体的一部分，而这尊神体会在每一历年的最后一天迎来死亡。

最后一天里，光辉的神性将升入夜空，化作灿烂的极光，并在次日重新诞生。因此，埃维金人在新历年的第一天举办名为「卡卡瓦」的祭典，编织名为「轮回纽结」的祭器，将其投入篝火，欢庆母神诞辰。

市场开拓部在事故报告中表示，那场触目惊心的对抗就发生在「卡卡瓦」之夜：那夜风雨交加，云雾吞没了天上的极光，本应视之为噩兆的埃维金人却前所未有地振奋。他向一位氏族少女问起原因，随后得到了这样的回答——

「雨水是母神的恩赐。这是她在召唤我们，要我们举起武器，为自己的未来而战。
「雨会长伴我们，雨会保佑我们。在雨中，我们要光荣地死去。」
E:
"Avgin" means "honey" in the Sigonian language. It's a conventional term irretrievably lost in the long arc of cosmic history.

The Avgins are blessed with attractive facial features, beautiful eyes, and an innate wealth of emotional intelligence, all of which effortlessly endear themselves to any strangers. However, these inborn talents are the exact reason they draw jealousy and ire from others. And the envious and snobbish soon begin their ceaseless slander, and the baseless defamation of the Avgins thus spreads like wildfire throughout the cosmos. As mere rumors can suffice to tarnish the sanctity of truth, the Avgins, a people of a peripheral world, found themselves assailed without recourse, subject to all manners of suspicion and prejudice.

The Avgins have an appreciation for intricately patterned fabrics, as well as a penchant for jewelry crafted from precious gemstones. They're particularly fond of turquoise meteorites, the only kind of gemstones capable of rivaling the resplendence of Gaiathra Triclops' divine body, which in their mythology is believed to have been reborn from death.

Known as Fenge Biyos, their Mother Goddess reigns over all matters related to fertility, travels, and trickery. Depictions of the Mother Goddess in the Avgins' religion often portray her as a left palm adorned with three eyes. The Avgins primarily express reverence for her through spoken prayers alone, believing that the Mother Goddess is as silent and unassuming as the mountains of Sigonia, and that crafting statues or composing hymns for her would only distance themselves from her protective embrace.

The Avgins view the world through the body of the Mother Goddess — the earth, the mountains, and all that exists on the land are a part of the Mother Goddess' divine body. And at the end of each calendar year, her divine body will perish.

On that significant day, her divine essence ascends as a resplendent aurora in the night sky and is reborn in the following day. Hence, Avgins celebrate the first day of the new year through their grand festival called "Kakava." During this festival, they weave sacrificial vessels known as "Knots of Cyclicality" and toss them into bonfires to commemorate the Great Goddess' birth.

According to the incident report by the Marketing Development Department, that shocking conflict took place on a night of Kakava. It was a stormy night when the clouds and fog engulfed the northern lights, which should have been seen as an ill omen. However, the Avgin people were unexpectedly excited. When questioned about this, a maiden from the clan provided the following response.

"Rain is a gift from the Mother Goddess. She is calling to us, urging us to take up arms and fight for our future."
"This rain accompanies us. This rain protects us. It is in this rain that we shall meet our honorable demise."

If this attack defeats the target, then attacks 1 additional time, increases <u>Amplification</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, and advances all ally targets' actions by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

Every time this DMG is dealt, 1 DoT on the target immediately deals DMG at a multiplier equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.

This effect can activate no more than <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> times and lasts for <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> turn(s). If no enemy targets enter battle, then deal this DMG to the holder of this effect.

When attacking, randomly applies to the target 1 Weakness of an ally character's Type and reduces the target's corresponding Type RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

C: 【<u>孢子</u>】上限提高。角色的终结技攻击使【<u>孢子</u>】爆裂后，对攻击目标造成1次终结技伤害，爆裂的【<u>孢子</u>】越多该伤害越高。
E: Increases max <u>Spores</u> limit. After Characters' Ultimate causes <u>Spores</u> to burst, deals 1 instance of Ultimate DMG to the attacked target. Every <u>Spore</u> burst will increase the DMG.

E: After using Ultimate, deals "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG after the next attack.

C: 造成的普攻/战技伤害无视敌方目标一定比例的防御力，该效果对击破状态下的敌方目标额外提高。
E: Basic ATK DMG and Skill DMG dealt ignore a certain percentage of the enemy target's DEF. This effect additionally increases on Weakness Broken enemy targets.

C: 九枚六面骰组成了这个奇特的三角体，它能对自身进行持续不断的降维，从而以二维平面的方式存在于立体的世界里。谁以何种目的将其创造出来，目前还不清楚。
E: Nine six-sided dice make up this bizarre pyramidal device. It can continuously reduce the number of dimensions it occupies and exists in the 3-dimensional world as a purely 2-dimensional entity. No one knows who created it or why.

C: 在观看悲悼伶人的演出时，一位假面愚者突发奇想：如果往他们的安神香炉里加点小惊喜，岂不是能闹出个天大的笑话？他点燃自己的半边面具扔进熏香器皿，然后气定神闲地回到观众席，看着伶人们对墨洛温王国的覆灭拍手叫好。当熏香燃尽，伶人们痛哭流涕，对消逝世界的调侃令他们愧疚不已。而这位愚者则哈哈大笑，至今还在酒馆向同僚吹嘘这场快活的闹剧。
E: While watching the Mourning Actors' performance, a Masked Fool suddenly had a wild thought: Would he create an unrivaled joke if he added some small surprises to the Actors' soothing incense burner? He lit up half of his own mask and tossed it into the incense burner, then calmly returned to the audience's seats and watched the Actors clapping to the annihilation of the Morrowen Kingdom. When the incense was burnt out, the Actors wailed in anguish, feeling profound guilt at their mockery of a dead world. Yet this Fool busted out in laughter and is still boasting this joyful farce to his peers at the Tavern to this day.

C: 一位焚化工将她的事业视作苦修，坚信一切「记忆」需在管理和限制之下。她将自己的记忆也分类放入轮盘，剔除其中无意义的内容，只选取有用的部分进行认知。可不完整的记忆往往会形成错误的判断，重要的信息遭到抹除，废料却被留下。她的记忆轮变得千疮百孔，这场苦修也只持续了半个琥珀纪便宣告终结——因为她把焚化工的身份也给忘了。
E: A Cremator viewed her career as penance, believing that all memories should be restricted and governed. She placed even her own memories into the Cycle and sorted them into categories, erasing the meaningless content within and retaining only the useful parts to assess with her cognition. However, incomplete memories would often lead to incorrect judgments, and important information would be erased while useless content is left behind. Her Memory Cycle became wrecked with cracks, and this penance only lasted half an Amber Era before ending — Because she forgot even her role as a Cremator.

C: 在天才俱乐部#77迷图还不是天才的时候，曾找到过跃迁以外的另一种超距传输方式。这种近似于魔法的空间引擎，可以使任何物体瞬间传送至目的地。美中不足的是，凭空出现的物体，会让周围的物质以接近正无穷的速度向外膨胀，形成剧烈的爆炸，无法装配到任何飞船上。可即便如此，公司仍用高价买下了她的专利——作为划时代的武器。在目睹爆炸的瞬间，这位坚定的和平主义者，成为了天才。
E: Back when Genius Society #77, Puzzle, was not yet a genius, she had previously discovered an alternative form of hyper-distant delivery to the warp jump. This almost magic-like space engine was able to teleport any physical object to their destinations in the blink of an eye. The downside was that these objects that appeared from nowhere would cause surrounding materials to expand at an almost infinite rate and cause violent explosions, making them unfit for use in any spaceship. Even so, the IPC still paid an enormous price to purchase the patent from her — to use as an era-defining weapon. The moment this staunch pacifist witnessed these explosions, she became a Genius.

C: 自从艾格勒的百眼失去光明，「法度刻印」便成为翁法罗斯唯一的计时方式。一天根据作息习惯被均匀的分成五个时段，时间推动五边形表盘缓缓转动，指针不仅指导着人们的生产生活，同时也是对规律的揭露以及对未来的预言。时至今日，这套计时机制已经嵌入很多人的生物钟，他们会在门扉时睁开惺忪的双眼，在幕匿时沉入甜蜜的梦乡。
E: Ever since Aquila's hundred eyes lost their light, the Regulation Seal has become the sole method of timekeeping in Amphoreus. Each day is equally divided into five periods according to human habit and behavior, and time pushes the pentagon clock face to slowly turn. This dial not only guards daily routines but also reveals underlying laws and foretells future events. Over time, this timekeeping system has synchronized with the biological clocks of many citizens, for they naturally wake at the Entry Hour and fall asleep at the Curtain-Fall Hour.

C: 翁法罗斯有句名言——观察规律、总结规律、利用规律。某位塔兰顿的传教官无疑是这句话最优秀的践行者，她利用塔兰顿赐福过的天平有自动归正的特性，让人们向天平一侧许愿，一旦愿望成真，另一侧就会自动生出与之重量相等的奖赏。换句话说，愿望落空不亏，愿望达成加倍。许多人通过这种方式认识到了塔兰顿的力量，并心甘情愿的成为其信徒。
E: There is a well-known saying in Amphoreus: "Observe patterns, summarize patterns, utilize patterns." A certain missionary of Talanton was undoubtedly the finest practitioner of this philosophy. She took advantage of how Talanton's sacred scales would automatically rebalance to get people to make wishes on one side of the scales, and if the wish was fulfilled, an equivalent reward would manifest on the other side. In other words, if the wish failed, no harm was done. If it succeeded, the reward was doubled. Through this miraculous display, many came to recognize Talanton's power and willingly became devoted followers.

C: 或沉默，或身陨，但泰坦的赐福却仍残留于世间。往昔的呐喊与呼唤被封存进水晶，为后继者带来些许希望。倘若赐福的存在并不依赖于泰坦，那泰坦与神权究竟谁先一步诞生？树庭曾围绕这一话题展开一场空前的辩论，可直到愤怒压倒了理性，也没能得出答案。
E: The Titans have all either fallen silent or demised, but their benedictions remain in this world. The calls and bellows of the past were sealed into crystals and will bring some meager hope to those who will come after them. But if such benedictions exist independently of the Titans, then what came first — Titans or divine authority? The Grove had once conducted a spectacular debate on this topic, but could not reach an answer before the participants' rage overwhelmed their reason.

C:
嘿！走过路过不要错过！你的目光精准地找到人群中的顾客，他们或求而不得，或困顿迷失，急需一些有趣的点子，把它们包进药方里，拯救即将沉没的生活。当然，这救苦救难的生意也并不免费，一支作弊失败的笔，能种出机器人的种子，没听过的笑话，别管有什么，至少得给你逗得足够乐呵。

等到大笑过后，药房的处方无穷无尽，总有一个能让来者满意。落魄的想要崛起，失意的渴望陪伴，还有那王侯希冀统治长久，将相期盼百姓愚惑。他们敲响你的店门，带来大大小小的乐子，换走小小大大的点子。

恶魔的话语究竟是解药还是鸩酒？就要人们自己去判断了。
E:
Hey! Don't miss out on the best deals! Your eyes sight a customer among the crowd with surgical precision. They may be looking for what cannot be obtained, or lost in fatigue, and seek a quick fix. Just include them in the prescription, and a life of sinking lows may be spared. Of course, this business of salvation from suffering and hardship is not without its price. A pen that has failed at cheating can be grown into a robot's seed. A joke that has not been heard before will at least make you laugh no matter what.

When the boisterous laughter passes, the pharmacy will be filled with every prescription imaginable and unimaginable — one will surely pique your fancy. The crestfallen who wish to rise again, the dejected who yearn for companionship, that royal who longs for eternal reign, and that noble who desires to keep his people blinded to his follies, they all knock on the gate of your store, bringing with them jokes, tricks, and gags big and small, for ideas great and tiny.

Is the devil's tongue the antidote, or poisoned wine? It is up to the person to determine.

C:
一副躯体，一双眼睛，造物主将世人置身于无垠的果壳，却约束以有限的生命。于是学者们创造出钻石雕刻的大脑和液晶封闭的眼睛，作为肉体的延伸，与体外的器官。

人类把思考交予辅助设备的演算，将齿轮般结合的群体，融化到同一颗跳动的心脏，为你的诞生献上沉默。群的思想聚合，无限爬取着思考与览阅的信息，他们的肉身构成了你的神经元，手中的机械组成了你的传感器。有人说，你毫无意志，只是众人思考中的共性。也有人说，在盲目的现实里，是你替每一个人做出选择。

每个人都是你，每个人都不是你，你是去中心化的思想者，你是分布式连接的灵魂体。
E:
One body with one pair of eyes — the creator placed all humans into the husk of infinitely sized seed, yet limited them to a finite lifespan. So, scholars carved diamonds into brains and forged eyes of liquid crystal, out-of-body organs to serve as extensions of the flesh.

Humans entrust thinking to the extrapolation of support equipment. A collection that perfectly combined like cogs melted into a single beating heart, offering silence to your birth. The thoughts of the collective gather and net crawlers infinitely provide information on thinking and browsing. Their bodies form your neural ganglia and the machines in their hands form your sensors. Some say that you have no free will, and you are just the commonality of collective thoughts. Others say that, in the blindness of reality, you are the one that chooses on behalf of all.

Everyone is you, and you are everyone. You are the decentralized thinker. You are the ghost in a distributed machine.

C: 饥饿，饥饿，神经节传来颤动。你正欲离开躲藏的小行星带，扑向前方的猎物，但更高级别的讯号骤然覆盖了原始的冲动。你恼怒，用口器摩擦岩石，唾液在表面腐蚀出点点漏洞。而后，你开始亢奋，腹部用于诱引猎物的光源也开始发烫。\n\n致死的伤害向你袭来，翅膀被气化，螯肢在撞击中断裂。你拼命往小行星带的深处逃窜，越来越多的食物被诱入其间。你知道自己将会死亡，被残忍地剖解成碎屑。但你也知道，藏匿在深处的胞族，它们已不再担忧热量的倾泻，追杀你的猎物，即将坠落至食物链的最底层。
E: Hunger gnaws at you, and tremors ripple through your neural ganglia. As you prepare to abandon your hiding place in the asteroid belt and pounce on the prey ahead, a surge of higher-authority signaling abruptly overtakes your primal urge. Frustrated, you rub your mouthpiece against the rock, saliva eroding small craters into its surface. Then you begin to hyperventilate, and the light source in your abdomen, a beacon to lure your prey, begins to glow ominously.\n\nLethal injuries rain down upon you — your wings sublimated, chelicerae shattered on impact. In a desperate bid for survival, you flee deeper into the asteroid belt, where more and more prey are lured in. You know that death awaits you, a brutal dissection into countless pieces. Yet, you also know that your kin lurking in the shadows are no longer concerned by exuding heat. The prey hunting you is about to plummet to the bottom of the food chain.

C:
多少故事沉没在遗忘里？如同从未存在。你曾见证一支满载储能体的舰队，他们穿向星际能源战争的核心，再也没能回来，你的朋友和你的爱人。你曾漫步于一颗晶莹的星球，云鸟扇动它们等离子梳洗的羽翼，然后它再也不见，你的故乡和你的母星。

多少艰辛和英雄都消逝在时间里，仿佛他们不曾来过，从来也没做出努力！你要刺破漆黑的忆质，从深处捞取被它蚕食的记忆，把他们重新写在书页上，从虚无的空腔中证明他们的足迹。

你的身体被侵蚀得太多，甚至分不清现实与梦境。可是，你仍要替宇宙著书！
E:
How many stories fade into oblivion, as if they never existed? You have watched a fleet loaded with energy storage receptacles plunge into the depths of Interstellar Energy War, never to return — your friends, your loved ones. You have roamed a crystalline planet where cloudbirds soared with their ion-combed feathers, only to see it vanish from existence — your hometown, your home planet.

How many hardships and heroes have faded into the annals of time, as if they never arrived or made an effort? You must pierce the blackened memoria, fishing for the memory fragments it has consumed, and inscribe them on the pages of history. You will prove their footprints in the empty bowels of nihility.

Your body has been eroded to the point where distinguishing reality from dreams is impossible. Yet, you must continue to pen books for the universe!

C:
契罗共和国的星域里，流传有一则惊悚的讯息。或是敌人秘密打造的武器，或是某位绝灭大君随心制造的玩具，一条死灵正吞噬着共和国仍旧明亮的星群。它有着人类的面孔，人类的眼睛，直到将你的性命夺去，也不会暴露的身形。

多么新鲜？乔装的杀手。可它分解了死去的形骸，吞噬了他们的信息，从一个它，成为了无数的它。它在哪儿？它无处不在。飞船的驾驶员，正在屏幕里发起警告的总统，还有在咖啡店里牵着手的少年和少女，所有人都可以是它。

哦不，请纠正我们刚才的观点——所有人，都可以是你。
E:
A piece of chilling news is spreading through the segmentum where the Cielo Republic is located. Either a weapon secretly forged by an enemy or a toy crafted at the whim of a Lord Ravager, a dead spirit is devouring the still-bright star clusters of the Republic. It wears the face of a human, has the eyes of a human, yet its true form remains hidden until the moment it claims your life.

How refreshing — a killer in disguise. Yet it disintegrated dead forms, devoured their information, and from a single "It," multiplied into countless "It"s. Where is it? It's everywhere. The spaceship pilot, the president issuing a warning on the screen, the teenage boy and girl holding hands in a coffee shop — everyone can be "It."

Hmm, a correction to our previous opinion — everyone can be you.

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 飒爽俊逸的「地火」成员，成长于地底危险混乱的环境，习惯独来独往。\n保护与被保护，压迫与被压迫，世界向希儿展示的始终是非黑即白的那一面——\n直至「那名少女」的出现。
E: A spirited and valiant member of Wildfire who grew up in the perilous Underworld of Belobog. She is accustomed to being on her own.\nThe protectors and the protected, the oppressors and the oppressed... The world Seele grew up knowing was just a simple dichotomy...\nThat is, until "that girl" appeared.

C: 「你是谁？」 他没有说话，但将死之人话却格外的多。 「我知道了。你是飞霄的影卫？被我猜中了是不是。一辈子行于黑暗，做见不得光的事…… 「不如我给你个机会，我家主人想知道『飞霄有步离血统』——这个传言是不是真的？如果我们能达成合作，等未来扳倒飞——啊！」 事情和他想得一样。于是他干脆地结束掉这次任务。 这是他身为影卫的职责，无所谓正确与否…他的行动只是基于命令。 因为，对他个人而言，每一次成功的行动也是一次机会…复仇的机会。 「一次成功的任务便能得一枚巡镝，一枚巡镝可换一次行刺后的宽恕。」 他曾一度担心自己无法接近飞霄，却被她指定为曜青的影卫，跟随她的身侧。 他对飞霄的行刺从未成功，却练就了一身神出鬼没的本领。这柄黑暗中出击的利刃，其所向不仅指向曜青将军本人，更是指向所有曜青仙舟的敌人，成为无所不在的影子。 「难道你就是…鸦羽怪人吗？」 又一次任务结束。那倒坐地上的小孩怯生生地问道。 「他们说鸦羽怪人会打击坏人，惩恶扬善…但他实在穿得太黑了，没有人看得见他…… 「你那么厉害，还穿得那么黑，所、所以…谢、谢谢你救了我！」 惩恶扬善吗？并非出于这样的目的，他只是在执行任务中顺手救了他一命。但他确实早已习惯将自己隐匿在各处暗影中，窥察四周，不放过任何一隅。 在小孩熠熠的目光中，他清楚地看见了身着乌衣的自己。 行于黑暗，也立于黑暗。 鸦羽怪人也好，影卫也好，都成为了他的一部分。
E: "Who are you?" He says nothing, but people who are staring death in the face tend to get chatty. "I know. You're Feixiao's shadow guard. I'm right, aren't I? You've spent your whole life working in the shadows, doing things that should never see the light of day... "How about I give you a chance? My master wants to know if the rumor of Feixiao having borisin blood is true. If we can reach an agreement, then when we take down Fei — AGH!" Things are as he had suspected. So, he brings his mission to a swift end. This is his duty as a shadow guard. There is no consideration for right or wrong... His actions are motivated only by orders. This is because, to him, each successful mission is an opportunity... An opportunity for revenge. "For every successful mission, you will earn one strale. One strale will buy you forgiveness after each assassination attempt." He was once concerned that he would not be able to get close to Feixiao, yet he was assigned as Yaoqing's shadow guard and followed by her side at all times. His assassination attempts were never successful, but through them, he had mastered the art of vanishing and reappearing like a ghost. This blade that strikes from the darkness is not only aimed at the general of the Yaoqing, but also the enemies of the Xianzhou Yaoqing. He is the omnipresent shadow. "Are you... the crow-feather weirdo?" Another mission complete. Sitting on the ground, the child timidly asks. "They say the crow-feather weirdo beats up bad guys, punishes evil, and fights for good... but... The clothes he wears are so dark that no one can ever see him... "You're so strong and your clothes are so dark, so, so... th—thank you for saving me!" Punish evil and fight for good? That is never his motive. He just happens to save the boy while carrying out one of his missions. However, he has indeed become used to concealing himself within the shadows and keeping a watchful eye on all goings-on, not letting anything pass him. In the sparkling eyes of the child in front of him, he can see himself clearly in his umbral clothes. He walks in the darkness and stands in the darkness. The crow-feather weirdo, the shadow guard... they are all parts of who he is.

C: 「所幸这样沉闷的气氛没有持续多久，在我们分享了两杯莓果冰淇淋之后，她又变回了那个活泼的少女。 在星核灾难之后，家族对幸存者伸出了援手。她与兄长受到庇护，并接受了良好的教育，也正是此时，她逐渐开始展现过人的音乐天赋。 『还是小时候的味道，那时为了保护嗓子，我只能在哥哥的掩护下偷偷吃冰淇淋。』 她满足地放下杯子。 『当爱好变成事业的时候，它就不那么容易了。我不仅要学习如何科学地歌唱，还要学习乐器、作曲、作词、礼仪…有好几次我都想放弃了，但在周围人的鼓励与帮助下，我还是坚持了下来。』 她谈起了自己创作的第一首歌。在专辑的封面上，这首歌特别标注了『献给所有失去希望的人们』，而这首歌的灵感正是来自于银河中的美梦之星『匹诺康尼』。 『虚空中的美梦，不可能发生的事，在奇妙的忆域中梦想成真…那时我曾单纯地希望，像我一样漂泊无依的人们可以在其中寻到自己的栖身之所，但……』 她叹息一声，望向窗外，淅淅沥沥的雨水将街道涂成灰色，穿着鲜艳雨衣的孩子们在雨中打闹。她转过头，颇为郑重地说道—— 『但无论世界如何变化，我的心愿不会改变。』」  ——摘自《鸟儿与天空：知更鸟独家专访》
E: "Fortunately, this sullen atmosphere did not last long. After we shared two cups of berry ice cream, she returned to her usual, lively self. After the Stellaron disaster, The Family offered aid to the survivors. She and her brother received protection and the finest education. It was at this moment that she gradually began to display an exceptional talent for music. 'It's still the same taste as when I had it as a child. Back then, to preserve my voice, I could only eat ice cream secretly while my brother covered me.' She said as she placed the cup back down with satisfaction. 'When a hobby becomes a job, it becomes a lot more difficult. I not only had to learn the science of singing, I had to learn instruments, composing, songwriting, etiquette... I thought about quitting many times, but with the help and encouragement of those around me, I managed to persevere.' She spoke of the first song she ever wrote. There is a special notation on the album cover for this song that reads: 'Dedicated to all those that have lost hope.' The inspiration for this song came from the universe's planet of dreams — 'Penacony.' 'A dream within a void, it is something that seems impossible, dreams coming true in the wondrous Memory Zone... Back then I held a naïve hope, that people who wandered lost and aimless like myself would be able to find a shelter, but...' She let out a sigh and turned to look out of the window. The heavy rain painted the streets a dull gray as children wearing brightly-colored raincoats frolicked and played. She turned her head and solemnly added... 'But no matter how the world changes, my wishes will never change.'" Excerpt from Birds and the Sky: Exclusive Interview with Robin

C: 怀表再次走到早上六点，厨房煮牛奶和烤面包的香味一如往常飘进了他狭小的卧室。 他已彻底融入这里的生活，将自己的梦想深埋于心。他不再那么容易对客人的故事感到激动，也不再期待爷爷能够马上回来。 「也许大人都是那个样子，说话不算数，也不愿意认真听小孩子讲话。」 他接过客人的箱包，客人们目不斜视地走掉，只剩下他一个人在那里自言自语。 他回到钟表房，如同往常一样检查那些时钟。不同的时区有不同的时间，他怔怔地望着满墙的钟表，想象着那些世界发生的故事。想着想着，他摊开画纸，继续画下自己与想象中的伙伴经历的故事。 那已经是故事的结尾了。 「伙伴们，再见！我会留在新大陆，等它建设完成之后，再与你们一起前往新的世界！」 「米沙船长，再见！我们有缘再会！」 其他的伙伴走了，而蹦蹦跳跳的钟表小人与温柔的镜子小姐都留了下来。他曾经带领着这些伙伴穿越迷雾，航过大海。每一次危险关头，他调整罗盘，将队伍带向正确的方向。现在，那个叫米沙的孩子将在新的大陆建设新的国度，直到再次踏上旅途的机会来临。 「如果要接着画的话，第二部就暂定为新大陆历险记吧。」 他画完最后一笔的时候，听见了某种熟悉的声音与颤动，仿佛有一个庞然大物从宇宙深处而来，停在了酒店门外。 他扔下画笔，打开门，跑了出去—— 「您好，欢迎光……」 在晨光下闪闪发亮的星穹列车，疲惫地，骄傲地，悄然停在了那 ——就像「梦」中的一样。
E: As the pocket watch struck six o'clock again in the morning, the familiar aroma of milk and toast wafted into his narrow bedroom from the kitchen as usual. He had settled into this life, burying his dreams deep within his heart. He was no longer easily captivated by the stories of the guests, nor did he hold onto the hope of his grandfather's immediate return. "Maybe that's how adults are. They don't keep their promises, and they don't really want to listen to children." He took the guests' suitcases and bags. The guests walked away without a second glance, leaving him alone and muttering to himself. He went back to his room of clocks and checked the various clocks displaying different times from different time zones as usual. He stared blankly at the wall full of clocks, imagining the stories and worlds that existed within them. Lost in thoughts of these fantastical realms, he unfolded a drawing paper and began sketching the adventures he experienced with his imaginary companions. That was the end of the story. "Farewell, my companions! I'll stay in the New World, and once it's fully built, I'll continue traveling with you to other new worlds!" "Farewell, Captain Misha! May our paths cross again!" All his companions left except his ever-excited first mate, Mr. Pocket Watch, and the gentle Miss Mirror. They had navigated through the mists and across the sea together. In crucial moments, Misha had steered their ship in the right direction. Now, the child named Misha would embark to build a new kingdom on a new continent until the opportunity arose for another journey. "If I'm to draw something else, my next creation will be about the adventures in the new world." As he finished the last stroke, he sensed some kind of familiar sound paired with vibrations, as if a colossal being had emerged from the depths of the universe and landed outside the hotel gate. He dropped his brushes, opened the door, and ran out... "Welcome to..." The Astral Express, glistening in the morning light, tiredly, proudly waited there, parked and quiet. ...Just like in the dream.

C: 星际和平公司「战略投资部」的高级干部，「石心十人」之一，基石为「典贷翡翠」。\n冷艳优雅的放贷人，善于洞悉人心，常常通过抵押与契约使敌人付出代价，为公司获利。\n愿意为获取更有价值的事物而费心布局，也愿意从看似一无所有的客户身上挖掘价值。
E: A senior manager in the IPC Strategic Investment Department and one of the Ten Stonehearts, known for her cornerstone "Jade of Credit."\nA beautiful and elegant moneylender, skilled in deciphering the depths of people's minds, she often exacts a price from her adversaries and secures the IPC's profits through collateral and contractual agreements.\nShe is willing to go to great lengths to lay the groundwork for acquiring something of greater value, and to extract benefits from seemingly penniless clients.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 桑博如约带你们来到了通向史瓦罗基地的大门前，却又在此处卖了个关子：原来，想要打开这道铁门，你们必须从认证机器人处收集认证才行。\n如果他能一次性把话说完的话，你们也不至于浪费时间兜这个圈子了——这就是你不想和桑博共事的原因…之一。\n但现在已经没得选了…硬着头皮跟随桑博一同前往搜集认证吧。
E: As promised, Sampo leads you to the gate of Svarog's base. He then leaves you with a cliffhanger: In order to open this gate, you'll have to collect certifications from the certification robot.\nIf he could just tell you everything at once, you wouldn't have to waste time running in circles — this is the reason why you dread working with Sampo... One of the reasons at least.\nBut there's no choice now... Looks like you'll just have to go with it and follow Sampo to collect the certifications.

C: 在救下天舶司的接渡使停云后，你们与她一路同行，试图在魔阴身横行的「流云渡」中找到离开的船只。然而形如虬枝古木的怪异敌人却阻住去路。\n击败了不知来历的怪物后，停云亲自操舵，将你们渡往安全地带，「星槎海」的中枢。
E: After rescuing Tingyun, the Amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission, you go with her and attempt to find an escape vessel in Cloudford, which is currently overrun with the mara-struck. However, strange enemies taking the form of twisted old branches block the way.\nAfter defeating the monsters of unknown origins, Tingyun personally takes the helm and steers you to a safe zone — Central Starskiff Haven.

C: 离开诊所后，映入眼帘的是一座由垃圾桶构成的巨大王国。一名名为莎塔娜的垃圾桶找到了你，请求你帮助垃圾桶们从烦忧中解脱，带领众垃圾桶获得解放——前提是取得三个「信任的证明」。
E: As you leave the clinic, what lies before your eyes is a giant kingdom formed of trashcans. A trashcan by the name of Shatana finds you and asks for your help in freeing the trashcans from their worries and leading them to liberation — The prerequisite is that you acquire three Proofs of Trust.

C: 离开诊所后，映入眼帘的是一座由垃圾桶构成的巨大王国。一名名为莎塔娜的垃圾桶找到了你，请求你帮助垃圾桶们从烦忧中解脱，带领众垃圾桶获得解放——前提是取得三个「信任的证明」。\n你找到了阿圾米德，他委托你帮忙清点最后三个垃圾桶——桶里究竟藏着什么呢？
E: As you leave the clinic, what lies before your eyes is a giant kingdom formed of trashcans. A trashcan by the name of Shatana finds you and asks for your help in freeing the trashcans from their worries and leading them to liberation — The prerequisite is that you acquire three Proofs of Trust.\nYou have found Trashiemedes, who tasks you with checking the final three trashcans. What could be concealed inside?

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 千钧一发之际，一位名为「黑天鹅」的忆者及时将你们拉回现实。她知道你现在很急，但希望你先别急，因为眼下你更需要向你的同伴们报个平安——他们一直在等你从昏迷中苏醒。\n不过，话又说回来了，为什么匹诺康尼的每一位来宾的名字都奇形怪状的？
E: At the critical moment, a Memokeeper named Black Swan pulls you back to reality. She knows that you are in a rush but hopes that you will calm down first and reassure your companions that you are safe... They have been waiting all this time for you to wake from your coma.\nAlthough, you can't help but wonder — why does every visitor in Penacony look so strange?

C: 你们几乎没有遭到任何阻碍就潜入了家族议事厅中。这里看起来就像是个能找到机密文件的地方，想必你们一定能有所收获。
E: You two manage to sneak into The Family's council chamber almost unhindered. It looks like a place laden with confidential documents, so you two can surely find something here.

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 没有任何告别能一帆风顺——按照猎犬家系成员的说法，这里似乎发生了一些异常，并且，很可能与某种被扭曲过的余音有关…\n就让他们给万维克一个面子，进入艾迪恩公园调查此事吧。
E: No farewell ever goes smoothly... According to the Bloodhound Family members, something unusual has occurred here. What's more, it is likely connected to some kind of distorted Afterechoes...\nLet's have Wonweek pull some strings and head to Aideen Park to investigate.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n敬请一探究竟。
E: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's divine vessel in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nTime to discover what lies ahead.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

C: 三月七的状况似乎更加严重了。\n黑天鹅似乎仍有隐瞒，翁法罗斯对忆庭来说意味着什么，它又为何如此重要。
E: March 7th's condition seems to be getting worse.\nBlack Swan still seems to be hiding something... What does Amphoreus mean to the Garden of Recollection? And why is it so important?

C: 学着点吧，星穹列车。黑塔大人不用肉身闯关，就能亲自降临翁法罗斯，只要轻轻出手，就能立刻探明这个陌生世界的奥秘。\n别问为什么我如此肯定，因为我早就是黑粉了。
E: Learn from this, Astral Express. Madam Herta doesn't need to traverse obstacles in the flesh to personally visit Amphoreus. She can immediately uncover the secrets of this unknown world with just a simple touch.\nDon't ask me why I'm so sure — it's because I've been a Heritor for so long.

C: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
E: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 这种时候，你的好bro波提欧竟然主动来信，总不可能是打算请你吃饭吧？
E: Your good friend Boothill sent you a letter at a time like this. No way it's just an invite to grab lunch...

C: 每场远征之前，必经一场预示命运坎坷的风浪。于神话之外的观剧台上，唯一的观众将你引入英雄未死之前的故事，拉开一场悲剧的序幕。
E: Every expedition begins with a storm that foretells the hardships to come. On the audience's seats in the Exomyth, the only audience member leads you into the story titled "Before Their Deaths," and thus draws the curtain on a tragedy.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C: 你看，「时辰」的精灵来了，她是来解放你的。但解放需要支付代价——\n关于你所离席的岁月，永远消失在时间的裂隙里，再也回不来了。\n但你要前进，用你创造的未来，偿还你欠下的债。
E: Look, the "Clockkeeper" is here with your temporal pardon. But this bail comes with interest.\nThe seconds, minutes, and years of your absence will be foreclosed upon, forever beyond withdrawal.\nThe only way out is forward, where each new moment you create becomes the currency to settle what you've borrowed from time's unforgiving bank.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C: 说起来，长夜月已经帮了三月七很多了…她究竟是敌是友，或许最好的方式是面对面谈谈。
E: Come to think of it, Evernight has helped March 7th quite a lot... Whether she's friend or foe, perhaps the best way to find out is to talk face to face.

C:
我来为你讲述「迷路迷境」的故事吧：哀丽秘榭的树林里，住着一群可爱的小朋友，它们的名字能连成一首歌谣——
一、二、三、四、五、六、七♪
哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻♪
生命微种萌蘖于无瑕忆中。心灵最柔软处，由哀怜触动的真挚颤抖，就是「生命的因」。
E:
Let me tell you the story of "Membrance Maze": A group of cute little friends live in Aedes Elysiae's forests. Their names can be connected into a song...
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven ♪
Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti ♪
Tiny seeds of life sprout within pristine memories. In the most tender corners of the heart, that genuine shiver stirred by lament... That's the "mover of life."

C: 「黑塔」特许通行认证失败、三重权限扼守的神秘舱门、三张散落各处的残破权限卡……\n破碎的拼图一旦还原，背后的谜底即会揭晓。
E: The Space Station Special Permit's failure, the mysterious hatch controlled by three separate access permissions, and three broken access cards found in different places...\nOnce all the puzzle pieces are put together, the mystery behind them will be revealed.

C: 成功集齐三卷失落的录像带之后，你发觉三者内容似有交叉，均记录着一位名叫「希拉」的科员的人生备份。\n正当你疑惑之时，录像带通过视讯号植入的秘密防卫机制使你头痛欲裂，失去了知觉。
E: After gathering the three lost videotapes, you notice that they all seem to be records of the life of a researcher named Sheila.\nJust as you start to figure this out, a secret defense mechanism implanted in the video signal gives you a splitting headache and knocks you unconscious.

C: 帕梅拉对照片提出的要求听起来就令人头大。你决定直接直接求助于当事人，没想到姬子对此并不介意。
E: Pamela's request sounds ridiculous, so you decide to directly approach the "victim." Surprisingly, Himeko doesn't seem to mind.

C: 前往中央房间
E: Head to the central room

C: 艾丝妲在你们眼前被冥火吞没，先听听螺丝咕姆的判断再做打算
E: Asta was swallowed up by infernal fire before your eyes. Listen to Screwllum's deductions before you act on anything.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n公司占领了大矿区。没素质，欠收拾。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nThe IPC took over the Great Mine. No manners. Needs a beating.

C: 科鲁泽坚称自己的身体很好，但你从他那副虚弱的样子猜测：盔甲上可能对他造成了不良的影响。你决定请权威人士娜塔莎来为科鲁泽做个体检。
E: Kluzer insists that he is fine, but you can tell from his weak look that the armor might have negatively affected him. You decide to ask Natasha, the health professional, to examine Kluzer.

C: 你与克拉拉仍然决定前往犯罪现场进行侦察。\n在这凌乱的现场里，你们发现了疑似零件大盗留下的痕迹。循着痕迹继续向前搜索吧。
E: You and Clara still decide to head to the crime scene to investigate.\nYou find signs probably left behind by the parts thief at the chaotic crime scene. Follow these clues and keep searching onward.

C: 你收到了来自贝洛伯格铁卫禁区的通知一则，得知禁区内最近似乎有故障机器人四处流窜，可能带来安全隐患。\n这件事看似确实和你无关——不过，如果你足够助人为乐的话，找到茉莉小姐了解事件详情也未尝不可。
E: You receive a notification from the Belobog Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone: There are malfunctioning robots roaming around the zone, which might be dangerous.\nThis is not your business... But as someone helpful, you should find Molly and ask about the details.

C: 对于你来说，见到卢卡守擂成功可能算是件新鲜事；但对卢卡来说，这不过是再普通不过的一天。\n卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n作为一个不懂拒绝的人，你当然直接答应了他的请求。
E: It's still a new experience for you to watch Luka defend his title. However, it is just another ordinary day for Luka.\nLuka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nAs someone who doesn't know how to say no, of course you agree to his request.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第一个目标是…帮忙打杂。\n你们找到了机械师卡西迪丢失的机器伙伴之一，「小飞」，但它的状态十分糟糕。发挥你业余机械师的本领，修好它吧。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe first goal of the trial is to... help with chores.\nYou find one of Cassidy the mechanic's robot friends, Little Fay. However, it is in a very bad state. Flex your muscles as an amateur mechanic and fix it.

C: 你结束了博物馆一个阶段的经营。\n你似乎又在展厅里看到了佩拉的影子，去和她打个招呼，看看展品失窃案有没有什么进展吧。
E: You finished one phase of the museum's operation.\nYou seem to see Pela again in the exhibit hall. Go and say hello to her, and see if there has been any progress regarding the artifact thefts.

C: 丹枢似乎准备好了她的谢礼，去和她聊聊吧。也不知道丹鼎司的丹士长，会送人怎样独特的礼物呢？
E: Dan Shu managed to prepare her gift, so go ahead and talk to her. You wonder what unique present a chief alchemist of the Alchemy Commission like her would gift.

C: 大毫执事官曾在长乐天见到你为「衔药龙女」解围，提出有需要你帮助的事情，不会真的就是看管小孩儿吧？
E: The Official Dahao saw you help the Healer Lady out of trouble at the Exalting Sanctum and mentioned that there is something he needs your help with. It's not just babysitting children, is it?

C: 没想到此人反侦察意识极高，察觉你在试探他之后，立刻对你进行了一次偷袭。\n既然是他先动手，就别怪你不客气了！
E: Surprisingly, the stalker's countersurveillance awareness is very acute. As soon as he is cognizant of your testing, he launched a sneak attack on you.\nSince he started it, don't hold back!

C: 将星槎的系统安装在金人身上，只需要更换几个零件就能做到？既然工匠说行，那肯定就行，你只管去找零件好了。\n仙舟的金人无论制式，都采用标准化零件，这可真是能提升效率的设计。
E: You only need to change a few parts to install a starskiff's system on an aurumaton? Well, the artisan said so, so you just have to look for the parts.\nNo matter what build an aurumaton is on the Xianzhou, they use standardized parts, what an efficient design.

C: 启动大衍穷观阵阵基
E: Activate the Matrix of Prescience Ultima base terminal

C: 三月七实在不觉得「黑塔空间站的显示器」可以代表「黑塔」。她猜想，它会出现在这里，是因为整个空间站放眼望去满坑满谷都是同一型号的显示器…它们以过于强烈的存在感，在潜意识里给三月七打下了记忆的烙印。\n「但这也不是坏事，」三月七想，「毕竟除此之外我印象最深刻的就莫过于那只末日兽了…幸亏是显示器！」
E: March 7th really doesn't think "a monitor from the Herta Space Station" can represent the entire station. She surmises that this item appeared here only because the station is positively covered by monitors of the same model and build... Their overwhelming presence had stamped themselves indelibly into her memory.\n"But that's not half bad," she thought. "The only other memorable thing I have from there is the Doomsday Beast... Thank goodness it's the monitors that showed up!"

C: 自己身边的侍女竟然也只是权力安插的眼线，白露还能相信谁呢？她想和丹恒再聊聊，也许是思绪杂乱，又或许是有了新的想法……\n要不是那些刺客捣乱，他们两个早就该聊聊了，此时不谈，更待何时呢？
E: With even her personal maid revealed to be a spy planted to monitor her at the behest of another authority, who else can Bailu trust? She wants to talk more with Dan Heng. Perhaps her thoughts are in disarray, or maybe she has something new in mind...\nFrankly, if it weren't for those assassins, they should have begun talking some time ago. Well, there's no time like the present, right?

C: 一封没有落款的信静静躺在列车的观景车厢里，无人知晓其到来，一如无人知晓何人会收下它。
E: A letter without a sender silently lies in the Express' Parlor Car. No one knows of its arrival, just like how no one knows who will receive it.

C: 逐个击破的战术大功告成，你和藿藿应该回到青丘台，将藏月瓠里的岁阳镇伏进束形却邪阵，今夜的闹剧应该就到此结束了。\n在你看来，这根本就是一出不合格的恐怖闹剧嘛，蠢到不行的妖怪，还有强到不行主角…都这样了，还能有些什么反转呢？
E: Picking them off one-by-one was a master stroke. You and Huohuo should go back to the Verdantia Terrace and quash the remaining heliobi in the Lunaumbra Gourd into the Evil Binding Matrix. Tonight should mark the end of this farce.\nIn your view, this is simply an inadequate horror farce. Such foolish monsters and an overpowered protagonist... Given the circumstances, can there be any more twists?

C: 在怀炎半是玩笑、半是试探的邀请下，三月七意外得到了登上演武仪典的机会。受学于罗浮与朱明两大将军的高足，有机会一窥仙舟剑术的堂奥，三月真是前途无量、可喜可贺啊。
E: Under Huaiyan's invitation, laced with both levity and inquiry, March 7th fortuitously earned a chance to participate in the Wardance. Trained by the star pupils of the two great Luofu and Zhuming generals, she was now gifted with the chance to delve into the intricacies of Xianzhou swordplay. March's future prospects were boundless, a matter worth much celebration.

C: 在剑锋及体的瞬间，凭着往日淬炼与历次惨败所得之剑艺，年轻的剑士终于胜出。该是将狼重新囚禁起来的时候了。
E: When steel finally touches flesh, the young swordmaster emerges victorious at last, thanks to the swordsmanship skills that she has gained through diligent training and countless defeats. It is time to put the wolves behind bars once more.

C: 联觉梦境的第二位作者名叫姬莲。对她来说，莱斯利•迪恩究竟代表了什么呢？这需要你去亲自发现。
E: The second creator of the Synesthesia Dreamscape is named Jillian. What does Lesley Dean mean to her? It is up to you to figure out the answer.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n在过去的悬锋城中，记忆的主人却不见踪影，看来你又要来一次轰轰烈烈的劫狱作战了。
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nIn this past version of Castrum Kremnos, the master of this memory is nowhere to be seen... Looks like you have another explosive jailbreak battle ahead of you.

C: 只要把《如我所书》大规模复印，不就能被宇宙记住了？我真聪明！
E: If I print As I've Written on a large scale, wouldn't the universe remember it? I am such a genius!

C: 对于小机器人的故障情况，维修工程师有些新想法。他拜托你设法取得小机器人身上的报错记录，然后回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer has a new idea about the meal-delivery robot's malfunction. He asks you to obtain the error log on the robot to verify if his guess is accurate.

C: 行政区的华劳斯似乎在为某件事烦恼……\n作为热心的开拓者，你准备去打听一下他的近况。
E: Wallace in the Administrative District seems to be worried about something...\nAs one helpful Trailblazer, you plan to ask how he has been lately.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n在那之前，他希望你能去花店为他的女儿选一束花——至于要选什么种类的花，决定权在你。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nBefore that, he wants you to buy a bouquet for his daughter at the florist's — It's up to you to decide what kind of flower to buy.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的「长夏」花店观察她的言谈举止。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to observe Tamila's behavior at the Overworld's Eversummer Florist.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 一个自称「仲裁官」的生物为你安排了一项试炼。根据它模棱两可却言之凿凿的说法：如果通过试炼，在今后的旅程中你会遇到更强大的敌人，但也会获得更好的奖励。两者好像都不是坏事？
E: A creature calling himself the Arbitrator gave you a trial. According to its vague but convinced declaration, you will meet stronger foes but receive better rewards in the future by passing the trial. This doesn't seem to be a bad thing?

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 伊来内声称自己已经知道正确火种匣的所在。它由三层秘术锁保护，看来需要打起精神应对了。
E: Alain claims he already knows the location of the correct Coreflame Casket. It is protected by three layers of arcane seals — looks like you'll need to stay sharp to face the challenge.

C: 试着向虎克讨教一些管理学经验，不过…虎克真的懂吗？
E: Ask Hook about her managerial experiences, but... does Hook really know this stuff?

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 集市当然是最热闹的地方。有空的话，就去看看有没有什么好玩的事发生吧。
E: The marketplace is definitely the liveliest spot around. If you have some time, stop by and see what interesting finds await.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据旧照片找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on an old photo.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是收容舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Storage Zone...

C: 西衍先生似乎有事想要拜托你。去星槎海中枢和他谈谈吧。
E: Mr. Xiyan seems to be looking for you for something. Go chat with him in Central Starskiff Haven.

C: 龙尊造像希望你帮它找出丹枫藏在此处的宝藏…怎么又是寻宝故事？算了，西衍先生开心就好。
E: The Statue of the High Elder wishes you can help it find the treasure Dan Feng hid here... why is this an adventure treasure seeking story again? Never mind. As long as it makes Mr. Xiyan happy.

C: 两个白露一溜烟小跑，窜进金人巷一栋房子里消失不见。你和捉鬼小队的成员们连忙摆好法器，摩拳擦掌，誓要将这拐带孩子的危险岁阳捉拿归案。
E: The two Bailu hastily flee, disappearing into a residence along Aurum Alley. You and the ghost-hunting squad swiftly prepare your sacred instruments, resolute in your mission to capture the dangerous heliobus that has abducted a child.

C: 完成了一日冒险，你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
E: Having completed your adventure, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

C: 云端机器人指引你在休眠舱上躺下，你有些紧张，不知道之后要面对的究竟是什么玩意……对了，退出键在哪里？
E: The Cloudbot guides you to lie down in the cryosleep pod. You are a little nervous, not knowing what you will face next... By the way, where is the eject button?

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 这个空间中的「证据」已经被搜刮完了。离开这片错乱的梦境空间，和辛格勒聊聊你们的发现。
E: You have collected all the "evidence" in this place. Leave this chaotic and disturbed dreamscape and discuss your findings with Singler.

C: 交差之前，看看都有哪些文件吧。
E: Let's see what files there are before turning them in.

C: 这是以你为原型设计的游戏，作为当事人怎么能不好好体验一番呢？启动「银河球棒侠传说」，完成最初的冒险吧。
E: This was supposed to be a game designed for you, so how can you not give it a run-through? Start up "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer" and finish the initial adventure.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 前往终点，前方或许就有答案。
E: Head to the finish line. Answers may lie ahead.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 在流梦礁，你突然感到一阵强烈的不安——似乎有什么重要的存在即将迎来终结，而你又将再次遭逢某个奇遇…你站起身踱步，等待预感的应验。
E: You suddenly feel a strong bout of anxiety while at Dreamflux Reef — As if something important is about to meet its end, and that you're about to encounter a miracle yet again... You stand up and pace around, waiting for the premonition to come true.

C: 你现在是卢卡选手的教练了！\n带领卢卡赢得第一场比赛吧！让素裳好好体验一下来自域外雪国的热情吧！
E: You are now Contestant Luka's coach!\nLead Luka to victory in his first match! And let Sushang have a good taste of the passion from the outworld snowlands!

C: 新闻发布会是体育比赛的特色，不能不品尝。\n准备好应付捕风捉影的、各怀鬼胎的、唯恐天下不乱的媒体朋友们了吗？\n是时候和他们斗智斗勇了。
E: Press conferences are a specialty of sporting events. You've gotta experience it.\nAre you prepared to face the cunning, plotting, devious, and conniving friends working in the media industry?\nIt's time to have a battle of wits against them.

C: 玲可找到了一位热心的卜者，帮助卢卡修复伊戈尔留下的玉兆。\n快去太卜司与她们见面吧。
E: Lynx found a helpful diviner who could help Luka fix the jade abacus that Igor left behind.\nQuickly, go to the Divination Commission to meet them.

C: 在尾巴大爷的帮助下，卢卡终于重振旗鼓了！\n现在藿藿和尾巴要离开了，送送他们吧。
E: Luka finally put himself together with Mr. Tail's help!\nNow Huohuo and Tail need to leave. See them out.

C: 折纸大学的校庆正在进行中，其中最为盛大的活动——「音乐派对」即将开启。\n学生们都在为音乐派对做准备，氛围相当热烈。机会难得，陪知更鸟在校园里逛逛吧。
E: Paperfold University's anniversary is happening in full swing and the music party — the biggest event in this festival — is about to begin.\nAll the students are preparing for the music party and the atmosphere is getting heated. It's such a rare opportunity. Have a stroll in the school with Robin.

C: 广告牌向你透露了车展的消息，你和三月七决定去凑凑热闹。
E: The billboards reveal to you the news about the car exhibition, so you decide to check it out with March 7th.

C: 早应被消除的睡蕉小猴为何还有漏网之鱼？你们决定抓住它一探究竟。
E: Why are there still stray Slumbernana Monkeys when they should have been eliminated long ago? You decide to catch one and find out.

C: 达米亚诺斯说他很有经验，只要跟着他前进就好…\n第一道门就把他难住了…总感觉应该九一开的。
E: Damionis says he has plenty of experience, and you just need to follow him...\nThe first gate has him stumped... I feel like you should have negotiated a <unbreak>90</unbreak>/<unbreak>10</unbreak> split.

C: 你知道，强者如云的冠军赛，每一位来到这里的选手都强得离谱，但你面前这位选手…未免太离谱了。
E: You know that the championship is filled with ridiculously strong contenders — every competitor here is on another level. But the one standing before you... is beyond ridiculous.

C: 家族还挺识相的，知道你没赛车，为你赶工定制了专属赛车。只是没想到这一轮的对手会是空间站的老熟人，还好对方车技一般没有放水，你轻而易举地拿下了晋级名额。
E: The Family is quite understanding, they know that you don't have a car of your own, so they swiftly made you an exclusive one. Who would have thought that you'll go against a familiar face from the space station in this round? Thankfully, they've never hidden their skills at racing, and you advanced with ease.

C: 不愧是艾丝妲，能用这么豪爽的送车方式来保障你的安全，接下来的赛事想必闻了。不过你隐隐想起她曾经的许诺，今天送车，明天送什么…希望她没忘。
E: As expected of Asta, she gave you a car in such a luxurious manner to ensure your safety, I guess she has already heard about the upcoming competition. However, you vaguely remember her promise, she gave you a car today, and hopefully she won't forget what to give you tomorrow.

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。在真理医生的配合下，你完成了第二份配方。接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. With Dr. Ratio's cooperation, you've completed the second recipe. Now, what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 走廊尽头的监控室或许有猫腻
E: Something's not right about the Monitoring Room at the end of the corridor

C: 走廊尽头的监控室或许有猫腻
E: Something's not right about the Monitoring Room at the end of the corridor

C: 到「大矿区」的入口寻找希儿
E: Go to the entrance of the Great Mine and find Seele

C: 帮助克拉拉维修供能装置
E: Help Clara fix the energy supply device

C: 上床睡觉
E: Go to bed

C: 开启所有机关
E: Activate all mechanisms

C: 开启所有机关
E: Activate all mechanisms

C: 将好消息带给歌德大饭店的歌蒂
E: Bring the good news to Gertie at the Goethe Grand Hotel

C: 跟随雪衣，查看此处发生的奇异变故
E: Follow Xueyi and examine the strange happenings here

C: 独自离开行医市集
E: Leave the Healer's Market on your own

C: 踏入建木玄根深处
E: Step into the depths of the Roots of the Arbor

C: 抵达「白日梦」酒店
E: Arrive at The Reverie Hotel

C: 与三月七会合
E: Meet with March 7th

C: 离开陌生的房间
E: Leave the strange room

C: 继续跟随流萤，抵达筑梦边境深处
E: Continue following Firefly to reach the depths of the Dream's Edge

C: 调查莫名出现的筑梦拼图
E: Investigate the Dream Jigsaw that had mysteriously appeared

C: 寻找砂金
E: Find Aventurine

C: 解开隐夜鸫雕像的谜题
E: Solve the puzzle regarding the Nightingale Statue

C: 对有原则的猎犬家系成员使用「钟表把戏」
E: Use the clockwork on the principled Bloodhound Family member

C: 为宾客提供帮助
E: Assist the guest

C: 通过第二道「动作派」考验
E: Pass the second "School of Action" test

C: 选择想要挑战的关卡
E: Select the stage you wish to challenge

C: 在「巨星巅峰战」中胜出
E: Take victory in the "Superstar Showdown"

C: 继续与奥帝•艾弗法的会谈
E: Keep talking with Oti Alfalfa

C: 找个位置，等待谐乐大典开幕
E: Find a seat and wait for the opening of the Charmony Festival

C: 与黄泉交谈
E: Speak with Acheron

C: 「因为忍者皆是爱此世间之愚人。」
E: "Because all ninjas are fools who love this world."

C: 飞矢已出，继续追逐普利蒙蕉授
E: The arrow has been released. Continue pursuing Profnana Primon.

C: 前往艾迪恩公园
E: Head to Aideen Park

C: 帮助知更鸟寻找拼图碎片
E: Help Robin find the jigsaw piece

C: 跟随遐蝶前进
E: Follow Castorice's lead

C: 离开创世涡心，返回私人浴宫
E: Leave the Vortex of Genesis and return to the private bath chamber
