C: 三月七想弄清机甲弱点，银狼来工造司寻找稀有以太灵。
E: March 7th wants to figure out the mech's weakness, and Silver Wolf has arrived at the Artisanship Commission to find rare Aether Spirits.

C: 开拓力已经全部恢复，请及时使用。
E: Trailblaze Power has been fully restored. Please use it soon.

C: 三月，把丹恒找来。
E: ...March, get Dan Heng.

C: 你还好吗，丹恒？小三月把事情都告诉你了吧？
E: Are you okay, Dan Heng? March brought you up to speed, I assume?

C: 嗯，我知道，但还不能说。姬子希望给你和三月七保留一点神秘感。
E: I know alright, but I can't tell you yet. Himeko wants to create a sense of mystery for you and March.

C: 宇宙浩瀚无边——我们能穿越星海擦肩而过，本已是奇迹般的缘分。若有机会能聊上几句、认识彼此，甚至结伴而行…这美妙的概率或许只能用「命运」解释。
E: The universe is vast beyond our imagination. It's a miracle that our paths converge. The fact that we get to know and travel with each other can only be seen as the design of destiny.

C: 很乐意。所谓当局者迷——也许我能从旁观者的角度帮你找到答案。
E: Sure. Oftentimes those who are involved in historic events don't have the opportunity to see things from a wider perspective. I hope as an onlooker I may provide some help.

C: 保持激动的好奇心好好等着帕！
E: For now, get some rest and stay tuned!

C: 哦，帕姆想起来了！
E: Oh, Pom-Pom almost forgot!

C: 这是太空电梯，你乘坐它来到空间站。至于你如何用言灵术控制电梯保安的故事，这里不再赘述。
E: This is the space elevator, which you took to arrive at the space station. As for how you used the enchantment of Spirit Whisper on the elevator security staff — there's no need to go over that right now.

C: 利尔他，天才俱乐部#22。最无私的那一个，最奇怪的那一个。他把一辈子时间都花在帮助别人上，这种乐趣横竖我是感受不到。
E: This is Aiden, member <unbreak>22</unbreak> of the Genius Society. The most selfless and the strangest one. He spent his whole life helping others. Personally, I don't see the point.

C: 也有可能对于这个空间站的科员而言，有用的信息全都不在电子存储设备里。
E: Perhaps none of the electronic devices on this space station have useful information for the researchers here.

C: 暂无法解释其定分逻辑，目前仍在探索其评分的意义。
E: Rating logic currently unavailble. Significance of the rating cannot be evaluated.

C: 研究室的工作屏总是十分凌乱的，桌面中堆放着密密麻麻的杂乱文件，以至于壁纸图片都看不清了。
E: The display screen in the research room is always very messy. The wallpaper is entirely covered by a dense clutter of documents on the desktop.

C: 「家用寻物仪，火热发售中！」广告机的女声慵懒地说道，你没有购买的欲望。
E: "Home-Use Object Finders, on sale now!" The advertising bot lazily declares, giving you no desire to purchase this.

C: 所以，黑塔女士超级任性的…她只做自己感兴趣的事，一旦失去兴趣就立刻走人，这座空间站就是这样的产物……
E: That is why Madam Herta is extremely... headstrong... She only pursues what interests her and as soon as that interest is lost, she abandons it and moves on. The space station was one such abandoned interest...

C: 想了解「星穹列车」。
E: I'd like to learn about the Astral Express.

C: 它们是奇物藏品没错，但它们就不是生命吗？它们的权益就活该得不到保障吗？！
E: They may be part of the rare item collection, but are they not also living things? Don't their rights deserve to be protected!?

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着姬子：「9分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Himeko: "9 points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着玲可：「7分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Lynx: "7 points!" it announces.

C: 海螺发出奇异的声响，不像笑声，倒是挺好笑的。
E: This conch makes a strange sound. It is unlike laughter, but is nevertheless quite humorous.

C: 你们…尽快……
E: You... hurry...

C: 这空间站是黑塔建的。{RUBY_B#「毁灭」的令使}绝灭大君{RUBY_E#}不出手，这里不会有什么大碍。
E: The space station is Herta's creation. As long as a {RUBY_B#Emanator of Destruction}Lord Ravager{RUBY_E#} doesn't intervene, there should be no problems.

C: …列车还没到。
E: ...The Express isn't here.

C: 好呀，不急。
E: Sure, no hurry.

C: 你和丹恒交换了手机号码。
E: You and Dan Heng exchanged phone numbers.

C: 哎？黑塔女士这么说？
E: Huh? Madam Herta said that?

C: 整齐码放在书架上的纸质资料，如丹恒所言内容非常冗杂，甚至有许多手写稿件。
E: Paperback documents are placed tidily on the shelf. Like Dan Heng said, the content is very dense, and some of it is even handwritten.

C: 这可是很科学的！不要分心，集中注意力！
E: This is science! Don't get distracted! *deep breath* Focus.

C: 盯着它看了一会儿，你发现这面墙上不仅有「你们」冒险的回忆。
E: After staring at it for a while, you realize that the memories on this wall aren't just "your" adventures.

C: 三月七的床，一半叠得很整齐，另一半没有。
E: March 7th's bed. Half of it is neatly made, and the other half, not.

C: 三月七的桌子，摆着各种各样的小玩意儿。
E: March 7th's desk. All kinds of gizmos are strewn about it.

C: 我就没动过。你看见的这具身体是我做的远程遥控人偶，空间站里多得是。哪里需要我就转接哪里。
E: I haven't moved. What you're seeing is one of my remote-controlled puppets. They're all over the station. I just connect to one wherever I am needed.

C: 我们初来乍到，看什么都新鲜。
E: We only just got here — everything's new to us.

C: 在此，我以大守护者代理的身份，暂时剥夺各位行动及发言的自主权；当裁判团对你们进行审判时，你们会得到辩解的机会。
E: As agent of the supreme guardian, I herewith temporarily strip you of your freedom of action and speech. When you are tried by the adjudication panel, you will be given the opportunity to defend yourselves against the accusations.

C: 又要沦为阶下囚了…我发现每三个世界，这种情况就要来上一次。
E: Looks like we've been downgraded to accomplices... again. Seems like it's every third planet this happens.

C: 不行，大守护者的命令是捉拿犯人，不能因为他们逃进封锁区就拒绝追击。不管是死是活，我都得亲见为证。
E: The supreme guardian's order was to arrest them. We cannot abandon our pursuit just because they fled into a sealed off area. I must ascertain their fate with my own eyes.

C: 你们不知道吗？贝洛伯格这座城市的结构，就像连接在一起的两个大圆盘，上层区负责行政跟贸易，下层区负责能源供给和资源开采。
E: You didn't know? Belobog is structured like two big connected discs. The Overworld is responsible for administration and trade, while the Underworld is responsible for energy supply and resource extraction.

C: 我得接着忙了，你们再到别处去逛逛吧。机械屋随时欢迎你们光临…当然也随时欢迎你们来消费哦。
E: Well, I'd better carry on here, why not have a better look around? My workshop will always be open to you... and your wallets, of course.

C: 好，小朋友们请看：这就是「永冬铭碑」，它是为了纪念伟大的筑城者而竖立的。
E: Okay guys, take a look over here: This is Everwinter Monument. It was erected to commemorate the mighty Architects.

C: 桑博那家伙，大概是猜到我们会问他要藏身处，一回到行政区就溜没影了。真不能指望他。
E: Classic unreliable Sampo — he probably guessed we'd ask where his hiding place was. No sooner are we back in the Administrative District than he sneaks off.

C: 没什么，只是有点…陌生。
E: Nothing, it's just a little... new.

C: 这套我熟悉…可可利亚嘛，她办事就是这个风格，先让大家都忙活起来再说。
E: I know Cocolia's style — get everyone into a frenzy first.

C: 嗯…那确实不能拆——或者说，拆起来比较麻烦。先让我仔细研究一下……
E: Hmm... Looks like it shouldn't just be taken apart, or should I say, it'd be hard to non-destructively take it apart. This can be quite the hassle. Let me take a closer look.

C: 但这盒子用的根本不是普通的弹子锁，而且锁孔形状非常奇怪。与其说是钥匙，不如说像是螺丝、或者钻头一类的东西……
E: But this box doesn't use a pin tumbler lock mechanism at all, and the shape of the keyhole is so odd. Seems like what it needs is not so much a key, but something like a screw or a drill...

C: 不行不行！这样会把内容物毁掉的……
E: No no! That will destroy the contents inside...

C: 我的目标就是成为希露瓦小姐这样的人——天不怕地不怕，一心只扑在自己热爱的事业上，还能由此为他人创造价值……
E: My goal in life is to be like Miss Serval, who has no fear and pursues her work with such passion, while simultaneously creating value for others.

C: 怎么还没回来？不会出事了吧……
E: Why aren't they back yet? Nothing bad happened to them, right?

C: 布洛妮娅大人！布洛妮娅大人！贝洛伯格，永屹不倒！
E: Lady Bronya! Lady Bronya! Long live Belobog!

C: 上床休息。
E: Go to bed.

C: 拍完了吗？快，给我们看看！
E: Done? Let's have a look!

C: 不管别人怎么想——在我心里，你们的到来就是对我漫长守候的奖赏。谢谢你，「开拓者」。
E: No matter what anyone says, I believe your arrival was the reward for my long vigil. Thank you, Trailblazer.

C: 有事直说呗，咱俩谁跟谁呀。
E: No need for the formalities. Let's hear it!

C: 其实，我是想问问你…你们这趟列车，还欢迎新乘客吗？
E: I was wondering... is the train accepting new passengers?

C: 别、别这样！布洛妮娅，你现在可是大守护者了，不用因为这点小事……
E: N—No need, Bronya! You're a supreme guardian now. Don't let a little thing like this...

C: 嗐。不管怎么样，这件标本是很有纪念意义的，我也要带走。{NICKNAME}，谢谢你提醒。
E: ...Anyway, this specimen means a lot to me, so I'm bringing it with me. Thanks for the reminder, {NICKNAME}.

C: …知道了，我会考虑考虑的。
E: ...Mm. I'll think about it.

C: 啊…收拾累了，今天就到这里吧。辛苦你们俩陪我忙前忙后啦。
E: *sigh* ...I'm tired of packing. Let's leave it here for today. Thanks for your help.

C: 我只是担心她独自一人踏上旅程，能不能好好照顾自己。不过，有你这样优秀的人作旅伴，我的担心大概都是多余的吧。
E: It's more that I'm worried she won't look after herself properly... Then again, with capable people like you as travel companions, I'm probably overthinking things.

C: 你想走的原因没那么简单吧？
E: The reason you want to leave isn't so simple, is it?

C: 会谈的地点是磐岩镇的「诊所」。我和希露瓦都是初来乍到，得麻烦{NICKNAME}你带路了。
E: Negotiations will be held in the Boulder Town clinic. Serval and I are newcomers, so you'll have to lead the way, {NICKNAME}.

C: 接下来该做什么？
E: What should we do now?

C: 堆成了小山的文件，一定能卖不少钱吧。
E: A mound of piled-up documents. They must fetch for quite a bit of money.

C: 老旧的录影机，它能放出什么你都不敢想象。
E: An old VCR machine. You do not dare imagine what it might show you.

C: 置之不理。
E: Ignore.

C: 一股腥味在你掀开垃圾桶盖时扑面而来，然而里面并没有鱼——只有一张和鱼有关的广告，莫非这就是所谓的通感？
E: An overwhelmingly fishy smell emanates from the trashcan as you remove the lid. Instead of fish, you find only a fish-related flyer. Is this how synesthesia works?

C: 贝洛伯格的汽车，一种（在你看来）老式的交通工具。
E: A Belobog car. An old-fashioned means of transportation (in your eyes.)

C: 你抱着必死的决心打开垃圾桶盖，一眼就看见那个散发着浓烈异味的奇怪东西。
E: You decided to open the lid of the can with a determined mind. At your first glance, you saw that strange stinky thing.

C: 我没有听到虎克的自言自语。
E: Not a single word.

C: 漂亮的一击！胜利者是「冷面小青龙」——以及两位临时参战的观众！
E: Oh! What a beautiful performance! Cold Dragon Young and his last-minute admirers emerge victoriouuuus!

C: 嗨，希儿，还有…桑博的客人们。看来你们已经认识啦？
E: Hey Seele, and... Sampo's guests. So, it looks like you've already met.

C: 走，我们上高处看看。
E: Come on, let's get to higher ground and take a look.

C: 哼，你们那什么筑城者，看来也不是全知全能啊。
E: Hmph, looks like your mighty Architects weren't as all-knowing as you thought.

C: 而且，也许因为克拉拉也在吧——就是那个红衣服的丫头。她似乎跟史瓦罗关系很好，总是跟在他身后。
E: It might also have been because Clara was here — the little girl in red. She's best pals with Svarog — always following behind him.

C: 现任「大守护者」不过是个骗子，她用花言巧语欺骗了下层区，而且压根不在乎我们的生存——
E: The current supreme guardian is a liar who uses sweet words to deceive the Underworld. She's never cared about our survival—

C: 所以，我们得想办法让史瓦罗愿意和我们沟通。
E: In which case, we need to think of a way to convince Svarog to communicate with us.

C: 希儿？
E: Seele?

C: …歌德宾馆的前一天，我见过你们。杰帕德带你们去拜见母…大守护者，他告诉我，你们是从天外到来的客人。
E: ...I saw you the day before the Goethe Hotel. Gepard took you to see mo— ...the supreme guardian. He told me you were visitors from beyond the sky.

C: 算了吧，现在不想聊这个。
E: Uhh, maybe next time.

C: 首先是「下层区」——这是一个巨大的地下空间。矿民在此建立了城镇，开凿地髓。
E: First we have the Underworld — a huge underground space. Miners have built towns here and are excavating Geomarrow.

C: 从娜塔莎那里得知，下层区肩负了为整座城市供能的重任；曾经，在地下劳作的矿民很受尊重，和地上往来频繁。
E: We learned from Natasha that the Underworld shoulders the energy needs of their entire civilization. Laboring in the Underworld used to be a great honor, and there was regular movement between realms.

C: 当时的大守护者正是可可利亚•兰德。
E: At the time, the supreme guardian was none other than Cocolia Rand.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 可可利亚大人决定背水一战，她认为假如地面失守，少了地上供给的物资，地底立刻就会崩溃；但反之则能支撑更久。
E: Madam Cocolia decided on a last-ditch offensive. She thought that if the surface fell, the underground would immediately collapse without source of supply. However, in the reverse scenario, humanity would hold out longer.

C: 那我等着你。
E: Then I'll be waiting for you.

C: 倒是没什么关系…
E: It doesn't matter anyway...

C: 什么？她丢下我们，自己就这么回去了？你怎么不拦着她呀……
E: What? She just ditched us and went back? How could you let her...

C: 你想知道是什么原因驱使我下达了那些命令…对吗？你觉得自己已经准备好触碰真相了？
E: You want to know why I gave those orders... is that right? Do you believe you are ready to learn the truth?

C: 我记得它，这好像是我以前给你的？你是从哪把它找回来的？
E: I remember giving you Junjun. I haven't seen this fella in years. Where did you find him?

C: 没什么问题了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 身体还好吗？
E: How are you feeling?

C: （当面问个清楚吧。）
E: (I should just check with him in person.)

C: 哈，那可不行！能给我赚钱比能打赢比赛更重要。
E: Ha, winning won't be enough! Making money for me is more important than winning games.

C: 他还有留下别的什么线索吗？
E: Did he leave any other clues?

C: 老板说了，您来打比赛那相当于免费给拳手们指导业务，我们巴不得您多来喂喂招儿呢。
E: Boss said you coming to the challenges is like free tutorials for the boxers. We wish you were here more often!

C: 传说中的外来者一路披荆斩棘，终于攀升到了到了天梯排行榜的第二位！冠军宝座近在眼前，但{M#他}{F#她}能够像往常一样轻易击败擂主吗？让我们拭目以待！
E: The legendary Outsider has climbed {M#his}{F#her} way to the very top, sitting at No. 2 on the Leaderboard! The championship is so close at hand, but will {M#he}{F#she} beat the champ as easily as usual? Let us wait and see!

C: 这个女人，是什么来头…？
E: Who is she anyway...?

C: 开始替你弟弟担心了？
E: Starting to worry about your brother?

C: 看来有人在这只垃圾箱里筑了个简陋的小窝。
E: Looks like someone used this dumpster as their humble living quarters.

C: 博识学会武装考古学派话事人在近期的新闻发布会上表示，海尔雷星分队在星球南回归线某洞窟中发现了一微缩星系。
E: The spokesperson of the Armed Archaeologists under the Intelligentsia Guild stated in a recent press conference that a squad dispatched to Hellem has discovered a miniature galaxy in a cave located near the planet's southern tropical latitudes.

C: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
E: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

C: {NICKNAME}说的不错。试图遮遮掩掩，只会让我们显得别有用心。
E: {NICKNAME} is right. If we're too scripted, it'll sound like we're hiding something.

C: 我觉得这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
E: He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...

C: 这倒不必，星穹列车与此事无干，这我十拿九稳。你我不必深究他们的来意，只要饵吞下，鱼钓出，也就够了。
E: That won't be necessary. The crew has nothing to do with the incident, of that I am almost certain. It isn't their intentions that trouble me. All I want is for them to lure out the one we're after.

C: 「都记在天舶司的账上」！
E: The commission will cover the cost!

C: 这话有什么特别的吗？
E: Is there anything special about what she said?

C: 卡芙卡还会停留在迴星港吗？
E: Any chance Kafka is still at Stargazer Navalia?

C: 快让我过去！我这批货必须尽快卖出去！
E: Let me through now! I have to sell these goods on the double!

C: 请留步！不可通行！
E: Hold! You can't go through here!

C: 稍安勿躁，各位。遵地衡司总务府的公文，「长乐天」目前会暂时封闭关口航路。具体消息很快会发送在邸报和各位的玉兆上。
E: Everyone, please remain calm. This is an announcement from the Realm-Keeping Commission General Bureau. Exalting Sanctum is temporarily closing its borders and navigation routes. The details will be outlined in the official bulletin sent to your jade abacus soon.

C: 是说这棵树的高度能攀上天空，枝条上能垂下星星。
E: It means the tree was as tall as the sky and stars hung from its branches.

C: 仙舟联盟除去人类与狐人定居之外，还有被称为「龙裔」的持明一族。这孩子应该就是其中的一员吧。
E: In addition to humans and foxians, the Xianzhou Alliance is also home to the Vidyadhara people — also known as "Long's Scions." This child must be one of them.

C: 刚刚那四个人什么来头
E: Who are those four people

C: 罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
E: How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?

C: 我们随时都能动身，你好了就跟我说一声。
E: We can move out any time. Let me know when you're ready.

C: 你加入云骑军多久了？
E: When did you join the Cloud Knights?

C: 可不是吗。有同僚在附近遭遇了怪物，受伤了，刚刚才救出去。
E: You can say that again — some comrades were injured by monsters in the vicinity. They only just made it out.

C: 这是一张来自天舶司的罚单，看起来再普通不过。
E: A fine comes from the Sky-Faring Commission. There's nothing special about it.

C: 去你的吧！
E: Shut your pie hole!

C: 这些家伙到底为何要背叛罗浮呢…想不明白啊。
E: Why would they betray the Luofu... I don't understand.

C: 一旦丹炉熄灭，烟气散去，本座立即赶来。
E: I will come at once when the crucibles are doused and the smoke dissipates.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们现在就出发吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, let's make haste.

C: 巧了么这不是，这几位刚随太卜大人一同出征。多亏了他们奋勇先行，云骑弟兄们才不用受云霞紫府的毒气所害。
E: What a coincidence — they left with the master diviner not long ago. It's all thanks to their courageous work that the Knights don't have to worry about the poison in Evemist Mansion.

C: 前进也好，离开也罢，无名客的目的地应该由他们自己选择…就像在列车上决定目的地时，亲手投出那一票一样。
E: Whether our destination lies before us or behind us, the decision is ours to make. Here, as on the Express, every vote counts.

C: 它被一朵巨大的珊瑚承托着，宛若婴儿在摇篮里渴睡。
E: The egg is nestled atop a hulking shelf of coral, like a child dozing in its cradle.

C: 我听过你的恶名，饮月君。
E: I've heard of you, Imbibitor Lunae...

C: 对了，各位若是途径星槎海，我有一件东西想托付各位转交驭空。
E: Oh — if you pass through Starskiff Haven, I have something that I hope you can give to Yukong.

C: 这是我唯一能为她做的事了。
E: This is the least I can do for her.

C: 谢谢你们，能帮她完成这些后事，不留遗憾。
E: Thank you for helping her complete all these tasks. She can depart in peace.

C: 帮我回忆回忆？
E: Think I need a reminder...

C: 该和谁打个招呼呢？太卜？青雀？小神医？还是公输先生？唔…{NICKNAME}，要不都去见一见吧？
E: Who should I go to first? The Master Diviner? Qingque? The miracle doctor? Or what about Master Gongshu? *sigh* {NICKNAME}, shall we go and meet them all?

C: 另外，彦卿还有一个不情之请。
E: Also, I have a rather abrupt request.

C: 老大，咱们认怂吧，他们可玩真的。您真和药王秘传结仇，我可不敢再奉陪了……
E: Time to throw in the towel boss — they're playing for real. If you wanna start a fight with the Disciples, I'm out.

C: 第二，匹诺康尼是「同谐」家族的属地，这也是家族首次向其他派系公开发出邀约。要记得，列车是以客人的身份受邀前往，该遵守的规矩一定要遵守。
E: Second: Penacony is a colony belonging to the Harmony Family — it also marks the first time this Family has extended a public invitation to other factions. Please remember that the Express has been invited as a guest, and that we must adhere to any and all regulations.

C: 那…倘若这美梦注定支离破碎，任何事物都将离去：朋友、亲人、陌生人；然后是轻快的风、飞翔的鸟儿、群星…最后是你自己。
E: Now... imagine if this splendid dream were fated to fall apart: Friends, family, strangers, followed by the gentle breeze, soaring birds, the stars... and ultimately, yourself.

C: 这就是耐人寻味的地方。家族送来的「邀请函」是一只八音盒，转动发条便会伴着谐乐发出声音。
E: This is the part that intrigues me — the invite sent by The Family was nothing more than a music box that, when wound, would play an accompanying tune.

C: 简单来说，朋友，我需要你的帮助。你或许还不知道，匹诺康尼远没有它看上去那么简单，家族的眼线遍布这里，我不想明说，你明白的。
E: Simply put, my friend, I need your help. You may or may not know this, but Penacony's far murkier than it seems. The Family's eyes are everywhere, but you get the drift.

C: 是不是之前的银河巡回演唱会累到了？这种情况还坚持演出，知更鸟小姐真是艺人的楷模啊！
E: Could she be tired out from her Cosmic Concert Tour? Insisting on performing under such circumstances, Miss Robin is a superstar among celebrities!

C: 说不定还会有亲人反目、家破人亡、阴阳两隔、血流成河之类的经典桥段，那可太刺激了……
E: Who knows, maybe we'll even witness classic scenarios like family feuds, tragic losses, worlds torn apart, espionage situations, rivers running red with blood, stuff like that! This is simply too thrilling...

C: <color=#ff3a3e>莫非是厢区…不，楼号也弄错了？抱歉，这座酒店太大了，走廊布置也很相似，稍不注意就会迷失方向……</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Do I have the wrong wing... or even the wrong block? I'm sorry, this hotel is huge, and the hallways all look the same. It's easy to get lost in here...</color>

C: 呵呵，理论上可以，但非常困难。毕竟我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
E: Theoretically, you can, but it would be very difficult to pull off. After all, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria yet.

C: 「黄金的时刻」是匹诺康尼的十二梦境之一，对应时间为「午夜」——在这里，梦中的时间永远停留在零点前的瞬间，明天不会到来，而这一夜的狂欢也永远不会结束……
E: Golden Hour is one of the twelve dreamscapes in Penacony, and its time coincides with midnight. Here, the dream's time is forever stuck in the moment before midnight. Tomorrow will not come, and this night of revelry will never end...

C: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: …不，你不是帕。
E: ...No, you are not.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
E: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 猎犬家系是梦境的守门人，在这里负责包括缉拿偷渡犯在内的一系列安保工作。
E: The Bloodhound Family are the guards of the Dreamscape. We're in charge of the security here, and our duties include arresting people who try to enter our world illegally.

C: 你说话好有趣。
E: You're funny.

C: 没有演出的时候，我也承接格拉克斯大道周边的接待工作，如果你不介意，我可以带你体验各种有趣的东西！只要好好工作，也许就不会被纠察了……
E: When there are no acting gigs, I work as a guide near Glaux Avenue. If you don't mind, I can show you all the exciting things around here! Maybe if I do my job as a guide, people will stop suspecting me...

C: 比如我确实不是「本地人」，猎犬家系追捕我不是毫无来由…与你同行也有一些别的原因……
E: I'm not a local, and there's a reason why the Bloodhound Family is after me... I also have my own purpose for joining you on your journey...

C: 我的好朋友米沙，他遇到麻烦了！求求你，救救他吧！不然就要出人命啦！
E: My friend, Misha, is in trouble! I'm begging you to help him before it's too late!

C: 不能逃避现实。
E: You can't run away from reality.

C: 尝试洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts.

C: 结果是这样进来的…钟表戏法，好神奇啊。
E: Never imagined that's how we'd end up getting past the guard... That trick of Clockie's really is amazing.

C: 救命
E: Help

C: （别在意这些细节了——要我说，你该出门看看了，小心别被吓到！）
E: (Stop nitpicking the details. If you ask me, I'd say you should take a look outside. But don't get frightened by what you see!)

C: 现在，是时候了。我等不堪受辱，誓要举起天火的大旗，令垃圾之王改邪归正……
E: A change was overdue, as the humiliation was too much for us. We intended to help Tatalov mend his ways under the banner of the Skyfire...

C: 啪！一声巨响，一股青烟从袋中徐徐升起，在空中拧成一团，缓缓变成了一个巨大的...垃圾桶。
E: Bam! Green smoke wafts up from within the bag together with a loud noise. It twists and congeals in the air, slowly becoming a giant... trashcan.

C: 垃圾桶王国的垃圾会是什么样？抱着好奇心，你打开了第一个桶的盖子。
E: What sort of trash would Trashcan Kingdom hold? Curiosity piqued, you open the lid of the first trashcan.

C: 鱼群…
E: Fish...

C: 请问一栋建筑在什么情况下才需要修缮？结合下{M#他}{F#她}方才的经历，答案很明了了。
E: What could possibly have to happen to an entire building for it to require renovation? Combine that with what {M#he}{F#she} just experienced, and the answer is clear.

C: 「还好」？
E: "It's fine"?

C: 要通知家族吗？
E: Should we inform The Family?

C: 抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
E: Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?

C: 忆泡中的记忆到此为止了。
E: Memories in the bubbles come to an end here.

C: 看来我们得暂时放慢脚步了……
E: I suppose we can slow down for now then...

C: 仅凭几条线索，我也很难做出推断。
E: I cannot reach a conclusion with so few clues.

C: 对于忆者，这种程度的忆域不过是孩子的游乐场。走吧，我们从正门离开。
E: A Memory Zone of this level is mere child's play to a Memokeeper. Come on. Let's head out through the front door.

C: 然后，就是结局了……
E: After that, it's the end...

C: 在极短的时间内先后出现了两位牺牲者…这件事本身就过于异常。
E: Two victims appearing one after the other in a very short time span... In and of itself, that's very unusual.
Raining...? Raining...

C: 只是他们的手腕比我想象的还要强硬许多，连知更鸟的替身都准备好了…这两起案子一定会被压下去。
E: It's just that their trickery runs deeper than I thought. Robin's stand-in was all ready to go... These two murders are definitely getting hushed up.

C: …并不意外。
E: ...I knew it.

C: …在那之前，你不问问我的名字么？
E: ...First, don't you want to know my name?

C: 「永火官邸」启程了，可怜的人们…他们还不知道等待在前方的是什么。
E: The Ever-Flame Mansion has set out on a journey. Those poor people... They have no idea what lies in wait ahead of them.

C: 嘿，你们两个！前方是议事要地，非请勿入。
E: Hey, you two! That's a place of business. No entry!

C: 严肃点，没人跟你玩。先回头吧，提示多半就在那座显眼的<color=#dbc291ff>沙盘</color>里。
E: Get serious. I've no time for games. Let's head back. The hint is probably in that prominent <color=#dbc291ff>sandpit</color>.

C: 说说引导吧。
E: Tell me about the guided tour.

C: 看着吧，以知更鸟的死为筹码，我会为自己赢回<color=#dbc291ff>自由和力量</color>。最后，我会颠覆这场美梦，创造<color=#dbc291ff>最盛大的死亡</color>。
E: We'll see. Using Robin's death as a bargaining chip, I'll win back my <color=#dbc291ff>freedom and power</color>. In the end, I'll ruin this beautiful dream and create <color=#dbc291ff>the grandest death</color>.

C: 「同谐」的光照下，一切罪恶无所遁形，我恳请祂降下光芒，并代祂向你提问。接下来…你有<unbreak>113</unbreak>秒的时间自证清白，得到我的信任。
E: Under the light of the Harmony, all wickedness is revealed. I implore THEM to shed THEIR light, and I'll ask you questions on THEIR behalf. Next... you have <unbreak>113</unbreak> seconds to prove your innocence and gain my trust.

C: …真的想要亲手毁灭这个世界吗？
E: ...Do you truly wish to bring about the destruction of this world?

C: 拉帝奥，你真该进来看看，太壮观了，我敢说你轻轻一捏就能把我弄死。
E: Ratio, you should come in and take a look. The view here is breathtaking. Honestly, you could easily squash me with just a pinch.

C: 「还好」…是什么意思？知更鸟小姐怎么了吗，谐乐大典的筹备工作一直在有序进行，应该挺好的吧，相信她能为各位带来最精彩的演出。
E: "Fine"... What does that mean? Is there something wrong with Miss Robin? The preparations for the Charmony Festival have been proceeding smoothly, so I guess things are pretty good. I believe she will be able to put on a spectacular show for all of you.

C: 是治安官大人派我们来的，别的我可不能多说了。
E: It was the Security Officer who dispatched us. That's all I can divulge.

C: 真不行。老大说了，事关家族颜面，谁也不能放过去。
E: Sorry, no can do. The boss said that since it's a matter of The Family's reputation, no one's allowed through.

C: 曾有人这么对我说：匹诺康尼在很久以前并非如此，匹诺康尼也不应如此。
E: Someone once said to me: Penacony wasn't like this a long time ago, nor should it be.

C: 我很喜欢你的比喻。诚然，鸟儿生来就会飞翔，但在遥远的曾经，它们的祖先也只得从地面仰望高天。
E: I like your analogy very much. Indeed, birds are born to fly, but in a distant past, their ancestors could only gaze at the sky in envy.

C: 确实，但怎么着？你那袋礼金里，还藏了呼叫近地轨道支援的信标不成？
E: That's true, but what's your plan? Did you conceal an Orbital Support beacon in that gift money bag?

C: 没必要，我还有事在身…不过，谢了。
E: That won't be necessary. I have some business to attend to... but thank you all the same.

C: 希露瓦是谁？介绍给我认识认识呗。
E: Who's Serval? Will you introduce me to her?

C: 现在我可以告诉你，完全正确。
E: Now I can assure you that your speculation is absolutely correct.

C: 如果可以，我一定会把它们卖掉的。
E: Well if they did, I'd sell them in a heartbeat.

C: 它没有被毁掉，我一直保存着。
E: It wasn't ruined. I've always kept it.

C: …别在我脑子里乱翻了，混蛋。
E: ...Why don't you stop rummaging through my mind.

C: 对，就是这个。把很多很多纸版画放在一起，就变成了会动的壁画。
E: Yes, that's it. Putting many drawings together and turning them into a moving wall painting.

C: 真诚是我为数不多的宝贵品质，不用特意强调。看见那片迷宫了么？在你走出那里前，我就能彻底了解你了。
E: Sincerity is one of my traits that everybody likes. And I have precious few of those. Moving on! See that maze over there? I'll know everything about you before you reach the exit.

C: 这是你第二次打断我了。你真的很好懂。
E: Oh! Shut me down like a champ. Well I guess when it comes to mind games this isn't exactly your first rodeo.

C: 砂金的行为背后一定有着更深层的逻辑。我猜他从最初就对匹诺康尼的秘密有所察觉，并不断在为揭开它而布局。
E: There must be some deeper meaning behind Aventurine's actions. I suspect he's been aware of Penacony's secret from the beginning... and has been continuously strategizing to unveil it.

C: 也许我们该就此抽身了。
E: Maybe we should now get outta here while we still can?

C: 又回到这里了。砂金居然选了这么个引人瞩目的地方……
E: We're back here again. Aventurine actually chose a really conspicuous location...

C: 什么情况，这里究竟是？
E: Just what's happening here?

C: 好像有什么人救了我…
E: I think someone saved me...

C: 还有灰马甲、领带、猎犬勋章、水壶、调饮技术、治安官的身份…它们全都是真实的——
E: And the gray vest, tie, Hound Emblem, bottle, the bartending and your role as a security officer... These are all true traits...

C: 当然，我知道你们不会信。所以同样地，我也不能轻信你们就是真的无名客。
E: Of course, I know you won't believe me. Which is also why, similarly, I have a hard time believing that you're the real Nameless.

C: 足够了么？
E: Is that enough?

C: 无论银河浩瀚，只需轻轻一握便能召唤成千上万的云骑军…宝了个贝的，得有多壮观啊。
E: And across these sprawlin' stars, a gentle squeeze is all it takes to rustle up a whole legion of Cloud Knights. Now I reckon that'd be one fudgin' sight to behold.

C: 以及那位「黄泉」…究竟打算做什么。
E: And that Acheron... Who knows what she intends to do.

C: 唔，瓦尔特先生，你们正在寻找的人……
E: Um, Mr. Yang, the person you're looking for...

C: 黑洞？不，是忆质凝聚形成的吸积盘么，流梦礁竟然建立在如此不稳定的忆质上。
E: A black hole? No... an accretion disk formed from consolidated memoria? Was Dreamflux Reef built on such unstable memoria?

C: 哈哈，开个玩笑。我是说，这位小姐会带我们去见知更鸟的，对吧？
E: Haha, just kidding. I mean, this lady will lead us to Robin, right?

C: 等到蒙托尔星系的家族代表响应「钟表匠」的号召前来时，星核早已被人激活，渗入了原始的联觉梦境中。
E: By the time a representative from the Montour system's Family arrived at the Watchmaker's call, the Stellaron had already been activated and was seeping into the primordial Synesthesia Dreamscape.

C: 我没有其他选择。梦主从来都是神龙见首不见尾，就连各位家主都很难见到他。
E: I didn't have other options. The Dreammaster has been elusive, and even the heads of the Families can hardly get an audience with him.

C: 如果我没猜错…我们早就见过他了，对么？
E: If I'm not mistaken... we've already met him somewhere, haven't we?

C: 继续跟在我身边，他们肯定会饿死，至少做奴隶还能混口饱饭吃。要是、要是我在这发达了，我立刻就去把他们赎回来，好好抚养长大……
E: My children were starving, and I hoped they'd have a chance at survival if they became slaves here. If... if I can strike it rich here, I'll lift them out of that situation... and give them the life they deserve...

C: …为什么这么说？
E: ...Why do you say that?

C: 急啦，鸡翅膀男孩？戳到你痛处了？
E: What's the rush, chicken wing boy? Did I get to you?

C: 过分敏锐绝非益事，尤其是你在孤立无援的时刻。
E: Being overly astute can be a detriment, especially when you find yourself alone, and without allies.

C: 那你随便挑一位——就瓦尔特了——把他强制唤醒不就行了？
E: How about you just wake up someone? Let's say... Welt?

C: 就是她。虽说星穹列车欢迎每一位乘客，但一个个都偷偷摸摸潜进来…你们是不是太不拿自己当外人了帕！
E: She's one of them. Look, we welcome all passengers on the Astral Express, but sneaking in like that... You have no regard for etiquette!

C: 怎么！难不成你怕了，兄弟？掏出你的枪来，咱们该干票大的了！
E: Wait! Are you getting scared? Draw your weapon! Let's make a big scene!

C: 多么美好的祝福！姬子小姐，你对你们的队伍有什么期望？
E: A wonderful wish! Miss Himeko, what are you expecting from your team?

C: 身为来到匹诺康尼的逐梦客，打倒他们，是你迈向成功的第一步！
E: As Dreamchasers who've come to Penacony, defeating them is your first step towards success!

C: 咦？我们还什么都没做…她也太能脑补了吧？
E: Huh? But we haven't even done anything... Is her imagination running wild again?

C: 嘎呜…身可死，苏乐达™之名不可弃……
E: Grawwrr... The body withers, but the SoulGlad™ name shall not...

C: …呃，不是，没什么。我们赶紧去下一关吧。
E: ...Uhm, nevermind. Let's hurry over to the next stage.

C: 你还信不过你挚友吗！
E: You don't trust your dear friend!?

C: 「流弹？什么……」
E: "A stray bullet? What..."

C: 这里是要去对面吧。
E: We're going to the opposite side, right?

C: 水手？折纸小鸟有这种设定吗……
E: Sailors? Can Origami Birds be sailors...?

C: 我在孩提时代告别故乡，踏上「开拓」的旅途，路过一站又一站，最后在阿斯德纳停下。我和朋友建设了最初的匹诺康尼，又为它的未来奋斗至今……
E: I left my homeland as a child and embarked on the journey of Trailblaze. I traveled to various planets until finally reaching Asdana, where my friends and I built the original Penacony and fought for its future ever since...

C: 我想把它给你们：我的「怀表」。它陪我走过漫长的旅程，指引那个一无所知的傻孩子不断向前，有幸和这么多伟大的人一起走到了今天。
E: I want to give you my pocket watch. It has accompanied me throughout my long journey, guiding that naive child forward, and has been blessed with the presence of so many great people up to this day.

C: 真正的「死亡」…匹诺康尼的所有人都会在「秩序」的美梦中永远沉沦。
E: The true "death"... where everyone in Penacony loses themselves completely in the eternal sweet dream of the Order.

C: 我们先四处探探吧。各位，小心前进。
E: Let's explore around. Be careful, everyone.

C: 这个人戏真的好多，他们一家子都是老戏骨啊。
E: This guy really loves dramatic scenes. Bet he comes from a whole lineage of stage performers.

C: 「我们不再需要一位君王。我们本是超绝万物的君王。」
E: "We no longer have need for a king, for we have become kings of all things."

C: 「请原谅我的失礼。忘了告诉诸位，唯有这最后一出戏——是早已写完的。」
E: "My apologies for my negligence. I forgot to inform you that the final part... was scripted long ago."

C: 各位也知道，星穹列车向来不会拒绝任何心向远方的旅客。所以，他们接下来将和我们一起旅行一段时间，直到抵达目的地为止。
E: As you all may also know, the Astral Express never declines any passenger whose heart yearns for the distant stars. Therefore, they will be traveling with us for a while, until they reach their destinations.

C: 哈，这些年我都风餐露宿惯了，现在突然让我住到这么好的地方…啧，还挺不错的。
E: Ha, all these years out in the wild, and now I'm bunkin' in luxury... Gotta say, it's quite the treat.

C: 太机械降神了！
E: It's nothing short of a deus ex machina!

C: 呀，真是好激烈的情感…呵呵，让人直冒汗，却也欲罢不能。
E: Ah, such an intense emotion... Heh, makes you break out in a sweat, but you just can't get enough.

C: 「光锥」是用于封装{RUBY_B#记忆}凝固事象{RUBY_E#}的光之切片，这枚空光锥也一样。
E: Light Cones are slices of light used to encapsulate {RUBY_B#Remembrance}solidified phenomena{RUBY_E#}. This empty Light Cone is the same.

C: 花火啊花火，整个故事里最难以捉摸的神秘人物。可惜，她率先领悟到答案是真的，为了搅混水故意袭击你们也是真的。
E: Sparkle — yes, Sparkle, the most enigmatic and elusive character in the entire story. But unfortunately, she was the first to uncover the truth, and she did purposefully attack you to create confusion.

C: 虽然加拉赫先生的身份是虚构史学家，但他在这件事上确实没有说谎。更何况「死亡」和「沉眠」本就并蒂双生，不是么？
E: It's true that Gallagher is a History Fictionologist, but he didn't lie in this matter. In addition, "death" and "dormancy" do arise from the same concept, don't they?

C: …罢了，无论如何结果是好的。
E: *sigh* Never mind. At the end of the day, this is a positive outcome.

C: 看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是江户星了帕！
E: Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: Edo Star!

C: 知更鸟
E: Robin

C: 拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔
E: Mikhail Char Legwork

C: 这只鸟儿还很弱小。要是离开我们的照料，恐怕没法独自存活。你想看着它死去吗？
E: Without us, this bird would be too fragile to survive on its own. Do you want it to die?

C: 现在，它因为人们「想要在梦中沉睡」的渴望而变得坚不可摧。如果要将其摧毁——
E: At present, it has become impervious due to people's desire to remain slumbering within the dream. And in order to destroy it...

C: …哼唧！哼唧，哼唧哼唧！
E: ...Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 哈！不得不说，那家伙本事确实不小。
E: Hah! That guy has some skills, I have to admit that.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！两位聪明又美貌的女士，欢迎登上我的「晖长石号」！
E: Ohohohoho! Welcome aboard my ship, the Radiant Feldspar, smart and charming ladies!

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！欢迎，欢迎两位女士登船！怪我照顾不周，害你们在外面久等了吧？
E: Ohohoho! Welcome aboard, my dear ladies! Forgive me for any lack of attentiveness that might have led to a lengthy wait outside.

C: …真难对付啊，那位老奥帝。没想到在匹诺康尼最危急的关头，他居然会走出「上市」这步险棋。
E: ...Old Oti is a tricky opponent. I didn't expect him to take the risky step of "going public" at such a critical moment for Penacony.

C: 呵呵，整件事的精妙之处不就在这吗？答案是：没有人。没人能够保证，一切全凭自觉和尊重，至少董事会多少还会顾及你们这些家主的面子。
E: Heh, that's the brilliant part of it all. The answer is simple: No one. There are no guarantees. It all hinges on self-awareness and mutual respect. However, the board of directors will consider the interests of the family heads to some extent.

C: （通过「抵押」便能实现愿望的典当行，这艘船上真的有那种地方吗？）
E: (A pawnshop that grants wishes... is there really a place like that on this ship?)

C: 赢…赢了？我…我真的赢了？！
E: I... I won? I actually... won!?

C: 现在就差你了，赶紧收拾收拾。准备好了，咱们就出发！
E: Everyone's waiting for you, so hurry up and pack. We're leaving as soon as you're ready!

C: 决战的时候你怎么没来？
E: Why were you not there during the final battle?

C: 你还认识砂金？
E: Do you know Aventurine?

C: 当然没问题！但如果你不想走太远，我也可以为你演唱一首轻柔舒缓的歌曲，以免你无聊！
E: That's no problem of course! But if you don't want to go too far, I can also play a soothing tune for you in case you get bored!

C: 古怪的娃娃扇动双马尾消失在了梦境的天空中，这场面看起来可比折纸小鸟惊悚多了。至于「黄金花火大树」…忘了它吧，多半只是花火随手捏的设定罢了。
E: The peculiar doll flicks its twin ponytails and vanishes into the sky of dreamscape, a sight much more thrilling than an Origami Bird. As for the "Golden Sparkle Tree"... forget about it, most likely just some random balderdash that Sparkle made up.

C: 根据《近现代花火语汇编》一书，「芙莫」一词首次诞生于琥珀<unbreak>2005</unbreak>纪花火星系的花火星，原意为「毛绒绒的」。现在，花火星人多用「芙莫」特指「毛绒娃娃」。
E: According to the book "Compilation of Sparkle Vocabulary in Modern and Contemporary Times," the term "furmur" was first coined in <unbreak>2005</unbreak> AE on the Sparkle Planet in the Sparkle star system. Its original meaning is "fluffy." Nowadays, the inhabitants of Sparkle Planet often use "furmur" specifically to refer to "plush dolls."

C: 继续盯回去。
E: Continue to stare back.

C: 难道就没别的办法了吗…
E: So that's it? There's no other way?

C: 只是有种奇怪的感觉。虽然前几站也有过，但这次格外明显。
E: Just a strange feeling. I had it a few stops ago, but it's super strong this time.

C: 蕉，蕉，蕉，蕉——
E: Ba, na, na, na~

C: 一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！
E: An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernanas!

C: 对，就是这个旋律！一起唱吧，你将要打开新世界的大门——
E: Yep, that's the tune! Let's sing together and open the door to a new world—

C: 我还不想走…
E: I don't want to leave yet...

C: 既然有缘相遇，辞别之前，可否请教阁下尊姓大名？
E: Since fate saw fit to bring us together, may I know your name before we part ways?

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 是有些莫名其妙，但越抽象的东西越容易传播嘛。
E: I guess it is a little odd, but abstract ideas are always the easiest to spread around.

C: 丹恒，记得给我抄抄。
E: Dan Heng, can I copy your answers?

C: 「整个学期的课全排满了、每天都在过三点一线的生活、毕业答辩太辛苦、论文根本写不出来……」
E: "My schedule for the semester is packed. All I do is eat, study, and sleep. It's so hard to prepare for my thesis defense. I'm stuck on my thesis..."

C: 哦，我理解你的意思，「不避艰险」的精神能为影片创造更多价值。
E: Oh, I get what you mean. The ability to not shy away from danger can bring great value when film-making.

C: 哦，面对他人的刁难，你的反应很「圆滑」，但副导演不喜欢被人夸赞外表。
E: Ooh, you were tactful in the face of someone making things difficult for you. However, the assistant director doesn't like to be praised for her appearance.

C: 校服可不是免费的，去教工办自己买！
E: School uniforms aren't free! Go buy one from the faculty office!

C: 没事，是我多虑了，你很健康哦。
E: Nothing's wrong. I was just worrying too much. Everything is looking good.

C: 想不到咱们的脾气倒是挺合拍的，我懂你意思。
E: Yep. Hey, we make pretty good pardners, huh.

C: 但即便如此，现状依旧严峻。
E: Even so, the current situation is still rather grim.

C: 但考虑到部分居民对家族的成见，这未必是件容易的事。
E: But knowing how a number of residents here view The Family... It won't be easy for the plan to work.

C: 我去探探虚实。
E: I'll go and investigate.

C: 你是我等一族的救主，收走垃圾的猎王者，怎能在此处屈服？
E: You are our clan's savior and the king-hunter who took away the trash. How could you give in now?

C: 不、不是的！我还是考过几次倒数第二的……
E: N—No! ...Not exactly. I was also the second to last a couple of times...

C: 咦？
E: Wait, what?

C: 这小猴还有社会团体，真是越来越诡异了…机会难得，容本姑娘去一探究竟吧。
E: Things are getting weirder, huh? This monkey even has a fan club now. But since we have a way to get into the club, I'll go see what they're up to!
Bana...

C: 甲虫小猴！
E: Beetle Monkey!

C: 我试试看。
E: Let me try.
Bana...

C: 蕉…蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana bana, bana...

C: 好痛…发、发生什么事了？
E: Ow... Wh—What happened?

C: 想必这位谐乐蕉师也是幕后黑手的同僚。另外我有种预感，那位芮克先生也不简单。
E: Charmony BananAdvisor must be in league with the mastermind behind this. And I can't help but feel like there's more than meets the eye with Mr. Reca.

C: 你要去哪，好不容易把你内推进来，别再做惹眼的事啦。至少…别再掏枪指着别人？
E: Where are you going? It wasn't easy to get in, so don't do anything that'll draw unnecessary attention. At least... stop pointing your gun at people?

C: 哦，难怪那些助蕉要一对一教学……
E: I see. No wonder those Assistananas only want to teach students one on one...

C: 接下来，让我们把目光投向一些更复杂的问题。
E: Moving on, let's turn our attention toward issues that are a little more complicated...

C: 看这阴翳中的城邦！苦难、仇恨、悲伤，都在浸满罪恶的土地中滋长，血泪汇聚的浪将吞没一切希望。
E: Behold the city of shadow! A sinful land of suffering, hatred, and sorrow. Bloody tears soon to devour all hope for the morrow.

C: 皆因无情无泪的御猿•邪忍，施展邪术令百姓沉沦，纵容邪祟倚势凌人，引得天下共愤。
E: Soulless Evil Ninja Osaru, agent of the vile, cast the masses into sin by foul arts and guile. Fiendlings indulgent in evil gone wild, enraged the hearts of all — man, woman, and child.

C: 初次见面。阁下…何许人也？
E: Pleasure to meet you. Who... might you be?

C: 是我的名字——以后我不用艺名了，既然要当我的粉丝，就要记住我的名字哦。
E: That's my name — I'm not going to use a stage name anymore. So, if you're going to be my fan, please remember that my name is Gabbana.

C: 姬子姐姐，杨叔，你们也来了！
E: Himeko, Mr. Yang, you're here as well!

C: 蕉（无奈）…实验成果居然受到了这么大的损伤，你们这群差生……
E: Bana... The experimental results have been so badly damaged. You're such a bunch of unruly students...

C: 失败品…你们都是不可*蕉化*的失败品。
E: Failures... A bunch of failures that cannot be cultivated.

C: 别、别动什么歪脑筋……
E: D—Don't you dare try any tricks with us...!

C: 暗门打开了。
E: The secret door is open.

C: 呃啊…！
E: Urk...!

C: 迈德漠斯，你是……
E: Mydeimos, you are...

C: 自{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战来，你已许久没有睡得如此酣畅。
E: Ever since the battle with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, you haven't slept so soundly in ages.

C: 绝对，是你忘记了！这就是*我们*，见过的！家乡的宝贝！
E: You must have forgotten! This is a precious relic from our hometown! We definitely all saw it back then!

C: 缇安…别激动，你现在需要好好休息……
E: Calm down, Trianne... You need rest.

C: 嗯，我也准备好了。
E: I'm ready, too.

C: …总觉得有哪里不对劲。
E: Something feels off...

C: 只是，不知道付出了多少代价……
E: But... at what price?

C: 她们出发了。但愿大家平安无事……
E: They've set off. Please, stay safe, everyone...

C: 打不开…是为了抵御黑潮，把门封上了吧。
E: I can't open it... It was probably sealed in order to ward off the black tide.

C: 这个…不用太放在心上。不知道为什么，他特别在意自己的全名。
E: ...You don't have to take that too seriously. For some reason, he's especially particular about his full name.

C: …找到了。
E: ...Found it.

C: 这是什么原理？
E: What is the principle behind this?

C: 如何？这确是真正的「金枝誓言」——两位也并未遭吾暗算吧？
E: So, what do you think? It really is the Golden Bough of Vows, and I did not set any traps for you, right?

C: 甚好。那么，就向上攀登，到吾之王座去吧。
E: Excellent. Then, just continue climbing to reach my throne.

C: 您，您是在让我滚，还是……
E: A—Are you asking me to get lost? Or...

C: 我是说…你们的小小游戏，可是连带着让不少人一起遭了殃呢。
E: What I'm saying is... Your little game dragged down quite a few innocent souls alongside you.

C: 托勒密总爱咬文嚼字，离开悬锋时，从大图书馆顺走了不少古籍——都是我家的，也不用还了。至于朴塞塔…呵，他不爱说话，但弹得一手好琴……
E: Ptolemy was a real bookworm, always spouting off in chapters and verses. When we left Kremnos, he made off with a stack of ancient tomes from the grand library — not like it mattered, since my family owns the library. And then there was Peucesta... Heh, he was the silent type, but a truly masterful musician...

C: 我现在能理解，你为何会把「不死」视作一种缺陷，甚至诅咒了。
E: Now I understand why you see "immortality" as a defect... or even a curse.

C: 不久后 奥赫玛城下
E: Shortly after, in Okhema

C: 没什么可抱歉的。我曾是一名战士…也终会重新投身于战场。
E: There's nothing to be sorry for. I was once a warrior... and I'll find my way back to the battlefield someday.

C: …辛苦了，{NICKNAME}阁下…那刻夏老师。
E: Good work, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} and... Professor Anaxa.

C: 遐蝶小姐，{NICKNAME}阁下，你们回来了。
E: Miss Castorice, {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}, you're back.

C: 「纷争」的试炼已是迫在眉睫，希望万敌…能尽早下定决心吧。
E: The trial of Strife is imminent. I pray Mydei will be able to steel his resolve soon...

C: …听上去很公平。我接受这个提议。
E: ...A fair proposal. I accept.

C: 但在那之前，你将被剥夺行动的自由。这是我的底线，决无让步的可能。
E: Until then, you will be stripped of your freedom. That is my one condition and I will brook no argument.

C: 自你的父亲死后，我和族人就一直在等待复兴悬锋的时机。我们将一切希望寄托于你，却迟迟没有得到回应。
E: Ever since your father died, our people and I have been waiting for a day to revive Kremnos. We placed all of our hopes in you but never received an answer.

C: 悬锋的王，是你。你会来，我有预感。
E: King of Kremnos, it is. That you would come, I knew.

C: 你知道我会来？
E: You knew I was coming?
This ██ is █ the sacrifice █ ██ of a Holy Maiden.███ █ ██ █

C: 这…确实是个问题。
E: This... could be a problem.

C: …啊，说的也是。可万一它肋下生翼……
E: ...Ah, good point. But what if they do grow wings...

C: 声音…好刺耳…
E: That sound... It pierces my ears...

C: 而逼迫凡众履行这一职责，无异于将其送上绞架。
E: Yet we cannot compel anyone into divinity, as it would be no different from sentencing them to the gallows.

C: 在*我们*踏上旅途时，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}就已降下预言。就像它分裂自身，化作世间万千门径……
E: When we started our journey, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} had already provided their prophecy. Just like how that Titan divided themself to create the countless passages in the world...

C: 迈德漠斯出发了，去背负属于他的命运。
E: Mydeimos has left the city to face his own fate.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 如果你想让妈妈帮你问问泰坦的想法…那就必须答应一件事。
E: If you want me to consult the Titan on your behalf... you'll have to promise me something.

C: 那眼下这道阻碍…只是一道小小的障眼法？
E: So, this obstacle... it was simply a mirage?

C: 呵呵，说到这个才发觉…许久没见，你竟已出落得和你母亲一般美丽了啊。
E: Hehe, it's been a while since I last saw you, and I just realized you've grown into such a beauty, just like your mother.

C: 咦，孩子们，你们是从哪儿跑进来的？
E: Hey, little ones! How did you sneak in here?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: …老实说，我真没想到大名鼎鼎的「理性」泰坦竟是这副嘴脸。
E: ...Honestly, I didn't expect the renowned Reason Titan to behave like this.

C: 挑衅只会在{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天秤上徒增你死的砝码，事情不必走到那一步。
E: Provocation will only tip {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}'s scales further toward your demise. There's no need to go to such lengths.

C: 螺丝咕姆先生受托对「圣杯」进行了无害化的处理。现在的它不过是个寻常的梦泡，不会再有什么回应愿望的非凡特性了。
E: Mr. Screwllum was entrusted to neutralize the power of the "Holy Grail." Now it's just an ordinary dream bubble, stripped of its wish-granting properties.

C: 对了对了，荣誉队员打算召唤哪位匹诺康尼历史上的传奇名人呢？你该不会和虎克一样，对匹诺康尼的历史完全不了解吧？
E: Right, right. So, honorary member, which legendary figure from history are you planning to summon? Don't tell me you're as clueless about Penacony's history as I am?

C: 名字代表了你的过往，也会揭露你的弱点。把自己的信息从竞争对手面前藏起来，这才是聪明人的做法。
E: Names tie you to your past. They also expose your weaknesses. A wise competitor hides their true self from the opposition.

C: 如您所愿。
E: As you wish.

C: 真正的歌者不会只向靠近舞台的观众献唱。
E: A true singer doesn't only perform for the ones who can afford front-row seats.

C: 应列车之鸣笛，顺香香酥酥脆脆的帕姆派而来者！
E: If you heed the Express's whistle and obey the Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pie, then answer!

C: 当然是为了找你一雪前耻——你以为我会这么说吗？别把自己想得太重要了！
E: What, you think I came all this way just to get payback? Oh, don't flatter yourself!

C: 我不是，我没有！
E: I'm not—! I'm not involved!

C: 那位从者小姐，收敛一下你的杀气吧。如果你的手时刻放在剑上…我也必须为保护知更鸟小姐做些什么了。
E: Miss Servant over there, could you tone down the murderous look? If your hand's always on your sword... I'll have to step in to protect Miss Robin.

C: 我以为，如果我能背负起国家的苦难，换来人民的乐土，即便迎来悲哀的结局，一切也都值得。
E: Yet I thought... I could carry the weight of the kingdom's pain and trade it for the peace of the people, the sacrifice would be worth it, and I would be willing to face my thankless end.

C: 不认识我？你才是新来的吧？
E: You don't know who I am? Guess you're the real newcomer here.

C: 我要出发了。
E: I must set off.

C: （等等，那边的人，总感觉很熟悉。）
E: (Hold on. I think I've seen that person over there before.)

C: 要不是我认识你，就要被你这鬼话唬住了。故友重逢？不过是你生意的一些添头罢了。
E: If I didn't know you better, I'd almost be swayed by your sweet words. A reunion of old friends? No. It's just another part of your business deal.

C: 把思绪收回到现在，如果能有一个实现愿望的机会，{NICKNAME}，你想实现什么愿望？
E: Gather your thoughts to the present. If there really is a chance to fulfill a wish, what would yours be, {NICKNAME}?

C: 还真有你的性格。
E: That does sound like something you'd say.

C: 「公司高管吃里扒外，和银河通缉犯暗通款曲」——Assassin，你可一定要把这美妙的一幕拍下来。
E: "An IPC Executive Secretly in Cahoots With a Cosmic Fugitive" — Assassin, you've got to grab this awesome scene on film.

C: 一台毫无预兆出现的电视机，此刻正以它光滑的后脑勺背对众生。
E: A TV, appearing out of nowhere, turns its polished rear to the crowd.

C: Bravo！不愧是匹诺康尼最艳丽的花朵，无论文戏还是武戏都同样出色。
E: Bravo! Truly Penacony's brightest bloom — brilliant in both drama and action.

C: 呱，Saber救我。
E: *ribbit* Saber, help me!

C: 解释也好，惩罚也罢，只要能救下知更鸟小姐，一切都任你处置呱。
E: Doesn't matter if you wanna punish me later or demand an explanation... as long as Miss Robin is safe, you can do whatever you want with me. *ribbit*

C: 葛瑞迪，你不会以为我真的只会像个傻子一样受你摆弄吧？
E: Grady, you don't think I was truly going to let you play me like a fool, right?

C: 准备群殴老爷爷。
E: Time to gang up on the old man.

C: 一段被遗忘的历史…对现状并无帮助。
E: A forgotten piece of history... is no help to us now.

C: 抱歉。我忘了你长得不高。
E: My apologies. I forgot that you're not very tall.

C: 恰恰相反，一片狼藉。所幸游客们只当那是一场狂欢，无人在意。
E: Quite the contrary — I made a terrible mess of things. Fortunately, the tourists thought of it as nothing more than a spell of merrymaking.

C: …先等会儿。如果是以这种形式纠正，那我刚才吃掉的……
E: ...Wait a sec. If this is how violations are corrected, then everything that I ate just now...

C: 这个…可能没那么简单。杨叔看看就知道了，这些停云小姐怕是有点难以沟通。
E: That's... not gonna be easy. You'll see what I mean, Mr. Yang. These Tingyuns aren't exactly easy to communicate with.

C: 为避免死灰复燃，我对你的身体——准确地说，尾巴——进行了一些微小的优化。
E: To prevent its resurgence, I made some minor modifications to your body — or more specifically, your tail.

C: 莫非…这已不是第一次了吗？
E: Could it be that... this isn't the first time?

C: 旧日的回声，你们不必消去。
E: Echoes of the past, you need not fade away.

C: 总之，感谢二位出手相助。
E: In any case, I must thank the both of you for your assistance.

C: 「想了解盛会之星的历史，就去克劳克影视乐园」——嗯，将军会喜欢这份礼物的。
E: "Come to Clock Studios Theme Park to learn more about the history of the Planet of Festivities!" I think the general will like this gift.

C: 分毫不差。
E: Exactly.

C: 这同样也是我的困惑之处。幻胧是如何扮作停云的模样，我毕竟未曾亲见。
E: That's what I've been puzzled about too. I never actually saw how Phantylia managed to disguise herself as me.

C: 依二位的意思，那时的「停云」看上去是哪般模样？
E: What was your impression of that "Tingyun," if you recall?

C: 若回到当初，仓促来去，想必也帮不上什么忙。我应当会暂缓行程，在外寻求盟友的帮助，可如此一来……
E: If I had rushed in and out back then, I wouldn't have been much help. Instead, I would've postponed the trip and sought assistance from allies, but in that case...

C: 那么，请您闭上眼睛——
E: Then, please close your eyes—

C: 要送停云小姐回去了…有点舍不得啊。
E: I can't believe it's time for Miss Tingyun to leave. I'm not ready to say goodbye just yet.

C: 我想说的话有很多，但都留到路上吧。回罗浮路途遥远，我们有的是时间。
E: I have a lot I'd like to tell you, but I'll save it for the road. It's a long journey back to the Luofu.

C: 这样啊，那瞭望台是个不错的选择。从这儿望去，能看见整个匹诺康尼。
E: I see. In that case, the observation deck is a good choice. You can see all of Penacony from here.

C: 这场告别该结束了，对吧？
E: We're almost done saying our goodbyes, right?

C: 自我们重逢起，那象征「同谐」的天环就从未在你头顶显现。
E: The halo above your head that symbolizes the Harmony — it's been missing since the moment we reunited.

C: 他的诞生源自一场意外，而且您无比熟悉……
E: He was born from an accident, one that you're actually quite familiar with...

C: 那我们开始吧？
E: Now, shall we begin?

C: 唯有如此，我才能真正迈向人世，与众生一同行走大地。
E: Only then will I truly be able to walk among the living in their world.

C: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
E: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

C: 不，还差那么一点。
E: No, we're still not quite there.

C: 好，我明白了。
E: I see.

C: 哎哟！怎么人全来了，早知道先把房间收拾一遍了……
E: Ahh, why is everyone here!? I should've cleaned my room...

C: 恐怕要做好最坏的准备，先不谈语言问题，刚才的袭击…那一击威力相当不俗，很难想象一处与世隔绝的边星竟拥有这种武器技术。
E: I'm afraid we must plan for the worst. Putting a potential language barrier aside, that was a powerful attack on us just now... It's hard to imagine a planet as far out and isolated as this having the expertise to create such sophisticated weaponry.

C: 都说不准，切忌盲目乐观。摸索着前进吧。
E: I can't tell for sure. But let's not get our hopes up too high. We can learn and observe as we move.

C: …并非来自「天上」，而是「天外」么。
E: ...Not from above the sky but beyond it...?

C: 维尔图斯，当务之急是把诺杜斯先生劝回来，重渊处处是凶恶的敌人，他们没有自保能力，随时可能身处险境。
E: Virtus, right now we must focus on convincing Mr. Noldus to return. The Abyss is swarming with fierce enemies, and they have no way to defend themselves, leaving them vulnerable to all kinds of danger.

C: 贝洛伯格二周目？
E: Is this the sequel to Belobog?

C: 虽然没明白，但展开还不坏。
E: I don't really get it, but at least things unfolded quite nicely.

C: 你终于有惊无险地骑上了大地兽。
E: You finally manage to ride the dromas safely.

C: 终于能离开这里了！
E: We can finally get out of here!

C: 但我渴望战斗！
E: But I thirst for battle!

C: 真是尸横遍野，正门前不该有这么多敌人的。负责守城的人去哪了？
E: Bodies everywhere. How could so many enemies have made it to the front gates? Where were the city guards?

C: 这倒是句实话，信也无妨。
E: That is true. Of this, you can be assured.

C: 一片死寂……
E: It's deathly silent...

C: …更虚弱，但也更扭曲。
E: Weaker... but also more distorted.

C: 虽说我的本职是织造华服，但私人时间，我最钟爱的却是这座浴场。归根结底，衣物是一种隔阂，掩藏起人的身躯和内心……
E: My duty may be to weave lavish robes, but I most enjoy coming to these baths in my personal time. Garments are shields after all, hiding both our bodies and what we truly think...

C: 或许是我有些心急…为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
E: I may be getting ahead of myself, but for Amphoreus, I am willing to take a chance on you.

C: 总算回来了，她都和你说了什么？
E: You're finally back. What did she say to you?

C: 没想到她唯一的顾虑，是担心我们向民众散布星际旅行的传闻。这倒和白厄在重渊的反应如出一辙。
E: Promise not to tell her people about our interstellar voyages... I didn't expect that to be her only concern. Though this is consistent with how Phainon was acting when we were at the Abyss.

C: 还记得那团遮蔽世界的混沌物质吗？我总有种预感，翁法罗斯是被人为封锁的。神话中的那些泰坦，也可能和某位星神有所关联。
E: Do you remember the mass of chaotic matter concealing Amphoreus from the rest of the universe? I can't help thinking that someone is intentionally keeping Amphoreus hidden. Their Titans could also be related to some Aeon.

C: 没关系，这也是常有的事，说明你更适合当一名战士。
E: That's okay, there are many others like you. It just means you're meant to be a warrior!

C: 让我看看…外形不太一样，但功能倒是差不多，也许能通过共鸣…嗯……
E: Let's see... This looks different, but it works more or less the same. Hmm, maybe a little resonance will do the trick...

C: 那儿的视角似乎不错，能拍到整个城区。我们也找路上去吧。
E: That should be a good vantage point to photograph the city. Let's find a way up.

C: 是尼卡多利？
E: Is it Nikador?

C: 总有一天，我会折断它的长矛，摘下「纷争」的火种。
E: One day, I'll break the lance and take the Coreflame of Strife.

C: 请别放在心上。
E: So, please don't take it to heart.

C: 很高兴能帮上忙。
E: I'm glad that I could help.

C: 在壁画中，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}背负着庞大的黎明机器，它的身上流着金色的神血，自左胸一直垂落至大地，向四面八方淌去。
E: In the murals, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} bears the enormous Dawn Device on their back. Golden divine blood courses across their body, flowing to the ground from the left-hand side of their chest and spreading in all directions.

C: 约定？啊，怪不得他叫你们「阿格莱雅的贵客」……
E: A pact? Ah, so that's why he called you "distinguished guests of Aglaea"...

C: …抱歉，给各位添麻烦了。
E: ...We're sorry for the trouble that we caused.

C: 成交！从现在开始，这幅《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》就是您的私人收藏了！
E: Deal! Now, this {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden is yours!

C: 拿球棍敲一下。
E: Whack it with the baseball bat.

C: 你这狮子怎么吃的是瓜呢？
E: Why are you so interested in the tea?

C: 你跟你的兄弟，为了消遣无所不用其极，连捏造历史这种卑劣的行径都听之任之，毫无底线。
E: You and your brothers will do anything for the sake of entertainment, even encouraging despicable acts such as fabricating history. There's no limit to how low you would stoop.

C: 我们真的不是故意的！
E: It was really an accident!

C: 再考虑考虑。
E: Need time to think about it.

C: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们为何来到翁法罗斯？</color>
E: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why have you come to Amphoreus?</color>

C: 但保卫奥赫玛一役，我们并肩经历了许多场战斗。决死时刻的眼神不会骗人，我能从他们的眼中找到信念，也愿意将后背交给他们。
E: However, during the battle to defend Okhema, we fought side by side numerous times. The look in someone's eyes in moments of life-and-death never lies, and I was able to detect the conviction in their eyes back then. That's why I was willing to put my life in their hands.

C: 十二张虚位的图腾，对应翁法罗斯的十二尊泰坦。而每一座被点亮的星宿，都代表一颗被人类归于原位的火种。
E: The twelve vacant signs symbolize the twelve Titans of Amphoreus, while each illuminated constellation represents one Coreflame that mankind has restored to its rightful place.

C: 阿格莱雅说的话，你先别放在心上。她这一通发难有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
E: Don't take Aglaea's words to heart right now. Her verbal attack on us was quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.

C: 可以试试让丹恒出肉装…
E: We could try letting Dan Heng tank...

C: 为了翁法罗斯，缇安老师也付出了很多代价。
E: Trianne has sacrificed a lot for Amphoreus.

C: 喔…真是壮观。
E: Whoa... That's impressive.

C: 收起你的剑…它似乎尚有理智。
E: Put your sword away... It seems to still be rational.

C: 好…知道啦。小白，还有小灰…你们也要保重。
E: Okay... Don't worry about me! Take care of yourselves, too...

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}在很久之前便已殒落。归还火种，接过它神权的半神，就是缇宝大人。
E: But the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan, Janus}Titan{RUBY_E#} has long fallen and surrendered their Coreflame. Tribbie is the demigod that inherited their divinity.

C: 「你们无法通过挑战。」
E: "You'll never pass my challenge."

C: 「离开吧…离开。即便世界会因之破碎…我也不会帮助一群屠夫。」
E: "Leave... Just leave. Even if the world will be destroyed as a result... I will not help a group of ruthless butchers."

C: 是你。是我。去哪？带你。
E: It's you. It's me. Where? With you.

C: 母亲…你还在那里吗？
E: Mother... Are you still there?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: …等等，你提醒了我，阁下…我的确去过悬锋城。请给我片刻……
E: Oh, n–no... Wait, I just remembered! I did visit Castrum Kremnos once. Let me find it for you...

C: 味道，浓烈…继续，下一个！
E: Scent, strong... Onward, next!

C: 真是个怪人…
E: What a cranky guy...

C: 可以让我看看那把武器吗，{NICKNAME}阁下？
E: May I take a look at that weapon, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?

C: 刚才那是什么意思？
E: What was that just now?

C: 不废话，直接杀进去！
E: Talk is cheap. Let's charge in!

C: 先集中精力点燃火盆吧。
E: Let's focus on igniting the braziers first.

C: 「吾等，将神王的『荣耀』封藏于剑皿之中。」
E: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Honor within this sword vessel."

C: 毫无新意的把戏…你真以为能逃出我的罗网吗？
E: How predictable... Did you truly think you could outrun me?

C: 你若知道鏖战是多么疲倦……
E: If you have any idea how exhausting it is to fight a protracted battle...

C: 用剩下的时间好好休养吧，白厄。
E: Use this time to properly rest, Phainon.

C: 神谕赋予了他新的使命，让他能以黄金裔的身份重启人生。但那新的使命和复仇的欲望相比，孰轻孰重？
E: The prophecy gave him a new mission, granting him a new life as a Chrysos Heir. But which is more important to him: His new mission or his desire for revenge?

C: 那，小英雄…如果有一天，我们必须和哀丽秘榭说再见了，你会愿意成为「救世主」吗？
E: Well, little hero... If the day comes for us to say goodbye to Aedes Elysiae, could you become a Deliverer then?

C: 我还以为你最近抽不出时间阅读。
E: I thought you'd be too preoccupied to find time for reading.

C: 我…没什么，只是有些事想找阿格莱雅大人谈谈。
E: I... It's nothing. I only came to discuss some matters with Lady Aglaea.

C: 这本书…很特殊吗？
E: Is this book... very special?

C: 又有麻烦？
E: More trouble?

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

C: 你还没解释清楚！
E: You still haven't explained things clearly!

C: 「车厢被击中后，你失去了意识，我把你抬出来后也昏过去了。幸好有车厢保护，否则我们都要粉身碎骨。」
E: "You passed out when our car got hit. I blacked out too, but not before dragging you out. It's a good thing we were in the car, or we would've been crushed to pieces."

C: 哭，都给我哭。
E: Cry, cry for me.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}也提到了「找回被夺走的未来」，还有「欺骗死亡」。想想万敌的不死之身，翁法罗斯存在着某种奇迹般的伟力，甚至能够逆转死亡……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} mentioned "finding your stolen future" and "cheating death." Considering Mydei's indestructible body, it seems to suggest that there is some kind of miraculous power in Amphoreus that can even reverse death...

C: 这算是…安慰？
E: Is this supposed to be... comforting?

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯，他开始和元老院接触了。
E: It's Anaxagoras. He has initiated contact with the Council of Elders.

C: （回去前，跟遐蝶也打个招呼吧。）
E: (Before leaving, I should go and say hi to Castorice.)
Hehe...

C: 期间，阁下可在附近随意游览。但还请不要离开卫兵视线，以免贻误紧要事机。
E: In the meanwhile, you are welcome to explore the vicinity, but kindly remain within the guards' view. Delaying the crucial meeting is something none of us wish to see, I presume.

C: 你不是爱看我的脑子么？继续往后翻。
E: Don't you just love to pick through my brain? Go on, continue flipping through my memories.

C: 算了，我大概有点头绪。如果不出我所料，他们应该不是幻觉，而是……
E: Never mind, I think I know what this is about. If things are as I thought, then they aren't hallucinations, but...

C: 还能坚持住么？
E: Can you keep going?

C: 好啦，先不说这个。你参加辩论的时候，人家也没闲着。
E: Well, moving on! Hehe, I was hard at work even while you were at the debate.

C: 好像有人留下了什么。
E: Looks like someone left something behind.

C: 修复右边的黄金短矛。
E: Repair the right Golden Short Spear.

C: 修复右边的黄金短矛。
E: Repair the right Golden Short Spear.

C: 你呀，还是这么不小心。重要的礼物，不该揣在怀里小心护着吗？
E: Tsk. You're still careless as ever. Shouldn't you keep such a precious gift near your bosom?

C: 啊，对了！走之前，最后送给两位一句忠告。尤其是给你的，蜗居公主——
E: Oh, one last thing before we go. I gotta give you this piece of advice, especially to you, Princess Homebody —

C: 这一切…还要持续到什么时候…？
E: When will this ever end...?

C: 现在…还没人知道。
E: Nobody knows... as of now.

C: 这倒的确…不过……
E: You have a point, although...

C: 据说，女王不计代价将她带回城堡，她意欲以这前所未见的伟力，将整个翁法罗斯纳入掌中……
E: I've heard that the queen spared no effort in bringing her back to the castle. Her Majesty intends to control all of Amphoreus with this unprecedented power...

C: 我们没能唤来尊神，却迎来了横绝冥河的魔物。那可憎的巨龙，玻吕刻斯，将所有亡者拒于冥界之外。
E: Instead of summoning a supreme god, we encountered a monster that cut off the River of Souls. That detestable dragon Pollux denied all the dead from the gates of the nether realm.

C: 遐蝶，请如人那般生…如人那般死。
E: Castorice, please live as a human... And die as one.

C: 不，并非是我，而是在回收灵魂时，于记忆之中传来的声音。
E: No, not from me. The sounds that come from the memories when we were collecting the souls.

C: 「——至是，工程已毕，言尽于此。」
E: "...And now, the objective is complete. That is all."

C: 没错…我难以想象，身处黄金世，享受着无尽寿数的人们…如何会醉心于死亡？
E: Indeed... I cannot imagine that those from the Era Chrysea, blessed with eternal life, could ever yearn for death.

C: 所以，就让{NICKNAME}带着我们的火种回到人间，让凡人取回生死流转的权利……
E: So, let's give our Coreflame to {NICKNAME} and have {M#him}{F#her} take it back to the mortal realm. Give humanity back their cycle of life and death.

C: 更何况，我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，注定要颠覆这个有悖常理的世界。
E: Besides, I, Anaxagoras, am destined to overturn this farcical world.

C: 但我认为，你想问的不是这个。真正令你迷茫的是…阿格莱雅将决定世界命运的机会托付给你，是否正确。
E: But that is not what you're asking, is it? What you really want to know is: Is Aglaea making the right decision in entrusting the fate of the world to you?

C: 「你怎么了，白厄？难道我们不是最好的朋友吗？」
E: "Why, Phainon? Aren't we the best of friends?"

C: 还有其他人没有投票么？
E: Is there anyone else who hasn't voted?

C: 投票啊！还愣着干嘛？……
E: Just vote already! What are you waiting for?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>没错，身负火种的泰坦即为过去的黄金裔，背负同样火种的黄金裔正是未来的泰坦——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Coreflame-bearing Titans were the Chrysos Heirs of yesterday, and the Chrysos Heirs who carry the Coreflames today will become the Titans of tomorrow.</color>

C: 其次，对于神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，指控其自身对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的严重亵渎——
E: Now, concerning Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, he has confessed to grave blasphemy against {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}...

E: What decision will you make, Lady Goldweaver?

C: 听我说：那里不是家。
E: Listen, your home is not there.

C: （瓦尔特…这年轻人还真有礼貌啊。）
E: (Welt... This young man sure is courteous.)

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「毁灭」。</color>若您无视我的警告，一意孤行——
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Destruction.</color> So, if you ignore my warnings and persist in your ways...

C: 可惜，他还是没有回应。
E: Regrettably, he hasn't answered us.

C: 听白厄说，他可能会站在逐火之旅的对立面。
E: Phainon said Anaxa might be opposed to the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 真是名副其实的「大表演家」，任何人都可能被他的演技欺骗。
E: He is indeed "the Great Performer," capable of fooling anyone and everyone with his tricks.

C: 什么…？！
E: What...!?

C: 的确。出门求学以前，我甚至都没听过有人研究这门学问。
E: Indeed. Before I left home to pursue my education, I never even knew that anybody was looking into this area of study.

C: 酒会结束已至深夜。我头晕目眩，独自回到营房。也是在回去的路上，我遇到了一个人。
E: It was late into the night by the time the banquet ended. My head still reeling, I returned alone to the barracks. On the way back, I encountered someone.

C: 我们已经听闻，你们以流着黄金血的异人作为猎物，志在清洗那些诅咒之子给世间带来的污秽。
E: Word has it you hunt those with golden blood, all in your quest to cleanse the world of the filth of those cursed offspring.

C: 要把他们送往安全的地方，让他们远离黑潮的魔爪…这是*我们*必须做的事。无论换做哪位姐妹，她们都一定会做出一样的决定的……
E: We have to get them to safety, far from the grasp of the black tide. It's something we can't turn away from. Any of our sisters would make the same choice without a second thought...

C: 嗯…天空的火种，跟我走吧……
E: Hmm... Coreflame of the sky, come with me...

C: 我呼唤你——
E: I summon thee —

C: 播下希望……
E: Sow the seeds of hope...

C: 肯定就是这个！大司铎私藏的「全世宝石」，传说是黎明机器剥落的一部分……
E: It must be this! The Gem of All Worlds that the Chaplain secretly stashed away, said to be a fragment peeled from the Dawn Device...

C: 你不就是想要刻法勒的火种嘛？拿去，给你！都是那救世小子让我偷来的，这玩意对我根本没用！
E: You're after Kephale's Coreflame, aren't you? Fine, take it! The Deliverer made me steal it! It's no use to me anyway!

C: 嗯，我决定好了。可别想着阻止我啊，裁缝女。

C: 打错人了——看来你眼神不太好啊？

E: Everyone, calm down... listen to me.

E: The Coreflame in my hand trembles violently, its warmth slipping away like sand through my fingers.

C: 哪怕是第二次看，依旧让人觉得不可思议……
E: It still feels unreal, even after seeing it a second time...

C: 那你呢，风堇。你不会感到悲伤吗？
E: And you, Hyacine? Do you not feel sadness?

C: 再见，雅辛忒丝。
E: Farewell, Hyacinthia.

C: 一个英雄辈出，史诗充栋的时代……
E: An age where heroes rise and epic stories are told far and wide...

C: 早知道就捎上斯蒂芬了。
E: I knew we should've brought Stephen along.

C: 嗯，这的确很难。但你还是应该牢牢抓住灵感，编织发自肺腑的清词丽句……
E: Mm-hmm, it is indeed difficult. But you should still cling tightly to your inspiration, weaving heartfelt and elegant verses...

C: 「糟了…一定是盗火行者来了」？
E: Well, we thought it must be the Flame Reaver coming this way...?

C: 片刻之前，云石天宫……
E: Moments ago in Marmoreal Palace...

C: 「呵…放心吧。即便我十分希望能再听见你的声音，再看一眼你的面庞……」
E: "Heh... Don't worry. As much as I'd love to hear your voice again, to see your face..."

C: 哇，简直就像…简直就像从黑潮里滋生的洗脑蚀怪一样，太吓人啦！
E: Whoa, that's like... some brainwashing monster straight out of the black tide. Creepy!

C: 哼，其实它早就露馅了……
E: Hmph, actually, it gave itself away very early on...

C: 「过去千年，我手中的所有织物都沾染上了这冰冷的神性。因而，我开始厌恶它们的色彩、触感和气味。」
E: "Over the past thousand years, every piece of fabric I've worked with has been tainted by my cold divinity. It's made me hate their colors, texture, and scent."

C: 「恐怕这次没有那么周全的计划了。无法和他们一一道别，我倍感遗憾。」
E: "I'm afraid there's no such detailed plan this time. I deeply regret not being able to say farewell to them one by one."

C: 她真的是被清洗者…
E: She really was taken by the Cleaners...

C: 除非也是她计谋的一环。
E: Unless it's all a part of her plan.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「侵晨」</color>，我为它取的名字。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Dawnmaker"</color> — the name I've chosen for it.

C: 我难以确认。我们知之甚少，有关神性。
E: It's difficult to confirm. About divinity, we know very little.

C: 谢谢你把我带到了这里，阿格莱雅…你拯救了我。
E: Thank you for bringing me here, Aglaea... You saved me.

C: 但你没猜错——就把这当做买一赠一的特别服务吧。除了保护刻法勒的火种…我会再卖你们一个人情，顺带陪那条疯狗玩玩。
E: But you guessed it right. Consider this a two-for-one deal. I'll keep that lunatic entertained on top of protecting Kephale's Coreflame — You owe a big favor after this.

C: 千年前，我接过墨涅塔火种的时候…你认为我那时准备好了吗，吾师？
E: A thousand years ago, when I took up the Coreflame of Mnestia... do you think I was ready then, teacher?

C: 遐蝶！你从刚才起就一直在偷笑，不如接下来就由你来分享吧？
E: Castorice! You've been giggling for quite some time. How about you go next?

C: …开个玩笑哈，我懂你的意思。那救世小子身上的确有种让人信服的气质，不输当年的阿格莱雅。
E: ...Just kidding, I get it. That Deliverer boy does have a certain charisma about him. It reminds me of Aglaea in her prime.

C: 哎呀哈，什么使命不使命的，说得那么严肃……
E: Ahaha, all this talk about missions... you're making it sound way too serious.

C: 走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
E: Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.

C: 打完这一仗，我们就回家！
E: We'll go home as soon as this battle finishes!

C: 那座显眼的装置，恐怕就是举办仪式用的？去看看吧——环境很黑，请当心脚下。
E: That really conspicuous device might be part of the ritual? Let's go take a look. It's dark, so watch your feet.

C: 呵…愚昧的雨之民啊……
E: Heh... Foolish Rainfolk...

C: 黑潮的威胁逼迫黄金裔完成逐火之旅，迈向神谕中的创世奇迹。
E: The black tide's threat has forced the Chrysos Heirs to complete our Flame-Chase Journey, heading toward the prophecy's Miracle of Genesis.

C: 但她没有憎恨那些族人，依然长成了一名热情的少女。
E: Yet she bore no hatred for her people, and still grew into a passionate young lady.

C: 更何况……
E: Furthermore...

C: …我正好想与这小家伙独处片刻。
E: ...I would like to have a moment alone with this little one.

C: …抹去残酷、流血和平庸者的悲歌，放大英雄的荣光、赞颂他们的功绩——史诗和传说，自古如此。
E: ...Legends and epics have always erased the cruelty, the bloodshed, and the cries of the commoners, while glorifying the heroes and their triumphs.

C: 我已唤来了虹桥。沿着它行进，在穹顶了结人子与那泰坦的命运纠葛吧。
E: I've called forth the Rainbow Bridge. Proceed along its path to the dome where the entwined fates of humanity and the Titan must be resolved.

C: 她曾念念不忘的奇迹…只差一步便能化作现实了啊。
E: The miracle she never stopped dreaming of... is just one step away from becoming reality.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>——在英雄塞涅俄丝开启逐火之旅后，天空之民所遭遇的一切。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>— We will reveal all that befell the Skyfolk after Seliose initiated the Flame-Chase Journey.</color>

C: 他也是一位战士吗？又或者……
E: Was he also a warrior? Or perhaps...

C: 试着用它操控风场吧，搭档？
E: Let's try to control the wind's direction with this thing, partner!

C: 消失无踪…？
E: Lost to the winds...?

C: 下楼吧…浴宫就在不远处了。
E: Let's head downstairs... The bath chamber isn't far away.

C: (「记忆」命途拥有让一个区域内时间暂停的能力，或许能帮上忙……)
E: (The Path of "Remembrance" holds the power to suspend time in a given area... Maybe that could help...)

C: 丹恒一个人回去，有点担心。
E: I hope Dan Heng will be okay heading back on his own.

C: 毕竟，就像列车之于你和丹恒…翁法罗斯也是人家的故乡呀。
E: Like how you and Dan Heng treasure the Express... Amphoreus means everything to me.

C: 试问：结果会如何？答案或许出乎意料地简单。
E: What would happen? Perhaps the answer is simpler than you'd think.

C: 昔涟…？
E: Cyrene?

C: 这是…玩具？真是，多大个人了还玩玩具。
E: Is this... a toy? Really now, aren't we past the age for these?

C: 我也想看看。
E: I want to read it.

C: 毕竟我们都长大了。
E: We had to grow up sometime.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>没错。迷境每迎来一位新的妖精，都代表帷幕之外，那远离哀丽秘榭的广阔天地，将要经历一场天翻地覆的劫难哪。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Indeed. Every time a new fairy arrives in the maze, it means that Beyond the Veil, in the vast lands far from Aedes Elysiae, a great calamity is on the horizon.</color>

C: 嗯，小白，记好啦！我们……
E: Mark these words, Snowy! See you...

C: 看来在他心中，比世界更重要的，是族人和荣耀……
E: So to him, glory and his people outweigh the entire world...

C: 历史会记下这一刻，神谕中的黄金裔已悉数就位，它喻示着翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明。
E: History shall remember this moment. The prophesied Chrysos Heirs now stand assembled, heralding a new dawn for Amphoreus.

C: 他们正在呐喊：即便身陨，也愿汇成洪流，拱卫创世涡心，让「再创世」付诸实现。
E: They cry out: Though dead, they'll converge into a torrent and guard the Vortex, to see the Era Nova fulfilled.

C: 请看：那立于剑士身侧的，正是他时而称为伙伴、时而称作战友，那在历史中杳无踪迹的「无名英雄」——
E: Behold. At the swordsman's side stands one he has sometimes called companion, other times comrade, that Nameless Hero absent from the annals of history —

C: 嘿嘿，我们最近引进了很好吃的「刺刺球」哦！
E: Heehee~ We're growing these yummy "Quillorbs" now!

C: 好久不见！
E: Long time no see!

C: 又一次尝试，又一次失败。
E: Another attempt. Another failure.

C: 以此身祭火…燃烧下去…！
E: This form shall fuel the fire... burn, burn unceasing!

C: 不过，我们可不打算告诉你♪
E: But, we're not gonna tell ya ♪

C: 奋力地燃烧自己，以徒劳为剑，反抗神明吧——
E: Burn yourself up with all your might, wield your futility like a sword, and fight against the gods—

C: 在故人引荐下，我得见逐火之旅的领导者，刻律德菈。一场艰难而漫长的谈判后，我们达成共识——
E: Through my old acquaintances, I was given the chance to meet the leader of the Flame-Chase Journey, Cerydra. And after a long and arduous negotiation, we came to an agreement—

C: 我只记得一只若虫，它藏在余光尚不能及的阴影中，徒劳地推着石球……
E: I only remember a nymph, hiding in the shadows just out of sight, futilely pushing a stone ball...

C: 哼…那还真是谢谢你啊。但我同样相信，这一次你追不上我——
E: Heh... well, thank you for that. But I also believe that this time, you won't catch up to me—

C: …这几百万次的轮回里，还从未有意外发生。
E: ...Not once, in millions of cycles, has there ever been an exception.

C: 那份属于平凡人的…属于你自己的，温暖…却微乎其微呢？
E: The part of that warmth that should come from you... from an ordinary person... it's so faint.

C: 但…我依旧愿意相信你，救世主。
E: But... I still believe in you, Deliverer.

C: 还记得吗？在最初的时间线里，你和迈德漠斯曾在公正天秤前展开「角斗」，称量各自心中「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」。
E: Do you remember? In that first timeline, you and Mydeimos stood before the Scales of Justice, locked in a "duel," each of you weighing what you held dearest, "what weighed more than the fate of the world."

C: 好痛…火焰，在灼烧…？！
E: It hurts... the fire... burning...!?

C: 醒醒……
E: Wake up...

C: 不知不觉中，我们一起走过了好愉快的旅途呀，直到世界的尽头都在一起。
E: Without even realizing it, we'd already taken a wonderful journey together, all the way to the world's end.

C: 昔涟，你知道我该怎么回到自己的世界吗？
E: Tell me, Cyrene, how can I return to my world?

C: 是呀。妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
E: That's right. He's the mastermind who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.

C: 嗯…{NICKNAME}，是不是得借助一下你身上的宝贝啦？
E: Hmm... Which means it's probably time to borrow that treasure you're carrying, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我就不发表什么励志演讲了，只希望下次见面你能带来好消息，小家伙。
E: I'm not gonna give any motivational speeches. I just hope you bring good news the next time we meet, little one.

C: 这是翁法罗斯的最后一次逐火之旅，但对于我们，它不是结束，而是开始。
E: This will be Amphoreus's final Flame-Chase Journey, but it won't be the end of us... It'll be the beginning.

C: 也许在旅行途中，你可以把那些故事都讲给我听。这样一来，它们也能成为我们共同的回忆。
E: Maybe you can tell me those stories as we travel. That way, they can become our shared memories too.

C: 此地是翁法罗斯与现实宇宙的交界，是鄙人观察这场实验的观众席，您亦可称之为…<color=#dbc291ff>「神话之外」。</color>
E: This is the intersection between Amphoreus and the real universe, the audience seat where I observe this experiment. You can also call this location... the <color=#dbc291ff>"Exomyth."</color>

C: 至于这两位误入法场的「客人」……
E: Now, these two accidental guests...

C: 救世之旅，始于足下……
E: The journey to save the world starts with a single step...

C: …让人家套点话试试看吧。
E: Let me see what I can get out of them...

C: 我来斫断你这无礼之徒的冰碴子！
E: Insolent brat, I'll shatter that ice of yours!

C: 诸君，请肃静。凯撒已驾临她忠诚的议会，同盟会议即将开始。
E: Ladies and gentlemen, silence please. The Imperator has arrived before her faithful council, and the alliance meeting is about to begin.

C: 我不会。
E: I won't.

C: 啧啧，道阻且长啊。
E: Tsk tsk, the road ahead will be long and difficult.

C: 有关智械哥的来历：他编写的防火墙，使用的是十四行代数式——在{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#22}利尔他{RUBY_E#}发明九字算法后，银河中早就不存在这种数学逻辑了。
E: Concerning the origin of that Intellitron: The firewall he created uses quatorzain algebraic expressions. But ever since {RUBY_B#Genius Society #22}Aiden{RUBY_E#} invented the nine-worded formulae, this kind of mathematical logic no longer exists in the cosmos.

C: {NICKNAME}此行前来，正是为了阻止那个坏人的阴谋。我们的立场是一致的。
E: {NICKNAME} has in fact come here to stop that villain's evil scheme. Our goals are aligned.

C: 试想这样一种可能性：若我将奥赫玛夷为平地，将她的人民碾作死灰，列位英雄又是否会重新觊觎半神的力量，以便与我相抗？
E: Why don't you entertain this possibility? What if I reduced Okhema to rubble and ground her people into minced meat? Would the heroes then once again desire the power of demigods, so they could fight against me?

C: 在记忆的力量流淌过后，一个不应存在于此的事物，在你的眼前浮现……
E: After the power of Remembrance flows through, something that should not exist here materializes before your eyes...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>——现在本姑娘就是罗刹雕像上那人就是丹恒的兄弟左青龙右白虎少吃碳水化合物——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...Aaaand now I'm Luocha~ The statue... is that... ...Dan Heng's brother!? Azure Dragon, White Tiger, eating less carbs...</color>

C: 翁法罗斯的三月，属于永夜之帷的时间…暂时以<color=#dbc291ff>长夜月</color>这个称呼，将我放进你的回忆中吧♭
E: The third month of Amphoreus is the month reserved for the <color=#dbc291ff>Veil of Evernight</color>... So, place me into your memory using the name "Evernight" for now ♭

C: 现在，带着它回去吧，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。回到翁法罗斯，扭转最后的「再创世」……
E: Now, take it, and return with it, dear {NICKNAME}. Return to Amphoreus and overturn the final Era Nova.

C: 而我会在时间的角落静静注视，等待下一场邂逅的到来……
E: And I will silently watch in a corner of time, waiting for our next encounter...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>令「纷争」的锋刃永远高悬，同它的敌人厮杀到世界尽头！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Let the blade of Strife hang forever overhead, locked in battle with their enemies to the world's bitter end!</color>

C: 你是怂了，还是不相信「诡计」半神的含金量？
E: What, getting cold feet? Or you just don't believe in the almighty worth of the demigod of Trickery?

C: 前进吧，完成那未竟的大功业。
E: Go forth. Finish the greatness left undone.

C: （我要找到「海洋」半神守护的涡心入口…海瑟音，她还在这里吗？）
E: (I need to find the entrance to the Vortex guarded by the demigod of Ocean. Hysilens... is she still there?)

C: 哦，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}，高贵的女王！我们已响应您的召唤而来。
E: Oh, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, our noble queen! We've come at your call!

C: 我…只要一处能令我容身的宴席。
E: All I want... is a feast where I might belong.

C: 在出征的前日，我们高唱颂歌，准备向星海启航……
E: On the eve of war, we sang our hymns, and set our sights to sail beyond the stars...

C: 这便是真正的结局…她的宏图被剑锋撕裂，华贵的衣袍被金血沾满……
E: This... is the true ending. Her grand designs torn apart by the blade, her regal robes soaked in golden blood...

C: 她的伟业，将不再限于翁法罗斯之间……
E: Her glory will no longer be bound by the borders of Amphoreus...

C: 啊，这充满讽刺的宿命……
E: Ah, such an ironic twist of fate...

C: 但我也不会任机会溜走。毕竟，如若有万分之一的机会能在你的心壁上凿出裂缝……
E: But I won't squander a chance, not even a sliver of one. If there's even a crack in the walls of your conviction...

C: 但对你却不同，剑旗爵。孤独自寂静的深海中伸出魔爪，它正在蚕食着你，逐渐剥离你的心智——你会退化成那些失迷海妖的模样吗？多么令人惋惜……
E: But you're different, Dux Gladiorum. Loneliness has crept from the silent depths, sinking its claws into your mind. Bit by bit, it's peeling you apart... Will you regress into one of those lost, mad sirens? Oh, what a shame that would be...

C: 那便是决定翁法罗斯，乃至银河命运的时分。
E: That shall be the moment that decides the fate of Amphoreus and the entire cosmos.

C: 前进吧，为了荣耀的金血！
E: Go forth. For the golden blood's glory!

C: 阿波罗尼…你看…
E: Apollonius... look...

C: 接下来，你我就要走向世界的终点。
E: Now... You and I will walk towards the end of this world.

C: 至于求解的过程，无论优雅或暴烈，庄严或谐谑——
E: As for the process of solving it... No matter how elegant, violent, solemn, or humorous...

C: 这颗星星叫做「雅利洛-VI」。啊，这个名字冷冰冰的，还是「贝洛伯格」更好听。
E: This star is named Jarilo-VI. Aww, that name sounds so cold... Belobog sounds better.

C: 呵…如此奢华，着实惹人惊叹。
E: Huh... Such opulence does indeed evoke astonishment.

C: （这一次「再创世」，就是和铁墓决战的舞台。）
E: (This "Era Nova" will be the arena for the final battle with Irontomb.)

C: 我只关心三月七的安危！
E: I only care about March 7th's safety!

C: 就像忆者们脱化肉身，化作迷因。如今的你…是一个无人知晓的幽灵。
E: Like how the Memokeepers renounce their flesh and turn into memetic entities, you are now a ghost... a being unperceived by all.

C: 告诉我，要怎么做，才能保护{NICKNAME}和丹恒？
E: ...Please. Tell me what I need to do to protect {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng.

C: 丹恒阁下，就此别过了。
E: This is goodbye then, Lord Dan Heng.

C: 请相信我的直觉。
E: Please trust me on this.

C: 那是否意味着，现在只有我和{NICKNAME}身上带有翁法罗斯的「通行证」？
E: Then does that mean only {NICKNAME} and I have the "travel permit" for Amphoreus right now?

C: 呃…不知道你在说什么，咱们还是别打哑谜了，要不…先来个自我介绍？
E: Um... I don't know what you're saying. Let's not speak in riddles, alright? Why don't we... start with an introduction!

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>封装完成，开始传输——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Encapsulation complete. Initiating transmission—</color>

C: 嗨，想我了吗？
E: Hi, miss me yet?

C: 这很正常。派系只是星神的追随者，而浮黎…从来不是一位亲人的神明。
E: That's to be expected. The various factions are only followers of their Aeons, and Fuli was never known to be friendly with humanity.

C: 不过，有件事我也不理解：根据黑天鹅的说法，忆庭内部并不团结，有一股势力贪图「神殒的记忆」，行事不择手段。
E: But there's still something I don't understand: According to Black Swan, the Garden is internally fractured, and there is a party that craves the "Memory of an Aeon's Fall." They would do anything to achieve that goal.

C: 我们在想同样的事。
E: Yes. We're thinking the same thing.

C: 但他们不会放弃，我们也不会。
E: But they wouldn't give up. And neither will we.

C: 可是，在提出这个问题前……
E: Well, take a step back. Before we ask this question...

C: …我不同意，但你请便。我只是觉得，手账还是该以记录风土人情为主。
E: ...I'm against including this photo, but suit yourself. I just think that a travel journal should mainly focus on documenting local customs and culture.

C: 要是三月在，肯定能提供不少好点子。
E: If March were here, she'd definitely have plenty of great ideas.

C: 你的眼睛很清澈。当一切过去，我希望镜子映出的，依旧是那双眼眸。
E: Your eyes were so clear. When all this is over, I hope the mirror can still reflect those same eyes.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#「神秘」}「忘却」{RUBY_E#}</color>会守望你的来路，如长夜般隐秘，永远安宁♭。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#The Enigmata}"Oblivion"{RUBY_E#}</color> shall keep watch over your past, veiled in the hush of the evernight, silent and serene. ♭

C: 看看它。
E: Take a look.

C: 在她的言语中，我捕捉到一种强烈而纯粹的……
E: Within her words, I sensed an intense but utterly pure...

C: 这位半神的意志值得尊敬，但我的立场不会变。
E: While I admire that demigod's willpower, my position has not changed.

C: 你这酒鬼，喝些泉水也能喝醉吗？
E: Ridiculous, how did you get drunk from spring water?

C: 不出所料，有人已恭候我们多时了。
E: As expected, someone's been waiting for us.

C: 「不朽」的龙裔，还有…你昔日的战友。
E: A Scion of Permanence... and your old comrade-in-arms.

C: 交给我吧。阐述「大地」至沉的过去……
E: Leave it to me. I'll recount the Earth's heaviest past...

C: 谢谢。我们无法回到过去，做出更好的选择。但至少，我们会在未来的轮回中做得更好。
E: Thank you. We can't go back to the past and make better choices. But at least we can do better in the future.

C: {NICKNAME}的留影石机？怎么会在这儿？
E: Is that {NICKNAME}'s photostone? What's it doing here?

C: 旅途…伙伴……
E: Travel... companions...

C: 但在那之前，我很乐意见证几位无名客重逢，并护送你们踏上归途。
E: But before that... I'd be very willing to witness the reunion of the Nameless and to escort you on your way home.

C: 也罢。我只是提供一个思考的方向。选择权仍在您手中。
E: Fine. I am only giving you a possibility for you to ponder. The choice is still in your hands.

C: 实验结束。贤者本以为这具躯壳在刺激停止后便会死亡。但很遗憾，他错了。
E: The experiment was over. The sage had assumed this shell would perish once the stimulation ceased. Unfortunately, he was wrong.

C: 别闹了，三月。快出来吧。
E: Stop fooling around, March. Come on out.

C: 「『救世主』的神谕，于我已无意义。它应当被交予更合适的人手中——」
E: "The prophecy of the 'Deliverer' means nothing to me now. It belongs in the hands of someone far more fitting..."

C: 这一世，童年般的「黄金世」会延续千年，直到神谕中注定的瞬间——
E: Like a happy and carefree childhood, the "Era Chrysea" in this cycle will last for millennia, until it reaches the moment decided by the prophecy...

C: 也太强了吧，根本轮不到咱们出手……
E: Whoa, he's so strong! We didn't even get a chance to jump in...

C: 他希望我们，作何回应呢？
E: What answer does he hope for from us?

C: 等你们好久啦。灰宝，丹宝，还有……
E: I've been waiting so long for you! Grayie, Dannie, and...

C: 奇迹同样需要你们。
E: The miracle needs you too.

C: 这些散落的卷轴，记录着很可怕的内容。堆满整间屋子。
E: These scattered scrolls are full of terrifying things. And they're all over the room.

C: 「这一次，我们要面对他的『绝望』。」
