E: "This time, we'll face his despair."

C: 从今以后，世界不再需要神谕许诺的明天。
E: From now on, the world no longer needs a tomorrow promised by prophecies.

C: 终于来了，救世主们。
E: You've finally arrived, Deliverers.

C: 「只有同时背负光与影，才能走过轮转的晨昏。」
E: "Only by bearing both light and shadow can one traverse the cycles of dawn and dusk."

C: 很遗憾，我们不得不做出合理的推测：铁墓的诞生，始终在星神的计算中。
E: Unfortunately, we have to go with this reasonable assumption: The birth of Irontomb had always been within that Aeon's calculations.

C: 而这一次，主人公们甚至想自行著述。
E: The difference this time is that the protagonists are daring to write their own stories.

C: 你的声音，好遥远…
E: You sound... so... far away...

C: 卡芙卡…？
E: Kafka...?

C: 而现在，我们要用这片宁静，净化铁墓的怒火。
E: And now, we will use this tranquility to cleanse Irontomb's rage.

C: 但在「记忆」和「开拓」笔下……
E: But under the pen of the Remembrance and the Trailblaze...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是知晓命运的破碎，仍以破碎拥抱命运，一段渴望被爱，更渴望去爱的旅途。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's about knowing how fate is shattered, yet still embracing fate's brokenness. It's a journey that longs to receive love, but longs even more to offer its love to others.</color>

C: 真是听着就让人家怦怦心跳呀。
E: That's so heartwarming!

C: 除非有人将「爱」栽种于心，带上它{RUBY_B#开拓}前往{RUBY_E#}明天，对吧？
E: Unless someone plants that "love" into their heart and {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}brings it with them{RUBY_E#} into tomorrow, right?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为创世，镌写开篇的一笔！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And inscribe the opening stroke of genesis!</color>

C: 收获月，我教愚人启蒙「智识」——
E: In the Month of Reaping, I enlighten the foolish with luminary Erudition...

C: 「不、不好了帕！三月乘客，正在梦游帕！」
E: "Oh no! Passenger March is sleepwalking!"

C: 那么，该到我了。
E: Well then, it's my turn.

C: 罢了罢了，脑子一时转不动了哪。就让本姑娘难得真诚一回吧——
E: Oh well, my brain's not working right now. Let me be genuinely sincere for once...

C: 我相信，那个我最在乎的{F#她}{M#他}……
E: I believe that the one I cared for most...

C: 我相信，在那段故事里，又或者无数段相似而不相同的故事之后，大家…所有牺牲的伙伴，都能和我们儿时憧憬的「救世主」一起，在更辽阔的星空下相聚。
E: I believe that in that story — or in countless stories, each alike yet unique — everyone... all the companions who sacrificed themselves, alongside the Deliverer we once dreamed of as children, will reunite beneath a vast, endless sky.

C: 可是，千万别忘记：逐火是不断失却的旅途。或许痛苦会有许多，但你我从未孤独。
E: But remember this well: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. There may be pain along the way, but you and I will never be alone.

C: 他们将会懂得失却，最终…选择失却。
E: They will come to understand what it means to lose, and in the end... they will choose to let go.

C: 别怕——英雄们会保护大家！
E: Don't be scared. The heroes will protect everyone!

C: 「神谕应验了。这孩子是神明送来的礼物。」
E: "The prophecy's fulfilled. This child is a gift from the gods."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始」……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning"...</color>

C: 嗨。想我了，吗♪
E: Hi. Miss, me, yet?♪

C: 所以今天，我也来为你讲故事。自己写的故事。快坐下来♪
E: So I'm going to tell you stories today. A story I wrote myself. Quick, sit down ♪

C: 但这样的花朵，应该不能被称作「爱」吧？
E: But should a flower like this be called "love"?

C: 但，世上怎会有如此真实的梦呢？所以，我不同意他的看法。
E: But how could a dream feel so real? That's why I didn't agree with him.

C: …那太好了。
E: ...That's excellent.

C: 明白了～那么从现在开始，行动由我接手。
E: Got it. So from now on, I'll be in charge of this operation.

C: 别装了。
E: Drop the act, already.

C: 嘻，嘻嘻，你的选择太正确了。还不快把对面的冒牌货抓起来，咕噜噜……
E: Hee, hee hee, you made the right choice. Hurry up and lock up the fake on the opposite side, *gurgle*...

C: 所有人报数！
E: Fall in and count!

C: 流线型的机身，银白的金属光泽……
E: A streamlined body. A silver-white metallic luster...

C: 气早就没了吧。
E: Must've gone flat ages ago, right?

C: 他负责疏通阻塞、发明超镍零件，还有冲调<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>。我嘛，则负责监督他干活…对了，我俩还合写过一本《汽水与空间站维修艺术》。
E: He was responsible for clearing blockages. He invented Ultra Nickel Parts, and he brewed Kapo-Kali. As for me... I was responsible for supervising his work... By the way, we also wrote a book together, The Art of Soda and Space Station Maintenance.

C: 我也喜欢折腾。
E: I like to run amok too.

C: 唯一的大礼，就是藏在这房间里我的四张涂鸦手稿。我想你也认出来了，其中还有黑塔大人的风姿，没想到吧？
E: The only big gifts are my four graffiti drafts hidden in this room. And yes, there is also a nice picture of our respected Madam Herta. You didn't expect this, did you?

C: 你怎么还在这儿？你们科室没喊你去准备急救手术吗？
E: Why are you still here? Didn't your department call you to prepare for the emergency operation?

C: 当然。我不仅知道你会来，我还知道你为什么而来。
E: Of course. Not only did I know you were coming, but I also know why.

C: 你是？
E: And you are?

C: 我自掏腰包给大家解决问题还是我的错了？你赶紧把我的密钥还过来！
E: How is it my fault when I'm spending my own money to solve everyone else's problems? Give my encryption key back!

C: 我觉得没刚刚的事重要。
E: Nothing as important as what you were just discussing.

C: 麻烦的是，现在「无敌宇宙核弹头协会」的成员越来越多了。以后究竟还要怎么样，才能从混乱的人群中一眼认出一名科员呢？
E: The trouble is that there are now more and more members in the Invincible Space Warhead Association. In the future, how can we recognize a researcher in a crowd?

C: 能有空搭理你？
E: You sure she has time for you?

C: 不可能，要是她想拒绝我，还能和我聊这么多？更何况……
E: That's impossible. If she were to reject me, why would she talk to me so much? Besides...

C: ~电~波~已~上~线~
E: AIRWAVE IS ONLINE.

C: 但他这辈子能等多久？
E: But how much time can he spend waiting?

C: 也许当他垂垂老矣，成了我这样的老头子，莱斯莉终于回到了「黑塔」。
E: Maybe Lesley will finally return to the space station when he is old and decrepit like me.

C: …没想到等了这么久等来这样一条消息。
E: ...I can't believe this is what I've been waiting for.

C: {NICKNAME}，<color=#dbc291ff>激活界域定锚</color>这事就拜托你了！
E: {NICKNAME}, please <color=#dbc291ff>activate the Space Anchor</color>. I am counting on you!

C: 你先随意说个一二字。
E: Just say one or two words.

C: 我马上就来。
E: I'll be right there.

C: 如果没空，那我就只能找那些老东西来帮我了。
E: If you don't, then I suppose I'll have to get help from those old farts.

C: 下一秒，结晶的裂纹在屏幕上无声蔓延开来。黯淡的蓝色闪烁，怪物残影漫天疾行，沉默巨大的星球开始缓慢裂解。接下来，不断闪回的是襁褓里的啼哭，青年时期的欢笑与愤懑，和临行前「黑塔」冰冷的倒影。
E: The next second, crystallized cracks spread silently across the screen. The dim blue flickers, monsters spread all over the sky, and the silent planet begins to crack slowly apart. Then comes the flash back, from a baby crying in the cradle, to the joyous laughter and the resentment in teenage years, and the space station's cold reflection before the final departure.

C: 承蒙「丰饶」的慈怀，医疗舱散落着一些包治百病的药剂，你可以用用看。
E: Thanks to the kindness of Abundance, there are panaceas that can cure all diseases scattered around the medical cabin. You can try using them.

C: 能偷走尴尬的回忆是好事啊！
E: It's good to have your embarrassing memories stolen!

C: 是有人在监视她，拓写她的日常言论？抑或是有人在操纵她，以她的口吻说出设定好的语言？
E: Is someone watching her and writing her dialogues? Or is someone controlling her speech?

C: 至于她会做何反应，就不是我能控制的了。
E: But how she is gonna react to that is completely beyond my control.

C: 我派人去检查了一下，发现这是感染了模因病毒引发的畸变。但「螺中笑声」的收容工作并无任何异常，也就是说，这绝不可能是它自行感染上的。
E: I had someone examine it and found that it was caused by the memetic virus. But the Crackup Conch has been properly stored all this time, which means it's impossible for it to get infected on its own.

C: 但凡是你觉得不太正常的地方，通通记下来跟我汇报一下就好。怎么样，帮个忙呗？
E: If you find anything weird, just write it down and report it to me. So, what do you think?

C: （一开始还在学什么古怪叫声，而且谈到什么「古兽崇拜」就心虚，难道…）
E: (At first she was imitating some strange sounds. Then when they talked about "Leviathan Worship," she looked very nervous...)

C: 可能三个人都感染了。
E: Maybe they are all infected.

C: 空间站建设在宇宙之中，离地面很远，并非每个人都能适应这里的生活。这一点在待久了以后会尤为明显。
E: The station is built in space, far away from any land surface. Not everyone can adapt to life here. This will become clear after a while.

C: 是裂界造物，它们诞生于裂界，身上还有诸多谜团未曾解开。
E: Those are Fragmentum creations, creatures born of the Fragmentum.

C: 然而答案又怎是那样简单的东西？更何况他想要达成那样从心而外的「修行」，更是难上加难……
E: But answers are not easy to give. Besides, he wanted to master a trial of the heart that would thoroughly change him, and that would be even more difficult...

C: （没想到关键线索会以这种方式出现……）
E: (I didn't think a clue like that would suddenly pop up...)

C: 这份更新内容里，可有卡波特大人难得一见的样子哦~
E: Aww... He looks really cool in the new limited-edition snapshots~

C: 阿兰来找我，想学习如何消解上司带来的压力。
E: Arlan came to me to learn how to manage pressure from his boss.

C: 阿兰ID的通行证
E: Arlan's ID Pass

C: …就一个人走掉啦。我还给他离去的背影拍了一张照片呢，说实话，挺硬汉的！
E: And then he just left. I took a photo of him — he was doing one of those tough guy walks!

C: 你给我的任务，无论是不是工作范围内的，我都会去完成它。
E: I always try to complete every assignment you give me, regardless of whether it's within my job description.

C: 阿兰，我其实真的能够感受到你的压力，尤其是在我看到这张照片之后，更加难过。
E: Arlan, I understood the level of stress you're dealing with as soon as I saw this photo.

C: 这段时间，防卫科收到了多份有关这种不明生物的目击情报。
E: Recently, the Security Department has received multiple sightings of this unidentified creature.

C: 好了好了，别吵了…「戏命鬼」，这个名字我记下了。
E: Alright, stop bickering... Jinx, I'll note the name down.

C: 趁我们战斗的当口，呜呜伯都消失了。
E: While we were battling, the Wubbaboos disappeared.

C: 是啊。你还记得那篇《呜呜伯行为考》么？
E: That's right. Do you still remember what was written in the Observation on Wubbaboo Behavior?

C: 阿德勒说，呜呜伯用它们族群的特殊手段，为你送上了一份特别的「祝福」。
E: Adler said that the Wubbaboos prepared a unique blessing just for you, using the special technique of their species.

C: 活着的人…还有呜呜伯，我们的生活总归要继续。
E: As for the humans... and the Wubbaboos, all our lives have to go on.

C: 很高兴见到你，艾丝妲。
E: It's good to see you, Asta.

C: 是不想管吧。
E: Normally she doesn't want to deal with it.

C: 没、没这么夸张吧…我算什么东西，还轮得到黑塔女士来惦记？
E: I—I wouldn't go that far... I'm just a nobody. You think Madam Herta would remember me?

C: 你等一等，让我研究一下……
E: Wait a second... let me take a look...

C: 就像…这样！
E: Just like... this!

C: 啊咿——这里怎么会有虚卒？！
E: Ahhhh! Why are there Voidrangers here!?

C: 支援舱段检修完了吗……
E: Are the repairs in the supply zone finished...

C: 觉得你就是块冰冷的铁。
E: You're nothing but a piece of ice-cold metal.

C: 黑塔越是殚精竭虑，就越是在远离她所希望的宇宙。结论：日复一日的更迭，正在不断消磨她的才能。
E: The more Herta tries, the further she moves away from the Universe that she had hoped for. Conclusion: The endless iterations of the Simulated Universe are wearing down her talents, day by day.

C: 希望如此，但客观来看：她一定会发现。
E: Indeed. However, objectively speaking, it is almost certain that she will.

C: 恐怕在她的计划中，唯一的变数就是我突然拜访空间站的消息——随之而来的，还有模拟宇宙将要被关停的噩耗。这会让她的布局功亏一篑。
E: News of my sudden visit to the space station was probably the only uncontrollable variable in her plan — and with my arrival came the nightmare of shutting down the Simulated Universe. That would have ruined her plans and all her preparations.

C: 放心，太空站没有那么脆弱。无论是《太空大战争》还是这次事件，都在黑塔的计划之内。
E: Don't worry, the space station is not as fragile as you think. Whether it's Cosmic Warfare or the incident that just took place, they're all within Herta's grand plan.

C: （黑塔的学术伙伴？莫非是她提过的…记得电梯入口就在附近，过去看看吧。）
E: (Herta's research partner? I remember she once talked about... The elevator's entrance seems to be nearby, I shall check it out now.)

C: 她反向骇入我的设备，以我的名义给一堆人发了垃圾消息，让他们去玩一款叫做《太空大战争》的电子游戏。
E: She reverse-hacked into my device and sent a bunch of spam messages to people in my name, asking them to play a video game called Cosmic Warfare.

C: 与人沟通十分困难，只有行动表达。
E: Communicating with others can be a most difficult endeavor. It is through action alone that we can convey our intent faithfully.

C: 于是我便带维利特一起上列车，希望能与列车组齐心协力解决现下危机。
E: ...and that is why I boarded the Express with Velite. I am hoping to solve this crisis with you.

C: 当然了，为了活命，我还是又重复了一遍——
E: But, of course, I repeated it again in order to survive.

C: 你支持我…真的？谢谢，谢谢……
E: You do...? Thank you.

C: 这不是送死？！就为这种理由？他到底在固执个啥？我倒不太关心，我只关心他死了我的人生转机怎么办？…好吧，我确实关心。
E: That's a suicide mission! And for what? D—Don't get me wrong, I don't really care... But if he dies, how am I going to turn my life around? ...Alright, fine, I care about him.

C: 不知道银枝乘客怎么样了…虽然列车摆脱了这次危机，但不知道为什么还是高兴不起来帕……
E: The Express managed to escape the crisis, but Pom-Pom still feels a little sad... Pom-Pom wonders what happened to Argenti.

C: 比如…你觉得…什么是「纯美」？
E: ...In your opinion, what is beauty?

C: {NICKNAME}，能否麻烦你先去检查一下那位维利特先生的状况？他看上去吓得不轻，我们应该礼待来客。
E: {NICKNAME}, could you please go check on Velite? He looks uneasy. He is a guest of ours, after all.

C: 准备好了，我们走吧。
E: I'm ready. Let's go.

C: 你看这几摞资料吧，不知是哪个小年轻这么不上道，字搞这么小。
E: See this material here? People are so inconsiderate — how's someone like me supposed to make out the small print?

C: 焦虑？我吗？果然还是看得出来吗……
E: Anxious? Me? Is it that obvious...?

C: 看你的脸色，不像什么好消息。
E: Your countenance suggests tragedy.

C: 在你回消息的时候，我也翻完了这本册子。上面记录了几位天才俱乐部会员的生平——不乏一些有趣的信息。
E: I finished browsing through this booklet while you were replying to messages. It recorded the lives of a few Genius Society members — I'd say it contains some interesting information.

C: 是的，一些由我亲手造就的问题。
E: Yes... problems wrought by my own hand.

C: 它这么努力，不就是为了得到阮•梅女士的关注嘛！
E: It's working so hard just to get Madam Ruan Mei's attention!

C: 结果反倒有一堆人追着她的手稿看个不停……
E: The end result? Everyone's obsessed with getting their hands on them...

C: （……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
E: (...So I really can't say anything about her.)

C: 嘤嘤……
E: Eeep, eeep...

C: 哦，当然可以，{F#她}{M#他}本来就是你带进来的。你决定就好。
E: Of course. You brought {F#her}{M#him} in, after all. It's up to you.

C: （好大的房间…空间站还有这么开阔的地方？）
E: (This is huge... The space station has an area this big?)

C: 走吧。顺着这趟电梯，敬请见证——「天才的杰作」。
E: Go. Take the elevator and bear witness to this "Genius' Masterpiece."

C: （这家伙是怎么回事？看起来和主控舱段的不一样…）
E: (What's up with this unit? It looks different from the one in the master control zone...)

C: 阮•梅怎么还没来？
E: Why hasn't Ruan Mei come?

C: 不，你来的正是时候。
E: No, your timing is actually perfect.

C: 反正闲着也是闲着。
E: I've got nothing to do anyway.

C: 来，笑一笑——
E: Alright, smile—

C: 呜呜呜……
E: *sobbing*...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了？你找尤利安有事吗，他现在有点不太舒服，如果可以的话，请不要刺激他。
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}. It's you. Did you need to speak with Julian about something? He's a little out of sorts at the moment, so please try not to get him riled up.

C: 抱歉，希望没刺激到他。
E: Sorry, I hope I didn't upset him.

C: 吸气…呼气…吸气…呼气……
E: Haa... Phew... Haa... Phew...

C: 你看，这是磐岩镇镇守铁卫的徽章，我是镇上的医师。
E: Look, this is the badge from the Silvermane Guards' Boulder Town garrison. I am the town's doctor.

C: 所以，我们接下来的行程是——去金人巷找杜氏茶庄的杜老板，
E: So, our next journey will be — To Du's Teahouse in Aurum Alley to meet with Boss Du.

C: 你看这活动门槛低、还有惊喜感，参与率直接拉满，试茶的队伍都排到金人巷码头去了。
E: Anyone can take part in this event, and it brings a sense of surprise and suspense. Before I knew it, we were overwhelmed with participants, and the queue to try my tea stretched all the way down to the Aurum Alley docks.

C: 你用颤抖的嘴唇抿住茶碗口沿，任凭液体奔腾入胃，如同远古的海浪冲击着礁石，带给你一点小小的味觉震撼。
E: You press the teacup to your trembling lips and allow the water to rush into your stomach. The feeling of ancient ocean waves crashing against rocks sends a slight shock over your taste buds.

C: 当时我正准备打开看看，结果被一个巡逻的持明拦住，非说我是什么「放生帮」，我解释了半天她才放我走。
E: I was going to open it and see what was inside, but a patrolling Vidyadhara stopped me and kept calling me an "Unshackled" or something... I was explaining myself for hours before she let me go.

C: 都说别提了嘛！
E: I said drop it!

C: 我们该做的，是将他们带到大守护者的面前。
E: Our job is to present them before her. Nothing more.

C: 欢迎来到「存护之城」——贝洛伯格。
E: Welcome to Belobog — the City of Preservation.

C: 贝洛伯格能够迎来节庆可谓一大喜事，祝你们不虚此行。记得替我向各位老友问好。
E: It's great that Belobog is able to host a celebration. I hope your trip goes well — say hi to our friends for me.

C: {NICKNAME}，不管哪个世界的节日庆典，肯定都少不了各种美食吧？
E: One thing's for sure though, {NICKNAME}. Where there's a celebration, there's bound to be food, right?

C: 珍惜这段缘…
E: Cherish the moment...

C: 的确，我理解。站在你们的视角，这件事肯定很不符合情理吧？
E: I understand. From your point of view, I can see how unreasonable it appears.

C: 都是我们的功劳。
E: That's us. The honor is yours.

C: ——没事，我们本来就聊得差不多了，这会儿正准备收尾呢。
E: It's no bother, we've pretty much wrapped things up already, anyway.

C: 所以呀，我建议两位还是别在这件事上太费心了，你们觉得呢？不如趁你们还在的时候多享受下节庆前的热闹氛——
E: I wouldn't waste too much energy on this matter. Why not make the most of the festive atmosphere...?

C: 好深奥哦…才怪，你就是在瞎扯吧！
E: Wow, that's soooo deep... Come on, stop fooling around!

C: 我倒是要看看，今天到底是谁管谁——走吧！
E: Hmph! We'll see who's really in charge. Let's go!

C: 对于当下活在这里的人类，你又有何计划？
E: What are your intentions for the people currently living here?

C: 的确，就应该这样！绝对不能让布洛妮娅一个人承担这么重大的选择，还有它可能导致的后果…!
E: Right? I don't think it's fair for you to carry the weight alone. Why not discuss it with others first?

C: 星穹列车的各位——我脑海里浮现了一个想法，但要实现它需要在场各位的协助。
E: Astral friends, I have an idea. But for it to work, I'll need everyone's cooperation.

C: 既然话已经说到了这个份上，那我就跟你走一趟。但还是要给各位打好预防针…想改变上面的决定可不是什么易事。
E: I admire your determination. Seeing as we've come this far... I've changed my mind — I'll hold off a little longer and see what you have to show me. But remember — winning over the higher-ups won't be easy.

C: 谢谢你的认同，但我其实没做什么。
E: Thank you, but I didn't really do anything.

C: 唷，运气不错啊，弄砸了这么个项目，职级居然只降一级，看来上面的老几位是挺照顾你。哦，他们都下线了吧，那——
E: You only got demoted one rank? Whew, you dodged a bullet there — pretty big project to mess up on. Someone must be looking out for you. Oh, they've already left the call...

C: 上层区该问的人已经都问过了，对吧？
E: Did we miss anyone in the Overworld? I think we asked just about everyone we needed to.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆建立于<unbreak>600</unbreak>年前，起初是为了纪念初代大守护者阿丽萨……
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum was founded <unbreak>600</unbreak> years ago, and was originally built to memorialize Supreme Guardian Alisa...

C: …还有在七百年前对抗侵略者的战争中牺牲的……
E: ...Also, those who sacrificed their lives in the war against the invaders <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago...

C: 我这小小的诊所，每天都要面对大量前来问诊的病患…多亏有你帮我分担压力，我才能静下心来专心照料病人。
E: This little clinic has huge numbers of patients to deal with every day... If I didn't have you here to help me out, I wouldn't be able to focus on giving them quality care.

C: 如果我说，我认同你的想法…
E: What if I told you I agreed with you?

C: …他们在哪里？你说…你知道对不对？
E: ...Wh—Where are they? You... you know where they are, right?

C: 我都提醒过她好多次了，这药不能信，可是她……
E: I told her so many times not to believe in that medicine, but she...

C: 嗯…我没事。设身处地地想想，他会有那样的反应也很自然。我能做的只有尽力为这些患者治疗，消除他们的疑虑。
E: Mm... I'm okay. If I were in his shoes, I may well have had the same reaction. Now I need to focus on treating the patients, and dispelling their doubts.

C: 如果让他的受害者知道了真相，瓦赫肯定会被愤怒的下层区人撕成碎片。那时的我还很年轻、软弱，奥列格会提出那种建议，肯定也是顾及了我的感情。
E: Had his victims found out the truth, Vache would've been torn to pieces by furious Underworlders. I was young and weak at the time — Oleg must have worried about how I'd react to such a scenario, or he wouldn't have suggested banishment.

C: <size=36>史考特商业，只为冠军而生！</size>
E: <size=36>Scott Business Alliance, made for the champions!</size>

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 观众们，请不要吝惜你们的掌声与喝彩！让胜利者沐浴在胜利的荣耀之中吧！
E: Please, everyone, shower your cheers and applauses on the winner for {M#his}{F#her} victorious glory!

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 以我的能力，估计帮不上什么忙…我先看看吧…
E: Sure, but knowing me, I probably won't be much help...

C: {NICKNAME}你快过来，这里据点隐蔽，视野开阔，可以监控整个房间。
E: {NICKNAME}, come quickly. This place is secluded and it's a good vantage point. You can watch the whole room from here.

C: {NICKNAME}，你不如先听听捕猎装置这个方案……
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't I show you how to make a trap?

C: 终于抓到你了，{NICKNAME}…或者我应该叫你，水魈才对呢？
E: I finally got you, {NICKNAME}... Or should I call you... Xenohydro!

C: 你顶着我的脸，是不是为了享受我的好名声，方便在空间站内到处招摇撞骗？
E: Aren't you using my face to take advantage of my reputation so you can conduct scams in the space station?

C: 拉明娜为什么帮你？
E: Why did Lamina help you?

C: 于是我放任了这一切。直到科员窝藏水魈的谣言风传一时，他们叫嚣要严惩知情不报之人……
E: So I let it all happen, until the rumor that someone in the staff harbored the Xenohydro became widespread. They called for severe punishment for those who did not report relevant information...

C: 啊？那「波少」岂不是连收了我什么礼物也记不得了？不行不行，我一定得要回去，不然被应物科的伯伯们发现了，那就糟糕了。
E: Oh? Can't Master Capote even remember what gift he got from me? Oh no, I have to get back. If those old guys in Implement Arts catch me, it'll get ugly.

C: 好，我们出发吧。
E: Okay, let's go.

C: 总之，这个箭头图案应该就是进一步的线索——只是我也不太清楚这意味着什么…我们还是跟着查宝接着找其他线索吧。
E: Anyway, this arrow pattern must be another clue — but I'm not sure what this means... Let's follow Findie and look for other clues.

C: 你对我就这么没信心吗…
E: You thought I couldn't do it?

C: 需要恢复药？我包里有不少…
E: If you need recovery meds, I've got some in my bag...

C: 但我记得很清楚，他拿到医学院录取通知书的那天，爸妈带我去花店买了最贵的一株「侯爵夫人」。
E: Still, I remember the day he received his offer from the medical academy. My parents took me to the florist and we bought him the most expensive Marquise stem in the shop.

C: 那个铁卫，他是在冲着我们大喊大叫吗？
E: That's a Silvermane Guard. Is he yelling at us?

C: 没关系，我理解。你肯定在忙很重要的事吧？那就快去吧。
E: It's okay, I understand. You must have some important things on your plate? Don't let them get ahead of you.

C: 唔…相信我，都会好起来的。
E: Oh... Don't worry, things will get better — I'm sure of it.

C: 这里陈列的展品多种多样，从名家的画作到地髓标本，足以让访客在短短几分钟内掌握贝洛伯格文化的精髓。
E: There are all sorts of exhibits on display – paintings by famous artists, samples of the planet's crust... Visitors can experience the essence of Belobog's culture in just a few minutes' time.

C: 确切地说，是展品失窃了。
E: It was stolen.

C: 没关系，下层区还有其他人在协助我们调查，不差这一会儿功夫。况且我们本来也没什么头绪，先帮你解决些实际的麻烦，也算是不浪费光阴了。
E: It'll be fine — we have other people in the Underworld working on the investigation too. Besides, we don't have any clues yet, so we may as well do something useful.

C: …嘘，小声点，是个大家伙！
E: ...Shh, keep your voices down, it's a big one!

C: 如果你们一致认定如此，那一定是某种凌驾于算法范畴之上的力量影响了我的系统行为。
E: If you and Clara have both reached the same conclusion independently, then there must be some force influencing my behavior which transcends my system's algorithms.

C: 呃，这倒不必，我们其实已经做了高仿模型……
E: Uh, that won't be necessary — we've already made a high-quality replica.

C: 只有铭记前人的努力和教训，我们才能在日渐艰难的环境中存续下来，总结出属于每一代贝洛伯格人的生存之路。
E: Every passing day, we Belobogians must continue to endure the city's harsh environment. The trials and experiences of our ancestors serve as a reminder that the path of survival belongs to every generation of our people.

C: …{NICKNAME}，你身上是不是有什么东西在响？
E: ...{NICKNAME}, is... that your phone?

C: 佩拉，{NICKNAME}——我马上会发布指令，动员所有城区内执勤的银鬃铁卫展开上门调查。
E: Pela, {NICKNAME} — I will issue an immediate directive to mobilize all on-duty Silvermane Guards in the city to conduct a door-to-door investigation.

C: 这家伙，明明家里那么有钱，居然还会起这种歪心思——简直不可理喻！我们得想办法阻止这场交易！
E: Why would someone from such a wealthy family do something like this for money... It's unbelievable! We have to find a way to stop this before they sell the film!

C: 行吧…没想到我桑博英明一世，这次居然栽在自己的老客户手上了…你该通知谁就赶紧通知吧，办事麻利点，我也能少吃点苦头……
E: *sigh* I knew the good times couldn't last, but I didn't think a valued client would bring them to a close... Go ahead, notify the authorities — I'd rather burn out than fade away.

C: …不过贝洛伯格就这么大，除非他敢一个人躲到雪原里去，否则迟早都会被我们抓住的。
E: ...Still, Belobog is only so big. Unless he's brave enough to hide out in the Snow Plains, we'll catch him sooner or later.

C: 好了。接下来该把它交给谁呢？
E: All done. Where do I submit the application?

C: 博物馆？
E: The museum?
...Huh?

C: 感觉已经和面试没关系了…
E: Are we sure that's how interviews should be done!?

C: 算了，还是别改了。
E: Forget it. Let's keep it as is.

C: 嗨，你好啊～请问，博物馆志愿导览员申请表，交给你就好了吧？
E: Hello there, may I hand in the volunteer guide application form to you?

C: 想什么呢，当然不是啊——面试需要你来做辅助评定，别想跑。
E: What are you thinking? Of course not! Surely we need you to be an assistant assessor for the interview. Don't even think about running off.

C: ——不，我想还是先问问你身边的这位{NICKNAME}吧：请问，你是否以任何形式帮助希露瓦小姐完成了这份简历？
E: Wait, let me ask {NICKNAME} something first. Did you provide any help to Miss Serval in completing this resume?

C: 话不必说到这份上吧…
E: Come on, I'm sure you're more than cultured enough to be a volunteer guide.

C: 好、好的，谢谢你！
E: O—Okay, thanks!

C: 银鬃铁卫已经消失很久了，作为地下住民，我只是有一些问题想要问问她而已。
E: We haven't seen a Silvermane Guard down here for a long time now. I just wanna ask her a few questions, nothing more.

C: 地火、流浪者、史瓦罗…下层区的变化远比我想象中的更加激烈。唉，银鬃铁卫离开之后，地下到底经历了什么？
E: Wildfire, the vagrants, Svarog... The changes in here are greater than I ever imagined. *sigh* What exactly did the Underworld go through after the Silvermane Guards left?

C: 啊？她能带兵？那还挺了不起的嘛。
E: Oh? She heads up the force? Hm... Not bad.

C: 说得好听，你敢保证没人是来找茬的吗？休想，谁都别想进来！
E: Yeah right, and you can guarantee that no one there with you is out for blood? I don't believe it. Stay where you are!

C: 「矿车销子」…「矿车轮对」…确认…这样就行了？
E: Mine Cart Pin... Mine Cart Wheelset... Confirm... Just like that?

C: 让我看看…嗯，这部件勉强能用，这小东西还挺能干的嘛。
E: Let me see... Yeah, we can make do with this part. This little machine isn't half bad.

C: 你让我去我就去，岂不是很没…
E: Why would I take orders from a little...

C: 离、离我远点！我这都是为了大局着想，哪像你们成天就想着四处滋事？
E: Back off! I was thinking about the bigger picture when I did that, unlike you all who just look for trouble every day!

C: 有虎克在，你们休想！
E: You'll never lay a finger on daddy without passing through Hook!

C: 喂，你这个叛徒！
E: Hmph, you traitor!
I—I mean... Argh...

C: 唷，小鬼脾气还挺冲？行，我就花两分钟听听你们想问什么。
E: Oh, you have a temper, huh? Alright, I'll spare a couple minutes for your little detective game.

C: 信我吧，那厨子心术不正，我老早就看出来了——不信你问别人。
E: Trust me, something's definitely fishy with that cook. I could tell from the start. If you don't believe me, just ask anyone.

C: 假设裁缝在说谎…
E: Suppose the tailor is lying...

C: 完完整整，还活蹦乱跳的，你放心好了。
E: Is still happily running and jumping around.

C: 如果你再骗我的话…
E: If you lie to me again...

C: 小心外面的怪物！
E: Be careful of the monsters!

C: 嗯…这里倒是背风背阴，地面也很平整。但……
E: Hmm... This area is sheltered and facing the sun, plus it's flat ground, but...

C: 嗯？
E: Really?

C: 那让我来打开它看看吧。
E: Let's open it up then.

C: 什、什么，贝洛伯格野人是什么？
E: ...B—Belobog Caveman?

C: 没想到裂界怪物会突然出现……
E: These Fragmentum monsters are coming out of thin air...

C: 你突然耍什么帅啊……
E: Hmph, we could've handled it...

C: 哎？我……
E: Huh? Me?

C: 和我一起露营，你不满意？
E: You weren't just here for the camping?

C: 我也不清楚具体内容。但……
E: I don't know the exact details, but...

C: 那、那是……
E: Uh... About that...

C: 这是——啊，找到了！
E: It's... Ah! Yes, we found it!

C: …咦？这是什么？
E: ...Huh? What's this?

C: 你是…下层区人？不对，你说可可利亚——你是那个「大守护者」的养女？那——
E: You're... an undergrounder? Wait a minute... you're saying that Cocolia, the Supreme Guardian, adopted you? Then—

C: 我只是路过——
E: I'm just passing by—

C: 脾气好差啊，这家伙！不过，如果能帮虎克找到宝贝的话，虎克就原谅你！
E: Aren't you sassy! But if you can help me find my treasure, I'll let it slide!

C: 虎、虎克最讨厌打小报告的人啦！我劝你们不要做傻事！
E: Ah, you snitch! You'll regret it, I'm warning you...

C: …没有。但那机械聚落上下我摸了个遍，收集了不少线索，保证能帮上你们的大忙。
E: ...No. But I've felt my way around the outside and picked up more than a few clues. I can help you. You have my word.

C: 走吧！去找史瓦罗把事情说明白。
E: Now to set the record straight with Svarog. Let's get in there!

C: ——这根本不可能起作用吧！
E: ...How is that gonna improve our chances?

C: 小心，不知道这回有什么花招。
E: Careful, this one might have a few tricks up its sleeve.

C: 直入主题吧，不要浪费这个世界宝贵的时间。
E: Proceed with your central point. Do not waste this world's valuable time.

C: 筑城者的指令：任何尝试与「星核」接触的行为都将造成严重后果。重新评估中——目标威胁指数达到最高。
E: As instructed by the Architects: Any attempt to engage with the Stellaron will result in grave consequences. Reassessing... Target threat index critical.

C: 她会站在我们这边吗…
E: Will she stand with us...?

C: 已经进行了多重备份，可以随时提取。
E: There are multiple backups. I can recover them at any time.

C: 其实完全没兴趣…
E: No, not interested...

C: 让他买你的玩偶大熊吧。
E: Let him buy Junjun.

C: 哎呀，好像真不是我孙子！
E: Oh for the love of... You're not my grandson after all!

C: 七百五十。
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak>.

C: 怎么突然说这个…
E: What makes you say that...?

C: 老爹和虎克的生日会就快开始了，但是虎克还没有准备好给老爹的礼物……
E: Mine and daddy's birthday party is starting soon, but I haven't bought daddy his gift yet...

C: …哎？现在用不上吗？
E: ...Huh? Why not?

C: 干脆把它卖给费斯曼吧。
E: Why not just sell it to Fersman?

C: …对，肯定是这样没错。
E: Yes, that's correct.
███You██Pascal█very██ █like████Clara██!

C: 机械墓场里有各种各样的废弃机器人…我们先去那边找找看吧。
E: There are all kinds of abandoned robots in the machine graveyard. Let's go take a look.

C: ██欢迎█归█！回█{NICKNAME}█。█克拉拉█铆█！█败██？失██——
E: ██Welcome█back█! return█{NICKNAME}█. █Clara█Rivet█!█Fail██-ure██?

C: 容易被忽略的小概率事件，往往最有可能引致灾害。
E: Improbable events that are easily disregarded frequently result in catastrophes.

C: 将机械单元帕斯卡的核心存储格式化，随后纳入基地网络统一管理。
E: It is recommended that Pascal's data be formatted and integrated into the base network.

C: 大概只是某种故障…？
E: Maybe it's some kind of technical fault?

C: 看到你过得不错，我就放心了。
E: I'm glad to see you're doing well.

C: 我的摇滚灵魂，就是维护身为军人的尊严啊！
E: My rock 'n' roll soul is to uphold the dignity of a soldier!

C: 我们并非要以武力镇服你，那样的服从毫无意义。
E: We don't want you to yield through force of arms. That wouldn't be a victory for us.

C: 准备好了就登台吧，我们一起完成这场演出！
E: Now, if you're ready to get on stage, let's push for that standing ovation!

C: 唔…
E: Argh...

C: …消散了呢。
E: ...She disappeared.

C: 没错！愉快的冒险本来就没有那么多条条框框嘛。
E: Right on! But you can say whatever you like — a good adventure shouldn't be full of rules and regulations!

C: 还是先找找看别的线索吧？
E: Let's look for other clues first.

C: 星核给予我的承诺，才是这个世界唯一的希望……
E: The Stellaron's promise is the only hope for this world...

C: 我不清楚，三月。或许得等我们回到列车上以后，听听姬子和瓦尔特先生怎么说。
E: I'm not sure, March. We should see what Himeko and Mr. Yang have to say when we get back to the Express.

C: …希儿？
E: ...Seele?

C: 这个大家伙…就是星核拘束装置吗？前人居然掌握了如此复杂的科技，真是壮观……
E: Is this... the Stellaron Imprisonment Device? They had such advanced technology back in the day.... impressive.

C: 阴影中！！！
E: shadow!!!

C: 信任的人…亲近的人…全都离我而去。这座城市…抛弃了我。
E: The people I trusted... the people I was close to... they've all left me. This city... has abandoned me.

C: 如果雅利洛-Ⅵ的风雪确实持续了近七百年，这个可怜的虚卒恐怕也已在此处度过了相同的时间。
E: If the blizzard on Jarilo-VI has continued for almost <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, then this poor Voidranger has probably been stuck here for the same length of time.

C: …唔，什么声音？
E: ...Oh. What was that sound?

C: 哦，不对。这款寻物仪的型号和我订购的不一样，好像是很久之前的老款……
E: Wait a minute. This finder is a different model from the one I ordered. It looks like an obsolete model from a long time ago...

C: 比如我会问你<color=#dbc291ff>「蓝色的客运型星槎有多少艘？」</color>，需要根据你的观察，正确地回答我的问题。
E: For example, I might ask <color=#dbc291ff>"How many blue passenger starskiffs went past?"</color> You will need to answer my questions according to your observation.

C: …可不能落井下石啊。
E: ...You can't kick her when she's down.

C: 总之，我们先抓紧问问事故线索，再安排人手亲自把她带回医馆吧。
E: Anyhow, we should hurry up and ask for clues about the incident, then arrange for someone to send her back to the apothecary.

C: 芦慧知道了你这样会生气的。
E: Luhui will get upset to see you rushing back to work like this.

C: 毫无疑问，这就是事故中嫌疑最大的星槎。
E: Without a doubt, this is the prime suspect of the starskiff accident.

C: 得找熟悉当地情况的、热心的、接受过良好教育、敢于冒险的化外民充当向导，协助我完成在仙舟上的考察项目。
E: Someone familiar with the local situation, friendly, well-educated... A capable adventurer... An outworlder... All these qualities must be present to help me finish my research project on Xianzhou.

C: 你掏出了你最趁手的宝贝，铆足了力气挥舞。
E: You take out your favorite treasure and swing it as hard as you can.

C: 来聊聊我的冒险经历吧。
E: Let's talk about my adventure.

C: 小聪想找你去写诗。
E: Cong wants you to write poems.

C: 你总是对蘑菇的要求这么高吗？
E: Do you always place such high expectations on mushrooms?

C: 可是主人不明白，只顾执意呼唤我。
E: But my master could not comprehend, and kept trying to beckon for me.

C: 是作者！
E: It's about the poet!

C: 你好，请别忘了行李。
E: Hello. Please don't forget your luggage.

C: 一片冰心在玉壶
E: I'll say my heart is still as pure and righteous as jade.

C: 诗歌依托于语言的特殊韵律，只有符合韵律的排列组合才能叫作诗。小聪主人为了掌握诗歌的「规范」专门造出了我。
E: Poetry relies on the special rhythm of language. Only the permutations that conform to the rhythm can be considered a poem. Master Cong has created me to master the standard of poetry.

C: 静斋喜欢怎样的人？
E: What kind of person is Jingzhai attracted to?

C: 平韵奇句仄，仄韵奇句平。若是偶字句，两字换仄平。
E: For iambic meters, an unstressed syllable followed by a stressed syllable. For trochaic meters, the opposite.

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}吗，找我有事？
E: It's you, {NICKNAME}. Is there something you need?

C: 思来想去，我觉得还是更适合忧郁。原本是想让小聪主人帮我格式化的，但是…和你们走一遭的经历也挺宝贵的，我就留下来了。
E: After thinking about it, I think I am more suited for gloominess. Originally, I just wanted Master Cong to format me and be done with everything. But... the experiences I had with you all were also very precious, so I decided not to.

C: 这又有什么问题？
E: What's the problem with that?

C: 嘿嘿，狐仙小姐姐～
E: Hehe, foxian beauty~

C: 我就知道！嘿嘿，没人能拒绝这样的机会。
E: I knew it! Heh, no one would refuse an opportunity like this.

C: 哼，该不会因为听闻仙舟上狐人的美貌，想来追逐一段桃花缘？
E: Hmph, you aren't here to chase your lofty romance because you've heard of foxian ladies' beauty on Xianzhou, are you?

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 那我们就不打扰了！
E: We'll leave you be, then!

C: 我不相信这家伙的话…不过嘛，你们要是找到了，青雀小囡，记得联系我啊。
E: Qingque, I don't believe anything this fella says... But if you do find Ms. Daiqing, please let me know.

C: 多亏了你，事情算是告一段落了，拿好，这是我答应给你的报酬。
E: Thanks to you, we can consider this little saga over. Take this, it's what I promised you.

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof Woof!

C: 不必了。
E: No, thank you.

C: 眼下的鳞渊境可不安全…
E: Scalegorge Waterscape isn't safe at the moment...

C: 应该是吧？我也不确定，一定是我随手搁置。
E: I guess so? I'm not sure. I must have misplaced it.

C: 凭吊结束了，{NICKNAME}，咱们回去吧，好吗？
E: I'm done paying my respects. Should we go back, {NICKNAME}?

C: （转身离开）
E: (Turn and leave)

C: 仙舟人想从魔阴身的宿命中解脱，重归恒常寂灭。但药王秘传却觉得魔阴身是赐福，是脱离肉身凡胎的进化。
E: Xianzhou people wanted to be released from the threat of mara and return to the stability of life and death. Yet the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus believed that being stricken with mara was a blessing — a natural evolutionary step in casting off the mortal coil.

C: 加入「药王秘传」这种事，还有在其中经历的种种，我实在没法对那个孩子开口……
E: I just couldn't find a way to tell her I was a disciple... and about all the things I experienced there...

C: 就带我去仙舟的集市里转转，买些吃的，到处玩玩吧！医生们不总是喜欢在病情无可救药时对病人家属说「想吃什么就吃什么，带他到处玩玩」吗？
E: Just take me for a spin around the market, buy me some snacks, and have some fun with me! Don't doctors always say that when a terminal case is hopeless to "Take them out to eat whatever they want, and go around and have fun"?

C: 喂！
E: Hey!

C: 对不起，这种情感，我不太明白。
E: Sorry, I don't quite understand this feeling.

C: 该去贿赂一下挡路的老爷了。
E: Can't we just bribe them?

C: 咳咳咳…事不宜迟，走吧。
E: *coughing*... There's no time to lose. Let's go.

C: …让我缓缓就行，白露大人，别忘了「交易」……
E: ...I just need a rest. Lady Bailu, don't forget our deal...

C: 这当然不是，我还有更重要的事情不在仙舟之上，求药或是长寿不过手段而已，我是不会在罗浮留下来的。
E: Of course not. I have more important matters in places other than the Xianzhou. Elixirs and immortality are just a means to an end. I won't stay on the Luofu.

C: 妾身深感不忍，斗胆请大人为这个孩子着想。
E: I can't bear it! Your Highness, please, think about this poor child!

C: 巧舌如簧。他究竟是不是那个罪人，试试便知！
E: Empty rhetoric, there are ways of unearthing his true identity...

C: 明白了，大人请随我登船，白露小姐在显龙大雩殿等候。
E: I understand. Please alight, Your Highness. Miss Bailu awaits you at Dragonvista Rain Hall.

C: 鳞渊境的蜃影提到过丹枫既是骁勇绝伦的战士，也能以云吟治疗他人。
E: The Mirage Echoes of Scalegorge Waterscape mentioned that not only was Dan Feng a brave warrior — he could heal others with cloudhymn magic.

C: 放心，我研究了大量捕获扑满的案例，仙舟内外的我都看过。
E: There's no cause for concern. I've studied many cases of capturing Trotters, both within and beyond Xianzhou.

C: 速战速决吧，我也困了。
E: Let's kick some butt so we can get back to resting.

C: 找到什么线索的话，随时联系我，如果有「以貌取人」之外的证据，我立刻就来支援。只有一条：请不要直接去找罗刹本人，有任何发现，先找我。
E: Keep me updated on progress — if you find hard evidence, I'll be there in a flash. One thing though — don't approach him. If you make a discovery, contact me first.

C: 倒不是不相信瓦尔特先生，而是不相信没有证据的指控。希望各位理解。
E: It's not that we distrust you, Mr. Yang, but we cannot act on groundless accusations. I hope you understand.

C: 罗刹在长乐天的码头上眺望着风景，旁边立着一口棺材。可能是刚下星槎，也可能是在等星槎。走了一会儿，他将行李放在一边，靠在栏杆上观看码头下往来的星槎。
E: Luocha is looking into the distance at the dock of Exalting Sanctum with his coffin at his side. Maybe he just left a starskiff, maybe he is waiting for a new starskiff. He walked along the dock for a while and put aside his luggage, leaning on the railing and watching starskiffs passing by the dock.

C: 逻辑很顺畅，看起来这就是正确的顺序了。{NICKNAME}确实很聪明。
E: The logic in this is sound — looks like the correct order. Nice work, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你别掏钱。这是我神探三月七的案子，当然应该是我来掏钱了！
E: In your dreams! This is genius detective March 7th's case — I should be the one paying...

C: 各位，我们现在知道罗刹是什么时候离开那片空地的了。
E: So, we now know what time Luocha left the open area...

C: 交货？…啊，老大等您很久了，但您需要先证明身份，我才能让您见到老板。
E: Delivery? ...Ah yes, the delivery — the boss is waiting for you. I'm afraid I'll need to see some ID first.

C: 行得通才怪。
E: Surprised?

C: 但是这张纸…有点眼熟……我能拆开看看吗？
E: The paper looks familiar... can I open it?

C: 很可惜，不是这样啦。
E: Sadly not...

C: 不敢当。这本就是天舶司分内之事，却让二位英雄以身犯险。我实在惭愧。
E: You flatter me. This is a Sky-Faring Commission affair, yet the two of you had to put yourselves in harm's way. I am ashamed.

C: 的确，是我疏忽了。
E: You're right, an oversight on my part.

C: 我的专业领域不是解谜吗？
E: Isn't solving puzzles my expertise?

C: 真的吗？我倒是觉得挺傻的。
E: Really? I think it's silly.

C: 你们干什么呢？司舵的宝贝闺女带着个外人在这里东摸摸西摸摸，像什么样子？
E: What is the meaning of this? The Helm Master's daughter, bringing outworlders in to sneak around...?

C: （但这似乎不是现在该提出的话题。）
E: (...Still, it doesn't seem like something to bring up now.)

C: （但这似乎不是现在该提出的话题。）
E: (...Still, it doesn't seem like something to bring up now.)

C: 明天，我会去帮你办理手续。你会先从一个地勤人员做起，正如我和采翼当年那样。我相信…你会成为一个了不起的斗舰飞行士。
E: I'll take you to do the paperwork tomorrow. You'll start as ground crew, just like Caiyi and I did. I believe that one day... you'll make an outstanding fighter pilot.

C: 您觉得她是何居心？
E: What do you think her motive is?

C: 是吗？那要怎么让你下定决心呢？
E: Is that so? Haha, so how can we get you to make up your mind?

C: 我不会留下。
E: No, I'm leaving.

C: 来玩「真心话游戏」吧！
E: Let's play truth and lies!

C: （…不，别再和这个女人打交道了。）
E: (...No, I don't want to deal with this lady again.)

C: 该你提问了，等你准备好了，就来找我。
E: It's your turn to ask a question. Come see me when you're ready.

C: 你吗？…你是一位星神意外创造的生命，徒具肉体却没有灵魂。艾利欧指引我找到你，让你得到了灵魂。
E: You? ...At first, you were a being accidentally created by an Aeon, with a body but no soul. Elio guided me to you, and you were given a soul.

C: 下次这种话让我们来讲！你自己说很奇怪耶！
E: Pleasure! But are you thanking us or giving yourself a compliment?

C: 停云小姐，请退后！
E: Miss Tingyun! Fall back!

C: 发不出去……
E: Can't send the message out...

C: 这下我成开锁工具了吗？
E: Am I a lock picker now?

C: 我想你也该离开了，丹恒。
E: Yes, it has been a long day for you, Dan Heng.

C: 他只是想保护你。
E: He's just trying to protect you.

C: 后来啊…应该不用赘述了。今日我们立于此地，便是为了追念她的结局。
E: In the end... I do not think the details are necessary. We are here today to commemorate her.

C: 所以，当你直视我的眼睛时，我开口提问了。那是我问过自己千百遍，却没有答案的问题——
E: ...which is why I asked the question as you looked me straight in the eye. I've asked myself that same question infinite times... but was never able to find the answer...

C: 祸首饮月，一意孤行，擅行化龙妙法起死回生，变化形骸，酿致大祸，有辱战士哀荣。
E: Imbibitor Lunae, the chief culprit, chose to use the Transmutation Arcanum as a means of resurrection, begetting terrible transformation and great calamity in the process. He dishonored the name of the fallen.

C: 三月七是能和谛听交流的。
E: March 7th can communicate with Diting.

C: 总之，我就是能懂谛听的意思。
E: The simple truth of the matter is that I can understand him.

C: 你不是我的对手，所以，你也不是「刃」的对手。有我随你同行，才不会枉送性命，小弟弟。
E: You are no match for me, and therefore, no match for Blade either. Let me accompany you — there is no need to throw your life away.

C: 三万个将士，三万颗丹腑，三万点生命的烛火……她竭力不让自己被眼前残酷的奇观夺走心神。
E: Thirty thousand soldiers, thirty thousand Core Esse that are kindles of life... She tried not to get distracted by the cruelty of the miracle before her eyes.

C: 来吧，小弟弟。余兴节目留给你了。
E: Come, young man — I'll let you finish up.

C: 想获取长生之法，就要成为一名莳者，但想成为莳者，还要经历一些小小考验。
E: If you wish to gain the means to immortality, then you must become a disciple... but to become a disciple, you must first pass several small trials.

C: 你的手臂和手指已经不疼了。可能是习惯了，也可能是麻木了。
E: Your hand and shoulder no longer hurt. Maybe you've gotten used to the work, or perhaps they have grown numb.

C: （从这份「紧急指示」上来看，药王秘传似乎注意到了神策府近期的渗透行动…怪不得绿芙蓉这么急着截获它。）
E: (Judging from these "Urgent Instructions," the Disciples are aware of a Seat of Divine Foresight operation to infiltrate their ranks... No wonder Green Hibiscus was so eager to intercept this.)

C: 啊？这这这…「持明髓」？写这药方的家伙是疯子吧……
E: Huh? Th—This calls for... Vidyadhara bone marrow? Whoever wrote this prescription must be out of their mind...

C: 呃…那要不你找机会偷偷溜了，随便找个地方蹲着。我把她送走就回来找你。
E: Um... I guess you could slip away and find a safe spot to hide. I'll come back and get you once I've sent her on her way.

C: 你记得很多东西，只是你自己不知道罢了。
E: Some memories are buried deep within you. It takes time for them to resurface.

C: 太卜大人？
E: Master Diviner?

C: 今朝有酒今朝醉…
E: Today there is wine, so let us drink...

C: 清除干涉吧。
E: In which case, we must eliminate her.

C: 他们都同意收留你。我是个被放逐之人，你看起来也不像有可以归去的地方…但至少在这里，我们都不会是孤身一人了。
E: Everyone agreed to take you in... I'm an exile, and by the looks of things, you might not have a home to go back to, either... But here on the Express, nobody is alone.

C: 「不要回头，继续向前走。」我完全明白了，只要和干扰者反着来，就能找到出路。真不愧是我。
E: "Don't look back. Keep going forward..." I get it! If I do the exact opposite — I'll find my way out! You're a true genius, March.

C: 资深玩家将这种梦称为「刺身」，我不确定这点是否合您胃口。如有任何不适，请立即离开梦境，并寻求专业的医疗帮助。
E: Veteran gamers call this type of dream a "thrill-dream" — I don't know if you're into that kind of thing? If you feel any discomfort, please leave the dreamscape immediately and seek professional medical help.

C: 我注意到，这段梦里似乎出现了您熟悉的人。需要再次提醒，梦只是梦，在匹诺康尼，梦可以被加工，也可以被篡改。
E: I noticed that the people in your dream were familiar to you. It's worth repeating that dreams are just dreams, and in Penacony dreams can be processed or even tampered with.

C: 这可真是一场特别的美梦。您注意到它嵌套式的结构了吗？在梦境中参与出演一场舞台剧，就像梦中梦一样诡异又迷人。
E: What a special dream this has been. Did you notice its nested structure? Being part of a play inside the dreamscape is as weird and captivating as being in a dream within a dream.

C: 你听说过岁阳？那样倒好，解释起来也不用多费口舌了。
E: Oh, so you're familiar with heliobi? That makes this much easier to explain.

C: 不知怎么的，和你聊完之后就像让脑袋淬火降温一般，现在我冷静了不少。
E: Somehow, after talking to you, I feel like I've cooled off a bit.

C: 这把剑里封存着妖物。
E: Because the sword contains an evil spirit.

C: 不过，作为工造司的工正，我必须说一句公道话——虽然这宝剑被盗走，但咱们这工造司还是很安全的！
E: However, as the master artisan of the Artisanship Commission, I've got to clarify something — even though the sword was stolen, this commission is still highly secure!

C: 这并不是嗜血、嗔怒、畏怖的情绪，他为你留下的是…寄托？
E: It wasn't bloodlust, or anger, or fear. What he left for you was... hope.

C: 我们也调查过了，孤云交接前，工造司入口的机巧鸟拍到了{NICKNAME}离开…反倒是没有云璃姑娘离去的记录。
E: We looked into it as well. Before Guyun was handed over, the cycrane at the entrance of the Artisanship Commission captured {NICKNAME} leaving... but there's no record of Miss Yunli leaving.

C: 关于现场的美梦剧团…
E: Regarding the Sweet Dreams Troupe present at the scene of the crime...

C: 据我调查，案发前日，三位勇士本应押送一批货物回到领地内，谁料在路上遭遇了山贼泯灭帮的袭击。
E: My investigations discovered that the three warriors were supposed to escort supplies back to their territory the day before, but they were unexpectedly ambushed by the Annihilation Gang.

C: 怎么样，您记住了吗？需不需要我再讲一遍？
E: What? Where did you get that idea from? Do you need me to go over it all over again?

C: （但请放心，我来为您重播一遍方才的记录。）
E: (But don't worry. I'll replay the records for you.)

C: 这、这怎么可能？！匹诺康尼的梦里怎么会死人！流光忆庭的…你做了什么？！
E: H—How is this possible? How can people die inside Penacony's dreamscape? In the Garden of Recollection... what did you do!?

C: …没错，正是如此！
E: ...That's right. That's the one!

C: 嗯？这证据好像没法证明他是凶手吧……
E: Hmm? This evidence doesn't really prove that he is the murderer...

C: 反正，不要纠结于名目之辩，只要机枢能有效运转，「玉兆」还是「计算机」又有什么分别呢？
E: Anyway, don't dwell on names. As long as the machine works, what does it matter whether it's a "jade abacus" or a "computer"?

C: 符卿的阵法可以压制卡芙卡。为了出奇制胜，只能秘而不宣。希望不至于让各位怀疑我的诚意。
E: Fu Xuan's Matrix of Prescience was able to go one step further than Kafka. To maintain the upper hand, I had to keep it a surprise. I hope this hasn't made you doubt my sincerity?

C: 不要假装和我很熟。
E: Don't act like we're friends.

C: 你没事吧？有受伤吗？
E: Are you alright? Are you hurt?

C: 你们为什么要帮我？
E: Why are you helping me?

C: 精彩，太精彩了！我好幸运喔，长生种活一辈子也没几个能看到这种奇观哇！
E: Amazing, absolutely amazing! Even the long-lived might not witness something like this in their lifetime! I'm so lucky!

C: 是本座的错，是本座对将军有了额外的期待……
E: It's my fault. I had higher expectations of the general...

C: …这也是小女子的职责所在，义不容辞。
E: ...Of course general, I am duty-bound.

C: 那里本是仙舟上炼制丹方，研究岐黄的地方。离「建木」的封印地十分之近。星核邪祟一旦爆发，恐怕已是凶多吉少了。
E: The Alchemy Commission is where the Xianzhou's medical research and production take place. However, due to its proximity to the Ambrosial Arbor's seal, I'm afraid the Stellaron spirits may have plunged it into a deeper crisis than we first feared.

C: 还能做什么，等着呗。里面危险，我们就逃出来了。
E: Waiting around, that's what. We ran away, it was way too dangerous in there.

C: 就算它会动也不足为惧。咱飞快地跑上去，剌它一刀就走。实验材料就这么到手啦，它长得还能比咱跑得快？
E: So what if it moves? I just need to run over and saw off a sample. It can't grow faster than I can run, right?

C: 先得提醒恩公们一嘴，工造司是仙舟机要重地，与太卜司同列。
E: A warm reminder, benefactors, that the Artisanship Commission is as important to the Xianzhou as the Divination Commission.

C: 其中的烈焰确实从未熄灭过……
E: Indeed, the flame inside has never been extinguished...

C: 你给过我谢礼了。
E: You've already rewarded me.

C: 「罗浮三少」是你想加入就能加入的吗？
E: You think you can join the Luofu Trio just because you feel like it?

C: 好了好了，你们不要吵。两包都是我的，这样就不乱了！
E: Quit it, you two. Both packs are mine, that way there's nothing for you to fight over.

C: 你到底是谁？警告你别多管闲事啊，老大已经好几天没打过化外民了。
E: Who do you think you are? Keep your nose out of this — I beat people up all the time.

C: 什么事？
E: What do you need?

C: （丹枢不在这里…该去哪里找她呢？）
E: (Dan Shu isn't here... Where could she be?)

C: （楠楠在那边…但似乎没看到钟珊和其他人…先去问问楠楠吧。）
E: (Nannan is there... but I can't see Zhongshan and the rest... Let me ask Nannan first.)

C: 这段时间是浮羊出栏的时节啊！我这里进了不少上好的浮羊，那当然是多了很多羊肉菜了啊。
E: It's the season when the Puffergoats are ready! I've purchased lots of premium Puffergoats, which explains why there are so many goat dishes at my place.

C: 那你纠缠人家高唐干什么？
E: Why are you bothering Gao Tang then?

C: 诶呀呀，你把它们给打死了…这可怎么是好？
E: Oh, no. You killed them... What shall we do?

C: 嗯…这个入会试炼还蛮有趣的。几位先忙，我们两个单独讨论一下…{NICKNAME}，借一步说话。
E: Hmm... this newcomer trial is quite interesting. Please allow us two to discuss it in private... {NICKNAME}, follow me.

C: {NICKNAME}！好久不见咯～你旁边这位女士是？
E: {NICKNAME}, it's been a while! Who's this lady next to you?

C: 觉得「自己的所作所为很重要」，那恐怕只是身为人类独有的傲慢罢了。
E: I'm afraid it's a sign of arrogance for humans to think that their actions are that important.

C: 当然了，「克里珀看顾我们」之类的说法…用在教材和演讲稿上鼓舞鼓舞人心还是不错的选择。
E: Of course, using phrases like "we have the blessing of Qlipoth" in teaching materials and speeches is a good way to inspire everyone.

C: 所以，植物得长成什么样子？得有粗大的树干？还是绚丽的花瓣？或是埋在地下的块茎？
E: What does a plant look like? Must it have a huge trunk? Must it come with beautiful flowers? Or must it have a tuber buried in the ground?

C: 有关「放生帮」的事…
E: I'd like to talk about the Unshackled...

C: （钟珊到底是什么人…地衡司派出的卧底？不，不太像）
E: (Who exactly is Zhongshan... Is she an undercover agent of the Realm-Keeping Commission? She doesn't feel like one though.)

C: 他们几个瞧不上我，走了也不吭一声，这确实可能。
E: It's possible, since they've always looked down on me.

C: 来呀，迷途之人，渴望离开吗？想的话就来找我呀？
E: Come, lost one! Do you desire to leave? Then come and find me!

C: 你的战意火辣辣的，尝起来好过瘾呀！
E: What a peppery fighting spirit! Such an addictive flavor!

C: 喂喂，这不是拥有超强第六感的{NICKNAME}嘛？
E: Yo, how's that super strong sixth sense of yours?

C: 嗯，有劳你了。
E: Yes. Please lead the way.

C: 没什么事，我们继续走吧。
E: We're all good. Let's keep going.

C: …对了，桂乃芬小姐呢？桂乃芬小姐——
E: ...Wait a minute... where did Miss Guinaifen go? Miss Guinaifen...!

C: 咱们去找她。
E: Let's go find her.

C: 好、好害怕啊——嘿嘿，我装的！
E: H—How t—t—terrifying, ahahaha...! The joke's on you!

C: 让怕岁阳的人用岁阳来收服岁阳，怎么想都不对劲…实在抱歉，我帮不上忙。
E: Who thought making a heliophobe with a heliobus in her tail hunt heliobi was a good idea... I'm sorry, I've been so useless...

C: …真、真的吗？
E: ...R—Really?

C: 制伏个屁！老子虎落平阳，遇上了这只小狐狸，真是倒了血霉！
E: Sealed my foot! My power was weak when I ran into this fox child. It was bad luck, nothing more!

C: 等等，我再仔细考虑一下。
E: Wait, let me think about it.

C: 不要相信它！
E: Don't believe Cirrus!

C: 停，我知道你想问什么。欺负小姑娘有意思，另外，我没有解除附身——省省力气吧。
E: I know what you want to ask. Yes, it does amuse me to make a little girl cry, and no, I haven't left your body. There, now you can save your breath.

C: 没用的东西，这里是出口！快进来！
E: This is the exit, you useless brat! Come here!

C: 藿藿，动身吧，穿过铜镜，到吾这边来。
E: Hurry, Huohuo. Pass through the mirror and come to me.

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: 你如何看待藿藿的尾巴？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's tail?

C: 这些镜子与我所熟知的雪衣大人都不一样……
E: None of them show Madam Xueyi as I know her to be...

C: 你解释了绥园中发生的大小事情。素裳似乎明白了事态严重性……
E: You explain what happened in Fyxestroll Garden to Sushang, and she seems to realize the seriousness of the situation...

C: 桂乃芬面不改色地将葫芦摔到地上，葫芦在地上碎开，无数的岁阳逃了出来。
E: Her face emotionless, Guinaifen smashes the gourd on the ground and countless heliobi break free.

C: 但是，{RUBY_B#共犯}你的新朋友{RUBY_E#}桂乃芬还在等你，你还是听雪衣的话，让藿藿带你们离开吧。
E: However, {RUBY_B#partner in crime}your new friend{RUBY_E#} Guinaifen is still waiting for you. You should listen to Xueyi and let Huohuo take you two out of here.

C: 深呼吸，深呼吸，柯柯娜，现在是工作时间，你必须打起精神来…等到醒来，等到醒来就好了……
E: Deep breaths, Cocona, deep breaths. It's working hours now. You've got to get it together... When you wake up, when you wake up, it'll all be fine...

C: （这里就是柯柯娜的内心世界吗？摇摇欲坠的大楼，令人眩晕的高度……）
E: (This is the world of Cocona's heart? Swaying buildings on the verge of collapse, and such dizzying heights...)

C: 等你上台演绎这首歌的那天，你的梦想一定会和匹诺康尼的十二时分交相辉映…想想就觉得了不起！
E: Wait till you're performing this song on the stage. Your dream will shine as bright as Penacony's Twelve Hours... I'm impressed just thinking about it!

C: （也许要等经历完这一切，才能抵达她的内心深处。）
E: (Maybe I have to see this through to the end to reach the depths of her heart.)

C: 不怪你，这世上的人大多都是如此。
E: I don't blame you — many are the same in this world.

C: 很遗憾…虽然庞德的技术精湛，但竞技比赛永远有它难以预料的部分。庞德最后以微弱的差距拿到了亚军，但这也意味着……
E: Alas... Pound's technique was superb, but competition always has its unpredictability. Pound only lost the championship by a hair's breadth, but that also means...

C: （这里，应该就是柯柯娜记忆的终点了吧?）
E: (This place, it should be the destination of Cocona's memories, right?)

C: 我已经试过了…太多次。有时是哀求，有时是搏斗，有时任由黑潮把我淹没。
E: I've tried it before... many times. Sometimes it's begging, sometimes it's a struggle, and other times I'm drowned by its black tide.

C: 「有深不见底的海吗？」
E: "Will there be a fathomless sea?"

C: 啊，对了…那家店总不能一直空着。我这就去联系苜蓿草家系，找人接手。
E: Oh, that's right... That store can't be left empty. I'll contact the Alfalfa Family to have someone take over the store.

C: 在那之前，就由我来为您提供——在我力所能及的范围之内——最为优质的服务。
E: But before that, allow me to provide you with — to the best of my abilities — the highest in customer service.

C: 莱斯利先生…消失了？
E: Mr. Lesley... Disappeared?

C: 「现实，如此脆弱缥缈，像一株蒲公英，一吹即散。 」
E: "Reality, it is so frail and fleeting that a single breeze can scatter it like a dandelion in the wind."

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！如果您能自由地在现实与梦境间往返，能否帮我咨询一下家族在现实世界的代理人？
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! If you can move freely between dreams and reality, would you be able to consult with a Family representative in the real world?

C: （结合之前看到的信件，他大概也是协助构建了莱斯利梦中形象的影迷之一吧？）
E: (With the letter I read before, I could assume that they were one of the fans that assisted in reconstructing the image of Lesley Dean inside the dream.)

C: 罗伯特，是这个空间的主人的名字吗？
E: Robert, that is the name of the master of this space?

C: 我当然知道，迪恩先生。起码到今天为止，我的身份还是您的艺人助理啊。
E: Of course I do, Mr. Dean. But at least for today, I am still your assistant...

C: 我在那一刻终于确信：我无需再怀疑自己的存在。我就是莱斯利•迪恩生命的延续。
E: At that moment, I finally believed: I no longer need to doubt my own existence. I am an extension of the life of Lesley Dean.

C: 莱斯利•迪恩——「银河之星」。
E: Lesley Dean — "Cosmic Star."

C: 他是个多情的人。
E: He is a loving man.

C: 我想来想去，感觉在这里放置您的半身像最合适。
E: I gave it some thought, and I feel that it's most suitable to place a bust of you here.

C: 稍等，等我摆一下……
E: Hang on, let me display it...

C: 「砸烂它！」——球棍如此向你低语到，你把手伸向腰间——
E: "Smash it to smithereens!" Your baseball bat whispers to you, and your hand snakes toward your waist...

C: 踢掉终端的电源。
E: Kick out the terminal's power supply.

C: 但相对的，你感觉自己的*诗性*上升到了一个全新的境界。只差一点，还差一点点来自苏乐达刺激…你相信你立刻就能创作出惊世骇俗的绝句了。
E: However, in return, you feel your poetic inspiration has ascended to a brand-new level. Just a bit more... Just a bit more of the SoulGlad stimulus... and you will instantly compose a magnificent masterpiece.

C: 不，绝对不行。你听见了吗？绝、对、不、行。
E: No, absolutely not. Do you hear that? NO. NEVER.

C: ——原来是我搞错了。
E: ...And it seems I was wrong.

C: 请、请问，这里是白日梦酒店前台吗？
E: Excuse m—me, is this The Reverie Hotel reception?

C: 这是你该来的地方吗？
E: You sure you should be here?

C: 我是酒店的大堂经理。
E: I'm the lobby manager.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}！
E: I'm {NICKNAME}!

C: 我可没傻到一打二十……
E: I'm not that stupid to take on twenty of them alone...

C: 杠！
E: Gang!

C: …你拍马屁的功底还真浑然天成，银枝兄弟。
E: ...You're such a natural when it comes to flattery, Argenti.

C: 简直就是尽地主之谊！
E: You make it sound like we're the hosts here!

C: 你看，我在这里拜师学剑，你在这里也结识了不少人…罗浮，四舍五入也算是咱们的老家了。
E: I studied swordsmanship here. Plus, think about how many friends you've made here... The Luofu is basically our home too.

C: 还是让你们年轻人之间多聊几句吧！云璃，来之前你不是准备了很多话要说吗？
E: But I want to hear more from the youngsters! Yunli, did you not have lots prepared that you wanted to say before you left?

C: 椒丘大夫，你说的真是太好了！
E: You expressed it perfectly, Master Jiaoqiu!

C: 你们难道在等我发言吗？我没有感想。走吧，星槎快到了。
E: You're not waiting for me to say something, are you? I have no thoughts on the matter. Let's go. The starskiff will be here soon.

C: 我常听牌友们说「翻乱了工匠的箱子，如同掐住了工匠的脖子」。找到对应的手稿之后，还是得早点儿把其他手稿放回去。不然工造司的人一定会找我麻烦的。
E: I often hear from mates that "messing with a craftsman's toolbox is like choking off a craftsman's neck." Once we find the right manuscript, we'll have to put the rest back promptly — otherwise, the Artisanship Commission folks will come after me.

C: 好，我们就这样告诉铖杰。
E: Good, that's what we'll tell Chengjie.

C: 雁过留声，人过留名。莱恩老师，他、他的工匠生涯里就只留下了这份手稿，我却……
E: Master Ryan's mighty name reverberates down through the ages. All he left in his career as a craftsman was this manuscript, and yet I...

C: 接得好啊。
E: Well said.

C: 师傅总说「工匠不需要墓志铭」，因为工匠留下的一切都在作品里。
E: My master used to say, "A craftsman doesn't need a gravestone," because everything they craft is left behind in the works they make.

C: 等到师傅离世之后，面对他留下的天才设计，我只觉得无力和悔恨。我痛恨自己浪费了学徒时光，不知道该如何实现师傅最后的设计。
E: All I felt was powerlessness and regret when confronted by the genius of his work after his passing. I hated that I wasted my apprenticeship, not knowing how to carry out my master's final designs.

C: 不知为什么，莱恩老师向工造司申请收我为徒。在我人生最灰暗的时候，是他伸出了手，给了我继续下去的动力。
E: I'm not sure why, but Master Ryan decided to take me on as an apprentice. Just as I was falling to the rock bottom, he reached out and gave me the strength to keep going.

C: 这艘星槎最喜欢的事情之一，就是向那些自以为能够控制星槎的人说「不」。
E: This starskiff seems quite disobedient.

C: 于是老师设计了与之匹配的「傻瓜式」辅助系统。这套系统能根据不同复杂的场景响应驾驶员的操作，让每个飞行士都能轻松使用轻型星槎。
E: Therefore, my master came up with a set-and-forget support system that complemented the starskiff. This system will respond to the pilot's action differently according to different conditions, making it easy for every pilot to maneuver the starskiff.

C: 因果殿里真的是人的灵魂吗？
E: Are they really human souls in the Hall of Karma?

C: 当时现场的气氛那么热烈，结果决赛没几回合就分出胜负了——我看大伙儿都意犹未尽，然后就脑子一热…你就别记仇了，希儿。
E: The mood was on fire that day, but the final match was over in just a few swings — everyone wanted more. So, in the heat of the moment, I just... Come on — don't hold that against me, Seele.

C: 噢，那他应该没给你们详细讲述当时的情况。
E: Ah, then he probably didn't describe the scene in detail.

C: 没印象了。
E: I don't remember.

C: 我想说的就是，卢卡那小子把身边人的命看得比自己重要，从小就是这样。
E: What I'm trying to say is: Luka views other people's lives as more important than his own. That's how he's always been.

C: 这是什么行为艺术吗？
E: ...Is this some kind of performance art?

C: 卢卡，你……
E: Luka, make sure you—

C: 不太对劲…喂，咱们先躲一下！
E: This doesn't feel right... Hey, let's hide for a bit!

C: 我要玩古兽化石！
E: I want to play with Leviathan fossils, too!

C: 再说了，就属你在罗浮朋友多，你不去我都不知道该去哪玩！你得带路啊。
E: Plus, you're the only one with so many friends on the Luofu. I'll be lost if you don't come along! You've got to lead the way.

C: 两位，一路顺风。
E: Have a safe trip, you two.

C: 这段时间来的游客，多半会去参观演武仪典。我们几个就是为此而来的啊。
E: Most of the tourists around at the moment are here to attend the Wardance, and that's why we're here too.

C: 去金人巷吧。
E: Why not visit Aurum Alley?

C: 按照流程，任何抵达罗浮的货物都必须经过检查。
E: According to the protocol, all cargo arriving on the Luofu must go through inspection.

C: 我也觉得奇怪，看起来公司和他们结仇不小啊。
E: Yeah, that's what I find strange, too. It seems like the IPC and the borisin have some serious grudges.

C: 将军还真是给了我一个大难题，要说服公司。
E: Looks like the general has given me a tough challenge. He wants me to try and help put the IPC's mind at ease.

C: 将军邀请我们前来演武仪典观礼，想必也有这一层考虑。
E: The general must have had that in mind when he invited us to attend the Wardance.

C: 可恶，我一开始竟还真以为天将们只是前来观礼，还满心欢喜呢……
E: Aww... I was so excited. I thought those Arbiter-Generals were just here to see the ceremony...

C: 我们可以按照公司的规矩，签署一份双方都能接受的保密协议。
E: We can sign a mutually acceptable non-disclosure agreement in accordance with the IPC's rules.

C: 按照属地原则，既然这批货物滞留在仙舟的港口，天舶司当然有权检查。
E: According to the principle of territoriality, since your vessel is stranded on the Xianzhou, the Sky-Faring Commission has the right to inspect it.

C: 不至于这么惊讶吧？我看你也挺年轻的，中气也足，再活个几十年问题也不大的。对自己有点信心嘛！
E: Why so surprised? You're still young and full of energy. I'm pretty sure you'll live a few more decades. Have some confidence in yourself!

C: 不必担心，我会完成当年的承诺，找到医好你的办法。眼下我已有了眉目。
E: Don't worry. I'll fulfill my promise and find a way to cure you. Actually, I've found some leads.

C: 看来我在罗浮仙舟上也还挺有名的嘛。
E: Looks like I'm quite famous on the Xianzhou Luofu, too.

C: 这匣子是干什么用的？怀炎将军怎么不把它打开啊？
E: What's this box for? Why don't you open it, General Huaiyan?

C: 但在他看来，我们与那些随时会离开的游客并无区别。
E: But from his point of view, we're no different from all the other tourists who may leave at any time.

C: 尽是些坏消息。
E: It's all bad news.

C: 这一夜，你被面见将军的不安，以及演武仪典召开前的热闹人流搅扰得难以成眠。
E: This night, your restlessness from meeting the general and the bustling crowd before the Wardance keeps you from falling asleep.

C: 请师父用茶！
E: Please have some tea, masters!

C: 你到底懂不懂剑术啊？
E: Seriously, do you actually know anything about swordplay or what?

C: 我明白，我和一般的孩子似乎不太一样。我从来没有羡慕过他们拥有的玩具和自由，也从没觉得一心练剑是什么枯燥、艰难的事情。
E: I understand that I'm not like other kids. I never envied the toys and freedom they all had. I never found sword practice boring or hard.

C: 对了，彦卿小兄弟，似「迴星港」这般自动运行的区域，平日里也会有咱们这么多人来闲逛吗？
E: By the way, Yanqing, is it normal to have so many people wandering around in an automated area like the Stargazer Navalia?

C: 走前边这位是饮月君的隔世之身，跟在他后面的是列车组最近吸纳的新成员，二位鼎鼎大名，我这对耳朵听得可清楚了。
E: He's the reincarnation of Imbibitor Lunae, and the person behind him is the newest member of the Crew. I've heard a lot about you.

C: 不错。
E: That's right.

C: 化干戈为玉帛，确是好事。
E: Well, I'm glad we managed to talk this out.

C: 就算两位曜青使者自幼耳闻呼雷的传说，但对他的所知依旧少得可怜。唯有十王司判官才清楚，幽囚狱底下关押的到底是一头什么样的孽物。
E: I know you've heard legends about Hoolay since you were children, but your knowledge about him is likely very limited. Only the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission truly know what kind of abomination is locked up at the bottom of The Shackling Prison.

C: 和当时在工造司里的情况一样，这些货物仿佛失去了控制一般攻击在场所有人。
E: It's just like what happened in the Artisanship Commission before. These goods went haywire and attacked everyone in sight.

C: 不知它还能不能连通另一处。
E: I wonder if it can still take us to the other side.

C: 诸位，我来拖住他们，请务必阻止呼雷逃脱！
E: I will hold them back. Don't let Hoolay escape!

C: 三位将军心有警惕，全都行动了起来，打算将逃犯和祸首连根拔起，以免再生事端。
E: At present, all three generals are on guard and taking action to hunt down the fugitives and the mastermind behind it all, in order to prevent further trouble.

C: 灵砂小姐想站在谁这一边不重要，毕竟你和我都站在联盟这一边，不是吗？我们走吧。
E: It doesn't matter which side you choose, Miss Lingsha. At the end of the day, both you and I stand on the side of the Alliance, don't we? Let's keep going.

C: 灵砂小姐有什么打算呢？
E: So, what's your plan, Miss Lingsha?

C: 你看着太像狐人了…
E: You look exactly like a foxian...

C: 你好，请问曜青使节需要什么帮助吗？
E: Hi, do you need my help, messenger from the Xianzhou Yaoqing?

C: 嗨，虽然眼下人手不足，但要是有什么想要我帮助的尽管开口，别客气啊。
E: Hey, although we're short-staffed at the moment, if there's anything I can do to help, please feel free to ask me.

C: …没有。
在狩猎开始前，我要了解我的对手。你可以拒绝，向我展示你的骨气；也可以合作一些，为我们双方节省时间，医士。
E: Before the hunt begins, I need to know my opponent. You can refuse and play tough, or you can cooperate and save us both some time, healer.

C: （示弱，让呼雷以为你屈服了）
E: (Show weakness, making him believe you've surrendered)

C: 可惜，你没能抓住我的伙伴…他会向伙伴们示警——
E: But sadly, you didn't catch my partner... He will alert them...

C: 藏形匿影的猴子…给我出来！
E: Now, you devious monkey... Come out and face me!

C: 我是来确保演武仪典安全的！
E: I am here to ensure the safety of the Wardance!

C: 说起来，要是这一回台上的对手超级厉害，三两下就把我打趴了，那可怎么办呀…毕竟我只算得上剑术初学者。也不知当时哪来的信心，就这么答应了怀炎将军。
E: But what am I supposed to do if my opponent for this round is super talented and just wipes the floor with me in seconds? I'm still a beginner in swordplay! I don't know where I got the confidence when I agreed to help General Huaiyan.

C: 那不就是单纯很大而已吗？
E: Wouldn't that be too big for no good reason?

C: 这是我从湛蓝星那边买来的特产「定分镜」，只要盯着选手瞧，就能给对方的战斗力定个评级。
E: These Rating Glasses are a special souvenir I picked up from The Blue. If I just look at a contestant through them, they can give a combat power rating.

C: 三月七，彦卿的弟子。
E: March 7th, Yanqing's disciple.

C: （仔细观察对方的…佩剑）
E: (Carefully observe their... sword)

C: 来客还在陆续增加，请千万小心。
E: There are still many guests arriving here. Please be cautious!

C: （云璃师父正在看着，冷静！）
E: (Master Yunli is watching. Calm down!)

C: 但犹豫不前比犯错更加致命。无论如何，我们都要作出决定。
E: But being lost in hesitation and failing to take any action will always be more harmful than taking the wrong path. We must make a decision, no matter what.

C: 莫非……
E: Could that mean...

C: 这家伙每次上战场总喜欢搞出这么大的场面。
E: Every time she hits the battlefield she makes a mess like this.

C: 你们以为设下了埋伏，人多就能取胜？
E: You think a little ambush is enough to defeat me?

C: 是啊，祂们从不回应，放任我等在世间彼此仇杀，这就是我们鏖战至今的理由。
E: That's right, THEY never answer us. THEY just let us loose in this world to massacre each other. That is why the fierce battle between us has raged to this day.

C: 是「还尘驻形丹」。不错，幽囚狱劫狱之事，我曾出力擘画。
E: Is Semblance Reversion Essence. Indeed, I helped plot the prison break in The Shackling Prison.

C: 这三人伤势都危及性命，得亏了咱们罗浮仙舟还有一位神奇的衔药龙女，已是不幸中的万幸了。
E: All three from the Yaoqing are critically injured, but fortunately, the Xianzhou Luofu has a miraculous Healer Lady. It's a silver lining in this misfortune.

C: 我不知道，它似乎什么都没有改变…但以前困扰我的许多疑虑烟消云散了……
E: I'm not sure. There don't appear to be any changes... However, the many doubts that once plagued me have dissipated.

C: 休得无礼！
E: You will show respect!

C: 蠢货，还不快谢谢皇帝陛下！
E: You dunce, why aren't you thanking Her Majesty?

C: 朕朕朕，朕个屁！我现在再杀你一次，看你想不想得起来！
E: You really think you're some hotshot Emperor!? How about I kill you again and we'll see if you've really forgotten!

C: 和她过去有关的物件啊…我想想……
E: An item to do with her past... Let me think...

C: 朕知道你无意谋反。但朕清楚，如果就这样放过你，会给其他人释放出什么信号。
E: I know you didn't mean to conspire. But I am clear that if I simply release you, it will send a signal to others.

C: 不能看着你被家族软禁。
E: The fact that you're confined by The Family bothers me.

C: 能见到你本人真好。
E: It's good to see you in person.

C: 这也是某种意义上的「永生」…
E: It's immortality in a sense...

C: 我会尝试和家族的高层斡旋，争取能将查德威克的忆泡带离匹诺康尼。
E: I'll negotiate with the upper echelons of The Family toward the aim of taking Chadwick's Memory Bubble with me.

C: 预计起爆范围内共有<unbreak>24</unbreak>颗卫星级及以上星体。其中包含3颗存在D级以上级别文明的次级行星。
E: There are an estimated <unbreak>24</unbreak> planets at the satellite level or above within the blast range. Among them, there are three secondary planets with civilizations of Grade D or above.

C: 你用了「选择性阻断药」…
E: You took the Selective Blocking Agent...
Phew...

C: 黑塔的人偶向前迈进了一步，用额头抵住了颤抖的忆泡。残驻着查德威克意识的忆泡瞬间破裂…数秒之后，黑塔睁开了眼睛。
E: Herta's puppet takes a step forward, pressing her forehead against the trembling Memory Bubble. The Memory Bubble, which still holds traces of Chadwick's consciousness, ruptures in an instant... and a few seconds later, Herta opens her eyes.

C: ——即使在梦境中，也绝不能松懈！
E: ...No time to relax, not even in a Dreamscape!

C: 为建成真正的盛会之星，担任隐夜鸫家主的格拉克斯教授开始向全宇宙募集最优秀的人才，带领他们探索改造梦境的方法——也就是筑梦技术。
E: To build a true Planet of Festivities, Professor Glaux — who was the Nightingale's family head — began recruiting the most stellar talents across the cosmos, leading them in the exploration of methods to modify the Dreamscape — what you know as dreamweaving technology.

C: 好心的客人，请问你有看到一只折纸小鸟吗？
E: Kind guest, might I ask if you've seen an origami bird?

C: 我是奥尔拉的朋友。
E: I'm Orla's friend.

C: 如果说匹诺康尼是一片梦想之地…那么，只有一次也好，我希望这片梦想之地回应一次我的愿望——让我回到那个鸟巢吧。
E: If Penacony is a land of dreams... Then, even if it's just once, I yearn for this land of dreams to heed my plea — let me return to the nest.

C: 嗯…朋友们，我这就来！
E: Yes... my friends, here I come!

C: 梦境的主人做出了选择。它最后看了一眼过去的同伴，转身走向你。
E: The Dreamscape's owner has made his choice. It takes one last look at his past companions, and turns to move towards you.

C: 我来接他回家。
E: I'm here to take him home.

C: 找到了吗？
E: Found it?

C: 你千万别说漏嘴…格拉克斯老爷可不喜欢「钟表匠」画的那只猫头鹰了，我好不容易才背着他抢到的限量版……
E: You better not let anyone know... Mr. Glaux has always disliked that Watchmaker-drawn owl. I had such a hard time nabbing the professor's limited edition merch without Glaux noticing...

C: 它鳞片上的伤痕是荣耀的证明。只是因为亲近大地，体表的泥土遮住了伤痕，所以始终没人发觉。
E: The scars on its scales are a testament to its glory. But as a servant of the earth, mud covered its scar, preventing anyone from noticing.

C: 大概是从上上周开始，总有些外邦人在打烊前坐在店门口，希望我把当天没卖出去的剩面包施舍给他们。
E: It started about two weeks ago — there would be outlanders standing by the entrance when I closed up, hoping that I would offer any unsold bread to them.

C: 如果只是一个，那我愿意。
E: If it was just one, I'll be willing.

C: 小友果然爽快。等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
E: You are most forthright. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

C: 我需要一个帮手。记得我上个月嘱咐过的吗？我老了，很多事都必须有人拉一把才行。
E: I need a helper. Remember my instructions last month? I'm getting old, and there are many things that I need help for.

C: 又不是不给你钱。
E: It's not like I'm not paying you.

C: 我看时间还早，就打算先去整点东西吃，结果等吃完都快到践行时了。我连忙冲出店面，往那条街跑……
E: There was still some time, so I decided to find something to eat, but when I was done, it was almost Action Hour. I dashed out of the shop and headed toward the alley...

C: 忍着点，我这就帮你包扎伤口。
E: Bear with it. I'll help you bandage your wound.

C: 倘若为了救人而偷盗是大罪，难道你要说现在的奥赫玛建立在不义之上吗？否则，为什么黄金裔是英雄，苏克提瑞斯却成了罪人？
E: If stealing to save lives is such a heinous crime, are you insinuating that the present Okhema was built on injustice? If not, why are the Chrysos Heirs heralded as heroes, but Soctires a criminal?

C: 作为本地富户，拉莱德完美符合对「为富不仁」的所有刻板印象：贪得无厌、趾高气扬、一毛不拔……
E: As a local affluent, Liluder perfectly embodies the stereotypical "unscrupulous rich" person: Greedy, pompous, miserly...

C: 一件事在道德上是善的，不意味着它就是对的，至少不一定符合城邦的利益。
E: Just because something is morally good, does not mean it's right. At least, it may not align with the interests of the city.

C: 你先接几个外邦人回家再说吧。
E: Why don't you accept a few outlanders first, then get back to me?

C: 圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
E: The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.

C: 那…阿格莱雅知道该怎么找到这个地方吗？
E: Then... Do you know how to find this place, Aglaea?

C: 哦！我知道这东西，雅努萨波利斯的神棍最喜欢玩的玩具，应该也能修好她身上的窟窿！
E: Oh! I know this! This is Janusopolis' astrologers' favorite toy! This should be able to repair the holes in her body!

C: 相比天谴之矛驯养的喋血狮群，你们不过是刻法勒的溺爱下的一圈羔羊。
E: Compared to the bloodthirsty lions bred by the Lance of Fury, you are no more than a flock of sheep coddled by the love of Kephale.

C: 恩人，我不是不爱这养育我的圣城，但还有理想没有完成——我还没有见到阿卡迪亚，我不想在步入冥河的时候都没能见到它一面！
E: My savior, it is not that I do not love this city that raised me. It's just that I have a dream that I have not yet completed... I have still not seen Arcadia. I don't want to enter the River of Souls without ever having laid eyes on it!

C: 帕里斯，我听说你要奔赴战场了，是吗？
E: Paris, I hear you are planning to go to the battlefield. Is that true?

C: 浪漫…还真是难懂啊……
E: Romance... I will never understand it...

C: 然后等到那黑潮落下，纷争败退，我们以尊贵的身份开着装饰花朵的马车去寻找的浪漫之乡——
E: Then, when the black tide falls and strife has been defeated, we can ride in our grand carriage as nobles and go in search of our city of romance...

C: 于是我不停地捕猎，撕咬、杀戮。我第一次感受到生物的饥饿，所以我吞下了银饰、炉灶、没绣完的金毯……
E: So, I hunt, devour, and kill endlessly. I feel the biological sensation of hunger for the first time, so I swallow silver jewelry, cooking stoves, unfinished tapestries...

C: 阿格莱雅从你的手中接过献礼，她双目微阖，感受着纺锤上每根金丝的触感……
E: Aglaea takes the offering from your hand and closes her eyes as she feel across every golden thread on the spindle.

C: 可以靠欧洛尼斯的力量。
E: We can use Oronyx's power.

C: 不要破坏本作的科幻世界观了！
E: Stop ruining the sci-fi theme of this story!

C: 顺便告诉他们，未来的一段时间里，神殿都不需要祭品和草药了。这里没有更多的报酬给他们，要想活命的话，就去圣城奥赫玛吧。
E: Also tell them, in the near future, the temple will have no need of tribute or herbs. We have little else to reward them with. If they wish to live, tell them to go to the holy city of Okhema.

C: 可为什么是我？我什么都没有做，我只想，我只想……
E: But why me? I haven't done anything. I just, I just want...

C: 毒药没能要了你的命，却夺走了你的眼睛。当然，这足够了，你无法再完成圣女的祈祷，只能被祭司们关在这里，然后被埋进废墟。
E: The poison did not take your life, but robbed you of your eyes. Of course, that much is sufficient. You are no longer able to complete the Holy Maiden's prayer. You can only be locked away by the priests here, and then buried in debris.

C: 随着帕西提亚的通告，耳畔的喧嚣骤然削减了不少。人们吵吵嚷嚷地离开，但并无太多不满。
E: At Pasithea's proclamation, the noise in your ears suddenly quieted. The crowd dispersed noisily, yet without much complaint.

C: 在废墟里，欧洛尼斯从未向我揭示黑潮之后的世界，即使只是一厢情愿，我也愿意相信，是我选择了命运，而非命运选择了我。
E: While in the ruins, Oronyx has never revealed to me a world after the black tide. Even if it's blind hope, I also wish to believe that it was I who chose destiny, not the other way around.

C: 她不是摔坏了腿吗？
E: Didn't she hurt her leg in that fall?

C: 能跟她做朋友…这真是我这辈子最幸运的事！
E: Just being friends with her... is the luckiest thing I've ever had in my life!

C: 喔，你说磁悬浮机器人啊。不瞒你说，我正为这个事头疼呢。
E: Oh, you mean the maglev robots. To be honest, they're actually giving me a big headache.

C: 机器人的电量为0，无法对你的指令做出任何回应。
E: The robot's batteries are flat. It is unresponsive to your commands.

C: 不然你先去睡会儿。
E: Do you want to get some sleep?

C: 我看你对这事儿挺感兴趣的…这样吧，我把防盗门的坐标发给你，你帮我去查查吧…哈——欠！
E: You seem pretty interested in this... Here, I'll send the door's coordinates to you, and you can check it out... *yawn*

C: 最近有一个传闻，说地上会出现神秘纸页，叫做「幸运签」。捡起「幸运签」的人，会收获至高无上的好运。
E: There's been a rumor lately that mysterious pieces of paper appear on the ground sometimes. These are called fortune leaves, and people who pick them up are said to receive extremely good luck.

C: 是出什么事了吗？
E: Did something happen?

C: 我看有不少科员都换上隐形眼镜了，我也想买来试试，就是不知道选什么款式好。
E: I see lots of researchers wearing contact lenses these days. I want to try them out, but I don't know which type to try.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 麻烦你转告这位…华劳斯，抱歉，我不能接受他的邀请。我们法律人必须洁身自好，绝对不能主动踏进灰色地带……
E: Please tell Wallace that I'm sorry, but I can't be his friend. As a judge, I must maintain a good reputation and should never step into any gray area...

C: 我听说行政区有个有名的房地产中介，名叫拉雯妮。正巧，莱姆士汀家旗下拥有小几十套房产，她应该听过我的名字。
E: I heard there's a famous real estate agent named Lavonne in the Administrative District. Well, my family owns dozens of properties. She should have heard of me.

C: 这箱子上也写了配送地址，让我看看！
E: The shipping address is also written on the box. Let me take a look!

C: 嘿嘿，「地火」的家伙才不靠谱呢。告诉你吧伊蕾恩姐姐，以后这下层区就是鼹鼠党的天下啦——不管是打坏人还是送快递，都可以委托我们哦！
E: Hehe, the guys from Wildfire are not reliable. Let me tell you, Elaine — from now on, The Moles will take over the Underworld! You can entrust us with anything — beating up bad people or delivering packages, anything!

C: 哪怕壮烈的「地火」不再如太阳般常燃——
E: Even if the valiant Wildfire would rise no more with the morning sun...

C: 我能帮上什么忙吗？
E: Can I help with anything?

C: 我方才分明看见宇宙盛大的图景在我眼前喷薄而出，即将把她伟大的智慧倾泻在我同样伟大的头脑中，却被你打断了！
E: I'd just caught sight of the magnificence of the universe gushing towards me, about to pour out her great wisdom into my equally great mind when you interrupted me!

C: 哎，直接交给大守护者是不可能的。但是将民众的科研成果交给相关职能部门来审阅一下，倒还是符合流程的。
E: *sigh* It's impossible to hand it over directly to the Supreme Guardian. But handing over public research results for auditing by the appropriate authorities is well within the rules.

C: 把曼娅出的题目复述给了雷金……
E: Tell Regin about Manya's question...

C: 嗯？什么意思？你要是不满意，我给你挂个名！
E: Hmmm? What do you mean? If you want some credit, I can list you as a co-author.

C: 那么，这里有两道题需要您回答。
E: Well then, there're two questions here for you to answer.

C: 波瓦大臣，这件事真不值得您亲自出马…这种自以为是科研人员的家伙，我们每年要拦下十几个……
E: Minister Bova, this matter is not worth your personal intervention... These self-proclaimed "scientists" are a dime a dozen. We throw out dozens of them every year...

C: 哦，我想起来了！之前我不是都把你打发走了吗？怎么又跑来胡搅蛮缠……
E: Ah, now I remember! Didn't I send you packing last time? What are you doing back here bugging me again?

C: 喔哦…不愧是波瓦大臣看中的新星，您果然绝顶聪明！
E: Hooboy... you really are Minister Bova's rising star, huh! What an intellect!

C: 打开银门。
E: Open the silver gate.

C: 最近还顺利吗…
E: Everything going well?

C: 你为小女子带来的情报虽然都很重要，但毕竟还是二手信息…等传到小女子耳朵里，那都成了三手信息啦~
E: All this intel you've brought me is fantastic, but it's still second-hand info... and by the time it reaches me, it's already third-hand...

C: 多亏了你~还挺顺利的~小女子已经能看到自己在舞台上光彩夺目的身影了…总有一天，小女子也能像她那样……
E: Thanks to you~ everything's going great. I can already see my dazzling figure on stage... One day, I'm going to be just like her...

C: 多亏了你~还挺顺利的~小女子已经能看到自己在舞台上光彩夺目的身影了…总有一天，小女子也能像她那样……
E: Thanks to you~ everything's going great. I can already see my dazzling figure on stage... One day, I'm going to be just like her...

C: 关于塔米拉的一切…
E: Everything about Tamila...

C: 算了算了，不管了！能开到证明就是胜利——我就去赌一把吧！辛苦你为我跑一趟啦。
E: Never mind. I don't care anymore! Having a letter is good enough. I'm gonna go take my chances! Thank you for doing this for me.

C: 行了，别狡辩了，赶紧放弃无谓的抵抗吧！我告诉你，要是你认错态度良好，法务大臣还有网开一面的可能！
E: Alright, enough yapping. Just give it up already! I'm telling you, if you admit to your crimes, the Minister of Justice may even let you go!

C: 现在的你只是裂界的回声。
E: You're now merely an echo in the Fragmentum.

C: 你的爸爸妈妈已经不在了。
E: Your Mom and Dad aren't around anymore.

C: 这话不太中听啊…
E: That's a bit rude...

C: 但就算这样，应该也能被相机拍到吧？
E: But I should still show up in photographs.

C: 啊…好、好了！多谢，多谢！
E: Ahh... It's fixed! Thank you so much!

C: 这名局促的新兵颤抖地向你鞠躬致谢后便奔向了堡垒深处——你远远望见那瘦弱的身躯在冰冷的裂界中化作了残光。
E: The ill-at-ease recruit gives you a bow of thanks despite his shaking body, then rushes towards the depths of the fort. You watch from a distance as his skinny form dissolves into broken light in the freezing Fragmentum.

C: 你听说过就好办了，这帮人既固执、又愚昧，简直不像接受过现代教育的人。
E: It's great you've heard of them. They are an ignorant and stubborn bunch devoid of any proper education.

C: 「护珠人找了你们很多次，你们到底在哪里！请尽量提供有效信息，不要浪费公共资源！」
E: "The Pearlkeepers have searched for you many times. Where exactly are you people!? Please provide useful information and stop wasting public resources!"

C: 陌生人迈着欢快的步伐离开了海滩，你做了好人好事，崇高的道德为什么还未投下赞许？
E: The stranger happily leaves the beach with a skip in his step. You have done a great deed, so why haven't the High Morals praised you yet?

C: …<unbreak>18</unbreak>、<unbreak>19</unbreak>、<unbreak>20</unbreak>。
E: ...<unbreak>18</unbreak>, <unbreak>19</unbreak>, <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 我就在你的面前，如果你看不见，也许这说明我是*更高维度*的生物。
E: I am right in front of you. If you cannot see me, perhaps it is because I am a higher-dimensional existence.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 大部分武器和盔甲的确坚固耐用，但每块金属都有它的极限。如果发现它们即将破损了，记得及时来哈托努斯的铁匠铺修复。
E: Most of the weapons and armor are indeed sturdy and durable, but every piece of metal has its limits. If you notice your armaments about to wear down, don't forget to bring them to Chartonus' blacksmith shop for repairs.

C: 垂眼间你只见栏杆上一行模糊的小字：「前有绝景，所以跳跃很有用」。
E: A glance downwards, and you see a blurred line of text on the railing: "Breathtaking view ahead, jumping is useful."

C: 摇铃上镌刻着一段文字说明——「欢迎您搭乘圣城观光一号线。只要轻轻摇铃，大地兽就会停靠过来，搭载您享受一段舒适惬意的漫步时光。」
E: Engraved on the bell is a line of text: "Welcome to the Holy City Sightseeing Line 1. Ring the bell lightly and a dromas will stop beside you. Ride in comfort on a leisurely tour of the city's mesmerizing scenery."

C: …哦，也许到时候跳出来的会是扎格列斯？比如因为你把钱币用在如此无意义的事情上而生气什么的？唔，它应该不会那么小气吧。
E: ...Oh, maybe Zagreus will pop out instead? Like, you made them angry because you used a coin on such a meaningless endeavor? Mmm, it probably won't be that petty.

C: 无奈之下，你拿出球棒，决定给他演示一下你之前的操作——
E: Seeing no other way, you unsheathe your bat and decide to demonstrate what you just did...

C: 神选的英雄洗去尘途的疲惫，让感官沉入金血，在梦里触及未来的火光。
E: The chosen heroes wash away their fatigue and immerse their senses in the golden blood, touching the fire of the future in their dreams.

C: 错综的地形，是最好的训练场。
E: Areas with intricate terrain make the best training grounds.
...Huh?

C: 为什么…仅仅是一击…黑衣执剑，那是个什么样的怪物…！
E: One strike... that's all it took... What kind of monster is that black-clad swordsman...!?

C: 曾有人说过｢对于体力劳动者来说，他们会在傍晚将一天的劳累和杂念丢入火中净化。｣而你累积的疲惫和杂乱的思绪说不定可以把火盆扑灭。
E: It's been said that "for those who toil, they throw their tiredness and scattered thoughts into the fire at dusk to purify them." Perhaps the weariness you've gathered and the clutter in your mind could be what extinguishes the fire.

C: 但是如果我们转换视角……
E: But if we shift our perspective...

C: 抱歉，吓到贵客您了吗？我不是有意的…相比其他衣匠，我确实被灌注了更多神识。
E: I apologize if I startled you, dear guest. It wasn't intentional... Compared to other Garmentmakers, I have indeed been imbued with a greater degree of soul essence.

C: 感谢…奖励…奖励……
E: Thank you... here's... your reward...

C: o((^'ω´^ )っ「领取的方式是，{NICKNAME}需要观看超级英雄沐浴皂广告，每观看<unbreak>15</unbreak>秒可以领取一块，累计满<unbreak>100</unbreak>块后发放欧」)∋
E: o((^'ω´^ )っ "To claim the coupon, {NICKNAME} needs to watch Superhero Soap commercials. You get a bar of soap per <unbreak>15</unbreak> seconds watched, and the coupon will be distributed once you have <unbreak>100</unbreak> bars of soap tallied." )∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「吼吼，答案是——『我全都要』！这就是双拼的真正奥义，要好好记住欧！」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "Ho-ho, the answer is 'I want them all'! And that is the ultimate truth of flavor pairing. You do well to remember it!" )∋

C: 可是，这些漂亮的装饰…一定也会被黑潮怪物们毁掉的。
E: But... these beautiful decorations... they'll be destroyed by the monsters.
███ I ██ █...welcome █ chasing the fire █...█ give █, continue ██ before ██. █ Blessing ...██ mend █ the sky █ainbow ███, at the e██ of the wind.

C: 壁画上描绘着工具、酒杯与令人费解的器具，这是泰坦的象征，亦或翁法罗斯历史的剪影？或许两者皆是。
E: The mural depicts tools, goblets, and perplexing implements, symbols of the Titans, or perhaps glimpses of Amphoreus' history? Perhaps both.

C: 他们听没听见我不知道，但这海螺是真的能说。戳一下那根刺，听听看吧。
E: I don't know if they actually hear anything, but the conch does talk. Give that little spike a poke and listen for yourself.

C: 你看到有些长矛呈现出倾斜的角度，它们似乎从遥远的地方被人投掷到此。
E: You notice some spears lodged at an angle, as if they had been thrown here from afar.

C: 以后开战，记得提醒对面朝着你的脚踝打。
E: Next time you're in battle, make sure to tell your enemies to aim for the ankles.

C: 如今的他成功了吗？你不知道。他已奔向直面「毁灭」的战场，将救世的责任托付于你。
