E: Did he succeed by now? You don't know. He rushed toward the final battle against Destruction, entrusting the fate of salvation to you.

C: 叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯老师，风堇。你身为助教，也应作为示范。
E: Address me as Professor Anaxagoras, Hyacine. As the teaching assistant, you should be setting an example.

C: 这意味着它并不是你们喜欢的课程，现在你们还有时间去选修其他的课程——
E: Which means this won't be a course you enjoy. Now, you still have time to pick other electives—

C: 即便我们承认一座高山比另一座高山更高，那相较之下的更矮一方，它亦是高山。
E: Even if we admit that one mountain is taller than another, the shorter one is still a mountain.

C: 原来虫生的尽头，便是在这样一片浩瀚的花海，聆听西风赠来的远方虫鸣，羽化成蝶…
E: So the end of a nymph's life is in a vast sea of flowers, listening to insect songs carried by the west wind, and finally emerging as a butterfly...

C: 更奇怪的是：列车上的其他人似乎都对这突然出现的镜子视若无睹…也许你应该再检查下它，或者问问别人有什么看法。要节约时间的话，就选择前者。
E: What's even stranger is that everyone else on the train seems to turn a blind eye to the sudden appearance of the mirror... Maybe you should re-check the mirror or ask the others about it. If you want to save time, you should check it yourself.

C: 就在那儿啊。
E: The one right there.

C: 就在那儿啊。
E: The one right there.

C: 怎么啦，不舒服吗？
E: What is it? Are you not feeling well?

C: 我可以给你关于浮黎大人的记忆……
E: I can give you the memories related to the Aeon, Fuli...

C: 你能读取别人的记忆？
E: Are you able to read other people's memories?

C: 你的名声已经传遍铁卫禁区了，{NICKNAME}。大家都盼着能和你再多交流交流呢。
E: Your reputation has spread like wildfire throughout the restricted zone, {NICKNAME}. We're all looking forward to engaging frequently with you.

C: 唷，大义凛然！有我年轻时的派头，哈哈哈！
E: Wow, you're so righteous! You remind me of myself when I was young, hahaha!

C: 我、我来给您复述一下这次的行动目标：呃…扫荡「残响回廊」，清理所有出没的裂界怪物。对，通报上是这么写的。
E: L—Let me recap your target this time: Err... Charge the Corridor of Fading Echoes, and defeat all the Fragmentum monsters lurking there. Yes, that's what it says here in the memo.

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 在佩佩的指导下，你找到了它所说的按钮并按了下去。
E: With Peppy's instructions, you find the button it is talking about and press down on it.

C: （被发现了！快跑！）
E: (We've been made! Run!)

C: （同步成功了……）
E: (Sync successful...)

C: 至于其他的，我就不清楚了。
E: I'm not too sure about the rest.

C: 对了，我有个朋友，它也知道一些内情，不过它性格孤僻，不愿意和我们过多来往，我也不知道它现在在哪儿。
E: By the way, I have a friend who knows some stuff behind-the-scenes, but it's a lone wolf and doesn't mingle with us often, so I don't know where it is.

C: 你知道吗，阮•梅女士在制造我时使用了珍稀材料，这使我先天拥有极高的道德！我的人品，毋庸置疑！
E: Did you know, Miss Ruan Mei created me using rare materials. This makes me innately highly ethical! My character is unquestionable!

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: 是，我讲究劳逸结合。
E: I believe in a work-life balance.

C: 他是怎么练成这样的？
E: And how did he manage to get that powerful?

C: {NICKNAME}很喜欢这个故事呢，已经读过三遍啦。
E: {NICKNAME}, you really love this story, huh? You've already read it three times!

C: 不光是实际发生过的，还有一些对话，先前只存在于人家的幻想里。但既然是这么珍贵的回忆，就一起放进来，小心地锁上吧。
E: And it's not just the things that really happened, some of those conversations only ever existed in my imagination. But they're precious too. So I'm tucking them all away, carefully, in the same book.

C: 可在故事的结尾，她几乎失去了一切…啊，人家知道了！
E: But she lost almost everything at the end of the story... Ah, now I understand!

C: 求求你了，把我补完吧！
E: Please complete the puzzle for me!

C: 还有两个碎片…快点…
E: Two more pieces... Hurry...

C: 筑梦遥眼，启动！
E: Dream's Eye. Activated!

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 哎，工匠总是要重复相同的错误……
E: Alas, artisans always make the same mistakes...

C: 是犯人请求你预测结果吗？
E: Is it a prisoner who's asking you to make this prediction?

C: 辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，占算结果已经拿到。
E: Good job, {NICKNAME}. Results obtained.

C: 关于这次占算的内容…
E: About the divination this time...

C: 多谢大师指导。
E: Thanks for your guidance, master.

C: 所以我的宝箱呢？
E: So, where is my chest?

C: 等等，都说了我不是啊！
E: Hang on, I already said I'm not one!

C: 有时我会以它为裁衣的模特。若有必要，它也可以代行公务或上阵御敌。
E: Sometimes I use it as a model for tailoring clothes. If necessary, it can also carry out official duties or engage in battle.

C: 需要我来发电吗？
E: Do you need me to generate electricity?

C: 别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
E: Don't worry. I will assist you throughout the process and share the interpreted content with you.

C: 简单来说，我需要你帮忙搜集一种名叫「创生若虫」的生物。它们怀有泰坦的赐福，可以帮助我解读这些预言。
E: In simple terms, I need you to help collect a type of creatures called "Creation Nymphs." They possess the Titans' blessings and can aid me in interpreting these prophecies.

C: 为方便你搜集，我提前在若虫可能出没的区域布设了多台「衣匠」。很贴心，不是吗？现在你也有访问它们的权限了。
E: To facilitate your collection, I've set up multiple Garmentmakers in areas where the larvae are likely to appear. Pretty thoughtful, right? Now you have access to them as well.

C: 期待你的好消息，贵客。再次感谢你的协助。
E: I'm looking forward to your good news, my distinguished guest. Thanks again for your assistance.

C: 嗯…有位织者非常嗜睡。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>你的私人浴宫</color>内，睡得正香呢。可以试着叫醒它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is always quite lethargic. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie <color=#dbc291ff>within your private bath chamber</color>, sleeping soundly like a rock. Feel free to try waking them up.

C: 上前来吧，勇士，觐见掌管黑暗的喀嚓大魔王，面对我！
E: Come forth, warrior, pay your respects to the Crrkin' Demon King that rules darkness, and face me!

C: 根本就没有什么地契吧？
E: This land deed doesn't even exist, I bet?

C: 巴特鲁斯，你又在扯谎！
E: Bartholos, you're lying again!

C: 真没想到，我陷入迷茫时，您竟愿意出言安慰。我着实无以为报，就用一个秘密来答谢您的善意吧——
E: I never thought that when I was at my most lost, you would offer me words of comfort. I have nothing to repay you with, so allow me to reward your kindness with a secret...

C: 天哪，您不会是那种人吧？热衷于打听别人的过去，挑出些支离破碎的片段，然后自顾自地断言对方一生都在治愈创伤？
E: Gosh, you wouldn't be one of those types, would you? Obsessively digging into one's past, picking out its shattered fragments, and then presumptuously asserting that the other party has been healing their trauma for their whole life?

C: 欧洛尼斯，别帮倒忙！
E: Stay out of this, Oronyx!

C: 「智慧是做成你原本不能做成之事的艺术。而我讨厌缺乏智慧的游戏。」
E: "Wisdom is the art of achieving what was impossible to you, and I hate games that are without wisdom."

C: 你也就嘴上爽爽。
E: You're all talk.

C: 回想起来，扎格列斯老祖当年也说过：「一切的最终意义都在游戏当中。只有游戏能够让它的意义指向自己本身。」
E: Even ancestor Zagreus once said: "The ultimate meaning lies within the game. Only the game can make its meaning point back to itself."

C: 老巴特鲁斯填饱了肚子，誊写商养活了一家老小，信徒的虔诚得到了证明——简直是三全其美的好事呀！
E: Old Bartholos gets to fill his stomach, the scribe can feed his family, and the believers get a chance to prove their piousness... It's a win-win-win!

C: 不过你不一样！{NICKNAME}——巴特鲁斯可不会忘了这个有趣的名字，桀桀桀桀……
E: But you're different, {NICKNAME}! I won't forget such a fascinating name, hehehe...

C: ——哦对，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的谜题我已经帮你解好了，直接用就行，不客气！
E: Oh right! I solved {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s Passage for you. It's ready to be used. No thanks necessary!

C: （假设台词）可恶！可恶的贼灵！它骗我们说，只要把财宝放进它的肚子里，就能让亿万家产躲过再创世的洗礼，让我们在下一世赢在起跑线上！
E: (Invented dialogue) Damnations! That conniving Spirithief! It convinced us that putting our treasures in its belly would protect our wealth through Era Nova, giving us an advantage in our next life!

C: 桀桀桀桀…咱要讲的秘密，绝对是放之四海而皆准。
E: Hehehehe... Nah, what I've got is the real deal. Cross-world certified.

C: 月光、池水、翻飞的金币…扎格列斯老祖说过，「无所事事的夜晚，连思考都是罪过」。
E: Moonlight, the pool, coins flipping in the air... Our ancestor Zagreus once said: "The slightest thought is a sin on an idle night."

C: 诶，这怎么是阴谋论呢！你明明也在攻略「黄金替罪羊」，我不信你会觉得那里面没藏着任何惊天秘密。
E: It is not a conspiracy! You're trying to conquer the Golden Scapegoat too, right? You can't possibly think that there are no surprising secrets within.

C: （敷衍地耸耸肩膀。）
E: *shrugs nonchalantly*

C: 不行，我的头比较铁。
E: Not really. My head is just not in the game.

C: …后续我们还能不能从{RUBY_B#羊头战利品}「艾吉克拉尼翁」{RUBY_E#}当中解读出新的信息，或许都很难说了。
E: ...At this rate, whether we can uncover any new information from {RUBY_B#ram-head treasure}Aegikranion{RUBY_E#} remains uncertain.

C: 第欧根娜找来帮手把新的战利品展示在标本墙上。
E: Diogena enlisted help to mount the new trophy on the specimen wall.

C: 把那些和我长得一样的战利品都贡献给我。我将帮助你赢取最终的胜利。
E: Bring me the trophies that bear my likeness, and I shall aid you in claiming your ultimate victory.

C: 《在黎明升起时坠落》
E: The Fall at Dawn's Rise

C: 如果你对这一职务感兴趣，建议搬来殿内居住，我会手把手教你。不出六十个光历年，我想便能入门了。
E: If you're interested in this role, I suggest moving into the temple. I'll teach you myself, and within sixty Light Calendar years, you'll be well on your way to mastering it.

C: 总之，你完成了我伙伴的遗愿，谢谢你啦！哗啦。那些利衡币你可得省着点花哦，别为了买什么奇怪的升值产品给赔光了，这可是他作为冒牌祭司的经验谈！
E: Anyway, you've fulfilled my companion's last wish. Thank you. *whoosh* And be sure to spend those Balance Coins wisely. Don't blow them on some weird "investment" product. That's advice from his experience as a phony priest!

C: 他是负责看管火种匣的祭司，恐怕被困在了半神议院…外面黑潮肆虐，除了您，怕是没有别人能指望了…您能去找找他吗？
E: He's the priest in charge of Coreflame Caskets. I'm afraid he's trapped in the Demigod Council... The black tide is everywhere outside. If anyone can save him, it's you. Please... will you look for him?

C: 呃啊…还是想不起来……
E: Ugh... I still can't remember...

C: 再试试，总能找到的。
E: Try again. We'll find it.

C: 为什么要做到这个地步？
E: Why go this far?

C: 但愿一切都是值得的。
E: Let's hope it was worth it.

C: 眼前的这一位…存在？她一言不发，但你却能理解，她没有敌意。
E: This person in front of me... Is she real? She's silent, but somehow you can tell she means no harm.

C: 「你会得到更多…」声音回答，「那些物质上的，与精神上的；可数的，与不可数的。所得将匹配于你的力量，从而…均衡。」
E: "You will obtain more..." The voice said, "More of the material, more of the spiritual... more of the countable, more of the immeasurable. What is obtained will be in proportion to your strength, and thus... in equilibrium."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「不过看起来还有蛮长的路要走……」</color>黑塔说着，叹了口气，<color=#dbc291ff>「虽然你引来了琥珀王，但祂一句话也没说就走了。继续吧，{NICKNAME}，就这么继续，看看到最后祂会不会主动和你打个招呼。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"But it looks like there's still quite a way to go..."</color> Herta states with a sigh. <color=#dbc291ff>"Even though you attracted the Amber Lord, THEY left without saying a word. Go on then, {NICKNAME}. Continue like this, and see if THEY will go out of THEIR way to greet you again at the end."</color>

C: 浮黎…
E: Fuli...

C: 「你刚被{RUBY_B#「毁灭星神」}纳努克{RUBY_E#}一瞬间就杀死了，连接切断了。」黑塔的声音在你耳边响起，「纳努克没见过阿基维利，是没什么交情，但没想到祂会直接攻击你。」
E: "You were disconnected because you just got killed by {RUBY_B#Aeon of Destruction}Nanook{RUBY_E#} in an instant," Herta's voice rang in your ear. "Nanook had never met Akivili before, so it's understandable that THEY don't know you. But I didn't expect THEM to attack you."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「糟糕，祂来了……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh oh, THEY're here..."</color>

C: （黑塔宣称的升级…好像没什么区别？）
E: (Herta's so-called upgrades... seem to make no difference at all?)

C: 哼哼，你也觉得祂们很厉害吧？虚拟星神和人工智能可不一样。我和阮•梅想到了个办法，把虚拟星神和现实的命途连接到了一起。
E: Ha, do you find THEM awe-inspiring, too? A virtual Aeon is not the same as any old AI. Ruan Mei and I came up with a way to connect virtual Aeons with THEIR real Paths.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: ……但茫茫中，祂并不知晓，宇宙间不堪并逐渐升级的混乱尽在<color=#dbc291ff>秩序「太一」</color>的眼中。
E: ...Unbeknownst to the Aeon, <color=#dbc291ff>Ena the Order</color> is observing the devastating and escalating chaos in the universe.

C: 可是你的骰子是个球。
E: But your die is spherical.

C: 「我要给你点奖励——来点小把戏怎么样？打烂这个游戏的经济系统，还是立刻送你去见星神？」阿哈开始拍手，「你做选择时最好小心点，不然可能废掉整个账号…难道我这样做很奇怪吗？」
E: "Let me give you some rewards. How about we set a trick in motion? Disrupt the economic system of this game, or have me send you to meet the Aeon right away?" Aha starts clapping. "You'd better be careful with your choice, or you might ruin your account... Is it weird for me to do this?"

C: 你相信只要扛过这场寰宇浩劫，这块废铁就会变得价值连城！然后你就能成为第二个路易斯·弗莱明！
E: You believe that once you survive this catastrophe, this piece of scrap metal will become priceless! And you shall become the second Louis Fleming!

C: 一只渊兽在踏平数个星球后突然被乏味的寂寞冲昏脑袋，它背靠已成一地废石的苦血山脉，开始对着月亮嘶吼。…像是在回味吞下一片片虫潮的快感。
E: A Depth Crawler, having razed several planets to the ground, is suddenly overwhelmed by tedious loneliness. It leans back against a mountain, which has become a wasteland, and begins to roar at the moon, as if recalling the thrill of consuming numerous breeds of the Swarm.

C: 当古老的「秩序」仍于宇宙中注视万物之时，一位青年曾在某个磅礴大雨的下午闯至神圣静默的石室，他把一块岩石当作神的座椅，同时将那座椅「直角」的角度作为觐见神的姿势——
E: When the ancient Order was still watching over all life in the universe, during a downpour, a young man once barged into the sacred and silent stone chamber. He used a slab of stone as a deity's seat, then took the angle of the seat's right angle as a posture to greet a God—

C: 而众人正在岸边跪拜，向牺牲的溺水者表达感恩，即使他们至今未知逝去的是双胞胎中的*哪一位*。
E: And a crowd was kneeling by the shore, expressing their thanks for the drowned, even if they still don't know *which one* of the twins it was.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群热血慷慨的巡海游侠。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice changes into a group of fervent and passionate Galaxy Rangers.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 你来不及向祂提问——你「死」了。你知道自己死去了，祂决定的。不，祂没有下任何决定——只是世间的一切按祂的计算，于这一时刻*发生*了。你知道自己已经四分五裂，失去「自我」。四周是一片枪响，你匍匐着…你向左挪动，捡起了自己的左眼球。
E: You didn't have time to ask THEM a question — you are dead. You know you are dead, for THEY have decided. No, THEY have decided nothing — it is merely a moment that everything happened based on THEIR calculations. You know you have been dismembered, and lost "yourself." A wave of gunshots blaring all around, you crawl about... You shuffle to the left, picking up your own left eye.

C: 接着，你向右挪动，捡起了自己的右眼球。
E: Then, you shift to the right, picking up your right eye.

C: 终局
E: Finale

C: 翻阅「血色图书」。
E: Flip through the sanguine book.

C: 是的…你已忘记过去的一切。
E: It's true... You have forgotten everything in the past.

C: 在「均衡」的注视下，宇宙的偏移正在回归正轨：一抹金色的河流凭空出现在星间，它湍急而上，汇聚无数赤金的水滴。
E: Under the gaze of the Equilibrium, the universe's deviation is returning to its proper course: A golden river materializes in the cosmos, flowing swiftly to where countless drops of crimson gold congregate.

C: 「吾王『帝皇』。」鲁德亚•珀忒修斯，追随鲁珀特一世的机械领主，骄傲地说道，「有机生命的演算充满错谬、漏洞百出。吾王终要剿灭一切有机生命。」
E: "His Majesty is our emperor." Ludia Perthesius, a mechanical overlord who has been a loyal follower of Rubert all its life, declares proudly, "The algorithm of organic lives is full of errors and loopholes. One day, His Majesty will wipe out all organic lives."

C: 驱散眼前的烟雾。
E: Clear the smoke in front of you.

C: 判定「自我认知」- 我可以拯救世界吗？
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — Am I capable of saving the world?

C: 你卸下装甲，用力地捶打自己的心脏，试图以疼痛刺激日渐衰退的身体。只要再坚持一次就好，只要能夺回这片星系，哪怕就此在失熵反应中消散也可以。
E: You take off your armor and beat your heart forcefully, trying to use pain to stimulate your deteriorating body. If only you could just hold on one more time. As long as you can take back this star system, you'd even be happy to disappear into an entropy reaction.

C: 你温柔地抚摸它的背甲，带着光亮走进永恒的黑暗。
E: You gently stroke its thorax as you walk off gleaming into the eternal darkness.

C: 少年头也不回地离开了，疯疯癫癫的答案，连一块石头的价值也不如。
E: The young prince left without even looking back. Such a deranged answer is worth less than a stone.

C: 「你是第一天当抄录员？我们烛墨学派的情况你又不是不知道，从来都是爹不疼娘不爱……」
E: "Is this your first day as a scribe? It's not like you're unfamiliar with the life of the Candelagraphos. It is a life without love..."

C: 是烛墨学派。
E: The Candelagraphos.

C: 「我也要为自己的前程考虑。」你的门生切断了与你的联系。
E: "I have to think of my future." Your student cuts off contact with you.

C: 在齐奥尔科夫学士的墓碑前，你俯身摆下一朵小白花，那是用超纳米布折的。
E: In front of Scholar Cholkov's tombstone, you lay a small, white flower, folded in ultra-nanocloth.

C: 但关于核心，「权杖」没有给出任何信息。位置，功能，一切皆为空白。
E: But the Scepters have not provided any information regarding the core. Positions, functions... all turn up blank.

C: 判定「危险程度」-极危。
E: Determining danger level - Dire.

C: 我也要做决策智能！
E: I want to be the strategic intelligence!

C: 「从更高的世界看清信号，它的本质是一道涟漪。如果被『不可知域』的迷雾遮蔽视线，那么我们要做的，就是走出障目的知识圆圈……」
E: "Looking from a higher world, you can see the signal's true essence is a rippling wave. If your vision is blocked by the mist of the Unknowable Domain, then one must move out of the obstruction of the Circle of Knowledge..."

C: 一串代码以超乎常理的方式钻出装置，它的数据凝固，化作熟悉的形象。
E: A string of code worms out of the device in a most extraordinary manner, its data coalescing into a most familiar image.

C: 火光穿过层层锈蚀的金属，那里站着千千万万个梅尼科，有机喉咙里迸发出冰冷的指令，「开始启动反有机方程演算。」
E: The blazing ray penetrates layers of rusted metal, tens of millions of Meniks standing there, frigid commands erupting from organic throats: "Activate Anti-Organic Equation extrapolation."

C: 你们团建来了？
E: You guys on a team building exercise?

C: 谁把这鬼东西放出来的？
E: Who let this ghastly thing out?

C: 「好在也不算一无所获。我们成功邀请了第五位天才加入模拟宇宙项目——她拒绝了。唉，知道答案就够了。」
E: "Luckily, it was not entirely in vain. We've successfully invited the fifth genius to collaborate on the Simulated Universe project — but she declined. *sigh* Knowing this answer is enough."

C: 蠕动身体。
E: Wriggle.

C: 我是一缕亡魂。
E: I am a ghost.

C: 这就是你们想要的药。
E: This is the medicine you asked for.

C: 下次吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 打开奇物回收商店。
E: Open the Curio Recycling Store.

C: 计数器继续跳转，最后停留在了「<unbreak>400</unbreak>」上。玩偶内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「智识是坨废铁，存护是个呆子；毁灭像个疯子，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」
E: The number on the counter continues going up until it stops at <unbreak>400</unbreak>. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."

C: 你踏入递归方程模拟的自然程序，一个黑匣子放在地上。你打开它，全息拟造出一位医师——他腰椎以下是蛇的身形。
E: You step into a natural program simulated by the recursive formula and notice a black box on the ground. You open it to reveal the holographic image of a physician — he has the body of a serpent below his waist.

C: 「遇到您这般坚韧的灵魂是我们的荣幸。我们是纯美骑士团——向您献出枪尖上的衷情。」一些骑士盔甲碰撞的声音传来，一阵幻晕的光辉将你笼罩…接着是巨大飞艇降落的声音。你的意识模糊，只听到他们纷杂议论如何将你救出…
E: "It's our honor to meet a soul as tenacious as yours. We are the Knights of Beauty, and we'll show you our passion through our spears." Along with the clanking sound of armor, a burst of dazzling light envelops you... You hear the sound of a descending massive airship. While drifting in and out of consciousness, you can only vaguely hear them discussing how to rescue you...

C: 你还要继续吗？
E: Do you want to continue?

C: 你又得到了一只咕咕钟！在这种攻势下，你开始恐惧自己终有一天会走上咕咕钟狂热粉丝的道路……
E: You've received another cuckoo clock! If things go on at this rate, you might one day become a cuckoo clock fanatic yourself. That thought puts you in fear...

C: 「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
E: "I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.

C: 「你来了——欢迎来到『机械城』的 『认知理发馆』。」服务员咔戎把头发简单地束起，指节轻敲了桌面两下，「在这里我们可以调整『自我认知』。你可以成为你想成为的任何东西，对吗？」
E: "Welcome to the Cogito Hair Salon of the Mechanical City!" Charon ties up their hair and taps twice on the bar table with their knuckles. "We can adjust 'Intra-Cognition' here. You can become whatever you want to be, no?"

C: 然而，在你的脑海内，胜利的菜单已然敲定。
E: And yet, in your mind, the menu for victory has already been decided.

C: 画家长叹了口气，咬住画笔，似是纠结如何收尾。「最后一笔，无名客，在你看来，历史是什么颜色？」
E: The artist sighs as they bite their brush, seemingly unsure of how to round off their work. "For the final touch, Nameless, what color is history to you?"

C: 根据你的文化归属和生物特征，软件挑选了十余种推荐套餐，但你挑挑选选，仍没能得出结论。它不断为你刷新推荐的内容，可要么就太油腻，要么就太寡淡。
E: The app selects a dozen recommendations for you based on your cultural background and your biological characteristics. Yet you scroll through them all, still unable to reach a conclusion. As it keeps refreshing its recommendations for you, you can't help but think they're either too oily or too bland, or...

C: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
E: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

C: 「难怪看不到出口，嗝，原来这船在无笑话兽的肚子里，那群王八蛋…忽悠我海对面是三进制帝国。」他低声思索，像是在同谁交谈。船舱深处传来酒馆的喧嚣，但你无比确信，门后空空如也，只有浮在胃液表面的笑声……
E: "No wonder I can't find a way out *hiccup* Turns out this ship is in the belly of the Jokeless Beast. Those scoundrels... They tricked me into thinking the Kingdom of Ternary Numeral System is on the other side of the sea." He contemplates in a low voice, as if speaking to someone. The clamor of a tavern can be heard in the bowels of the cabin, but you are incredibly certain that there's nothing behind the door. Only the laughter floating on the surface of the stomach acid...

C: 再也忍受不了笑话的无笑话兽终于爆发，它的胃溃疡卷起滔天的海浪，连人带船一并给你们抛进了太空。
E: The Jokeless Beast can't take these jokes any longer and finally retaliates. Its stomach ulcer stirs up colossal waves and throws you and the ship into outer space.

C: 你盘腿端坐在软垫上，与半人半蛇的店长四目相对。第<unbreak>99</unbreak>届不眨眼比赛已进入了白热化阶段，就连河童的两个酒友都不禁捂住嘴巴，生怕影响了这场惊天动地的对决。
E: You sit cross-legged on the cushion as you lock eyes with the half-human half-snake shop owner. The excitement of the <unbreak>99</unbreak>th Staring Contest is reaching its peak. Even the water demon's two drinking buddies can't help but cover their mouths, for fear they would disturb this world-shattering showdown.

C: 你身前的双头智械侦探正进行一场自我对弈，他的逻辑回路因结论的矛盾而互相攻讦，只能以永无止境的星际象棋和局来决定答案。
E: The dual-headed Intellitron detective in front of you is locked in self-debate. His logical circuits clash over conflicting conclusions, with the only resolution being a tie in an endless interstellar chess match.

C: 那么，是谁记录下的这则寓言？或许，灰黯之手也钟情书写奇妙的故事。千年以来，像这般痴傻的狂徒虽寥寥无几，但亵渎死亡的愚人却不在少数。
E: Then, who wrote this fable? Maybe the Hand of Shadow has a knack for telling strange stories? Over the centuries, there haven't been many fools as crazy as him, but there's no shortage of idiots who've dared to mock death.

C: 于是法吉娜也混入其中，鱼群在船下游曳，海洋的眷属登上木船，带来宝物和待宰割的云羊。蜜酿在宴会中流入海里，引得泰坦和鱼群争抢。
E: Thus, Phagousa mingles among them. Schools of fish swim beneath the ships and oceanic kins board wooden vessels, bringing treasures and sheep to be slaughtered. Honey brew spills into the sea at feasts, inciting the Titan and fish alike to scramble for it.

C: 艾格勒的眸子，凝视着斯廷法洛的工匠，他锻造的机械能够令水往高处流淌，铸造的战车能在阳光下攀登上山岗。
E: Aquila's gaze falls upon a craftsman in Stymphalia, whose machines make water flow uphill and whose chariots climb sunlit hills.

C: 恰如新生的孩童，在啼哭过后，世界才真正拥有生命。
E: Like a newborn, the world only truly lives after they cry.

C: 纵使诸神的智慧超越凡世，如此诸般谜题，又有谁能解明？
E: Even with the gods' wisdom surpassing that of the mundane, who can unravel such profound puzzles?

C: 雅努斯的祭司们低吟浅唱，呼唤神明的赐福。沿海百邦的渔获带着腥味跨越门扉，北域的野兽被剥下皮毛，和冰雪一起被带上出海的航船。
E: The priests of Janus hum softly, invoking the blessings of the god. Fish from the seaside states, carrying the scent of the sea, pass through the gates. Northern beasts, stripped of their fur, are loaded onto ships with ice and snow.

C: 雅努斯，世人为你献上鲜花与羊奶，以「繁荣」赞颂你的功绩。
E: Janus, the people offer you flowers and milk, extolling your deeds with "prosperity."

C: 从那以后，大多数人再也无法与欧洛尼斯直接沟通，祭祀们垄断了与神交流的权利，但好在他们足够恪尽职守，年复一年的履行欧洛尼斯施加的义务。
E: From that point on, most people could no longer communicate directly with Oronyx. The priests monopolized the right to converse with the divine, but fortunately, they remained dutiful enough to carry out Oronyx's imposed obligations year after year.

C: 可怜又可恨的扎格列斯，只能无穷无尽地盗取，再无穷无尽地失去，如此循环不止。
E: O Zagreus, pitiable, yet detestable. They can only ceaselessly steal and constantly lose. Such is an endless cycle.

C: 虽然粗糙，但是实用。
E: Crude, but effective.

C: 吉奥里亚其实懂得欣赏美。
E: Georios actually does know how to appreciate beauty.

C: 两次的失败令这位首领分外悲愤，他向大海怒吼，控诉这场不公平的对决。
E: Twice defeated, the leader was consumed by sorrow and fury. He roared at the sea, condemning the injustice of this one-sided struggle.

C: 生命在大地上。
E: Life is on land.

C: 而巨人却摸不着头脑，浑然不知是自己的无心之举所致。这或许也是它唯一无从了解的真实。
E: But the giant was bewildered, unaware that this flourishing world had sprung from their own unintentional act. Perhaps this was the one truth they could never fully comprehend.

C: 你睁开眼，发现自己正置身于金黄色的麦浪中。微风滑过你的脸庞，远方的村落炊烟袅袅，天空中不见太阳，却总是散发着明亮的柔光。
E: You open your eyes to find yourself amidst waves of golden wheat. A gentle breeze caresses your face as wisps of smoke rise from the chimneys of a distant village. Though the sun is nowhere to be seen in the sky, it radiates a soft, bright glow.

C: 「捡垃圾」就是我们科室的面试题，怎么样，我设计的面试环节很巧妙吧，呵呵。
E: "Picking up trash" was the interview question for our department. Haha — what do you think? I designed a clever interview, didn't I?

C: 是你看错了。
E: It seems I was mistaken.

C: 这样吧，我送你点私人珍藏，以后有缘再见吧。
E: I'll tell you what, I happen to have with me something I've collected. Just take it. Perhaps we'll cross paths again sometime.

C: 你以为是我故意的啊？还不是你们之前提的都不行啊！这该怎么办？
E: Do you think that's my fault? Or are we supposed to ignore all of your previous poor suggestions!? What are we going to do about it now!?

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，听说有个叫温世齐的，偷偷拿黑塔的终端算力挖琥珀币。
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. I heard there's a guy named Wen Shiqi who secretly uses Herta's terminal to mine Amber coins.

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，那天甚至有个虚卒从我面前跑了过去……
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. A few days back, there was even a Voidranger running past me...

C: 你注意到小机器人在此待机已久，你按下电源键，小机器人进入了休眠模式。
E: You notice that the little robot has been on standby here for some time. You push the power button, sending the little robot into sleep mode.

C: 老实说，我不太喜欢他搞的那套规矩，拳手经纪人什么的…我觉得没必要，太浮夸了。我只想靠自己的实力说话，其它的一概不感兴趣。
E: To be honest, I don't really like the set of rules he made. Boxing managers and all that... I don't really think it's necessary. It's too pretentious. I just want to let my own abilities do the talking, and I am not interested in anything else.

C: …可你的心里没有研究。你只是聆听他的皮肤与布料摩擦所发出的音调，试图用这些音调谱曲；后来，你仔细观察着他衬衫因肌腱折叠产生的褶皱走势……
E: ...But you could not think of research. Instead, you listened to the sound produced when his skin brushed the fabric of his shirt, and tried to compose a song with it. Later, you started observing the creases on his shirt formed by the shape of his muscular body...

C: 你为自己冲调了一杯热可可。它就是这天气的主角——还有什么比下金属雪时捧一杯热可可，团在被窝里，看着钟意的流媒体视频剧集更惬意的呢？
E: You make yourself a cup of hot cocoa, the drink of choice for this kind of weather. What could possibly be better than enjoying hot cocoa while snuggled up in a nice thick blanket and streaming a drama you enjoy as heavy metal snows down?

C: 我、我才刚开始学！等我挪动一下……
E: I—I just started learning this technique! Let me move around a bit...

C: 我感觉到了…
E: I feel it...

C: 之后…它们…会变成我们的样子！然后再去骗那些倒霉的家伙…！
E: And then... they'll... turn into us and then go search out for more unwitting innocents...!

C: 我来组成头部！
E: I'll be the head!

C: 你对着自然的伟大显像轻鞠一躬。现在，回去找那个女工头，让她帮忙鉴定这块地髓结晶的价值吧。
E: You give a slight bow to this marvel of nature. Now, it's time to go back to the supervisor and have her appraise how much this Geomarrow crystal is worth.

C: 哦——这事啊，我记得呢。怎么样，{NICKNAME}？你的矿工生涯还顺利吗？
E: Oh. That. Yeah, I remember. What about it, {NICKNAME}? Everything going well with your mining gig?

C: 我们认识你吗？
E: Do we know you?

C: （给两人看丹恒的照片。）
E: (Show them a picture of Dan Heng.)

C: 送给你们吧。
E: I'll give it to you.

C: 瞧一瞧，看一看啊！
E: Come and feast your eyes!

C: 不可思议…太精彩了！人不可貌相——别看{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}的体型这么纤弱，我猜他肚子里有九成的空间都是给胃腾出来的！
E: Mindblowing... That was incredible! You really can't judge a book by its cover. We shouldn't be looking at how frail our {F#gal's}{M#dude's} body is. I reckon <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of {F#her}{M#his} body is just the stomach!

C: 哦，对了——你如果还想参加磐岩镇大胃王挑战的话，不妨明天再来咱的摊位看看。我保证，以你这优秀的底子，肯定用不了几次就能挑战成功！
E: Oh, right. If you want to participate in the Boulder Town's Competitive Eater Championship again, feel free to come by tomorrow. With your excellent ability, I guarantee that you won't need more than a few tries to beat the challenge!

C: 「不幸」的箱子里有什么？
E: What's inside the chest with bad luck?

C: 只要评价足够真实，你的良心就不会作痛。
E: Your conscience won't hurt as long as you leave a truthful rating.

C: 很满意
E: Very satisfied

C: 至于窗景…对于完全不存在的东西，你只能默认给出最低级的评价了。
E: As for the view... You can only default to the lowest rating possible for something that doesn't exist at all.

C: 弹一下。
E: Pluck it.

C: <size=36>…你谁？！</size>
E: <size=36>...Who are you!?</size>

C: 我当然知道啦。毕竟我是贝洛伯格人气最高的摇滚明星嘛。
E: Of course. I'm the most popular rock star in Belobog after all.

C: 拍好了？让我看看……
E: Did you get the picture? Let me see...

C: 怎么还没到头…
E: Why is there no end in sight...

C: 必须保持连接…
E: Have to maintain the connection...

C: 我一只虫好孤单啊…
E: It's lonely being a nymph...

C: 生命如此无常，不经意间就会消散。在这「理性」的庭院之中，即便生而为虫，每日也不能怠于自省喀——
E: Life's impermanence strikes without warning. Even as a bug in this garden of "Reason", one must maintain daily self-examination, crrk—

C: 吾主啊，您何时归来…
E: My master, when will you return...

C: （吓虎克一跳）
E: (Scare Hook)

C: 要不是你太大个了，我可能都发现不了你呢！
E: If it weren't for the fact that you are too big, I might not have spotted you!

C: 登天？听上去很简单…
E: Touching the sky? Sounds easy enough...

C: 总感觉哪里有问题…好像不是这个顺序？
E: Something's wrong... Is this the correct order?

C: 初次见面嘤…
E: Pleasure to meet you, chirp...

C: 嗡嗡——我们受到亡语蝶的邀请，前来观看它们的最后一舞嗡。
E: Buzz buzz — We were invited by the Eulogistic Butterflies to witness their final dance.

C: 幽邃的黑夜里能有一盏篝火驱散寒冷，是多么一件幸福的事啊…让人想要把那火光紧紧抱在怀里，融进自己的身体里嗡……
E: In the deep, dark night, what a blessing it is, to have a bonfire to chase the cold away... Makes you want to hold onto that flame, press it close, let it melt into you...

C: 啊，原来，世界要迎来它的尽头了。
E: Ah, so this is it — the end of the world.

C: 不知道，我也不知道自己要去往何方，干脆我就这样去往彼岸吧。
E: No idea. I don't even know where I want to fly toward. So, why not just fly to the other shore?

C: 对不起，给你造成麻烦了。不过你放心，很快我就不会再说话了。
E: Sorry to disturb you, but don't worry. Soon, I won't be able to speak again.

C: 给你一个建议，你去找鹤运物流的梓桥。报上我的名字…该死，我甚至没有一个名字。告诉她，是你劝说我回到工作岗位的，也许你还能获得一些什么奖励。
E: Allow me to give you a recommendation. Go and find Ziqiao who works at Heron Express. You can mention my name... Darn it, I don't even have a name. Tell her, you're the one who convinced me to return to my position. Perhaps you will receive some kind of reward.

C: 你要不要再仔细查一查？
E: Do you want to look into it more closely?

C: 你是说可能是我们的客户擅自改造了机巧鸟…罗浮仙舟上怪人很多，说不定真的有人生了什么大病、搞出这些破事……
E: You're saying that one of our customers might have made unauthorized modifications to the cycranes? There are loads of weird people on the Xianzhou Luofu. It's possible that someone went off the deep end and wanted to stir some trouble...

C: 来点儿土味情话。
E: Let's hear some cheesy pick-up lines.

C: 站住！
E: Halt!

C: 你可千万不要来敷衍我，如果我输了，我会欣然接受！
E: Don't even think about going easy on me. If I lose, I'll accept it with glee.

C: 向我提问。
E: Ask me your questions.

C: 等等！{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你这么问不对啊，你怎么可以问已经知道答案的问题呢？
E: Hang on! {F#Lady}{M#Dude}, you're asking the wrong question. How can you ask a question to which you already know the answer?

C: 你也太狠了。
E: You're ruthless.

C: 你以为你是在跟谁说话呢？
E: Who do you think you're talking to?

C: 没错，你不要擅自扩大我们的管辖范围，我们管不过来的。
E: Indeed. Do not take the liberty of expanding our territory. We won't be able to defend it all.

C: 你就是那些所谓的「无名客」吧。你们这种人啊，我太了解了！
E: So you're one of those Nameless, then. I know exactly what people like you are up to!

C: 是啊。我只看见你在这转悠…等等，岩明这家伙在干什么？眼神警惕地瞪着这儿。他有什么不满吗？
E: Yeah. I mean, I only see you sauntering around as you do... Hang on, what's Yanming doing right now? He's staring daggers at us over here. Is he mad about something?

C: 没问题！那么就先收您押金……
E: Great! Please put down your deposit right here...

C: 「作战」又是什么？！
E: Dare I ask what constitutes "combat," then!?

C: 你望了望那位寡言的男性，他也望了望你。他的嘴里全是包子，说不出话，却在用眼神说「你是个真正的战士」。
E: You look over at the reticent guy, and he looks back at you. His mouth is stuffed full of buns, and he can't say a word — but his eyes tell a different story: "You really are a true fighter."

C: 有人知道自己知道，有人知道自己不知道，有人不知道自己知道，有人不知道自己不知道。不过还有一种人，他们知道自己不知道自己不知道——那才是最厉害的。
E: Some know they know, some know they don't, some don't know they know, and some don't know they don't. But the most impressive are those who know they don't know they don't know.

C: 记得你是墨涅塔的造物吧？
E: You haven't forgotten that you were created by Mnestia, have you?

C: 呼，还好你及时赶到，不然我就要被那怪物捉住，以身殉道了喀！
E: Huff, good thing you got here in time! Another second later, and that monster would've had me for a martyr's sacrifice, crrk!

C: 狂风，听我号令！
E: Wind, heed my call!

C: 不许直视烈阳！
E: Don't look directly at the blazing sun!

C: 没想到接上金人是这么危险的事。公输师傅已经警告了我很多次，都怪我偏要一意孤行。我已经开始后悔了……
E: I didn't think connecting to aurumatons was so dangerous. Master Gongshu had warned me many times, but I didn't heed his warning. I'm starting to regret it...

C: 就是啊，人心不古，世风日下！
E: Exactly! Humanity is on a sharp decline nowadays!

C: 前不久我看这个家伙到处吹嘘工造司怎么怎么好，鼓动不懂事的年轻人来报考。
E: Just a while ago, this person was hamming up about how good life at the Artisanship Commission is, and was trying to strong-arm a naive young 'un to apply with us.

C: 毕竟他又不像我，身为工造司的匠人，能享受免费和免排队搭乘工造司星槎的「内部福利」。
E: After all, he's not like me. As a craftsman of the Artisanship Commission, I can enjoy free and prioritized travel with Artisanship Commission starskiffs. An internal benefit, you see.

C: 发皱的纸上，满是渴望太阳之人的抚摸。
E: The paper is wrinkled from the caress of someone who longs for the sun.

C: 人还在就好，梦泡可以想办法再制一批。
E: It's fine as long as our people are still around. We can find a way to produce another batch of dream bubbles.

C: 宁静的赏月地。不知那位老人遥望月光时，脑海中会闪现何种思绪？
E: A serene moongazing spot. When that old person stares at the moonlight, one wonders what thoughts shimmer in his mind?

C: 跳下去吧！以你的勇敢，冲击未知的高度——但…都怪这墨镜，害你看不清脚下的路……
E: Let's jump down! Not knowing how high up you are is no challenge to one as intrepid as you! ...Except you can't even get a clear look at the ground below because of your sunglasses.

C: 伟大的瑟希斯…
E: O, Great Cerces...

C: 你不准备考试吗？
E: Aren't you taking the exam?

C: 快送我们出城啊！
E: Get us out of the city now!

C: 有些东西必须带走…
E: There are things we have to take with us...

C: 便注定要在人世间灭亡。
E: One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.

C: 哦？这么有自信吗？来，三枚都给你了，你来试试看。敬礼神明是大功德啊，我将这个机会让给你，你可不要浪费啊。
E: Oh, you're optimistic! Here you go, take all three and give it a try. Paying homage to the gods is indeed a great virtue. I'll be generous and give you this chance — so don't waste it.

C: 幸亏您阻止了她，真不愧是仙舟的贵客啊。
E: Thankfully, you stopped her. No wonder you're an esteemed guest of the Xianzhou.

C: 这种奇怪的想法…难怪三月七乘客会偷偷笑，好啦，现在列车长知道你们在仙舟干的「坏事」了。
E: What a strange thought... No wonder March 7th was laughing like that. Alright, now I know about all that "bad stuff" you got up to on the Xianzhou.

C: 对了，帕姆想起一件事，瓦尔特乘客在讲他创作的动画故事的时候，帕姆总是不小心睡着。
E: Oh yeah, Pom-Pom thought of something: Whenever Welt was telling me about the animated story he made, Pom-Pom always fell asleep quick.

C: …我刚刚睡着了吗？
E: ...Did Pom-Pom just fall asleep?

C: （应该是制作饮料的时候掉下来的，扔进垃圾桶吧！）
E: (This must have fallen down while getting a drink. So throw it in the trash!)

C: 靠近桌子边缘的位置放着一个小小的陶瓷杯，你发现它有三分之一的底座悬于半空。也就是说，只要你稍稍一碰，它就会摔得粉身碎骨。
E: There's a small ceramic mug near the edge of the table, and you discover nearly a third of its base extended over the edge. That is to say, if you were to give it the gentlest of nudges, it would smash to pieces.

C: 你还没来得及碰到叶片，帕姆就快速冲了过来……
E: Before you even have the time to touch a leaf, Pom-Pom charges over...

C: 明明每天都有在认真浇水，怎么还是变成现在这个样子了呢？
E: Pom-Pom keeps on watering these plants, day in day out... So how can they be like this?

C: 全新品类也不错。
E: Your own all-new species is pretty cool, no?

C: 试试这个「自然」配色！
E: Try the "Natural" colorway!

C: 诶…人类的好朋友…啊！原来一直是这个意思…
E: Hmm... A good friend to humans... Oh! The book's meant for dogs...

C: 我就知道{NICKNAME}乘客会这么说！
E: Pom-Pom knew you would say that!

C: 鹤运速递，啥都能寄。全新广告语，现面向全罗浮募集中。
E: Heron Express — We Mail Anything. The all-new slogan is being pumped out all over the Luofu.

C: 唷，又见面了，{NICKNAME}！威廉告诉我你正在路上的时候，你都想象不到我有多激动！
E: Here we are again, {NICKNAME}! You could have no idea how thrilled I was when William told me you were on your way here!

C: 功夫不负有心人，这只次元扑满终于被我们抓住了！…主要是被你抓住了！
E: Finally, we've caught this Warp Trotter... or rather, you've caught it!

C: 哈，就知道你会这么说。尽管在这小小的一方天地中一探究竟吧。
E: Heh, I knew you'd say that. Let's explore this small place a bit.

C: 好像又没了，先聊到这里吧。
E: Okay, I'll think about it.

C: 谈话的最后，对方连连答应你的各种无理需求，甚至还安慰你不必为难以实现梦想而暗自消沉。那人是这样说的——
E: In the end, they yielded to each of your unreasonable requests, even encouraging you not to let the impossible dreams keep you down. Their response is as follows...

C: 我对格斗不感兴趣…
E: I'm not interested in brawling...

C: （这小孩怎么回事……）
E: (What's wrong with this kid?)

C: 好了，废话不多说——让比赛开始吧！
E: All right, quit yapping and start the match!

C: 什么？！汤姆竟然出了石头！
E: What? Tom chose rock!

C: 「四大天王」之三
E: Third of the Formidable Four

C: 这玩意不是会自动刷新吗？
E: Don't these things renew themselves?

C: 打碎容器是为了保护和平。
E: I broke the vessels to preserve peace.

C: 哎，那还是用吧。
E: *sigh* I will use it.

C: 「传神」…通缉令要的就是这个。能受到你这样高度表扬，我感到很荣幸。谢谢你。
E: "Vivid"... That's exactly what wanted posters called for. It's an honor to receive such high praise like this from you. Thank you so much.

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 东南方有什么？
E: What is in the southeast?

C: 他就这水平也能打拳？
E: Is that all you need to become a fighter?

C: 听筒中传来一个陌生女人的声音。出乎你的意料，她的声音出奇地正常。她听上去只是有些衰弱。
E: You're not familiar with the female voice. Surprisingly, the voice sounds calm, just a bit weak.

C: 别回来了…我不想见到你。
E: Don't come back. I don't want to see you.

C: 停！你还打上瘾了是吧？你这年轻人还真是，气盛如豺虎，性行暴如雷。
E: Stop it! Are you addicted to doing that? Kids these days — you're a vicious beast with a thunderous temper.

C: 如果你不喜欢，我也准备了其他的谢礼。你可径自来取。
E: If you don't like it, I have some other thank-you gifts. Come and pick one yourself.

C: 困惑…
E: Confusion...

C: 零件丢到哪儿去了…
E: Where did I put that component...

C: 眼、眼泪？
E: T—Tears?

C: 我拒收好了。
E: I refuse.

C: 你误会了，这整艘货运星槎都是我的。当时就算我再慌不择路，也不能闯进别人的货运星槎里吧？我可是很有涵养的！
E: You're mistaken. This entire freight starskiff is all mine. Even given how panicked I was, there's still no way I could sneak into someone else's freight starskiff, right? I'm a conservative guy!

C: 再说了，这附近就有「枘凿六合」，我们一会儿交流起来更加方便。
E: Besides, there's the Hexanexus nearby, so it's easier for us to link up over here.

C: 接下来想问你的是，在你看来，我们要怎样才能「吸量」，我们要怎样才能提高「次日留存」，我们要怎样才能成为「爆款」？
E: Next, I'd like to ask you — in your opinion — how can we attract more recruits? How can we improve our next-day retention? How can we go viral?

C: 我原以为只要成功当上了学者，对娱乐的强烈需求自然就会消失…现在看来，堵不如疏啊。
E: I thought that as long as I became an academic, this powerful desire of mine for entertainment would naturally subside... But now it looks like it's better to clear it away rather than bottle it all up.

C: 不过既然你都这样说了，我就尽力试试看。
E: But if you say so, then I'll give it my best.

C: 他来到我游学的星球，用表演和趣闻引发了全队的欢笑——说实话，我从来没笑得那么夸张过。
E: He came to the planet where I was matriculating and made the whole team laugh with his skits and anecdotes — to be honest, I had never laughed so hard before.

C: 我抽了整整四十发，没有一次出现过像样的奖励——没、有、一、次！
E: I pulled forty times all up, and not once did a decent prize appear — Not. One. Single. Time.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 抱歉…被您看见这副狼狈的模样着实有失体面。
E: Sorry... It's really awkward for me to be caught showing you this side of me.

C: 你什么你！歌舞片就不要逻辑吗、就不用演技吗？找群小白脸在那乱喊乱叫、蹦蹦跳跳，你管这叫电影？
E: "I" what!? Don't musicals need to have logic to them, or acting skills? This is just a bunch of pretty boys yelling and jumping around. You call that a movie?

C: 哼，粗糙干瘪、难以下咽，还有一股铜臭味……
E: Hmph, rough cuts and bone dry, very hard to digest. Smells just like a cash grab to me...

C: 哎，我和你说啊，以后要是找工作，可千万别干酒店前台。
E: Hey, I tell you what — if you're ever looking for a job, never work as a hotel receptionist.

C: 是奎茵和您说的吧？也不奇怪，她从小就是这个性格…还时不时就喜欢给我找点麻烦。
E: Is that what Quinn said? I'm not surprised, as she's had this kind of personality since she was small... She likes causing trouble for me every now and again.

C: 你先接受这个设定就行——要是咱俩处得来，你自然能见识到我「专业」的一面。
E: Just accept this for now — and if we get along well, you'll naturally catch my "professional" side.

C: 哟，你又来了，这次有什么打算吗？
E: Yo, you're back. What's the plan this time?

C: 是不是很好奇，为什么这样的故事称得上惊险呢？别急，我来告诉你……
E: Aren't you curious as to why this story isn't considered thrilling, though? Don't worry. I'll fill you in...

C: 两对眼睛、皮肤光滑，有点像长了手脚的鱼——看它的样子，在宇宙中生存也没什么问题。
E: Two pairs of eyes and smooth skin, almost like a fish with arms and legs — judging by its appearance, it should have no problem whatsoever surviving in the universe.

C: 我历史不好……
E: I'm not so good at history...

C: 我从没在智库里见过类似的生物，这意味着它的种族要么尚未被发现，要么…已经灭亡。
E: I've never seen anything like it in the data bank, which means it's either an undiscovered species, or... extinct.

C: 于是我继续向垃圾场中央行驶，一路上尽是大大小小的刻字石，以及…修建在小行星上的房子。
E: So I continued on into the center of the trash dump, passing blocks with glyphs carved into them along the way as well as... little houses built onto the asteroids.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's up?

C: 记住了，东西放在<color=#f29e38ff>艾迪恩公园的垃圾桶</color>里。
E: Remember: The things were placed in the <color=#f29e38ff>trashcan at Aideen Park</color>.

C: 听着，我有一个预感，我们已经被……
E: Listen up. I've got a bad feeling that we've...

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 新伦蒂尼恩是公司旗下的工业星球，污染排放严重；空气里经常泛着一股呛人的烟味儿，就像在柜子里放了六个月的巴维鲁干酪一样臭。
E: New Londinium is IPC's industrial planet. A place that produces heavy pollution constantly. The air used to smell of suffocating smoke, stinking like Baviru cheese that had been sitting in the cupboard for six months.

C: 好伙计，这个任务就交给你了！我需要一个新面孔帮我收集信息，看看我们搞的这个项目在他们看来有多少价值。
E: The mission is yours, buddy! I need a fresh face to gather information for me, as I want to find out how The Family values our work.

C: 不小心？哼……
E: Overheard? Hmph...

C: 他还说那是他「经过缜密调查与分析，好不容易设计出的一份精彩绝伦的活动企划」。
E: He also said that he came up with the incredible event proposal after conducting a thorough investigation and analysis.

C: 我的热血与激情在熊熊燃烧——
E: The fire of passion is still burning inside me...

C: …想让我用这种恶心的腔调和每个路过的白痴说话？见鬼去吧，想都别想！
E: ...You want me to talk to every passing fool in that nauseating accent? Hell no! Don't even think about it!

C: 咻咻…为保障艾默里奇先生作为发明者的正当权益，现在将对「广告牌推销员」施行强制锁定操作。锁定将在现存的风险彻底清除后自动解除！
E: *Beep*... To ensure Mr. Emmrich's rights as the inventor, a mandatory lock will now be put on the sales billboard. The lock will be automatically unlocked once the infringement risk is resolved!

C: 妙极！妙极！电电枪广告牌挂了，这下大家都会抢着来买钻钻娃了！
E: Wonderful! Now that the Zappy Gun billboard is done for, everyone will flock to buy the Diamond Doll!

C: 等着瞧吧——属于我，伟大发明家艾默里奇的商业帝国正在冉冉升起！格拉克斯大道？迟早改姓！
E: Just you wait and see! I, Emmrich, the Great Inventor, will build a business empire in Penacony! Glaux Avenue? Hah, one day, it'll become Emmrich Avenue!

C: 眼前的皮皮西人掉进了妄想的漩涡。让你感到恐怖的是——他还真有可能成功。
E: This Pepeshi person is lost in his own delusions, and here's the scariest part: He might actually succeed.

C: 没错…恭喜你啊，世纪大迷题都被你解决了。
E: Bingo... congrats, you've cracked the mystery of the century.

C: 但她是如何回报我的？她融了我的号！擅自转走了我的限定版闪光外宇宙之火！
E: But how did she repay me? She stole my account and wiped out all my Aether Spirits! She even transferred my limited-edition shiny Blaze Out of Space!

C: 我对娱乐圈没兴趣。
E: I'm not interested.

C: 做个自我介绍吧，我叫芙尔拉，鸢尾花家系雇佣的经纪人——准确地说，是明星经纪人。
E: Please allow me to introduce myself. I'm Forla, an agent working for the Iris Family. Specifically, I'm a celebrity agent.

C: 她都是为了你的前途。
E: She's doing it for your career and your own good.

C: 没关系！
E: It's all right!

C: 我会继续努力传唱「纯美之歌」，为了声乐之星，也为了传承宇宙中珍贵的美好。
E: I will continue to preserve the "Song of Beauty," for the sake of the planet of canticles and the precious beauty of the universe.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 卢•阿彻的语气里带着一丝哽咽，显然被戳中了内心的角落。
E: Lew Archer's voice choked with emotions. Something has hit a tender spot in her heart.

C: 抱歉了朋友，之后我会跟你详细讲述往事的——如果你愿意听的话。
E: I'm sorry, friend. I'll tell you all the details after this if you're interested.

C: 也许他们只是开玩笑…
E: They were probably just joking around.

C: 既然过去的事情都已过去，我也该展开全新的生活了——先从这「黄金的时刻」开始吧！
E: Since the bygones are bygones, it's time I start my life anew. I'll begin in the Golden Hour!

C: 咳，闲话少说。我想调查的人，其实是猎犬家系的某位高层。我正打算以她为原型，拍摄一部超级英雄电影。
E: Ahem, let me cut to the chase here. The subject of my investigation is a big shot in the Bloodhound Family, and I'm planning to film a superhero movie about her.

C: 喜悦…是啊，我应该感到喜悦才对。
E: Joy... Yes, I should be feeling joyful.

C: 果然，这栋建筑还是和我印象中一样高大、宏伟…就像一件武器。
E: Indeed, the building is still as tall and grand as I remember it. It looks just like a weapon.

C: 呃…你好？
E: Er... Hello?

C: 这是你的奖金，那些因你而活下来的孩子，我替他们感谢你。
E: Here's your bonus. And on behalf of all those children who are still alive because of you: Thank you.

C: （从奥科萨娜手里拿到了封口费，可左想右想还是咽不下这口气。）
E: (You take the hush money from Oksana, but no matter which way you think about it, you can't quite stomach it.)

C: 再见，孩子，希望我们能早日在那个和平的世界相遇。
E: So long, kid. Hope we soon get that chance to meet up in that peaceful world.

C: 不是！朋友，你有所不知，如今匹诺康尼正在面临前所未有的困境…简单来说，就是找不到工作。
E: No! Friend, you might not know about this, but Penacony is currently in the midst of an unprecedented crisis... To put it simply, there are barely any jobs available.

C: 先聊这些。
E: That's all for now.

C: 整个搬走。
E: Take the entire trashcan away.

C: 你战胜了顽强的垃圾桶。作为回报，你得到了一袋…不，是好几袋垃圾。
E: You have triumphed over the obstinate trashcan. As a reward for your resistance, you have acquired a bag... no, several bags of trash.

C: 在一片欢乐的气氛里，那名来自下城区的卫兵却转过身子，哽咽起来。
E: Among the joyous atmosphere, the guard from the Underworld suddenly turns around and chokes up.

C: 糟了，我怎么感觉有人在盯着我看啾？我可受不了这种目光洗礼…我先走了啾！
E: Oh no, I can feel someone staring at me, tweet! I hate this kind of attention. I'm outta here, tweet!

C: 你隐约记得，似乎在空间站的某处见到过黑塔的手稿，但那时只有寥寥数页。
E: You vaguely remember seeing one of Herta's manuscripts somewhere around the space station, but back then it was only a few measly pages.

C: 这会是个升降台吗？就像影视作品里常见的那样——在感应到主人靠近时，从某处升起一套合金装甲，又或者是巨大战舰的外置驾驶舱。
E: Is this an elevated platform? Just like in the movies and cartoons, a set of alloyed armor pops out of somewhere once the owner comes within proximity — or it might be the external cockpit of a massive warship.

C: 是谁？是布置陷阱的凶手？还是这座空间站的主人？
E: Who is that? The crook who laid out these traps? Or the owner of this space station?

C: 杂物堆抖动了几下，王座和你都坠落大地。
E: The stack of boxes shudders several times, before the throne and you both fall to the ground.

C: 等等，我认得这个人，{F#她}{M#他}、{F#她}{M#他}就是那位贝洛伯格的大救星！
E: Wait, I know this person, {F#Sh—She}{M#H—He} is the savior of Belobog!

C: 但它不用看完砖一样厚的说明书，知道怎么按按钮就可以操作。
E: However, you wouldn't have to read an encyclopedia-sized instruction manual to know what buttons to press to control whatever.

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 诶？不是石头老板啾？是人啾！
E: Eh? It's not Boss Stone? It's a human!

C: 本来只是想研究下苏乐达机的油枪结构，没想到自己掉进去了啾。
E: I just wanted to study the SoulGlad machine's pump structure, but then I fell in, tweet.

C: 我要让小伙伴们也知道这座宾馆的魅力啾。
E: I must let my peeps know about the charms of this hotel.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个贪嘴的孩子总在到处觅食啾。那孩子笨翅笨爪的，搞不好在自己建的<color=#dbc291ff>「配餐室」</color>遇到了什么困难啾~
E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's one greedy child who's always scavenging for food, tweet. That child is clumsy with its wings and claws, and might have run into some issues in the <color=#dbc291ff>"Pantry"</color> they built, tweet~

C: <size=28>……早说呀啾！！！</size>
E: <size=28>...You should've said so earlier tweet!!!</size>

C: 我将所有掉落在小镇中的流星收集起来，镶嵌在游乐园的每一处记分牌上，只有获胜者才能获得一枚星星啾~
E: I collected every shooting star that fell in the town and inlaid them on each scoreboard across the park. Only winners get a star, tweet!

C: 唱片转转转，好听的歌就能从喇叭里传出来了啾~
E: Spin up that disc, and sweet music will play out of the speakers, tweet~

C: 今天黄金公子都做了什么呢？
E: What did Young Master Gold do today then?

C: 啾啾…让本鸟思考一下……
E: Tweet, tweet... I need to think...

C: 这就是美梦小镇大名鼎鼎的「折纸布光法」啾！
E: This is the famous "origami lighting technique" of Dreamville, tweet!

C: 再见了！我要继续我的「反派修行」了啾。
E: Goodbye! I am going to continue my "villain training," tweet!

C: 钟表小子的朋友，能麻烦您去找找它们吗？啾啾？
E: Clockie's friend, can I trouble you to help us find them? Tweet tweet?

C: 啾啾！看来所有的孩子都回来了啾！
E: Tweet tweet! Looks like all the children are back, tweet!

C: 好啦啾，再纠结这种事，石头老板的追兵就要到了啾。
E: Hurry up, tweet. Any more indecision over this matter and Boss Stone's lackeys will catch up, tweet.

C: 呼呼，我就是小鸟里的骑士，厉害的冠军候补啾。
E: Ho-ho, I'm the knight among birdies, the mighty championship contender, tweet.

C: 我从哪儿来？要到哪儿去？我到底是谁啾？
E: Where am I from? Where am I going? Who am I, tweet?

C: 说起来，画里的姐姐长得可真奇怪，我还是第一次见这样的折纸小鸟啾。
E: Come to think of it, this lady in the painting looks a bit peculiar, it's my first time seeing such an origami bird, tweet.

C: 请留步啾，这里是副舞台，主角请走其他路线啾。
E: Hold on, tweet. This is the second stage. Main stars should use another route, tweet.

C: 发出一声困惑的*哼*。
E: Let out a puzzled *hmph*.

C: 我才是！
E: I am!

C: 我的铁皮战舰坚不可摧，就连炸弹头也没法打破它啾。
E: My ironhide cruiser is impenetrable. Not even Bombhead can pierce it, tweet.

C: 哇，好厉害。
E: Wow, that's impressive.

C: 啾啾，和整个美梦小镇相比，这里也只是很小的一部分呢。
E: Tweet tweet, compared to the whole Dreamville, this is just a small section.

C: 戒指不等于爱情。
E: A ring doesn't equate to love.

C: 祝你…你叫什么来着啾？
E: Happy... what's your name, tweet?

C: 看在你态度诚恳的份上，这次就先放过你。不过要是下次还被我抓到，必须好好修理你一顿。
E: Given your sincere attitude, I will let you off this time. However, if I catch you again, I'll make sure I fix you up properly!

C: <size=36>哦哦哦哦哦哦哦！</size>
E: <size=36>Ohhhhhhhh!</size>

C: 多聪明也是一球棒的事。
E: Then I'd just take it down with my bat.

C: 谢谢，不必了。就像丹枢大人说的那样，往后几百年的路，小鱼还是要自己走的。
E: Thanks, but no there's no need. Just like Lady Dan Shu said, I'll have to walk my own path for the next few hundred years.

C: 还有传言说，有人只是稍微翻开《瘈狂之卷》看了一眼，就丢掉了性命！
E: I've even heard rumors about someone losing their life just because they stole a peek into the Manuscript of Delirium!

C: 哇哦。
E: Wow.

C: 他说这是人生最后一签…
E: He said this would be the last draw of his life...

C: 「别人光知道你身手好，不知道你做饭也这么好，改天得举行个金人巷功夫厨神争霸赛让游客们也知道知道。」你想起了金人巷的燕翠大厨，有不少人夸她功夫高强。
E: "People might know about your fighting prowess, but few know about your cooking skills. We should hold a Great Aurum Alley Cook Off Contest to show the world your talent." You cast your mind back to the Aurum Alley's Master Yancui and the many who've praised her skill.

C: 等等，别着急，你可以帮我脱离困境。
E: Hang on, not so fast. You can help me get out of here.

C: 您要是问「有什么和古琴相关的故事」，又或者「谁了解古琴」，那你可算是问对人了。
E: If you're asking, "Do you know any stories about guqin?" or "Who knows about guqin?" then you've come to the right place.

C: 一枝红杏探情郎。
E: In almond tent, our passions taken higher.

C: 芙蓉帐暖饱饥肠。
E: In hibiscus tent, our passions shall transpire.

C: 真是俗套的故事…
E: What a cliche...

C: 我想想，我给你点什么好处……
E: Let me think, what favor can I give you...

C: 谢谢你，我会好好收下的。
E: Thank you. I'll take good care of it.

C: 恚炎，好熟悉的名字，是谁啊？
E: Furynox, that's a familiar name. Who's that again?

C: 在空中放置些画着标靶的气球…
E: Float some balloons with targets on them high up into the sky...

C: 追上了！
E: All caught up!

C: 总之，感谢您为我们提供线索。这是家族承诺的奖励，之后我们会为案情做出结论。
E: Anyway, thank you for giving us some clues. Here's that reward The Family promised. We'll reach a verdict on the case soon.

C: 你也学着他开豪车上路溜两圈不就行了…难道说你家没有豪车？那就是你自己不努力了，反思吧。
E: Why don't you just copy him and ride a few laps in a luxury car... Or doesn't your family own a luxury car? That means you don't work hard enough. Why don't you reflect on that?

C: 我之前听说，家族募集了一群有名的艺术家和建筑师什么的，似乎有继续扩建「黄金的时刻」的打算。
E: I have heard before that The Family has gathered a group of famous artists and architects. I hear that they are planning to continue the expansion of "Golden Hour."

C: 你妈妈，夏洛特她…是个非常特别的人。我们刚认识的时候，我就在她的眼睛里看到了一团火——她一下就抓住了我的心。
E: Your mother, Charlotte... she is an exceptional woman. When I first met her, I saw a fire in her eyes... She captured my heart in just an instant.

C: 愿赌服输。按照约定，你的命现在归我了。把他带走！
E: Time to pay up. As we agreed, your life is mine. Take him away!

C: 都过去了，和我也没什么关系。往事就别再提了吧。
E: It's all in the past now and it's none of my business. Just leave the past in the past.

C: …不行，那绝对不行！我可不想变得和那些廉价的苏乐达饮料杯一样……
E: ...That's out of the question! I don't want to become as cheap as those SoulGlad glasses...

C: 但你最好别花太久…我可不想被别的酒杯嚼舌根，说我每天都和一个无趣的酒瓶待在一起。
E: But I hope it won't take you too long... I don't want the other glasses to start gossiping about me, saying that I'm with a dull bottle every day.

C: 小红的香醇虽不如阿绿，但烈性十足，哪怕是举世无双的「钟表匠」来了，也定无法驾驭，饮上三杯便会醉倒。
E: Though your fragrance is no match for Green, you are extremely potent, Red! Even the incomparable Watchmaker would not be able to tame your fire! Three glasses and he would be cast to the floor, drunk.

C: 很简单，我方才来的时候，亲眼看见它开了出去。
E: It is simple. I happened to witness them driving away when I arrived.

C: 你夸张地讲述起犯人与老板的仇怨。
E: You exaggeratedly explain the boss's grudge against the victim.

C: 真不知道这种既新奇又复古的文旅项目能否重燃判官大人对生活的热爱。
E: I wonder if this kind of novel-yet-retro tourist activity would be able to reignite the judge's passion for life?

C: 这是什么意思？难道你看不见吗？铁桶之神那投射在天空中的宏伟虚影。
E: What do you mean? Can't you see it? The grandiose silhouette of the God of Iron Can was projected in the sky.

C: 我数到三，一起上…
E: Everyone with me on three...

C: 老大，我们整合了几条街的资源，办了个小学校，我又能给孩子们上课了！
E: Boss, we pulled together resources from the whole block n' put together a little school! I can teach kids again!

C: 都说人心似水，这话简直是对水最大的侮辱——看到这些气泡了吗？它们代表我对你的愤怒和蔑视！
E: They say the hearts of humans are like water... But I'd say that's an insult to water! You see these bubbles? They represent my rage and contempt for you!

C: 还有你们几个，明知是非法渠道仍旧购买，助长犯罪气焰，是不是也该处罚？
E: And you lot: You all knew it was illegal, but still aided and abetted a criminal. Should I punish you, too?

C: 倒卖专辑的逐梦客见势不妙，直接跑得不见人影了。猎犬在身后穷追不舍。
E: Realizing his time is up, the Dreamchaser scalper flees the scene without a trace. The Bloodhound agent gives chase.

C: …你们不会也买了吧？要是被这个人骗了钱，可以把专辑还回来，鸢尾花家系会照价补偿。
E: ...Did you guys buy copies, too? If you've been scammed, you can return the album, and the Iris Family will compensate you for it.

C: 总这么冷冷清清 …
E: It's always this quiet...

C: 是的，这台放映机在匹诺康尼也算是抢手货。
E: Indeed. This projector is a hot commodity even in Penacony.

C: 让我再想想吧。
E: I need some time to process all that information.

C: 下面似乎还有很多游荡的怪物…
E: It still looks like there's plenty of Wandering Monsters down there...

C: 你是在说我？
E: Are you talking to me?

C: 我们还有些手续就能离开这里，接下来的日子，打算老老实实地享受采风之旅了。
E: We still have some paperwork to complete before we can leave this place. For the remainder of our time on the Xianzhou, we plan to spend our time searching for inspiration.

C: 我听说前段时间幽囚狱暴动，这里是重灾区，有被收押的证物活了过来，也不知道是真的还是假的……
E: I heard that this place was badly hit by the riot that broke out in the Shackling Prison a while ago. There are even stories about evidence in custody coming back to life, though nobody knows how much truth there is to those claims...

C: 当然，竞锋舰的安保人员不推荐任何人、以任何理由，登上传送带。
E: That said, the Skysplitter security team does not recommend climbing onto the conveyor belt under any circumstances, regardless of who you are.

C: 这简直是科技与智慧的结晶…
E: This is the true culmination of knowledge and technology...

C: 年轻人和你开玩笑呢，这么死板干什么。
E: They're just joking. Stop being so serious!

C: 你面上挂着「如果有时间我会回来听你们说什么」的微笑，倒退，倒退，再倒退到了对话之外的安全区。
E: You give them a smile that says: "If I get time, I'll come back and hear you out," then back away, back away and keep backing away until you reach a safe zone outside of this conversation.

C: 请问，你有见过一位老者么？
E: Excuse me, have you seen an old man?

C: （怎么突然让我来指挥…好吧，该让谁先上呢？）
E: (Why am I suddenly the commander...? Fine, who should I send out first?)

C: …下个孙子！！！快来救你爷爷！！！
E: ...Next grandson!!! Come and save grandpa!!!

C: 你真是神通广大！
E: You're truly omnipotent!

C: 尽管不知道那位学生是谁，但你还是要在心底默默地说——谢谢你，无名的忍徒！
E: Even though you still don't know who that student is, you can't help but thank them silently from the bottom of your heart: Thank you, anonymous ninja initiate!

C: 部长在芮克先生的摄影棚实习过，算是见过大场面了，瞧不起这里也正常。
E: The director used to intern under Mr. Reca, so he's probably seen what real filming is like. It's only normal that he's scoffing at our efforts.

C: 还是别乱碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: …我明白了，这是扎格列斯的恶作剧，这种事情偶有发生…是我慌乱之间没想起来。抱歉抱歉，错怪你了。这样吧，给你打个五折，算是赔礼。
E: ...I understand now. This is Zagreus pulling a prank. This kind of thing does happen once in a while... I forgot about it in the chaos. Sorry. I shouldn't have blamed you. How about this? I'll give you a fifty percent discount as an apology.

C: 这是瑟希斯的召唤！
E: This is Cerces' summons!

C: 我改主意了…
E: I've changed my mind...

C: 说明您喜欢现代外骨骼机甲。
E: It means you like modern exoskeleton mechs.

C: 已将您的不满记录在案——未来会增加更多可选武装…我是说，可选时尚单品。
E: Your dissatisfaction has been documented — more selectable armors... I mean, selectable fashion items will be added in the future.

C: 喔，喔。看来我们的开拓者不愧于「开拓」的名号，热衷于尝试新鲜事物呢。
E: Wow. Passionate about trying new stuff. It seems that you're true to the title of Trailblazer.

C: 好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…可是，到底哪里出了问题啊？
E: Owwch! Didn't expect it to bite... But, what exactly did you get wrong?

C: 吼吼吼，本狮只好揭露谜底，正确答案是——「债务」。
E: Ho-ho-ho, I have no choice but to reveal the answer. What I'm looking for is: Debt.

C: 这个谜题到底是在讲什么呢？想想看，想想看吼！
E: What is this riddle referring to? Have a think, have a think, ho!

C: 吼吼？异乡的勇士还认识和本狮品味相近的才子？吼…要不是本狮没法从墙里出来，绝对要跑去认识下这位贵人吼！
E: Ho-ho? Warrior from outlands, you know a genius whose wit is comparable to mine? Ho... If not for the fact that I can't leave this wall, I would've run off to befriend this luminary!

C: （无视它）
E: (Ignore it)

C: 值勤的卫兵阿扎说：「我早跟城主讲过了！扎格列斯昨晚给我托梦，践行时桥会断裂，可他没听我的。」
E: The on-duty guard, Aza said: "I already told the lord! Zagreus came to me in a dream last night, saying that the bridge would falter at the Action Hour. But he didn't listen."

C: 你不是被查杀了吗？
E: Didn't you get eradicated?

C: 嗝，好吃。
E: *burp* Tasty.

C: 太冷了…呼呼，请将那东西拿远点。呼…呼，我都快冻僵了……
E: It's cold... *crackle* Please take that away from me. Hu...ff... I'm freezing.

C: 你自己琢磨去吧，我还有事。
E: You should ponder on it yourself. I have other matters to attend to.

C: 大功告成！你把信投入信箱。不知道咪发迷收到信会是什么表情？
E: Mission complete! You slip the letter into the mailbox. Wonder what kind of face Mifamem will make when they get the letter?

C: 回忆之前的信件…
E: Recall the previous letter...

C: …谢谢你。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 嘻，开个玩笑。只是觉得{NICKNAME}的名字很好听。
E: Hehe, just kidding. I just think {NICKNAME} is such a beautiful name.

C: 螺丝咕姆先生的意思是，黑塔女士进入的翁法罗斯，有可能是那位来古士构建的认知障碍…就像同谐之力那样？
E: Mr. Screwllum means that the Amphoreus you entered, Madam Herta, might have been a cognitive barrier constructed by Lygus... similar to the power of Harmony?

C: 直到你收回视线，大树、秋千、池塘，还有初次见面时她送你的稻草人……
E: Until your eyes returned to the tree, the swing, the pond... and the scarecrow she gave you when you first met.

C: 昔涟拉着你在迷境中转了许久…直到你们都累了，她打着哈欠向你道别。
E: Cyrene dragged you around the Maze for a good while... Eventually, both of you were worn out. She yawned and said goodbye.

C: 对了，不如…把鞋子脱掉，一起感受下水温吧。{NICKNAME}有这样试过吗？
E: Oh... why don't you take off your shoes and dip your feet into the water? {NICKNAME}, have you tried this before?

C: 怀揣对天外世界的憧憬，昔涟眼中星光闪烁，向你挥手暂别。
E: With her eyes twinkling with the stars of her longing for the world beyond, Cyrene waves goodbye to you.

C: 这里呀…不得不说，人家好好地苦恼了一阵子呢——我到底应不应该对它感到熟悉？
E: Oh, this place... I must admit, I've mulled over it for quite some time now. Is this somewhere I should be familiar with?

C: 是因为战争的气息太过浓烈，以至于士兵的神智都模糊不清，误以为自己便是那指挥全军的将领了么？无论如何，看来我选错了人质。
E: Could it be that the spirit of battle has overwhelmed your sanity, causing you to become confused? Does a mere soldier believe themself to be a general of the whole army? Whatever the case, it seems that I have picked the wrong person as a hostage.

C: 我的灵智仍旧不太清晰，对位置的判断也颇为失准。请问——疯王的祭典在何处举办？我是否来到了错误的地点？
E: My mind is still unclear, and I have lost my sense of direction. May I ask... Where is the festival of the Mad King being held? Have I come to the wrong place?

C: …我？和你见过？怎么可能。我才刚成为辅祭不久，从未离开过命运圣城。
E: ...Me? How could that be? I'm but a new acolyte and have never stepped beyond the Holy City of Fate.

C: 「世界」
E: World

C: 跟我说说这个地方吧。
E: Tell me about this place.

C: 下次…记得带秘酿来…多带点……
E: Next time... remember to bring ambrosia... More...

C: （捏捏它的小爪子）
E: (Squeeze its little paws)

C: 跟它玩会儿吧！
E: Play with it!

C: 你再三确认，确定自己并没有看错——它的笑容中带有三分讥诮，三分凉薄，三分不屑和三分笑肌失调。
E: You check again and again to see if your eyes are deceiving you — its smile is a mix of sarcasm, indifference, disdain, and dysfunctional jaw muscles.

C: 虽然它们有些调皮，但其实做事很有逻辑，还很重情感。
E: Although they can be mischievous sometimes, they are very logical and they value relationships a lot.

C: 我还有一些事情想要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 孩子，这是一场灾难，如你所言。
E: Kid, as you said, this is a disaster.

C: 一切都如星神密卷中所言，一点不假，一点不差……
E: Everything happens exactly as predicted in the Mystic Scroll of Aeons, exactly...

C: 天哪，我快要呼吸不过来了！天哪！
E: Gosh, I can't breathe! Oh my gosh!

C: 这些入侵者，就是「毁灭」纳努克的追随者！绝不会有错！
E: These invaders are followers of Nanook the Destruction! This can't be wrong!

C: 你是谁？我怎么没有见过你？
E: Who are you? How come I've never seen you?

C: 也难怪，种子岛那边的人嘴巴一天到晚叭叭不停，动不动就吹嘘什么「莱斯莉的十一杯畅饮咖啡」神话。
E: Why am I surprised? People on Seed Isle never shut up. They keep bragging about the legend of Lesley's <unbreak>11</unbreak> Cups of Coffee.

C: 你是医生么？
E: Are you a doctor?

C: 我还有些问题想问…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 你支持他们在一起吗？
E: Will you support them being together?

C: 归根结底，还是我做得不够好，太安于现状，没有危机意识了……
E: At the end of the day, I'm the one to be blamed for the invasion. I was too complacent and failed to detect a major threat...

C: 这次真的多谢你了。有了你的协助，相信空间站的运作一定可以很快恢复到正常状态的！
E: Thank you so much. With your help, the operations on the space station will soon be back on track!

C: 有话就直说。
E: Just say it.

C: 我家？其实也没什么好说的，有点小钱，生活也算是富足…也就这样了，没什么特殊的地方。
E: My family? Nothing too crazy. They made a fortune and stayed relatively well-off. That's about it.

C: 我有些问题想问你…
E: I have some questions for you...

C: 它压低了声音，耷拉着头，不情不愿却又清清楚楚地开了口。
E: With its head drooped, Bit Busy speaks in a hushed but clear voice reluctantly.

C: 那就好，我去忙别的事啦。
E: Great! I'll get back to my work then.

C: 你好，鲜少有人会拨打这个号码。是，某位天才俱乐部会员？还是…空间站的科员？
E: Hello. People rarely dial this number. Are you a member of the Genius Society? Or a space station researcher?

C: 这位客人实在是太捧场了。要帮您打包一面盾牌吗？
E: This customer is a saint for supporting my business. Shall I pack up a shield for you?

C: ——不打算试试吗？
E: ...Will you try it?

C: 平平无奇的箱子，人们用来存放物件的必需品，看起来就像是能被球棒轻易击碎的道具。
E: An unremarkable box. A must-have necessity when it comes to storage. It looks like it could be easily smashed with a ball bat.

C: 我并非不愿思考，而是不愿动摇思考的根基。
E: It is not that I am unwilling to reflect. I am unwilling to shake the very foundation of thought itself.

C: 但这个逻辑并非无懈可击。异乡的智者啊，不知你有没有看到其中的疏漏？
E: However, this logic is not infallible. Wise one from outlands, I wonder if you have seen the flaw in this?

C: 「阿卡索斯」正是如此。看不见、摸不着，只能通过我们的理性来认知，规定着所有能找到的阿卡索斯城。可它确实存在，就在某个地方，并且永远不会消亡。
E: "Icatus" is much the same. It cannot be seen nor touched. It is only recognized through our rational cognition, which regulates all the cities of Icatus that we find. However, it does in fact exist somewhere, and it will never disappear.

C: （论证：是通过认知得到的。）
E: (Theory: We learn through our cognition.)

C: 回忆戛然而止，最后停留在你脑海中的，是男人喑哑的嘶吼与绝望的脸。
E: The memories reach an abrupt end. The last thing that you sense in your mind is the man's hoarse screams and his face of despair.

C: 不过…这样看来，拉达曼确实参与其中…恐怕他原本就计划将两个人都除掉吧……
E: However... Now that I think about it... if Rhadaman was involved... I'm afraid his original plan was to get rid of both the husband and wife...

C: 你们看这个无法使用的卷轴…他明显是有备而来。
E: Look at this useless scroll... He obviously came prepared.

C: 你这个玩弄感情的渣男！
E: You're a scumbag for playing around with her feelings!

C: 这个计划倒是有其巧妙之处，只有我们被逼上如此绝路，才能显得她父母不义。不过城外的安全问题，是我最大的顾虑……
E: There is a certain cleverness to this plan. Only by forcing us into a desperate situation can her parents seem in the wrong. However, I'm most worried about our personal safety outside the city...

C: 我会等更好的机会。我相信，如果我们是命定中的爱人，事情一定会迎来转机，墨涅塔会守护我们的！
E: I'll bide my time until a better chance comes along. I believe that if we are indeed destined to be lovers, then things will definitely take a turn for the better. Mnestia will surely watch over us!

C: 难道我没有拒绝的选项吗？
E: Don't tell me there's no option to refuse?

C: 哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出尼卡多利的兵器来对付我呢。
E: Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to rough me up with Nikador's weapon.

C: 嗯…您完全没听说过也正常。因为协会里加上我总共也只有四个人。
E: Well, it's not surprising you haven't heard of it. There are only four of us, including me.

C: …防守都被攻破了？怎么回事？！只有黑潮怪物的话，我们明明能撑更久……
E: ...The defenses were breached? What happened?! If it were just the black tide, we could have lasted longer...

C: 我可以替你去看看。
E: I could go on your behalf.

C: 你说这人，一把年纪了，非得窝在树庭瞎折腾，让他回奥赫玛就跟要了他的命似的。
E: That stubborn old fool, always clinging to the Grove, treating Okhema like it's poison to him.

C: 哎，又得还贷……
E: Tsk, time to make another loan repayment...

C: 库娜涅似乎从姐姐的身边拾起了什么…你猜那或许是一把武器。
E: It looks as if Cynane is taking something from her sister's body... You imagine it must be some kind of weapon.

C: 我从小就想当个科学家。
E: I've always wanted to be a scientist ever since I was little.

C: 保持高强度水群就好了。
E: Just keep posting in our group chat and everything will be fine.

C: 尽管听不懂大地兽的语言，但你似乎感受到了它的喜悦…如果不是错觉的话。
E: Although you don't understand the dromas's language, you seem to sense its joy... if it's not just your imagination.

C: 古语说，孤独是足以致死的疾病，想必科可波阁下也是念主心切，外加不适应城内的安逸环境，才会做出这等狂放的行径。
E: The old saying goes, "Loneliness is a fatal ailment." It seems Kokopo, too, longs deeply for its master. Struggling to adapt to the tranquil life within the city walls has only exacerbated its restlessness.

C: 你忘了找他们要钱？
E: You forgot to ask them for money?

C: …真要回去吗？
E: ...Are you really leaving?

C: 蕾莉亚！我亲爱的，噢！你那美丽的双眸怎么不再闪动着明媚的光？
E: Lelia! My love! Oh, why have those beautiful eyes of yours lost their radiant glow?

C: 现在的刻法勒…不也正是为了它的造物们免遭黑暗，才高举黎明机器的吗？
E: Isn't Kephale doing the same now — raising the Dawn Device to keep their creations safe from darkness?

C: 我给你讲了我的辉煌战绩，给你看了我健硕的肌肉…我甚至给了你我的签名！
E: I've told you all about my glorious achievements, shown you my strong, well-built muscles... I even gave you my autograph!

C: 我…实在有点…恐高…呕！
E: I... really have a bit of... a fear of heights... ugh!

C: 问问克利克。
E: Ask Kilik.

C: 包的，{F#姐们}{M#兄弟}。包的。
E: Got you covered, {F#miss}{M#dude}. All yours.

C: 这名卫兵盔甲下的身体遭到了黑潮的侵蚀，在漆黑的死灰蔓延至心脏的位置前，他因负伤过重停止了呼吸。
E: The guard's body beneath his armor has sustained black tide corruption. Even before the darkness spread to his heart, he passed from the severity of his injuries.

C: ——糟了，看那边，黑潮怪物又来了！
E: Oh no! Look there! Black tide monsters incoming!

C: 「——咳，我生有伟岸的身躯，是为了在末日的灾厄来临、世界坍塌时，把我创造的人子们接引到我的双手和肩背上，一同带往再创世——」
E: "—Ah, I was born with a mighty body, so that when the apocalypse comes and the world collapses, I can carry the children I created with my arms and on my shoulders, so that we might march toward Era Nova together—"

C: 嗯，毕竟亚森和拉缇娜他们还不知道嘛！
E: Yeah, because Yason and Lathena still don't know yet!

C: 是、是送信，不是送瓜……
E: I—It's delivering letter, not tea...

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 全是不明白的事，抽空还是去问问情况吧。
E: Nothing makes sense here. I'll have to find out what's really going on.

C: 海…洋……？啊…莫非您是海瑟音大人一直在等候的那位——
E: The... Ocean? Wait... Are you the one Lady Hysilens has been waiting for?

C: 摘取他们满溢的喜好来酿造，将回忆化作果浆，绝妙！
E: I'll harvest their deepest desires for my brew, spinning memories into liquid joy. Behold my genius!

C: 不久后……
E: Moments later...

C: 不含浓度的葡萄汁。似乎是因为一些用于发酵的生命已远渡冥界了……
E: Unfermented grape juice. Seems the life meant to spark the fermentation has long since crossed into the nether realm...

C: 为了能让这份独特重现在欢宴之上——万事拜托了，救世主阁下。
E: For the sake of bringing this unique experience back to our revelry... we're counting on you, Great Deliverer.

C: 我猜它应该是合成机的原型机之一，底座上或许还留有空间站的奇物编码。
E: I'm guessing that's one of the prototype synthesizers. There may be a curio code on its base.

C: 你不是有手机吗？
E: Why not use your phone?

C: 呵呵…你们的好意，我心领了。
E: Hehe, that's nice of you.

C: 哎哟，怎么连你也这么说呀！这下不就只剩下虎克自己了嘛！
E: Huh!? Even YOU won't play with me? Hook can't hide AND seek y'know!

C: 而且它还是荣誉队员的造型呢，是帮了虎克和老爹大忙的优秀队员！虎克觉得这个纪念品真的很棒哦！
E: It's modeled after you, honorary member! You did a big favor for Hook and daddy, so I think this is a fitting gift!

C: 特别厉害吧？
E: Pretty awesome, right?

C: 纸条上是帕斯卡的字迹…它似乎想把这些石头送给{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}呢。
E: It's Pascal's handwriting — he says he wanted to send the pebbles to you as a gift.

C: 得让我好好斟酌一下……
E: Still can't decide which name to go for...

C: 爱喝就多喝点。
E: There's plenty more where that came from.

C: 其实我也在找你。
E: I've been looking for you, too.

C: 列车里的人看见我都很惊讶呢。
E: People on the Express are shocked at the sight of me.

C: 这样啊，太可惜了。
E: Is that so? What a shame.

C: 这得问列车长。
E: For that, you gotta ask the conductor.

C: 星槎海倒是有得卖，但现在去也来不及了。
E: They sell them in Starskiff Haven, but there's no time to go there now.

C: 除了貘馍卷、黄石乳酪洋芋条、浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶，我还想要蒜苗五花肉、脆瓜胡辣鸡丁、陈婆豆腐、紫芋扣肉、鲜奶热炒、白灼鳞虾……
E: Tuskpir wraps, Yellow Boulder Cheese Fries, puffergoat milk, and Immortal's Delight aside, I also miss Garlic-infused Pork, Crisped Melon and Diced Chicken, Granny Chen's Tofu, Purple Taro with Pork, Fresh Milk Stir Fry, and Braised Prawns...

C: 那就好，帕姆能，我也能呀～
E: Great! If Pom-Pom can, then so can I!

C: 今晚肯定能做个好梦。
E: Thanks! I feel like I've got some lined up.

C: 搞不懂，不想了不想了……
E: I don't get it... never mind...

C: 嘿嘿，前些日子也算是受到{NICKNAME}的照顾，这是我的心意～
E: Hehe. You've been a good host the last few days, {NICKNAME}. Just a token of my gratitude.

C: 虽然波少粉丝后援会解散了，但还是有少部分粉丝留了下来，成立了新的后援会。有了他们的支持，我肯定可以更快在空间站改头换面，让大家感受到我的决心的！
E: Though the Master Capote Fan Club had disbanded, a small number of fans stayed behind and formed a new club. With their support, I can definitely start all over again on the space station and let everyone feel my conviction!

C: 关于「勇气」这件事，我其实之前也很怀疑自己……
E: I don't know about being brave...

C: 我当然知道自己再怎么厉害也用不了那把剑啦，但还是想见识见识啊……
E: Of course, I know I'd never be able to wield such a sword, but I'd still love to see it...

C: 你注意到了什么呢？
E: Pray tell, what caught your eye?

C: 「天外之境」…原来《奇谭》里说的都是真的啊……
E: Satelleden... So everything in the Tale series is true...

C: 嗯…挺多的。让我比较在意的是那个叫作「星际和平公司」的商业组织……
E: Quite a lot. I'm most interested in that commercial organization — the Interastral Peace Corporation.

C: 查阅智库的时候，我还意识到一件事——你们智库的加密手段实在是有些薄弱……
E: I realized something else when going through the data bank — the encryption for your data bank is pretty weak...

C: 要是能跟着列车旅行……
E: If only I could travel on the Express...

C: 可那毕竟是星球表面最高的山峰……
E: But that's the tallest peak on the whole planet...

C: 继续探索下去吧。
E: Never stop exploring.

C: 可能也有道理，毕竟搏击手每天的摄入可比普通人要大多了，哈哈哈。
E: Maybe that's true. A boxer does need to take in a lot more energy than the average person. Hahaha.

C: 这等方寸洞天，竟还有如此风景…真是不错，甚得我心。
E: Such a minute place, and yet such splendid scenery... just splendid.

C: 你擅长下棋吗？
E: Are you good at starchess?

C: <unbreak>277008</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>277,008</unbreak>.

C: <unbreak>191</unbreak>乘以<unbreak>383</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>191</unbreak> multiplied by <unbreak>383</unbreak>.

C: 重要的是礼尚往来…
E: What's important is reciprocation in kind...

C: 虽然一起经历了这么多，但其实我对星穹列车的背景还知之甚少。有机会的话，我很想多来做几次客。
E: Although we've been through so much together, I actually know very little about the Astral Express. I'd like to start visiting more frequently if the opportunity arises.

C: 实话说，我从小到大从来没有喝过「咖啡」。
E: I'll be honest — I'd never had coffee before.

C: 想都别想。
E: That's not gonna happen.

C: 同样的事，既是凶也是吉，还真是挺奇妙的。
E: Bad luck and good luck, all mixed together. Funny when you think about it, right?

C: 不客气。
E: Not at all.

C: 我会戴上我的头套，不被任何人打扰。
E: With this mask on, I intend to keep the world at bay.

C: 和你想象中的一样吗？
E: Is it what you were expecting?

C: 米沙平时的工作累吗？
E: Is your work usually very tiring?

C: 哇，修了很久吧。
E: It must have taken you a long time.

C: 宝了个贝的…这联觉信标明知道我语言匮乏，还要不停更新词库，真没劲。
E: What the fork... This Synesthesia Beacon obviously knows about my language deficiency, but it still keeps updating the lexicon... Fudge this.

C: 话说回来，列车上除了这个合成机，还有没有更新奇的玩意儿？
E: Anyway, other than this Synthesizer, are there any other cool toys on the Express?

C: 对，就是那位姬子女士的特调咖啡！
E: Yes, this coffee was specially brewed by Miss Himeko!

C: 一口下去，苦味火辣辣的，喉咙还会发麻，比嚼子弹过瘾多了！
E: It's bitter and spicy, and it even makes my throat numb. It's more addicting than chewing bullets!

C: 你相信直觉吗？
E: Do you believe in intuition?

C: 难道是新开的糕点铺打烊了？
E: Maybe it was a new bakery that closed for the night?

C: 直到今天！列车上的甜香又唤醒了我对奶香糕点的记忆，所以……
E: Until today! The sweet smell on the Express has awakened my memories, so...

C: 是恩公呀！小女子这厢打扰了。初次登上列车，本应与各位打声招呼，不想才行两步，便被这窗外星辰吸引，看入了迷。还请见谅。
E: Benefactor! My apologies... I should have immediately greeted everyone as soon as I boarded on this initial visit of mine to the Express, but before I had even taken two steps I became engrossed by the stars outside the windows. Please forgive me.

C: 你怎么也看上了这座盆栽。
E: Why are you interested in this plant, too?

C: 他为什么会想和我做朋友啊？我们都没说过几句话…我哪里吸引了他的注意，我改还不行吗？
E: Why would he want to be friends with me? We haven't talked much at all... What is it about me that attracted his attention? I'll fix it!

C: 我是一名光荣的政务官，我的生活里没有朋友，只有需要服务的市民！再见！
E: I am an honorable civil servant. I have no time for friends — only citizens that need to be served! Goodbye now!

C: 这样赚钱也没好到哪里去啊…
E: It's not like there's anywhere else to go with all that money...

C: 唉…行吧。拿给我看看。
E: Alas... fine. Let me take a look.

C: 对呀，这儿还有别人吗？
E: Yeah, do you see anyone else?

C: 其次，我们主编的硬性标准就是：高端大气！最好让读者一看就觉得自己没作者懂得多，心里油然而生一股子敬佩之情。
E: Other than that, the editor has made it clear that our paper is produced with the educated class in mind. Ideally, our average readership should consider exposure to our publication both a privilege and a chance to learn.

C: 要是有任何与美食相关的问题，千万不要客气，直接来问我就好。
E: If you have any questions related to food, don't hesitate to come to me.

C: 好像没什么可问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 假如某一个宇宙的我想出了传递信息的方式，而另一个宇宙的我想出了解读信息的方式，那根据我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论……
E: Say if in one universe I came up with ways to send messages and my "doppelganger" in another universe knew how to interpret those messages, it means, according to my theory...

C: 就这样吧。
E: Let's call it a day.

C: 这还不简单？时空隧道的基点就在下层区的矿道里！
E: Easy. The central point of the time tunnel is within the mine tunnels in the Underworld!

C: 「七彩虹」？
E: Rainbow?

C: 噢，是我们这儿最畅销的一种小花！五颜六色，好看极了——而且价格非常便宜。
E: Oh, this is our best-selling flower! It's colorful and gorgeous, and is offered at a great price!

C: 容我再考虑下吧。
E: I'll think about it.

C: …喂！看什么看，没见过发牢骚的人啊？
E: ...Hey! What are you looking at? Have you never seen someone express a little emotion before?

C: 那确实挺好的，恭喜你。
E: That's great to hear. Congratulations.

C: 我跟你说，你别学那群流浪者一样，总以为自己比可可利亚大人他们聪明。
E: I'm telling you, don't you dare be like those vagrants and dream that you're smarter than Madam Cocolia and the government.

C: 造物之柱的工程也由你负责吗？
E: Are you responsible for the Pillars of Creation construction project, too?

C: 让我再考虑考虑吧。
E: I'll mull it over.

C: 干这行有赚头吗？
E: Is there a lot of money in this line of work?

C: 驻扎在地下的铁卫可不像前线的兄弟们每天出生入死…整天除了巡逻就是站岗，肯定早就技痒难耐了。
E: The guards stationed down in the Underworld aren't like those heroes staring down death every day on the frontlines... All they do is stand or patrol. They must be itching to show off their skills.

C: 嗯…但要说为什么会这样，我也没什么头绪…你说，会不会是因为最近温度变低了？
E: Yep... But I have no idea why... Do you think it's because the temperature got colder lately?

C: 「能清除有害磁场」？
E: What about "it can remove harmful magnetic fields"?

C: 都是一点心理安慰，苔藓本身也是无毒无公害我辛苦挖了后晒干的！
E: It was just for the placebo effect. The moss itself is non-toxic and harmless. It took me a long time to dig it up and dry it!

C: 求你放过我吧，可千万别和诊所的那个女魔头说啊…她、她太可怕了！我再也不敢了！
E: Please let me go. Don't tell her... S—She's terrifying! I won't do it again! I promise!

C: 我们之前一起玩过捉迷藏…
E: We played hide-and-seek together before...

C: 我真的不记得了，只知道是绝对不可以忘记的事…这样，你给我点时间！我从头捋一遍。
E: I don't know. What I do know is that it was something I should never forget... Look, give me some time! I'll try to retrace my memory...

C: …你一说话，我就又忘了。让我一个人静静……
E: ...I forgot as soon as you spoke. Now leave me alone...

C: 什么事？
E: What is it?

C: 不过我也不爱吃洞螈肉…这「新闻」倒是和我关系不大啦。还有什么其他新闻吗？
E: Olm meat isn't my favorite anyway... So this "news" has nothing to do with me. Got any other news for me?

C: 呵呵…愿你在「会社」得以享受闲暇时光。
E: Hehe... I hope you get to enjoy some leisure time in the Society.

C: 「杂菜汤」？
E: Wild Herb Soup?

C: 你能吃辣吗？这里边用了铁锤辣椒碎提味，不习惯辣口的话可不要轻易尝试啊。
E: Can you eat spicy food? I use hammer pepper powder to enhance the flavor. Don't try this if you can't take spicy.

C: 没错…我当时正处在崩溃的边缘。幸好姬子小姐及时出现，带来了事件的全貌。
E: That's right... At that moment, I was on the verge of breaking down. Fortunately, Miss Himeko appeared in time and explained the whole picture.

C: 你不待在布洛妮娅身边吗？
E: You're not with Bronya?

C: 这个世界需要时间恢复，娜塔和布洛妮娅也需要我帮忙。我必须陪在他们所有人身边，尽自己的一份力。
E: The world needs time to recover. Nat and Bronya need my help. I have to stay with them and do my part.

C: 皆大欢喜，皆大欢喜。
E: Indeed, all's well that ends well.

C: 算是吧——虽然我是技术部的人，但我的专攻方向是「裂界」和「星核」。想在这些课题上弄出些名堂，可不能每天只泡在实验室里。
E: Pretty much — I may be from the Technology Division, but my areas of expertise are Fragmentum and Stellarons. And you can't remain confined to the lab if you want to make a name for yourself in these fields.

C: 你以前好像不是很担心杰帕德？
E: You didn't seem to worry much about Gepard before?

C: 想联系的话总有办法啦，不用担心！
E: There's always a way for me to contact him if I need to, so don't worry!

C: …有你说的那么夸张吗？要我说，这些筑城者天天就会说些假大空的话——有时间搞这些表面功夫，不如想想怎么改善大伙的生活条件……
E: ...Is it really as great as you say? If you ask me, these Architects just say the same empty rhetoric day in day out — and if you've got time for all this bluster, you've got time to help improve everyone's living conditions around here...

C: 我还负责和前线的直接沟通。假如前线被攻破了…我和弟兄们就要组成最后一道防线，防止敌人渗透城市。
E: I am also responsible for direct communication with the front line. If the front line was breached... my boys and I would have to form the last line of defense to prevent the enemy from infiltrating the city.

C: 哎，行了…我们还是聊回茉莉小姐吧。
E: That's it... We should just talk about Molly.

C: 慢慢地，有好多人听说了史瓦罗先生可以保护大家的消息，就都跑来这里扎营……
E: Slowly but surely, many heard about how Mr. Svarog could protect people, and came here to make camp...

C: 克拉拉暂时还不清楚原理…只知道它可以被用来调控贝洛伯格所有的小机器人，非常厉害。
E: I don't quite know why yet... I just know that it can be used to control all of the small robots in Belobog. It's really powerful!

C: 纳入基地网络真的可以控制损害吗？
E: Will integration with the base network really stem the damage?

C: 无论如何，你选择了将损害控制在最小限度的方案——这一选择无疑对维持下层区安定有利。
E: Regardless, you have chosen the solution to minimize damage — This choice will inevitably ensure the stability of the Underworld.

C: 哼，谁叫我是鼹鼠党的老大呢！
E: Hmph, I'm not the boss of The Moles without reason!

C: 要加入鼹鼠党需要做什么准备？
E: What does one need to join The Moles?

C: 你和娜塔莎关系怎么样？
E: How's your relationship with Natasha?

C: 耶。
E: Yay.

C: …你可不要和布洛妮娅大人说这些事呀，她会生气的——虽然我们现在已经得到了她的许可就是了。
E: ...Please don't tell Lady Bronya though. She might get upset — even though our work now have her blessings.

C: 前面这些桌椅呢？
E: What about these tables and chairs in the front?

C: 哼，哼哼！哼——
E: Oink, oink oink! Oink...

C: 你用双手轻轻抱起小熊，果然——它的身下压着什么东西。
E: You lift the bear cub with both hands and as expected... there is something underneath.
...Groo?

C: 把榛子抛给小熊。
E: Toss the hazelnut to the cub.

C: 我认识个朋友……
E: So I have a friend...

C: 那敢情好啊！我打小就是《奇谭》粉丝了。
E: That's good news! I've been a fan of the Tale since I was a kid.

C: 听起来不错……
E: Sounds lovely...

C: 别说得和你要打拳似的！
E: Don't talk so tough like it's a fight!

C: 这玩意也能吃？
E: Is that even edible?

C: 请广大镇民提高警惕，如遇案情迅速报告「地火」！
E: Please be vigilant out there, and notify the Wildfire instantly if you run into an encounter with them!

C: 我也想上去玩……
E: I wanna go up there too...

C: 哼哼，我的「圆滚滚」是无敌的！
E: Ha, my "Chubbie" is invincible!

C: 爸爸没有赢呢…
E: Daddy lost...

C: 爷爷，我要挑战你！
