E: I'll challenge you, Gramps!

C: ~我们迈过往日时光~
E: Our journey through time, wild and free~

C: 我早就和你说了，要早点买票……
E: I told you before to buy the tickets early...

C: …咳，好汉不提当年勇，过去的事情就不谈了。眼下最要紧的还是我们贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆啊。
E: ...Ahem, A good man does not brag about the past, let us move on from this. The more important thing right now is our Belobog History and Culture Museum.

C: 我是贝洛伯格艺术学院的毕业生，那时的我是初生牛犊不怕虎，天真地以为自己和艺术都有改变世界的力量……
E: I was a graduate of the Belobog College of Art. Back then, I had no fear and naively believed that me and my art has the power to change the world...

C: 「滴」的一声过后，帕金斯宕机了。
E: After a beeping sound, Perkins' system is down.

C: 喔，这不是荣誉队员{NICKNAME}嘛！你也是来找阿丽…来执行虎克老大的机密任务的吗？
E: Hey, honorary member {NICKNAME}! You're also here to look for Ali— to execute Boss Hook's secret mission?

C: 你在参观展览吗？
E: Are you touring the museum?

C: 根据前任司狱大人所说，此处的幽囚狱是由仙舟人和持明族人合作修建的。想来也合理，若不是持明云吟法术，也不可能在海底建造这么庞大的建筑。
E: According to the previous Jailer, this unit of the Shackling Prison was jointly built by Xianzhou natives and the Vidyadhara. And it checks out because if not for the Vidyadhara's cloudhymn magic, it wouldn't be possible to build this colossal structure underwater.

C: 老板您可错怪我了呀，您若不信我，我们再抽一签。您看，还是一样——「如鸟飞投罗网里，相逢能有几多时」。
E: Oh, you hurt me with your words. If you don't believe me, let's try another one. Look, it's still the same: "Like birds into nets, when will reunion be, one frets".

C: 哟，这位老板您又来啦？稍等一下，我在看闲书呢，讲的是「预言的自我实现」。
E: Oh, you're back again? Hold on, I'm reading a book called "A Prophecy's Self-fulfillment."

C: 嗐，至于那些什么影响啊，风波啊，那就是太卜大人他们的职责了。我又没公职在身，何必瞎操心，还是研究下晚饭吃什么更重要吧。
E: As for the impact, I'm not an official, and I don't think it's my job to worry about it. That's what the master diviner is for, right? For me, I'm more interested in figuring out what I'm going to eat for dinner.

C: 哈哈哈哈，不好意思，很少有人问我这些取材经历，不小心讲到兴头上了。
E: Haha, sorry, very few people ask me about my ingredient-seeking escapades, and I got carried away.

C: 哼哼，咱确实很厉害呀。不仅武功高强，做的菜也很好吃，客官一定要试试看哦！
E: Heheh, I am quite amazing! Not just at martial arts, but cooking too. You must try my food out!

C: 玩具、门铃、透金镜～星槎、玉兆、按摩椅～二手、修理、高价收～
E: Toys, doorbells, mirrors!~ Starskiffs, jade abaci, massage chairs!~ Second hand, or broken, I buy them all!

C: 我早知道了。我一听说建木的风波平息下来了，马上就去凑了凑热闹，毕竟眼见为实嘛。从长乐天那里不就能望见建木吗，我看到了。
E: Yeah, that's hardly news to me. As soon as I heard about it, I went there and checked it out myself, and I saw from Exalting Sanctum with my own eyes that it had stopped growing.

C: 你还会工造技术？
E: You know artifex technology?

C: 好呀，有时间的话一定要体验一次托蝶幻境。
E: Okay. Well, if you ever get the chance, you simply have to experience Butterfly Immersia at least once.

C: 客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
E: Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!

C: 我问它，要我的毛干什么用？它说步离人毛发特别结实，用它们搓出来的绳子，在这幽囚狱里可是千金难求的好东西。
E: I asked what it wanted to do with my fur. It said that borisin fur is known to be durable, and that rope made from borisin fur is a rarity in The Shackling Prison.

C: 他看起来总是那么漫不经心，仿佛丝毫不在乎自己的本职工作…可就是这样的他，见了我后竟又能不遗余力地要把我捉回地衡司……
E: He always looked so casual, as if he didn't care about his job in the slightest... Be that as it may, when he saw me he'd suddenly spare no effort in getting me back to the Realm-Keeping Commission...

C: 那你也不小了啊。
E: Then you're not exactly young.

C: 没有魔阴身你总有烦恼吧！我们的产品一向注重全银河化思维，任何人都可以活用我们的产品。
E: You may not be mara-struck but everyday worries definitely plague you! Our products are designed for use throughout the whole cosmos, and anyone can use them.

C: 所以——地衡司根本没有什么带刀侍卫，而我也其实只是个小勤务。
E: So... the Realm-Keeping Commission doesn't actually have any armed guards, and I'm just a lowly orderly after all.

C: 累是累了点，不过这累得值啊…忙活了这么久，天天喊着要严防死守的，这下总算能轻松点了。
E: It is tiring, but it's worth it... After working so hard to protect the peace, we can finally loosen up a bit.

C: 哟，这不是景元将军的贵客嘛！
E: Oh hey — it's General Jing Yuan's esteemed guest!

C: 我念完誓词，将军就道：「独木不可成林，孤剑不可成军。将军也不过是云骑一员而已，仅有片云如何能翼护仙舟？咱们各有所司，浴铁不要妄自菲薄。」
E: After I recited the oath, Jing Yuan said "Just as one tree does not a forest make, one sword does not an army form. I'm only one of many in the Cloud Knights. How can one piece of cloud shield the entire Xianzhou? We all have our own role to play. Don't underestimate yourself, Yutie."

C: 它能在根系与食物之间迅速寻找到最短路径，以最为节约资源的路径加以连接。一些兵法博物学家就意识到，可以利用这种特性制造一种演算系统。
E: Lucidums can rapidly find the shortest route between their root system and a nutrient source, optimizing pathing to conserve energy. Some military scientists realized that this could be used to develop a new system of calculations.

C: 呼呼哈哈哈哈哈…你问吧！老夫不怕你问，只怕答了你也听不懂啊。
E: Bwahahaha... Ask away! I'm not afraid of your questions, but I'm afraid you might not understand my answers.

C: 这些东西并不会增加物件的功能，但我们还是不遗余力地将它细化。以前还有个化外民说，我们这叫什么…「极繁主义」……
E: None of this improves the essential function of these tools, but we still take great pains to craft them well. Another Outworlder once told me that you call this style "Maximalist"?

C: 案牍库是做什么的？
E: What does the document office do?

C: 你是不是自己也不信？
E: Are you doubting it yourself?

C: 地衡司里通常是做什么的？
E: So what do you actually get up to at the Realm-Keeping Commission?

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}你也太乐观了，我未必还活得到痊愈那天，哎…咳咳……
E: Dear {F#girl}{M#boy}, you're far too optimistic. I may not even survive to see a complete recovery... *cough*...

C: 衰老到没办法处理公务、虚弱到挺不过连续的星际航行，最后无助地躺在病床上，绝望地细数自己有多少应做却未做的，又有多少应见却未见的……
E: Too old to handle official duties, too weak to handle continual interstellar travel, I ultimately lie here helpless on a hospital bed, desperately counting all the things I should've done but didn't, all those people I should've seen but hadn't...

C: 我曾是个旅行作家…咳咳…来到仙舟之前，我走遍了祖国广袤的疆域，体验不同恒星系的风土人情。
E: I used to be a travelog writer... *cough*... Before coming to Xianzhou, I'd traveled all over the cosmos, experiencing all the customs and peoples of different star systems.

C: 行啊，在外面做生意，咱们还得多聊。
E: Cool. Outworld traders like us need to stick together.

C: 有台机器能把我干的活全都包圆了，还干的又快又好，以仙舟的技术早就能办到了。那为什么你还能在这儿见到我呢？好好想想，孩子。
E: Xianzhou mastered the technology a long time ago to kit out any ingenium to do everything as quickly and as well as I do it. So then, what am I still around for, huh? Think about it, kid.

C: 有台机器能把我干的活全都包圆了，还干的又快又好，以仙舟的技术早就能办到了。那为什么你还能在这儿见到我呢？好好想想，孩子。
E: Xianzhou mastered the technology a long time ago to kit out any ingenium to do everything as quickly and as well as I do it. So then, what am I still around for, huh? Think about it, kid.

C: 再说了，自动机巧它也不会给地衡司纳税啊。
E: Or to put it another way, how much tax would an automatic ingenium pay to the Realm-Keeping Commission? Nothing.

C: 一转眼，能容下我的地方，也就只剩下十王司了——他们就喜欢和社会脱钩的人…不好意思，我好像聊跑题了，哈哈。
E: In a blink, the only place that would take me was the Ten-Lords Commission. They love people disconnected from society... Sorry, I seem to have gone off-topic, haha.

C: 我刚来这边例行检修穷观阵的时候，某位卜官一会儿问我「认不认识明阅」，一会儿又问我「你和绘星大人是什么关系」。
E: When I first came here for a routine inspection on the Matrix of Prescience, a managing diviner here asked me, "Do you know Mingyue?" Then asked me again, "What is your relationship with Huixing?"!

C: 依我看来，如今这里往来的所有人，这些顶着面貌寻常、衣着普通的过客，都有可能是药王秘传未被清剿的残党。
E: In my opinion, all of these passers-by here with their ordinary faces and their ordinary clothes, any one of them could be a surviving remnant of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 强求那些富贵做什么，出来贩药，迟早要还的…我只想做个普通的…哎……
E: Pursuing greed in medicine will eventually come back to bite you, sooner or later... I just want to live out an ordinary life... *Sigh*...

C: 十王司在此主理公务，无关人等一律回避…哦，阁下又来了。是有什么线索能提供给在下吗？
E: The Ten-Lords Commission are handling official matters here. If this does not concern you, please leave... Oh, you're back. Do you have any leads for me?

C: 还是那句话——德威不知道的，差不多就是阁下不该知道的。
E: As I always say: Anything Dewei doesn't know is what you should not know.

C: 算了，我没什么想问的了。
E: Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

C: 你这么明目张胆没人管么。
E: Does no one care that you're so obviously trying to escape?

C: 其他犯人看到你的样子不奇怪么？
E: Do the other prisoners not think it's weird that you look like this?

C: 不利于团结的事情还是不要说了。
E: Let's not talk about things that will undermine the spirit of unity.

C: 你们打算把这里买下来？
E: So, IPC is planning to buy this block?

C: 怎么说呢，来这里的都是本地人为多，我看他们几家店的老板伙计好像都互相认识。除了游客没星槎海多，乍一眼看好像没什么特别的。
E: Well, how should I put it... Aurum Alley is frequented by locals. I swear some store owners and staff even know each other. Sure, it doesn't have as many tourists as Starskiff Haven, and looks pretty ordinary at first glance.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 哈哈哈哈，不好意思，很少有人问我这些取材经历，不小心讲到兴头上了。
E: Haha, sorry, very few people ask me about my ingredient-seeking escapades, and I got carried away.

C: 咱也是持明嘛，心想着持明同胞得到了这样的荣誉，咱高低得去捧捧场…结果去了一看，您敢信吗？喂鸟都不够吃的一点东西，他们竟敢要价几十万信用点！
E: Being a Vidyadhara, I thought I had to go and support the business of my kin, especially when they received such honors... But that place charged hundreds of thousands of credits for portions that wouldn't even be filling for little birds! Would you believe it?

C: 说话不要这么偏激嘛。
E: You're being quite radical.

C: 我只是觉得我们持明在罗浮生活有诸多不便，地衡司应当多顾及下我们的需求才是。
E: It's just that the Vidyadhara's daily lives on the Luofu have many inconveniences. The Realm-Keeping Commission should consider our needs more.

C: 但单说这「住」吧，罗浮就真不如我们方壶了，我们那儿一蜕生就会分配一处居所。
E: But when it comes to housing, this place is simply awful. Whenever someone in the Fanghu has completed their hatching rebirth, they'll immediately get a residence for free.

C: 你能问到很多「标准回答」，但是它们不一定是你要的答案。
E: I can provide you with many "official answers," but they may not be the answers you seek.

C: …关于「长生」——咳咳，这里人多嘴杂，我们还是小点声说。
E: ...Well, let's find a more private place to talk about "immortality."

C: 唉…在之前的暴乱之中，那群步离人为了给自己打掩护，放出了不少囚犯。如今虽然暴乱平定，但仍有些漏网之鱼在狱中流窜。
E: *sigh* When the riot happened, the borisin set a good number of prisoners free and used them as decoys. Even though the riot has since been suppressed, there are still fugitives on the loose on prison grounds.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 战争追求的不是「棋局般势均力敌」，而是「尽可能对敌人不公平」。
E: What we want to achieve in war is not fairness but to create as many disadvantages as possible for our enemies.

C: 难道我又用错典故了…算了，我记不得了，反正就是夸你有眼光。
E: Did I use the wrong word again? Forget it. I won't remember it anyway. Just know it's a compliment for your good taste.

C: 我把玩法告诉了工造司的一个笔友，他帮我打造了一副琼玉棋牌和棋枰，还开了家牌馆…结果没想到，这种棋牌玩法火遍了罗浮仙舟。
E: I told my pen pal from the Artisanship Commission about the game. He then crafted a Celestial Jade tile set and a board for me, and even set up a games parlor... Surprisingly, the game took the Luofu by storm.

C: 汝若是也能化身机巧鸟回归，吾自然不会担心。
E: I wouldn't be worried if I could turn into a cycrane and come back either.

C: {NICKNAME}，不忙的话，可以陪吾聊聊天。
E: {NICKNAME}, if you aren't busy, why don't you join me for a chat?

C: 但一旦被镇入囚笼，岁阳对欲望的渴求无法得到满足…它们就像口渴的人，眼前有水，却永远也喝不着。
E: But when you place them in a prison, the heliobi have no way of satisfying their desires... They are like thirsty humans that can see water, but never taste it.

C: 等等，这和说好的不一样…
E: Wait, this isn't what we agreed...

C: 本来调来绥园常驻应该是件令人开心的事，结果没想到绥园已经荒废这么久了，什么有意思的事情都没有，还不如含明待在丹鼎司里呢……
E: I thought that coming to be stationed in Fyxestroll Garden was going to be a happy thing. I didn't realize that this place had been abandoned for so long that nothing interesting happened here. Even the Alchemy Commission where Hanming is stationed is more interesting...

C: 至于武弁是什么职位…你简单理解成十王麾下的云骑好了。
E: As for what a warden is... Just think of it as a Cloud Knight under the Ten Lords.

C: 喏，如果您不做高定，小店现在很难抽出时间接客，请您自便。
E: Well, if you aren't looking for haute couture, we're pressed for time to entertain you. Please see yourself out.

C: 像您这样的贵宾光临，简直是我们「广云袖」的荣幸啊！您下次再来，提前跟我说一声嘛，我们可以闭店清场，专门接待您！
E: It is Cloudbreadth Sleeves' honor to have entertained an esteemed guest such as yourself! Do let us know in advance the next time you come. We will close up the store just to specially welcome you!

C: 客人愿意帮我，麻烦事在没发生之前就能结束，小店自当感激不尽。
E: If you could help conclude a trouble before it started, I would very much appreciate that.

C: 客人愿意帮我，麻烦事在没发生之前就能结束，小店自当感激不尽。
E: If you could help conclude a trouble before it started, I would very much appreciate that.

C: 唉…这种查缺补漏的工作真的是大工程…要一不小心说走了嘴，底下观众可真不给钱！
E: Alas... it's a very tedious process to spot and rectify all these errors in the stories... If I say anything wrong, my audience seriously won't tip me!

C: 来小店里最挑剔的客人也老爱说这句话。
E: That's what our fussiest customers are always saying.

C: 客人要是想聊，还得到里面坐坐…嗯，客人难道还有别的事儿要问梦茗吗？
E: If a customer wants to chat, they have to sit inside... well, is there anything else that you'd like to ask me?

C: 一回生二回熟，客人再度光临不夜侯！您今天想要喝点什么？
E: It's you again, welcome back to the Sleepless Earl! What can I get for you?

C: 我有点担心你。
E: I worry for you.

C: 你要是知道了我的特殊疾病之后，你很快就理解了。
E: If you know what rare illness I have, you would understand very quickly.

C: 而我呢，生了怪病，这样五六百年的过程被缩短到了一个月里。一个月之后，我就会忘记我们俩在这里相遇的事情，当然我们的恋爱经历也会消失。
E: As for me and my condition, well, my body compacts this five or six-century process into just one month. After one month, I'd have forgotten about our meeting here and now — and this love story, too.

C: 好呀，总觉得我们还会再见面的。
E: Sure, I feel like we'll meet again anyway.

C: 这家伙拿百姓当实验品，肆意改造，什么令人发指的事情都做尽了。可我只有一个人，压根拿他没法子啊。话说回来，就算带了武器，我也是不敢上的。
E: That scumbag used common folk for experiments, modifying them with no regard to their dignity, and did every horrible act you can think of under the sky. But there was only one of me and there was nothing I could do about him. Even if I was armed, I wouldn't have dared to cross him.

C: …哟，合着您是太卜司的卜者？我可真没看出来。
E: ...Hang on, you're a Divination Commission diviner? Wow, I had no idea.

C: 肌肉不会说谎，你会下意识地走到我面前，正是肌肉在渴求运动的结果。
E: Muscles don't lie, my friend. Your body moved quicker than your mind and sent you to me because your muscles crave a workout.

C: 仙舟的「息壤」也必将造福于银河…前提是，仙舟人愿意的话。
E: Xianzhou's Fallow Earth can benefit the entire cosmos... that is, so long as the Xianzhou natives are willing to share it.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你也是神仙吗？为什么你看起来和其他神仙不一样？
E: {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, are you a celestial too? Why do you look different from the rest of them?

C: 呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲其他神仙姐姐的故事吧！
E: Phew... storytelling is tiring. If you want to listen, I'll tell you more stories about her next time!

C: 怎么？你也对仙舟史研究感兴趣，忘了自我介绍了，我是博识学会的陶德，要是对仙舟史感兴趣，咱们可以再探讨探讨。
E: Huh? You're also a keen student of Xianzhou history? Apologies, I haven't even introduced myself yet: I'm Todd from the Intelligentsia Guild. We can discuss things a little more if you're interested in Xianzhou history.

C: 其实仙舟本地人都还好吧…啊，没有冒犯你的意思。只是大家都活得比较久，相对而言比较稳重，不会把车开得太快。
E: Actually, Xianzhou natives are relatively decent at driving... ahem, no offense intended. People here can live a very long life and are relatively calm, so they don't drive too fast.

C: 但也有那种不遵守交通的长生种，觉得自己活得足够久了，无论做什么都不会出事，就开着星槎狂飙突进…结果就…哎，多可惜啊。
E: But there are also some long-life species that don't obey the speed limit. They feel like they've lived for so long that nothing could possibly happen to them, so they speed like crazy in their starskiffs... resulting in rather... uh, unfortunate situations.

C: 仙舟人喜欢把这些陈芝麻烂谷子的旧事归因到一件小事，以此证明「以小见大」，我个人实在是不好评价。
E: The Xianzhou natives love attributing past events to trivial matters to show that "everything is in the details," but I reserve my judgment for that.

C: 我看看，一份新的申请报告，由天舶司测速员发起的一档宣传交通法规的视频节目。有点意思……
E: Look, a new request report — it's a program about traffic regulations by the Sky-Faring Commission's speed testers. Interesting...

C: 亲爱的，爱你…
E: Darling, I love you...

C: 领导说我是匹诺康尼的销冠，所谓「能力越大，责任越大」，我应该去做这种具有开拓精神的工作。领导用一块「大饼」将我塞上了前往仙舟的飞船。
E: According to my boss, I'm the top salesperson in Penacony, and thus the one "most suitable" for trailblazing a path to a new market. "To whom much is given, much is required," or something like that... A ton of empty promises later, the next thing I know, I'd been thrown onto an airship bound for Xianzhou.

C: 也难为她了…
E: That must've been a hassle for her...

C: 可进入客栈暂避风浪！
E: Take shelter from the elements in the inn!

C: 市面上不太平…
E: These market conditions aren't fair...

C: 如果他永远地离开了，我愿意朝着熊熊燃烧的火焰向他致以敬意——我无法认可他的理想，但是我赞扬他奔赴理想的姿态，永不屈服，永不妥协，永远纯粹！
E: If he's really gone forever, I will face the roiling flames and pay my sincere respects to him. I can't condone his ideals, but I admire the way he pursued them — undaunted, unwavering, and untainted!

C: 那你会卷吗？
E: Well, can you do it?

C: 那也太那个了吧…
E: Oh em gee, it's so like, y'know...

C: 可惜，比赛期间我一般都会在这里随时待命…如果引擎出了问题找不到人就危险了，我的假期基本在竞锋舰没有比赛的时候。
E: Unfortunately, during competition season, I'm usually on standby here... If something goes wrong with the engine and there's no one around, it could be dangerous. My vacations are mostly when there aren't tournaments happening on the Skysplitter.

C: 这事儿不能让天舶司知道。
E: You can't let the Sky-Faring Commission know about this.

C: 你不是买了箱无糖汽水？
E: Didn't you buy a whole case of sugar-free soda?

C: 在那一天起，我决心还是附身在小孩身上，给这些大人们来点教训。
E: From that day on, I decided to only possess kids so I could teach these adults a lesson.

C: 你这岁阳还怪好嘞。
E: You're pretty good for a heliobus.

C: 我也不知道。
E: I don't know either.

C: 不管怎样，我都能看见你一成不变的未来。你会登上一条巨大的铁龙，飞向虚空。
E: No matter what, I can see your repetitive future. You'll board a giant iron dragon and fly across the void.

C: 我告诉你，来不及了！机会从来只会留给有准备的人！不过，你要是肯放我出去……
E: I'm telling you, time's running out! Chances only come to those who are prepared for it! However, if you're willing to let me out of here, then...

C: 老前辈？难道你很老么？
E: Old veteran? Are you really that old?

C: 我看你…像是神策府的贵客。对不起，是我说话太大声了。
E: I think you... look like an esteemed guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight. My apologies, I was too loud.

C: 嘿嘿，看着新人们怀疑自身实力时露出的错愕沮丧神情…可真是太有意思了！
E: Heh-heh, the look of creeping depression of a newcomer doubting their own ability... It's simply addicting!

C: 司鼎可并不需要一流医士。
E: The Cauldron Master does not need any master healer.

C: 根据《帝弓逸话》的记载，四千多年前，丰饶民纠集联军攻打罗浮时，正是为了这棵树啊！
E: Based on records from "the Reignbow Anecdotes," more than four thousand years ago, when the Denizens of Abundance rallied to attack the Luofu — it was for precisely this tree!

C: 师父，古籍里有载「阴阳」，何不以「阴」为阖，「阳」为开……
E: Master, ancient texts use Yin and Yang. Why not use Yin as shut, and Yang as open...

C: 怎么，梦想破灭了？
E: Is your dream dashed?

C: 不像现在，你不在了…
E: Now, you're no longer here...

C: 教练只骂我一人。
E: The coach only scolds me.

C: 包子大，饺子小。几个包子就吃饱。
E: Dumplings and steamed buns! The buns are huge — just a few and you'll be full!

C: 奶奶快看我手里这些宝贝——哀地里亚的银戒，厄涅俄努斯的陶瓷，还有上好的银簪子…我从奥赫玛最好的裁缝铺里挑的，你戴上一定好看。
E: Grandma, look at these treasures in my hands. Silver rings from Aidonia, ceramics from Aenionus, and these fine silver hairpins... I picked them from the best tailor's shop in Okhema, they'll look beautiful on you.

C: 孩子们，先吃点小饼干休息一下吧。圣女大人的住所前已经排起长队了。
E: Kids, let's take a break and have some cookies. There's already a long line forming outside the Holy Maiden's residence.

C: 哇！是小小灰！
E: Wow! It's Little Gray!

C: 明天见真是最伟大的预言吗？
E: Is "see you tomorrow" really the greatest prophecy?

C: 喂——爸，妈！
E: Hey— Mom, Dad!

C: 正巧哈托努斯在铸造它时，曾打造过一批仿件，这把就给你留作纪念吧，伙伴。
E: As luck would have it, Chartonus made a batch of replicas while forging it. I'll let you keep this one as a memento, partner.

C: 哟！别激动，说起来，那的确是让人热血沸腾的往事啊！
E: Yo! Take it easy there! But yeah, those were some seriously blood-pumping memories!

C: 好，我和缇安阿姐继续去琢磨琢磨，下次给你看个大的！
E: Alright, Trianne and I will keep brainstorming, and next time we'll show you something really epic!

C: 要说皮肤的质感，比想象中更粗糙，还有许多旧日的伤疤。荒笛大人，一定经历过无数场艰难的征战吧……
E: The texture of the skin is rougher than I imagined, with many old scars. Lord Terravox must have been through countless difficult battles...

C: 看在这些年里，没少偷吃尼卡多利贡品的份上，姑且就原谅他吧。
E: Given all those offerings to Nikador I've pilfered over the years, guess I can let this one slide.

C: 抢劫效率哪有诈骗高？
E: Is robbing ever as efficient as defrauding?

C: 我若胜了，一定娶你。
E: And I'll marry you when I win.

C: 破不了招啊！
E: We don't know how to defeat the other!

C: 就到此为止吧，这里的囚犯都知道你是幽囚狱的好邻居了。
E: That's enough... All the prisoners here now know what a good neighbor of the Shackling Prison you are.

C: 荒霸吐的头部。
E: Arahabaki's head.

C: 不要，我要走了！
E: No, I'm leaving!

C: 竞锋舰全员必须进入深海状态，竞锋舰也将达到光速的百分之十五。
E: All crew members of the Skysplitter must enter cryostasis. The Skysplitter will also reach fifteen percent of light speed.

C: 欣赏超赞的鸟类艺术照。
E: Admire stunning artistic images of birds.

C: 我记住了一半。
E: I only remember half of it.

C: 那就好，那就好…
E: That's good, that's good...

C: 贝洛伯格是哪里啊？
E: Where is Belobog?

C: 卢卡必能打赢复活赛！
E: Luka will definitely win the repechage.

C: 太好了，还能再看他比赛！
E: Awesome, I can still watch him compete!

C: 呃…恐怕不太方便…
E: Er... It's not very convenient...

C: 这是大型术算机「织机」，安全系数极高，如果有人被卷进去就会立刻紧急制动——但绝不要轻易尝试，那会让你损失一大笔赔偿费。
E: This massive calculation device called a "loom" is extremely safe to use. If anyone gets stuck in it, the device will immediately stop operating. However, you should never try it lightly, as you will have to fork out a hefty sum as compensation.

C: 工造司能源之本「造化洪炉」，驱动着整个司部的正常运转。
E: The Creation Furnace provides energy to the Artisanship Commission and ensures its normal operation.

C: 「精密仪器，请勿触摸。」
E: "This is a precision instrument. Please do not touch."

C: 在工造司，你甚至能看到正在疯狂内卷的蓝图。
E: At the Artisanship Commission, you can even gaze in wonder at the impossibly coiled blueprints.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 你跟随着短生种的脚步，来到你们初次见面的地方，她根本不顾及你的疑惑开始自说自话，你也决定将疑惑抛之脑后——你似乎很懂得看气氛。
E: You follow the short-life species to the place where you met each other for the first time. She starts talking without addressing your confusion. Seeing that, you set aside your doubts, as you can read the room.

C: 拿起来仔细端详。
E: Pick it up and examine it.

C: 时间会将崭新的物件变得陈旧，同时也会赋予它独一无二的故事，有些人就喜欢这些故事。
E: Time will transform the new into old, but it will also gift them a unique story. Some people simply enjoy these stories.

C: 好巧不巧，你发现了作业前面写着名字和班级，这说明事态还有救——
E: Fortunately, you notice that the student's name and homeroom is written at the start of their homework. There is still hope...

C: 没事的，这不是你的错（当然也不是我的错）。都怪他们两口子起名不懂得避嫌，才闹出了这般乌龙。
E: It's fine. It's not your fault (obviously, it's not mine, either). If anything, it's this couple's fault for picking such suspicious nicknames and causing such a misunderstanding.

C: 也许你走之后，会发生一场围绕邮包展开的犯罪大片…但这已经与你无关了。
E: Perhaps this package will end up causing a huge criminal drama after you leave... But that's not your problem anymore.

C: 但无论如何，为了鼓舞您的求知精神，您失去了生命中宝贵的几分钟，换来了一堂生动的亲密关系通识课。
E: Either way, in your spirited quest for knowledge, you've lost some precious few minutes of your life to learn a vivid lesson in intimate relationships.

C: 你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
E: You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.

C: 无聊，都是些迷信。
E: Boring. This is all superstition.

C: 仙舟人？莫不是诓你的。
E: Xianzhou people? They're probably trying to fool you.

C: 我帮人家上学，这不算？
E: I'm helping people with school, aren't I?

C: 我偶尔也会教书育人！
E: Sometimes I taught lessons!

C: 你暗自揣测着书卷主人的下落，怀疑对方是否遭遇了某种不测。但知识这东西，生不带来死不带去，想到这里，你不禁松了口气。
E: You secretly speculate on the whereabouts of the scroll's owner, wondering if they have met with an unfortunate end. But knowledge isn't a thing that one is born or dies with. You can't help but feel relieved at the thought of it.

C: 你担心电梯门后钻出一对双胞胎来。
E: You're worried a pair of terrifying twins are going to emerge from behind the elevator doors.

C: 「为什么，为什么事情会变成这样……」
E: Why? Why has it come to this?

C: 仙舟有个成语「人走茶凉」，这里就是它的绝佳应用场景。
E: The Xianzhou has a saying: The tea cools when the person leaves. It's a perfect proverb for this scene.

C: 「…我们不会抛下他…我们会在一起…一直一直……」
E: "...We won't abandon him... We will... always, always... together..."

C: 「来跳舞吗？」黄金的行李架提议，「和我们一起、和头顶的鲸群一起……」
E: "Dance?" A golden suitcase proposes, "With us, with the pod of whales above..."

C: 紧锁的柜门，它背后的秘密永远无法为人所知了。
E: A tightly-shut cabinet door, the secrets behind it forever locked away from anyone's knowledge.

C: 我本以为这是场朝圣之旅，却发现它不过是一幕荒诞喜剧，最大的丑角甚至还是我自己！
E: I thought I was on a pilgrimage, but this has turned out to be an absurd comedy, in which I'm the biggest clown!

C: 嘿嘿，我要把这张证书用金框裱起来，挂在房间最显眼的地方，让每个来玩的人都看得到！还要邀请家里所有长辈都来玩！
E: Heheh, I'm gonna frame this one up and show it off in the most conspicuous space in my room! Everyone who comes over will be able to see it! Oh, I have to invite my elders too!

C: 有点痒痒的，嘿嘿…是不是感觉还不错。
E: It tickles, heheh... I bet it feels good, doesn't it?

C: 越是能言善道，越不懂得享受沉默。您到现在都还没主动开口，想必也不是那种巧舌如簧，只晓得挑拨是非的人吧？
E: The more silver-tongued one is, the less they understand the joys of silence. Till now, you do not speak unless spoken to. I reckon you aren't the gab-gifted, fomenting sort?

C: 匹诺康尼大剧院？
E: The Penacony Grand Theater?

C: 即使是生产工序高度标准化的杯面，也会随着地域和时代变化而产生差异，匹诺康尼的口味偏甜，冰冷星球的味道就会偏辣。因此，再普通的商品也有收藏的价值。
E: Even if cup noodles are mass-produced with stringent factory standards, they'd still differ depending on their geography and times. Penacony's tastes are mildly sweet, while Belobog's are slightly spicier. That's why even everyday goods such as these have collector's value.

C: 要不是家里还有个不省心的哥哥和大堆产业要打理，我真想现在就请求和您一起去旅行。
E: If I didn't have a worry-wart brother and a ton of business to attend to, I would really like to ask you to take me with you.

C: 为什么啊…为什么我的文字总是不够恐怖呢？
E: Why is that... Why can't my words evoke terror?

C: 您对都市传说感兴趣吗？您看，像这样一座梦之城，必定会有很多迷人的秘密——
E: Are you interested in urban legends? Just like in this city of dreams, there must be countless mesmerizing secrets...

C: 你松了口气。冒险很成功，你得到了想要的东西。那…代价是什么？
E: You sigh with relief. The risk paid off, and you got what you wanted. But... at what cost?
...Groo?

C: 挠挠它的喉咙。
E: Scratch its throat.

C: 我？我什么建议都给不了，家族的人也听不进去我的话。我能做的就只有发发牢骚而已。
E: Me? I can't give out any advice and The Family doesn't listen to me. All I can do is vent, that's it.

C: 我想跟你聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 你从她的余光中看出了一丝惆怅，还有一丝…恨怨。
E: You detect a hint of melancholy out of the corner of her eyes, and a trace of... resentment.

C: 卡什女士自顾自地哼唱了起来。因为某些原因，她的声音不再婉转悦耳，但却带着一种难以言说的、引人入胜的魔力，让人忍不住驻足想要聆听。
E: Lady Cash starts humming along by herself. For some reason, her voice is no longer melodious but still has this indescribable and captivating magic to it that makes people want to stop and listen.

C: 您说的对！下次我一定换一家质量更好的。
E: You're right! I'll get a better quality bottle next time.

C: 很好，它这一辈子也算值得。
E: Great. Its life amounted to something in the end.

C: 但这种感觉…并不坏。什么都不用操心，只需要照着指令去做就好。天底下再没有比这更轻松的生活了。
E: But this isn't... bad. I don't have to worry about anything; I just need to obey. There is no easier life than this.

C: 可是出去的话，我又能做什么呢…真见鬼，我怎么会变成这副废物模样！
E: But what can I do if I leave... Darn, why did I become such a good-for-nothing!?

C: 曾经那么威风的家伙，如今却这么狼狈…智械的觉悟难道也像人类一样易碎吗？！
E: He was so fearsome in the past, and now he's looking pathetic... Could it be the consciousness of an Intellitron is as fragile as that of a human being!?

C: 为了一场幻梦，我抛弃了所有现实。现在呢？我好像拥有了一切；我又好像一无所有。
E: For a dream, I abandon all reality. But what now? I seem to own everything, yet I seem to have nothing.

C: 我不想再和所谓的评论家、鉴赏家打交道了——永远不想。
E: I don't wish to deal with the so-called critics and connoisseurs again — never.

C: 啊…她是如此令人过目不忘，可我已经很久没见到她了……
E: Ah... She is unforgettable, but I haven't seen her for such a long time...

C: …因为他没吃早饭？
E: ...Because he hadn't eaten breakfast?

C: 那些「旧友们」并不善于发觉他的天赋，为此我感到十分遗憾。
E: His "old friends" failed to recognize his talent, and I feel genuinely sorry about that.

C: 区区物件的拙劣模仿，怎么能比得上人类用心奏响的音乐呢？
E: How can a crude imitation compare to music made from the heart?

C: 看我的皮皮西后援团就知道，我可比一般人会玩多了。整个匹诺康尼就没有我不敢尝试的娱乐！
E: You can tell by my Pepeshi entourage that I am the biggest partygoer around! There is no form of entertainment in Penacony that I wouldn't dare try!

C: 唉…我现在只希望他们不要真的恨我。
E: Ah... I just wish that they will not truly hate me.

C: 您好，请问有什么需要帮助的吗？
E: Hello, is there anything that I can help you with?

C: 我此次前来匹诺康尼，就是为了结识一些门户相当、志同道合的朋友。
E: I've come to Penacony to make some new friends who share similar interests and backgrounds.

C: 人一旦入了梦，长相可以变化、身份可以造假——你甚至不知道对方到底什么种族、是男是女！这种朋友我哪敢随随便便交啊……
E: Those people in the dream can easily change their looks and even identity! And you never know their true race or gender! You surely don't want friends like that, right?...

C: 虽然此类事故的发生率不高于<unbreak>1.5%</unbreak>，但依旧值得警醒。
E: Although the occurrence rate is no higher than <unbreak>1.5%</unbreak>, it is still a matter of concern.

C: 如是。
E: I totally agree.

C: 当然不是啦，我是来自凯尔萨斯星的红泥粘土人，这幅样貌是我的拟态。
E: No, of course not. I'm a Red Clayform from Kalsas, and this form is a result of my mimicry.

C: 刚才那是什么？
E: What was that just now?

C: 再见。
E: Thank you.

C: 在这个梦里，漆黑王虎克当上了贝洛伯格的大守护者；离开雅利洛-Ⅵ千年之久的反物质军团卷土重来，准备完成他们此前未能完成的任务。
E: In your dream, Hook, the Pitch-Dark Lord, becomes the Supreme Guardian of Belobog. The Antimatter Legion, absent from Jarilo-VI for a thousand years, makes a comeback, intending to fulfill their unfinished mission.

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: …非常抱歉，目前没有对象能够接通您的「窥梦来电」。请确保您的通讯录中有至少一位朋友正处在深度睡眠中，然后再试一次。
E: ...I'm sorry, but there is currently no one available to connect you to your Dreampeek Call. Please ensure that at least one of your friends in your contacts is in deep sleep and try again.

C: 「苏乐达好处都有啥，谁说中了就送他。」
E: "What are the benefits of SoulGlad? Whoever gets it right wins this!"

C: 没吃。
E: I haven't eaten.

C: 哔哔哔哔——噗！我是疾风侠！疾风——力量！
E: Beep, beep, beep... Poof! I'm Quicksilver! Speed is power!

C: 快让我上车！
E: Let me in now!

C: …「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」？那艘空中飞艇？！
E: ... The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand? That airship!?

C: 来吧！坐上来吧！无论何时，无论要去往哪里，我都会帮你顺利抵达！
E: Come and sit inside me! No matter the place, I'll ensure that you reach there on time!

C: 你们一人一鸟就这么互相盯着对方，时间在沉默中流逝。
E: Time passes in silence as you and the bird stare at each other.

C: 你又要干嘛？
E: What brings you here again?

C: 我见过其他小鸟了。
E: I've met the other birdies.

C: 但你还没<color=#dbc291ff>找到足够数量的折纸小鸟</color>吧？等都搞定了再回来找我。
E: But I guess you haven't <color=#dbc291ff>found all the origami birds</color> yet, right? Come back again when you've done that.

C: 没错没错！我就知道灰色的朋友肯定善于观察！
E: That's right! I knew you would be a good observer!

C: 滴~嗒！灰色的朋友，请你收回刚才说的这句话！
E: Tick... tock! My gray friend, please retract that statement!

C: 帕姆从你手中抢走了那只梦泡，然后将它毛茸茸的额头抵了上去……
E: Pom-Pom yanks the dream bubble away from you and presses their furry forehead on it...

C: 艾薇拉陷入了沉默。某种一直萦绕着她的热忱消失了，取而代之的是工作最本真的情感——枯燥。
E: Elvira falls into a deep silence. A certain kind of enthusiasm that surrounded her has disappeared, replaced by the most fundamental emotion associated with work: Monotony.

C: 到底是谁劈了美梦小镇影院的屏幕？知不知道维护它需要多高的成本啊！
E: Who was it who cleaved Dreamville Cinema's screen in two? Do you know how much it takes to maintain it!

C: 当失去了为你打点好一切流程的的团队后，你得时刻关注市场动向和家族政策、得紧巴巴地控制资源投入与制作周期，你得分神打点资金人脉、亲自宣发造势，甚至还不得不费大力气处理盗版维权的问题……
E: When you lose a team that did everything for you, you have to pay attention to market trends and Family policies, stringently manage your resources and production timelines, personally promote yourself and manage your sponsors and network. You even have to spend huge amounts of effort on combating copyright disputes...

C: 但我不会束手就擒。既然能从公司的围捕中逃走这么多次，就不怕再多一次！
E: But I'm not just going to hand myself in! I've managed to escape the IPC's hunts so many times, I can do it again!

C: 普普通通一无名客。
E: I'm just an ordinary Nameless.

C: 在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
E: To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.

C: 在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
E: To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.

C: 透过圆心，你仿佛能感受到希佩的笑意。
E: You feel as if you can feel Xipe smiling at you through the center of the circles.

C: 嗨！脚并拢，头埋低，时时倾听客人的心意！欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」！
E: Hey! Feet together, head down, our customers always wear the crown! Welcome to the Dreamjolt Hostelry!

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: 就是这样，我知道你是酒吧的调饮师，聊天的能力肯定不错，但想用花言巧语来接近我是不可能的。我永远只会为美妙的旋律而沦陷。
E: That's the crux of it. I know you're a drinksmith and a skilled conversationalist, but flowery words won't impress me. Only a great melody will win me over.

C: …进入战斗？
E: ...Get into a fight?
(Meow!)

C: 小时候，我总是缠着父辈们给我讲无名客们的银河冒险故事。你们简直是我的童年偶像…真没想到，我现在居然有机会和你们面对面聊天。
E: When I was a kid, I kept asking folks from my parents' generation to tell me tales of the Nameless' cosmic adventures. You were basically my childhood heroes... I never imagined I'd be able to speak to you face-to-face like this.

C: 你的到来令我耳目皆新，能从这乏味单调的工作中寻得一丝慰藉。
E: Your mere presence has bequeathed me a sliver of comfort from the tedium of this job.

C: 只可惜…那星球已沉入虚无之海，足足一个琥珀纪之久，自此再无人有幸抵达那乌托邦的港口。
E: Alas... That planet is submerged in the boundless sea of Nihility — for an entire Amber Era, none have had the fortune of approaching this utopian harbor.

C: 在谐乐大典上，我们为同一种梦想祈愿，对同一种愿景祷告。以理想凝聚集群，「众赞之弦」便会降临，响应我们的愿望，赐给我们无上的极乐……
E: During the Charmony Festival, we pray for a common dream and for a common vision. Brought together under the same ideals, the "Harmony of Praise" will arrive, answering our prayers and granting supreme bliss...

C: 先到这里吧。
E: Let's end the chat here, then.

C: …啊？可是……
E: ...Ah? But...

C: 太出名也是种苦恼…
E: Who knew being famous could be such a pain...

C: 这里既是选手的竞技场、也是观众的狂欢之所，更是个巨大的苏乐达广告牌，强势地吸引着所有人的目光。
E: This wasn't just the contest arena, but also a party zone for the crowd — and it was also a massive billboard for SoulGlad, drawing in everybody's attention.

C: 红哨小姐用她体内的某个机械器官发出了一阵聒噪的哨声。你决定不理会她恶劣的态度，自顾自地继续提问。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a harsh squeal from a mechanical component somewhere inside her. You decide to ignore her bad attitude and plunge straight on with your questions.

C: 你好歹也算个演员，居然连自己参演的节目叫什么名字都不知道？就凭你这点敬业精神，这辈子都别想混上个有名有姓的角！
E: So you're an actor but you don't even know the name of the show you're in? You'll never ever land a big role if that's your sense of professionalism!

C: 你想在流梦礁安居吗？
E: Do you want to settle in the Dreamflux Reef?

C: 啊。那位小姐算是例外吧，我和她说过话，挺温和的，对孩子们也很热心。
E: Ah. Miss Robin is an exception. I've spoken with her before. She was quite gentle and very passionate about children.

C: 我经历了的这些事…一定都是家族布下的险恶阴谋！
E: These things that I experienced... They must have been some sinister plot set up by The Family!

C: 你懂的，虽然来不了多少钱，但我至少也吃饱穿暖，过得也挺开心。可父母就知道成天数落我，说我什么用都没有、什么事都做不好……
E: You understand. Even though I'm not making much money, I can eat and sleep soundly. I'm quite content. But, my parents are always criticizing me, telling me I'm useless, and I can't do anything right...

C: 都是自动战斗的功劳。
E: It's all thanks to auto-battle.

C: 为什么想要帮助这些孩子？
E: Why do you want to help these children?

C: 还请快些离开吧。
E: So please, leave while you can.

C: 是啊，如果没有人挺身而出，这样棘手的问题绝不会自己消失。
E: Yes. If no one stands out and takes action, such a difficult situation will not resolve by itself.

C: 开拓？真是个好名字！我也喜欢开拓！
E: Trailblaze? That's a great name! I love trailblazing too.

C: 最近有不少客人来到流梦礁，流梦礁一定会慢慢好起来的！
E: There are quite a number of people coming to the Dreamflux Reef recently. I'm sure this place will slowly get better!

C: 遇到过，我把它打跑了。
E: Yes, and I fought it off.

C: 我会记得。
E: I will remember.

C: 是啊，真是好一段漫长的时光，长到历史都已经失真……
E: Yeah, it has been a really long time, so long that the history has become unreal...

C: 这时候，我就会威胁他们，谁要是再吵，我就在历史里记一笔，说他是个笨蛋。
E: At times like this, I'd threaten them and tell them that whoever was next to argue would be listed as an idiot in the historical annals.

C: 而你们来到这里，带走匹诺康尼的故事，对我们来说或许也是一种重生吧。
E: And now you are here to take away the tales of Penacony. To us, this is perhaps a kind of rebirth.

C: 我想看看商品。
E: I'd like to see the products.

C: 这里有我的乐坊、我的「家人」们。我可以隔着薄薄的橱窗玻璃，看它们演出、看它们用音符为人们带来欢乐。
E: Here, I have my band and my "kinsmen." Through just a razor-thin piece of glass, I can observe them performing — plus all the joy that their melodies bring people.

C: 欢迎下次光临，翠丝的店永远为你敞开~
E: See you again next time — Jessie's store will always be open to your business~

C: 看来你已经找到一半小鸟了。
E: Looks like you've already found half of the birds.

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，<color=#dbc291ff>有个傻乎乎的小家伙跑去找谜钟先生玩了，可那里最近有恐龙出没</color>，万一被坏蛋吃掉就糟糕了啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>There's a dimwitted one that's gone to look for Mr. Big Ticker to play, but dinosaurs have recently been spotted there</color>. It'd be trouble if it got eaten by a baddie, tweet.

C: 啾！客官要是想聊聊天，随时都可以来找人家啾。
E: Tweet! Feel free to come find me anytime if you want to chat, tweet.

C: 焦渴中花苞希冀阵雨泽润\n烈阳下旅者惦念浓荫庇佑
E: Parched flower buds hope for a shower of rain.\nTravelers beneath the sweltering sun yearn for shrouded shade.

C: 当时怎么想到创业的？
E: What made you start a company back then?

C: 那就全部换一批人，反正不缺找工作的人…有壮士断腕决心，才有成功的可能。
E: Then I'll replace all of them at once. Everyone's hankering for a job these days anyway... Success is only possible with a will that has learned loss.

C: 呼…人都走了，这次也多谢你帮我解围，克劳迪娅……
E: Whew... They've all left. I must thank you for helping me out again, Claudia.

C: …有时我不禁思考，人与人之间的社交，当真是必要的吗？
E: Sometimes, I can't help but wonder... are social interactions truly necessary?

C: 这就是原因了。
E: This is the reason why I haven't resigned yet.

C: 晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号上最具「同谐」精神的特色甜点，就由我——这里有口皆碑的「美食乐手」为您呈上！
E: The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand's signature desserts that most embody the spirit of the Harmony. Please allow me — the widely acclaimed Musician of Delicacies — to present them to you!

C: 当然啦，娱乐活动附加上条件之后，总会变得无趣很多。还是再考虑一下吧。
E: Of course, I understand adding conditions to a recreational activity will suck all the fun out of it, so I'll give you some time to think about it.

C: 谁能想得到，我赚了这么多哈哈哈！
E: Hahaha! I didn't expect to make so much money!

C: 我就觉得你不对劲…
E: I knew you were suspicious!

C: 见我成功，就要置我于死地？！等我收拾你！
E: Yet here they are trying to execute me for my success. Ridiculous!

C: 那…那太好了…哈哈……
E: Th—That's great to hear, haha!

C: 她似乎真的吓到了，低下头去不再答话，似乎是在骗自己刚才的一切都从未发生过。
E: She looks frightened and becomes quiet, as if she's trying to convince herself that the earlier conversation never happened.

C: 你瞧我这件怎么样？我身上这件可是限量版，羡慕吧～
E: How do you like my dress? It's a limited edition piece. Jealous?

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 「交易」的原则是互惠互利，连打点我这种事都做不到，还想谈交易？我呸！
E: Trading is all about mutual benefits. They don't even think to pay me, and they hope to get themselves a deal? Bah!

C: 光是看到艇上皮沙发的牌子，我就知道这次出差是来对了。哈哈，真是多亏了公司对我的器重哇。
E: Just seeing the brand of the leather sofa confirms this business trip was the right choice — haha, all thanks to the IPC's trust in me.

C: 你老婆是明星？
E: Your wife's a celebrity?

C: 哎呀~您还没问是什么请求呢，万一这件事只有您能帮忙呢？客官不要这么狠心啾~
E: Come on, you haven't even heard my request yet. What if you're the only one who can resolve this issue? Please don't be so heartless, tweet~

C: 摸摸它的羽毛。
E: Pet its feathers.

C: …欢迎各位，现任船长{NICKNAME}在此祝愿大家在船上玩得开心！
E: ...Welcome everyone! {NICKNAME}, your current captain, wishes everyone a great time on board the ship!

C: 你这能给空艇更名、换涂装吗？
E: Can I change the name and livery of the airship here?

C: 你是这里的老师吗？
E: Are you a teacher here?

C: 和你说话挺开心的…你想聊音乐，还是听听我年轻时的光辉事迹，或者都想？
E: I enjoy talking to you... Do you want to chat about music, or do you want to hear me reminisce about my glorious past? Or perhaps both?

C: 这么纯情的吗？
E: I didn't peg you as the romantic type.

C: ——不对！我是哪来的混蛋吗！
E: Gah! I sound like a total jerk!

C: 而那些虚名能带来什么？信用点吗？就连她的应允都买不来……
E: And what can this weighty name bring me? Credits? What use is it when I can't even get her to go out with me...

C: 几年前，为了做田野调查，我曾到访过某个偏远贫瘠的星球。那里的人们还处于游牧与农耕的过渡期，比起「生活」，他们更加注重「生存」。
E: A few years ago, I once visited a remote and barren planet for my field research. The local people were still in the transitional period between nomadism and agriculture. They were more preoccupied with "survival" than "living."

C: 简直就像是书上说的「地缚灵」一样，要是我也能看到它们就好了。
E: They're just like the "earth-bound spirits" I have read about in books. If only I could see them, too.

C: 我从一位「当事人」那里听说，其实是有位公司的高管得罪了巡海游侠，被人追杀到匹诺康尼来了。为了自保，这位高管在克劳克影院设下陷阱，想解决掉游侠，但结果嘛……
E: I heard from a witness that there was an IPC official who had gotten on the wrong side of the Galaxy Rangers, and they chased him down to Penacony. To protect himself, this official had laid a trap in Clock Studios, thinking he could take down the Ranger, but it turns out...

C: 我的导师也这么劝我，还说我不做他的学生实在可惜了，可我怎么觉得…他是希望我留在学校帮他干活呢？可以随便使唤，还不用付钱。
E: My teacher gave me the same advice and even said it would be a waste if I didn't become his student. But somehow I feel... he just hopes that I stay in school so I can help him with his stuff. He can order me around without even paying me a wage.

C: 我觉得你很有音乐天赋。
E: I think you do have musical talent.

C: 谢谢…对了，请您也保存一份吧，不管以后大家还能不能聚在一起，就当是…我们乐队的回忆。
E: Thank you... Oh yes, please save a copy for yourself too. No matter whether everyone stays in touch in the future or not, this will be... our band's memory.

C: 你还会和乐队成员联系吗？
E: Will you still keep in contact with the other band members?

C: 虽说还欠着学费贷款一大笔钱，但只要我们父子同心，没有什么坎是过不去的。等我在匹诺康尼闯出名堂来了，就让老爹退休，好好享受生活！
E: I still owe a large amount of student loans, but as long as my father and I stick together, there's no challenge we can't overcome. Once I make a name for myself on Penacony, I'll help my old man retire and enjoy life!

C: 你怎么不卖睡蕉小猴了？
E: Why don't you sell the Slumbernana Monkeys anymore?

C: 你找我有什么事吗？
E: What can I do for you?

C: 我曾想过，是否放弃演员梦想，老老实实加入鸢尾花家系当个招待员算了……但我每每想到和你们一起出演的那场戏，你和乱破同学的台词就在我脑海中盖过了这些念头。
E: I once thought about giving up on my acting dream, to settle for being a receptionist with the Iris Family... But every time I think about that show I did with you guys, you and Rappa's lines engulfed all those thoughts.

C: 欸？你和其他同学在我这里做过香蕉派呀，我们还一起上了筑梦课。你是在开玩笑吧…是在开玩笑吧？
E: Eh? You and other students made banana pie here before. We even attended a dreamweaving class together. You're kidding, right? Right?

C: 来点好吃的。
E: Get me something tasty.

C: 我正在尝试以新的身份与各位相处。只是囿于性格，需要时间。
E: I'm trying to connect with everyone using my new identity, but I may need some time due to my personality.

C: 聊聊其他事…
E: Talk about something else...

C: 忆庭的目的…
E: The goal of the Garden...

C: 不怎么好喝的汽水，却有着远超任何一瓶苏乐达的价值。
E: A soda that doesn't taste so good, yet is far more valuable than any bottle of SoulGlad.

C: 你拨弄按钮，试图驾驶这艘船，但屏幕上出现的图标比你手机里安装的虚拟应用还多——你感到眼花缭乱，开始暗自考虑是否要自掏腰包为设备更新迭代。
E: You fiddle with the button in an attempt to steer this ship, but more icons are showing up on the screen than the number of virtual apps installed on your phone. You start to feel dizzy and silently consider if you want to open your own wallet to update this device.

C: 复古的金属舵轮屹立于此，旁边贴着一张纸条：「真正的船长需要的不是舵轮，而是天空的呼唤。」
E: The rustic metal ship's helm is right here, with a note stuck on it: "Real captains need no wheels but the call of the sky."

C: 书架上摆了历任船长收藏的书，你猜测丹恒或许会对它们感兴趣。
E: The bookshelf is slotted with books collected by previous captains. You infer that Dan Heng might be interested in them.

C: 那四叶草沙拉呢？
E: What about four-leaf clover salads?

C: …不对不对，过了。再往右。
E: ...No, no, that's too much. A little to the right.

C: 这都是些什么人啊！
E: Who are these people?

C: 都忘了自己是谁吗？
E: Have you forgotten who you are?

C: 我实在是太平凡了…
E: I'm way too ordinary...

C: 别人也能偷窥我？
E: Others can peek into MY dreams too?

C: 我想不通、想不通啊！
E: I can't figure it out! I just can't!

C: 看开点，兄弟，何必把目光放得那么宏大？
E: Look at the bright side, mate. Why do you have to think it that way?

C: 哎你知道吗，就在刚才还有个「骰子」问我什么时候能抓到犯人呢。可怜的小东西，这些日子肯定吓坏了……
E: You know? Just earlier, a "die" asked me when we'll catch the culprit. Poor little thing must be scared these days...

C: 这会是最棒的一条！
E: This is going to be the best one!

C: 我不管，我要退钱！
E: I don't care. I'm demanding a refund!

C: 看到那些审查官了吗？直接越过议会把我们全扣在这里，匹诺康尼怕是要变天了。
E: You see those investigators? They bypassed the council and just detained us outright — something huge is going down in Penacony.

C: 或许这就是命中注定吧，我本想去游泳……
E: Perhaps this is pre-destined. I originally wanted to go for a swim...

C: 我可是预好了造型师，全套礼服、妆造大清早就准备好了，结果……
E: I booked a stylist, an entire set of formal wear, and had my get-up all prepped and ready in the early morning. And now...

C: 这还差不多。
E: That's better.

C: 我怎么还没交到朋友…
E: Why haven't I made any new friends...

C: 但他只想留在船上…
E: But he just wants to stay on the ship...

C: 大哥也来匹诺康尼了…
E: My big brother has come to Penacony too...

C: 我现在跑还来得及吗？
E: Is it too late for me to run?

C: 说好的不聊工作呢？
E: I thought we weren't gonna talk about work?

C: 立刻生效的那种……
E: The kind that takes effect immediately...

C: 你还是成了诗人…
E: So you're a poet now...

C: …好吧，你选择了相当危险的方向，并注定要为这个想法付出代价，包括但不仅限于：完成布置的诗歌作业、定期与部员交流观点，以及目睹不愿察知的真相。
E: ...All right. You've chosen a rather dangerous direction, and are determined to pay the price for this decision, including but not limited to: completing poetry assignments, conducting regular discourse with club members, and witnessing hard truths.

C: 我是提醒运动小助手~记得每天坚持锻炼啾！
E: I'm your exercise reminder assistant! Remember to keep up with your daily training, tweet!

C: 你没做错，回教室去吧。
E: You've done nothing wrong. Go back to class.

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 这里有吃的，有喝的，还有家人和朋友在。丢掉这一切，去追一个可能根本不存在的人，值得吗？
E: There's food 'n' drink, and family 'n' friends here. To throw all that away and pursue someone who might not even exist, is it worth it?

C: 浴室歌王出浴了！你又唱了一嗓子，差点给自己听笑了。
E: The bathroom's star singer has appeared! You sing another line, almost laughing at yourself.

C: 没有重大新闻，也没有亟待解决的紧急事件，每颗恒星都运转在自己的轨道上，今天也是宇宙里日复一日的平淡一天。
E: No major news, and no urgent matters to address. Every star is orbiting in its own path, making today just another mundane day in the universe.

C: 这顶礼帽曾横渡星海，跨过漫长岁月。如今它沉眠在列车里，安详得如同归乡的游子。
E: This top hat has traversed the starry seas and crossed countless years. Now it lies dormant on the Express, as peaceful as a traveler returning home.

C: 哼唧！
E: OINK!

C: 你的举动让扑满很不满，它也该得到尊重。
E: The trotter is very displeased with what you have done. It deserves respect, too.

C: 你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「枘凿六合便携版」上。
E: As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Portable Hexanexus."

C: 大人们神武英勇，容貌悦人，定是「黄金之茧」墨涅塔的蝶翼扇动让鳞粉落在他们身上，才生出如此完美的人来！
E: Their courage and elegance must come from the fluttering wings of Mnestia, the Chrysalis of Gold! Their magical powder must have imbued them with such perfection!

C: 这是可以说的吗？
E: Is that something you can divulge?

C: 况且陶器的器形多样，做各种用途的都有，能将画作悄然融入生活之中，比如城中不少奇美拉砂盆也出自我手。
E: Plus, pottery offers a canvas of diverse shapes and purposes, allowing me to infuse art into life. You know, I've even crafted many chimera litter trays in this city.

C: 那个地位低下的山之民，既没钱也没前途…他哪里配得上你，赶紧把他甩了吧！
E: That modest Mountain Dweller with no riches or prospects... Does he even measure up to you? Just ditch him!

C: 嘴上说什么不勉强，实际上我们这些可怜人被勉强得还少吗？我告诉你，就你做的这些破玩意，大地兽都不吃！我……
E: You say you won't push us, but how many times were we outlanders pushed into things we didn't want? You know what? Even a dromas wouldn't lick the mess you serve! I...

C: 看来您对这道菜的评价还算不错，我的荣幸。承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>1000</unbreak>利衡币。
E: Seems like you're really enjoying this dish. I'm glad you like it. Thank you for your patronage. It's <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜…
E: Awoo... Awoo...

C: *非静止画面*
E: *This is not a static image*

C: {NICKNAME}退化——酒醉的蝴蝶！
E: {NICKNAME} regresses — A drunken butterfly!

C: 这样啊…不过初来乍到时，大家其实多少都会有些不适应的。不过要是待得久了，你就会发现这里的居民其实还都挺好相处的。
E: I see... It can take some time for everyone to get used to things at first, but once you do, you'll find that the people here are actually pretty friendly.

C: 这是麦迪特瑞恩蜜果。传说中这种果子为法吉娜所钟爱，用它制成的秘酿能给人带来精神与肉体的双重疗愈。
E: This is the Mediterrana fig. Legend has it that it was Phagousa's favorite, and the ambrosia made from it could heal both body and soul.

C: 没事啦，你先忙。
E: Well, that's it for now. I'll leave you to your duties.

C: 元老院的故事很简单——那里是一群死人生活的地方。或许有人觉得元老院的存在自有其必要…但我多少算个受害者，显然不可能对你说出这样的话。
E: It's rather straightforward: The Council of Elders is a place teeming with the living dead. Some may argue the Council of Elders serves its intended functions... but as a victim, that's not the tale I would tell.

C: 陌生的孩子，你莫非是初来乍到？无论是这空中的花园、还是隔壁的大浴场，它们都是我们这些闲暇市民，消磨时光的绝佳去处。
E: Are you new around here, unfamiliar child? Whether it's this hanging gardens or the grand bath nearby, these are the best spots for us citizens to while away the hours when we are idle.

C: 阁下找我，是有什么话想说吗？
E: Is there something you wish to discuss with me, {F#miss}{M#mister}?

C: 塞纳托斯在上…它应该不会让我家人在黑暗里迷路吧？他们应该能找到安静的地方歇着。我儿子小时候最怕黑了，希望他在那边不会害怕。
E: By Thanatos above... They would not leave my family lost in the darkness, would they? My family should be able to find a place of peace and quiet to rest. My little son was afraid of the dark. I hope that he is not scared over there.

C: 我想和你聊聊……
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 奥赫玛人一般会把肥皂的诞生归功于{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}，说是它有次不小心把橄榄油泼洒到了熄灭的火堆上，结果神的祝福因此变化出新的形态，于是就有了肥皂。
E: Okheman folks normally attribute the origins of soap to {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, saying the god once accidentally spilled olive oil onto an extinguished bonfire. The god's blessing then took on a new form, and thus soap was invented.

C: 所以，无敌的冒险家想和一个不知道为什么坐在房顶上的陌生女孩子聊聊天？
E: So, the peerless adventurer would like to chat with the strange girl sitting out on the rooftop for some reason?

C: …坐在屋顶上的人看风景，而看风景的人在街巷中看你。
E: ...People sitting on the rooftop look at the view, while people looking at the view see you in the streets.

C: 不管怎么样，能认识新朋友总归是件好事。来，我给你介绍一下——旁边这些温驯的大家伙们可是我们工坊的至宝，别看它们块头大，平时可乖了。
E: In any case, it's always nice to make a new friend. Here, let me introduce you to these docile big 'uns next to you. They're real sweeties around the workshop and don't let their big size fool you, because they're normally very obedient.

C: 哦，对了，还没来得及自我介绍呢。我叫盖亚，是树庭的学者，目前正在研究水培植物的相关课题。
E: Oh yeah, I haven't had a chance to introduce myself yet. I'm Gaia and I study at the Grove. My research topic is currently looking at hydroponic plants.

C: 可惜后来被浴场的人查出来，就把我赶了出来...但这些发现证明了我的理论是正确的！我敢打赌，要是能继续研究，说不定能培育出能抵抗黑潮的植物呢！
E: Unfortunately, the people at the baths found out and kicked me out... But these discoveries only prove that my theories are correct! I'm willing to bet that if I keep researching, I might even be able to cultivate plants that can resist the black tide!

C: 见了鬼了，水怎么会渴——不对，水怎么会说话！？
E: I'm hearing ghosts. How can water be thirsty... Wait, how can water be talking?!

C: 离开
E: Leave

C: 在你的眼中，他打造武器的过程朴实无华，除了力气大点、声音响些，似与翁法罗斯之外最平凡的铁匠并无二致。
E: In your eyes, his weapon forging process is unsophisticated, unpretentious. Apart from exhibiting more strength and producing louder clanging, he doesn't seem too different from the most ordinary blacksmiths in Amphoreus.

C: 如今在奥赫玛的山之民，我的族群，曾被使役，悬锋人。
E: Now Mountain Dwellers in Okhema, my people are. Used by Kremnoans, they once were.

C: 至于技术部分，老希可不太懂，您得去问工匠们，三两句话解释不清楚…而且，哪怕现在，这神体也还藏着不少秘密咧！就比如说，那「翻飞试炼」——
E: When it comes to the technical stuff, Old Hygilos isn't really in the know — you'd be better off checking with the craftsmen. It's too complex to explain... And even now, the corpus of this deity still harbors plenty of secrets! Take the Trial of Whimsy, for instance...

C: 法吉娜大人，你掀起波澜，抛弃了我……
E: O Great Phagousa, you have churned the tides and abandoned me...

C: 与如何登上高台同样费解的，是如何回到地面，四下并无楼梯、电梯或传送锚点，你选择——
E: As to how you inexplicably scaled to such heights, the same question arises with your descent. There are no staircases, elevators, or teleport anchors about. You choose to...

C: 缇里西庇俄丝……
E: Tribios...

C: 这样…我始终对你有些愧疚，要是有什么需要帮忙的地方，请尽管来找我。
E: In that case, I've always felt a certain guilt toward you. If there's anything you need help with, please don't hesitate to ask.

C: 我很乐意与阁下分享我的最新发现。
E: I'd be delighted to share my latest discoveries with you, esteemed outlander.

C: 另外，羡慕大地兽。它们有很多智慧。至少，比我们多。
E: We envy dromases. They have wisdom. At least, more than us.

C: 哈！智者的话语真是一阵见血。帕门弥德，你怕是要砸掉自己的饭碗咯。
E: Hah! Your words go right for the throat, wise one! Parmenides, you are in danger of destroying your own profession!

C: 很超脱的想法，但你似乎并未理解我的发问。就算那位学者拥有瑟希斯的智慧，他所观察到的也仍旧是那时那刻，从他的视角出发的阿卡索斯。
E: An unconventional line of thought, but it seems that you have not understood my question. Even if that scholar had the intellect of Cerces, he would only be able to observe the Icatus from his point of view at that moment.

C: 冒昧问下，你看不见颜色吗？
E: May I ask... can you not see colors?

C: 因祸得福，我在壁画领域也算是小有名气…唔，忘了自我介绍了，我叫福尔图娜，很高兴认识你。
E: A blessing in disguise, I've made a name for myself in the mural field... uh, forgot to introduce myself. I'm Fortuna, nice to meet you.

C: 这样啊…那就不打扰了。你要是对这个话题感兴趣，等闲下来了可以再来这附近找我。
E: I see... I won't bother you then. If you're interested in this topic, you can look for me here when you're free.

C: 这就不行了？才跑了几步就累成这副德行？出去别说是我的学生，丢人！
E: Is that all you've got? You run a few steps, and you're in such a sorry state already? Don't go telling anyone you're my students, as you'll bring me nothing but shame!

C: 「嚷嚷」？怎么说话呢？我在宣讲我此生践行的瑟希斯之道！
E: Muttering? What're you talking about? I am proclaiming the path I have pursued my entire life, the way of Cerces!

C: 知识为什么要付费？法吉娜会对泉水收费吗？又不是我姐姐那种…哦，是你啊。怎么，想来听我宣讲「知识开源论」了吗？
E: Why do I have to pay for knowledge? Would Phagousa charge for their springwater? It's not like it's my sister's... Oh, it's you. What's going on? Here to listen to my Open-Source Knowledge Theory?

C: 所以，别以为我是在逃避工作。恰恰相反，我在这里做的研究，比在那个被世俗观念束缚的树庭里有意义多了！
E: So don't think I'm trying to avoid work here. Quite the contrary, I am conducting research that is far more meaningful than whatever is in the Grove, fettered by shackles of worldly sentiments!

C: 好，我也得忙我的工作去了。
E: Okay, I have to get back to work too.

C: 小意思，一会儿还能再喝一杯呢。
E: It's fiiiine. I can still have another cup.

C: …我？奥赫玛的住民竟无知到这般地步，连「雅努斯之驹」的名号都未曾听过吗？哼哼，刻法勒号称全知全能，信奉者却如此孤陋寡闻，你真是不称职呐。
E: ...Me? Are the citizens of Okhema so foolish that they've never even heard of Janus' Steed? Hmph, Kephale claims to be all-knowing and all-powerful, yet their followers sure don't know a thing. Incompetence!

C: 自雅努斯为天地划定界限起，我们便侍奉在它左右。若雅努斯是那至高的「万径之门」，我们便是有形的「门」——为它打开通道，传达神谕。
E: Ever since Janus carved the boundary between heaven and earth, we have been there serving by their side. If Janus is the holiest "Gate of Infinity," then we are the physical "gates" — We open the way for them and pass on the prophecies.

C: 收听空间站留言。
E: Checking messages from the Space Station.

C: 哈哈，年轻人你这么说也没错。雅努斯之城虽然崇高，但也是充满人间烟火的一座城市，比起奥赫玛或是哀地里亚来没有本质区别。只不过，对老夫来说……
E: Haha, you're not wrong, young one. Though the city of Janus is majestic, it is also a place where people live their normal daily lives, no different to Okhema or Aidonia. However, in my eyes...

C: 在遥远的黄金世，由于没有黑潮和战争，旅行非常安全，人们为了表达对泰坦的崇敬之情，往往会前往某位泰坦施行神迹的具体地点进行朝圣。
E: Back in the Era Chrysea, travelling was extremely safe as there was no black tide or war. In order to show their reverence to the Titans, people would often make pilgrimages to certain locations where Titans would perform miracles.

C: 你做得很好，孩子，但这些还不够。
E: You have done well, my child. But, this is not enough.

C: 竟有人敢在圣地之中公然侮辱神明的侍者——三相泰坦的名誉岂容如此玷污？纵使女神们向来公正仁慈，也不是尔等凡俗亵渎的藉口！
E: Someone would dare publicly besmirch the name of an attendant to the Goddesses in this holy place — how could one tarnish the reputation of Three Titans of Fate? Though the goddesses have always been merciful and kind, this is no excuse for your mortal blasphemy!

C: 啊，好的…也祝您在此得偿所愿！
E: Ah, alright... Then may you find what it is you are wishing for!

C: 那我就让你开开眼。
E: Then let me show you something special.

C: 你看门口的台阶，表面有些断裂的痕迹，那是因为朝圣的信徒太多，以至于石阶不堪重负——
E: See the steps at the entrance? They're a bit worn and cracked, a testament to the many pilgrims that have passed through here —

C: 能讲讲你母亲的事吗？
E: Could you share more about your mother?

C: 圣女轻声问：「…你多久没吃饭了？怎么这么瘦？」然后就请她吃了自己的茶点，确认她恢复力气后，塞了一大包点心让她背回家。
E: The Holy Maiden spoke gently. "How long have you been without food? You are thin as a stick?" After offering my mother some of her snacks and ensuring my mother had enough strength, she packed a large bag of treats for my mother to take home.

C: 听说你还拿过圣女的东西？
E: Have you ever taken anything from the Holy Maiden?

C: 你没见过她吗？
E: Have you not seen her?

C: 她们并非如外表看上去的那般无忧无虑…在缇安之前，无情的命运已将千万次同样悲伤的离别交予她们，而吾师的步伐却从未犹疑。
E: They are not as carefree as they appear... Before Trianne's loss, merciless fate had already brought them countless similarly sad partings, yet my teacher's steps never faltered.

C: 不对不对！小灰用力过猛啦，听上去好像要把空间都给消灭掉啦！
E: No, no! That's far too violent, Little Gray! It sounds like you want to completely annihilate space itself!

C: 托小灰的福，*我们*可算是想到，这种五瓣花，其实就和妈妈紧密相关……
E: Thanks to you, Little Gray, we finally realized that this five-petal flower is deeply connected to our mother...

C: …嗷呜？！
E: ...Awooo!?

C: 到时候，灰宝一定要常来坐坐呀！
E: When it's ready, Grayie, be sure to visit often, okay?

C: 你想起那个狮子般的男人。据说狮子的一生会经历许多次迁徙，最后在距离出生地很遥远的地方落脚……
E: You recall the leonine man. It's said that a lion's life is marked by many migrations, eventually settling far from where it was born...

C: 那就祝他常战常胜吧。
E: Then, I wish he achieves victory in every fight.

C: 「作品要服务社会现实？」实话说，如果不这么做，创作者根本就没法赚钱。
E: "Serve societal reality with your work?" Honestly, if you don't, you can't make a living in this field.

C: 哈哈，谈不上什么打扰，请慢走。
E: Haha, feel free to come back if you want to talk. Take care.

C: 你记得遐蝶曾介绍过「亡语蝶」的来历——有人认为它是死者的最后一道执念，也有人认为它是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的信使。
E: You remember Castorice once spoke of the origins of the Eulogistic Butterflies. Some believe them to be the final obsession of the deceased, others believe them to be {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos'{RUBY_E#}s messengers.

C: 就像现在，若非我坚持正统，恐怕早就被那些「学者」蛊惑了。你说是不是？这世道，光有虔诚还不够。得懂得审时度势，才能真正守护信仰。
E: Take now for example. If I hadn't upheld the traditions, I would have fallen victim to the honeyed words of those "scholars," wouldn't you agree? In these times, piety alone is not enough. One must also assess and adapt to the situations around to truly protect one's faith.

C: 你好啊贵客…提醒我一下，接下来是要做什么来着？
E: Hello, honored guest... Remind me, what am I supposed to do next?

C: 我…说实话，我很害怕这件事。如果真的按照学者所说，一切记忆都将不复存在…那活在新世界的那个人，还算是我自己吗？万一……
E: I... to be honest, this terrifies me. If everything unfolds as the scholars predict, and all memories vanish... would the person living in the new world still be me? What if...

C: 之后有什么打算？
E: Any plans after this?

C: 嘘——我们一起保守这个秘密。
E: Shh— let's keep this secret together.

C: 是啊，没有地方可去。
E: Indeed, nowhere.

C: 黑潮已经被击退，但每隔一阵子就会有新的造物来袭。虽然还能勉力支撑，但更可怕的是，绝望已经开始蔓延。
E: We've driven back the black tide, but fresh creatures continue to attack in waves. We're holding, but worse than the attacks is how despair has begun to infect our ranks.

C: 想找你翻译一块石板。
E: I need your help to translate a slate.

C: （看上去…他们也很为难，一个人说，这件事是领导他们的人决定的。姐姐她，一定很困扰吧……）
E: (They seemed... quite troubled. One of them said it was the decision of their leader. That lady... she must have been troubled too...)
(What they deserve...)

C: 是…若虫？
E: Is it... nymph?

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 如您所愿，我会用金丝将那些您曾触碰过的若虫召回。希望这能为您减少一些负担。
E: As you wish, I will summon the nymphs you once touched back with golden threads. I hope this lightens your burden somewhat.

C: …你、你怎么这么吓人！好吧，跟你说实话还不行吗——我爹要揍我，我出来避避风头。就这么简单，满意了吗？
E: ...Wh—Why are you being so scary!? Fine, I'll come clean. My dad's gonna whup me at the moment, so I came out for a shelter. That's it. Happy now?

C: 来，就当自己家吧。等我家孩子回来，给你们尝尝我最拿手的蜂蜜烙饼，还有最近刚熏的肉！
E: Come on in, make yourself at home. Once my kid's back, I'll have you all try my best honey suncake, and the smoked meat I just finished curing!

C: 下次有空再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up again when there's more time.

C: 嗯，听我唠叨这么久，你也该烦了。去忙自己的事吧。
E: Well, I've rambled enough — you must've had your fill. Off with you now.

C: 我要回去继续睡，把这个梦做完迷！
E: I'm going back to sleep and finishing that dream, mem!

C: 我一定在做梦。
E: This has to be a dream.

C: 像这样望着水面，就会不自觉地想，水中的我和岸边的我，到底哪一个才是真的？
E: But these reflections always make me wonder — which is the real me? The one reflected in the water, or the one standing on the shore?

C: 看着它，心情也平静了一些。
E: Looking at it makes me feel calmer.

C: 嗷呜！
E: Awooo!

C: 我记得在很久以前，你曾敬我一杯「必得回音的浪漫」。
E: I remember long ago, you once offered me a toast, "a romance that is sure to echo."

C: 我的未来…亦将奉献给凯撒大人的大业。
E: My future... Will be dedicated to the Great Imperator's grand cause.

C: 毁了，要回档了……
E: Destroy it, it's gonna reset...

C: 喝…继续喝…伟大的海洋之神啊，老身随时准备好聆听您的神谕……
E: Drink... drink deeper... O great sea goddess, this humble servant awaits your next decree...

C: 但后来…这群义士的继承者们渐渐失却初心，成为以「抹杀黄金裔为己任」的暗杀者。
E: But later generations... forgot our higher purpose, becoming assassins obsessed with eradicating Chrysos Heirs.

C: 石榴。
E: Pomegranate.

C: 呵呵，下次有缘相会，再向你揭示美食的奥秘吧。
E: Hehe, next time fate brings us together, I'll reveal more culinary secrets to you.

C: 「吉奥里亚的食材」不是大地兽吃的吗？你想让黄金裔吃土？
E: Georios' Ingredients — aren't they food for dromases? You want the Chrysos Heirs to eat dirt?

C: 是啊，前两天我就信了他们说的，说什么艾格勒大人会因悲伤而哭泣，让我买了不少防雨防灾的东西，一个都用不上。
E: Yes. Two days ago, I believed what they said about Lord Aquila crying tears of sadness, and they got me to buy up all kinds of wet weather gear. But it turned out I don't need any of it.

C: 别多想了，我们好歹在奥赫玛，但愿刻法勒能一直保佑我们……
E: There's no need to stress yourself out. After all, we're in Okhema. May Kephale protect us...

C: 欧弥利亚婶婶，我发誓这次真的不一样了！就在今日，刻法勒已赐予我第二个征兆，虽然我答应他不能说…我是命中注定的十二黄金裔之一，你要相信我！
E: Auntie Aumilia, I promise this time is different! Kephale has given me a second sign today. Though I promised them I wouldn't say... I am definitely one of the twelve fated Chrysos Heirs. You have to believe me!

C: 这…对吗？
E: Is that... right?

C: 唉呀，真是心疼啊…
E: Oh, I'm so devastated...

C: 快点，队伍很长。
E: Hurry up, the line is long.

C: 哈哈，我又赢啦！
E: Haha, I win again!

C: 若是能服用一粒「魔法硬币」，我就能想起更多细节咕。
E: If I could imbibe a magic coin, I could probably recall more details, hoot.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个向往职场生活的孩子，最近经常假借别人的<color=#dbc291ff>画像</color>扮演人事玩招聘呢，或许它又跑到那附近去了。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who longs for the working life. Recently, they've been borrowing other people's <color=#dbc291ff>portraits</color>, posing as HR and role-playing a recruiter. Maybe they have run off somewhere nearby.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个将追求刺激贯彻到底的孩子，或许又在<color=#dbc291ff>舞台附近的喷气口</color>玩着蹦极呢。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's devoted to seeking thrills. Maybe they're bungee jumping near the <color=#dbc291ff>stage's air vents</color>.

C: 猫头鹰老师眼中流露出笑意，他扇着翅膀落到了小鸟们身边，逐个摸了摸孩子们古灵精怪的小脑瓜……
E: Professor Owl's eyes reveal an amused glint, as he flaps his wings and lands beside the birds, patting the children's mischievous little heads in turn...

C: 尤其是愚人戏方面，很难找到比他更懂的行家了。
E: Especially about Fool's Play. I don't think anyone will know more about it than him.

C: 今天我的日程是，帮助卡波特大人「给粉丝回信」、「取回定制午餐」、「熨烫服装」、「给第二批粉丝回信」、「取回定制晚餐」、「给第三批粉丝回信」……
E: This is my schedule for the day: Help Master Capote reply to his fans, fetch his personalized lunch, iron clothes, reply to the second batch of his fans, fetch personalized dinner, reply to the third batch of his fans...

C: 那些在这次灾难中失去生命的人……甚至连铭牌都没能被完整保存……
E: People who've lost their lives in this disaster... Some of them didn't even have an intact nameplate left behind...

C: 闲聊也是一种休息的方式，如果你有兴趣可以再来找我——只要是和课题研究无关，我都会很乐意聊聊的。
E: Chatting is also a way of resting. Come chat with me if you are interested. I'll be very happy to talk about anything as long as it's not about research.

C: 老板真有想法呢~
E: Boss sure has some interesting ideas~

C: 「只要走在前进的道路上，就意味着不停与身后告别。孩子们，我走在引领大地上所有生灵的道路上，不能停下来。」
E: "To walk the path of progress means constantly bidding farewell to what remains behind. My children, I walk on the path of guiding all living beings on Earth, and I cannot stop."

C: 没错！瞧，你其实很有天赋，只需要多加练习、熟能生巧……
E: That's right! See, you've got real talent! You just need more practice, and you'll get the hang of it...

C: 真的吗，你真的能写好吗？
E: Really? Are you sure you can write it well?

C: 黑潮之中，竞技的英雄用他那铁饼击碎怪物的侵袭；和平的日子里，高尚的冠军愿将这光荣的象征无私分享——
E: In the black tide, the competitive hero shatters monsters' invasions with his discus. In times of peace, the noble champion generously shares this symbol of glory.

C: 特效拉满，场面震撼人心。
E: The special effects are maxed out, and the spectacle is absolutely mind-blowing.

C: 唉…真不明白，只是打个工而已，这种赔上性命的事，有什么可争抢的？
E: *sigh* ...I really don't get it. It's just a job. Why are people fighting over something that could cost them their lives?

C: 嘶…这个提议值得考虑……
E: Hmm... This idea might be worth exploring.

C: 我不是说…等等，您哪位？
E: I said... wait, who are you?

C: 同意，就这么办吧……
E: Agreed, let's do that then...

C: 那地方，正如我想象地那般神秘，幽静，深邃……
E: That place was just as mysterious, tranquil, and profound as I had imagined...

C: 「与凡人同在的『无名客』！」
E: "But rather the Nameless who dwells among mortals—"

C: 还是说，小灰只是想看烟花？这样的话，*我们*可以教你如何制作烟花呀。
E: Or are you saying that you just want to see some fireworks? If that's the case, we can teach you how to make those, Little Gray.

C: 你说，在星海里濯足是什么感觉？开玩笑的，听说宇宙可冷啦。
E: I wonder what it feels like to dip your feet in the starry sea? Just kidding, I heard the universe is freezing cold!

C: 三束光芒…如果指的不是三位生灵的话，应该就是字面意义上的光芒了。
E: Three beams of light... If it's not referring to three living beings, then it must be literal rays of light.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 关于「建立」…
E: About Establishing...

C: 陨石？
E: A meteorite?

C: 列车外壳在跃迁过程中的损坏情况……
E: The damage to the exterior of the Express during the warp jump...

C: 希望你们接下来的任务能一切顺利。对了，谢谢你能和我分享这一路的冒险。
E: Hope your mission goes smoothly. By the way, thank you for sharing all your adventures with me.

C: 拿到了拿到了，真是多亏了漆黑的虎克大人呢！
E: Yes, yes, thanks to Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 原来如此，看来是我给大人找借口了。
E: I see. It seems that I just made an excuse for adults.

C: 行，那就等你有时间吧。
E: Okay. I'll be here when you're ready.

C: 唉，如果你是我的徒弟，我大概早能退休了吧…咳，开始吧。
E: *sigh* If you were my apprentice, I probably could have retired a long time ago... Ahem, anyway, let's begin.

C: 嚯，有种！比这小子聪明多了。
E: Ha, you're gutsy! And smarter than this kid.

C: 滴、答，这里是哪啊？我…我又是谁啊？
E: Tick, tock, where is this? I... Who am I again?

C: 跟你搭个讪。
E: Just trying to flirt with you.

C: 谢谢您的关心…空间站的传闻果然是真的，您是一位有胆识又会关心别人的大好人。
E: Thanks for caring... The rumor circulating in the space station is true! You're a brave and caring person.

C: 唉，总感觉此事还有蹊跷，但我得先思考事故报告该怎么写了…希望不会演变成辞呈吧……
E: Alas, I always felt something was off, but I have to turn my attention to writing up a situation report... Hope it doesn't turn into a resignation letter...

C: 「哟，做得不错啊。本来我不抱希望的，没想到空间站还真有人能通关这个游戏。」
E: "Yo, great job. I wasn't holding my breath and didn't expect anyone from the space station could clear this game."

C: 我认识你。
E: I know you.

C: 如你所见，综合馆里现在还缺三幅同类展品——这些画作都出自大师<color=#dbc291ff>雷比尼</color>之手……
E: As you can see, three exhibits of the same category are still missing in the General Hall. They are all made by the great painter <color=#dbc291ff>Rebini</color>.

C: 我会把它们拿去清理修复一下，不久它们就会出现在展台上了。{NICKNAME}，谢谢你带来的「宝藏」。
E: I'm going to take them for cleaning and restoration. They'll be on display soon enough. {NICKNAME}, thanks for bringing me this "treasure".

C: 请你拍完之后把照片给我看看吧，拍<color=#dbc291ff>一张照片</color>应该就够用了。
E: Please show me the photo once you've taken it. <color=#dbc291ff>One photo</color> should be enough.

C: 那我们等下在<color=#dbc291ff>边缘通路</color>见！
E: Then I'll catch you at <color=#dbc291ff>Backwater Pass</color> later, then!

C: 当然可以——我们还有很多时间。
E: Of course. We have plenty of time.

C: 画中的行政区比你印象里的要大很多，或许是因为这里的很多地方你都去不了。
E: The Administrative District depicted in the painting is much larger than you remember. Maybe it's because there are many places off-limits to you.

C: 一辆贝洛伯格最常见的公共交通工具（的比例模型），经常能见到它带着「叮叮当当」的声音驶过街头。
E: A scale model of the most common form of public transport in Belobog. They can be seen all over the streets making ding-dong sounds as they pass by.

C: 七百年前对抗反物质军团时使用的行军毯，是过去铁卫们最可靠的床榻。
E: The military bedroll used <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago against the Antimatter Legion. It was the most reliable bed for the Silvermane Guards in the past.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了大矿区的大桥。
E: A work of photography that captures the bridge at the Great Mine.

C: 「她是贝洛伯格地下世界的执炬人，当之无愧的开拓者：她令贝洛伯格每一颗勇敢的心都投身于地髓开拓团的伟大事业，并在那岩层之下为坚韧的冬城人赢得了广阔的天地；」
E: "She is the torchbearer of the Belobog Underworld, a peerless pioneer. She was the reason every valorous soul in Belobog devote themselves to the great cause of the Geomarrow Development Group, and the reason our Everwinter City found expansion on the rocky underground."

C: 「在她生命的最后一刻里，这位大守护者毅然选择以其单薄的身躯对抗来自天外的、不可名状的力量。她为冬城捐躯，也终于驱散了呼啸七百年不绝的风雪。」
E: "In the final moments of her life, the Supreme Guardian chose to resist the undefinable power from beyond the clouds with her singular form. She sacrificed herself for the Everwinter City, and finally ended the snowstorm that howled for seven centuries."

C: 司辰宫里行事多有不便，但我们想邀请您到绥园，好好做个检查。
E: As it's inconvenient for us to handle this matter in the Palace of Astrum, we would like to invite you to Fyxestroll Garden for a thorough check.

C: 小妹妹，身为司舵，我早已被知会了这次岁阳灾异的来龙去脉，我知道它的特性。岁阳所生成的幻觉，我绝不会相信的……
E: Young lady, as the Helm Master, I've already been well-informed of the circumstances of the current heliobus disaster. I know its characteristics, and I will never trust the hallucinations the heliobi produce...
Ah —

C: 我把闲置的遥控人偶弄过来，等着。
E: I'll bring over a couple of idle puppets. Hold on.

C: （怎么还不来…再等一会儿吧……）
E: (What's taking so long... I'll wait a little longer...)

C: 竟、竟然一眼看穿了我的想法……
E: ...Eh-he, was it that obvious...?

C: 交给我试试吧，我不敢保证。
E: I can't make any promises, but I'll try my best.

C: 民用金人被限制，新兴的商业中心也开始冒头。金人巷就像是走在一段平缓的下坡路上——所有人都知道它江河日下，却不以为这是严重之事。
E: Restrictions were placed on civilian aurumatons, and new commercial centers began to spring up. It was like being on a gentle downhill slope — everyone knew things were changing, but no one thought it was serious.

C: 没问题。
E: Sure.

C: 那么我先离开了，你随时可以在码头上找到我。
E: I'll be off to the dock then. Stop by anytime.

C: 另外…我还是问一下吧，码头应该是能还上欠款的吧？
E: Also... I should probably ask... Do you really think we'll be able to pay back everything owed on the dock?

C: 阿丰先生…商会的目标是促进金人巷复兴，怎么会是耽误大家呢？
E: Mr. A-Feng... Our goal at the Merchant Guild is to help make Aurum Alley a better place for everyone. Why would you work against that?

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 再加上商会无力支付租金，我方认为商会应该主动放弃码头经营权，并支付额外赔偿。
E: Coupled with the Merchant Guild's inability to pay the rent, we believe the Guild should voluntarily relinquish operating rights to the dock and pay additional compensation.

C: 抱歉，现在暂时无法使用「码放货物」和「物流规划」。
E: I apologize, inventory arrangement and logistics planning are currently unavailable.

C: 即便是最辉煌的时期，金人巷的交易量也几乎是与现在持平。
E: At its peak, the old Aurum Alley had a trading volume similar to what the Alley has today.

C: 没错，如今金人巷游人数量没有达到巅峰时期的十分之一，那时金人巷车水马龙、摩肩接踵，是真正的「罗浮第一夜市」。
E: That is correct. The number of customers visiting the shops was ten times what it is today. The Alley was alive, and was credited as the best night market on the Luofu.

C: 运气好而已，多亏大家的帮助。
E: I got lucky, and it was a collective effort.

C: 我还有别的事儿。
E: I have something else to do first.

C: 金人巷！好！
E: Aurum Alley — Cool! Cooler! Coolest!

C: 我本以为解决了码头的租金问题之后，你们就打算离开了。但是你们不仅留了下来，还说服了更多的店家加入你们，最后也说服了我。
E: To my disbelief, not only did you manage the lease, but you stayed to convince others — including me — that our cause is one that is worth fighting for.

C: 原本应该是没有的，投标完就可以等定标结果了。
E: No. Usually you just submit your bid and wait for the result.

C: 公司愿意更进一步，充分开发码头的物流效应。将金人巷打造成银河闻名的商业港口。
E: The IPC seeks to unleash the full potential of the dock, taking full advantage of its role as a logistics center — thus transforming Aurum Alley into one of the most advanced commercial ports in the galaxy.

C: 现在回过神来，我总感觉金人巷太幸运了，不知道是不是我的错觉？
E: It feels surreal that everything worked out for the Alley.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 是你自己没有警惕意识，你应该多听听地衡司的反诈骗讲座。
E: It's you who wasn't vigilant enough. You should pay more attention to those anti-scam ads from the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 对对对，就是这个，你直接把病名改成「不打牌我就要死了综合症」不就成了吗？毕竟银河里有着各式各样的病症……
E: Yeah, yeah! This one! Just change my ailment to "No-Game-No-Life Syndrome" and everything will be fine? I mean, there are all sorts of weird conditions across the cosmos...

C: 你们把飞来飞去的机巧鸟也算进去了。
E: You included the delivery cycranes in your math.

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 我听小秘书说你很擅长规划成本，真的吗？
E: I heard from the secretary that you're good at budgeting — is that true?

C: 那个方向…好像是「尚滋味」的后院吧？和「寿考堂」的店面挨着的。
E: Over there... I think it's the rear courtyard of the Spices Supreme? Right beside the Longevity Hall.

C: 咳咳，好巧不巧，是咱们鹤运物流的机巧鸟。
E: Ahem, to be honest... it's one of our cycranes.
