C: 你掏出手机，向两名学生自豪展示了「小桂子Guinevere」——这个承载着你诸多珍贵回忆的网络账号。
E: You whip out your phone and proudly show off LilGuiGuinevere to the two students — an account that bears many of your precious memories.

C: 自己带领的乐队受到万众瞩目，在舞台上闪闪发光，这么想是不是轻松多啦？
E: All eyes on a band that you lead, dazzling with splendor on stage. Who wouldn't be at ease at the mere thought of that?

C: 音律•忍徒们哟，在下方才观摩了诸位的演奏——
E: Sound Ninja, I have observed your performances...

C: 恕在下直言——想要带来让忍徒们认可的祭典，诸位的音律•忍法修为还远远不够。
E: If I may be so bold — you may wish to deliver a festival that fellow ninjas will truly recognize, but your Sound Release ninjutsu is sorely lacking.

C: 我是——
E: I am...

C: 缭乱众…此番名号颇有忍者的风采，不愧是身负球棒•忍者之名的上忍。
E: Dazzling Collective... Such a name radiates with ninja countenance — you are a true advanced ninja upholding the Baseball Bat Ninja's name.

C: 既然经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}都清楚，为什么不提出反对？
E: Since {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager knows about this, why didn't you raise any objections?

C: 喂喂，经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}。我有个问题想问，就是…你和乱破小姐很熟吗？
E: Hey, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager, I have a question. Umm... are you and Rappa really close?

C: …空垃圾桶。
E: ...Empty trashcans.

C: 后续的筹办工作就交给你们了，别让全银河的观众看笑话就好。
E: We'll leave the upcoming organizational work to you. Just don't become the laughingstock of the entire Cosmos.

C: 可能是乱破大人留下来的？具体我也不太清楚…但要是盛会巨星同学收集到足够的作曲灵感，其余乐队成员或许能完成这首曲子哦。
E: Maybe Lady Rappa left it behind? I'm not too sure either... but if you can collect enough composition inspiration, the remaining band members might be able to finish the track.

C: 辛苦！我这就上传…好啦，也发一份给你吧？嘿嘿，大家都会羡慕我的。
E: Thank you! I'll just upload it... Okay, and I send it to you too? Heh-heh, I'll be the envy of everyone.

C: 嘤嘤嘤！
E: *sob in tears*

C: 怪不得…上班摸鱼这种事，当然要瞒着我了。
E: Of course... they'd need to go behind my back to goof off at work.

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，非常抱歉，我思考了很久，但觉得还是要告诉你这个决定。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} manager, I am so sorry. I thought about this for a long time, but I have to share this decision with you.

C: 现在你莫名其妙地跑出来，为我们的演出带来了风险，抢走了属于我的位置，难道还要责备我心胸狭隘吗？
E: But then you came running out of nowhere and put our performance in jeopardy. You stole my rightful role, and you are going to claim I'm narrow-minded?

C: 鱼死网破，今晚就走。
E: We'll show 'em who's boss! I quit too!

C: 把音乐说成什么忍法，把乐器叫做忍具，一点对舞台的尊重都没有…这样的学生居然能当乐队核心。
E: Talking about music like it's some kind of ninjutsu and calling instruments "ningu"... you have no respect for the stage at all. I can't believe a student like this is able to become a band leader.

C: 你不是要外出交换吗？
E: I thought you were going on an exchange?

C: 忍侠…想想看也不是没可能，毕竟我的「炽热深蹲」在健身房可是无人能敌！
E: A Ninja Hero... It's not impossible if I think about it! After all, no one can keep up with my "fire squats" in the gym!

C: 音律•狩猎即将开始，请主公还是依循惯例，去察看诸音忍的准备情况吧。
E: The Sound Hunt is about to begin. Master, as is tradition, please go and check how the other sound ninja are getting on with preparation.

C: 而我所认知的音乐概念又太过狭隘了，既忽略了听众的感受，更是将眼光局限在了学院内部，但却忘了…并非只有记录在乐谱上的才是音乐。
E: The concept of what I recognized as music was far too narrow-minded. I ignored the feelings of the listeners and limited my vision to the academy's internal beliefs. But, I forgot... that music is not just what is recorded in a score.

C: 乱破是怎么把你劝回来的?
E: How did Rappa convince you to come back?

C: 世事•无常。由于突发状况，有位音忍没法参加此次作战了。然在下向各位承诺——
E: This world is unpredictable. Due to unforeseen circumstances, one of our sound ninja is not able to join us here. However, I vow to you...

C: 就算学院要组织新的乐队，成员也只能从学生里面找。不是我吹牛啊，折纸大学里会演奏乐器的学生，我契波大人基本都认识。
E: Even if the academy is to form a new band, its members will be from within the school. I'm not one to brag, but I know pretty much everyone who plays an instrument in Paperfold University.

C: 其三：找回吉他•忍徒，聚齐「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」。
E: Third: Find Ninja Initiate Guitar and regroup Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party.

C: （将发生的事都告诉他们）
E: (Tell them all about what transpired)

C: 要是好好交涉，把登台机会让给我们的概率很大！
E: If the negotiation goes well, there's a high chance that they'll give us the opportunity to perform!

C: 就是就是！
E: No, you won't!

C: 猫头鹰老师好！
E: Hello, Professor Owl!

C: 在围观什么呢？
E: What are you all looking at?

C: 姐姐和我说过乐队的事了，上次演出的直播我也有看，非常精彩。
E: Big Sis told me about the band. I also saw the last show's stream, and it was really good.

C: 听起来很厉害…我没有学过这么复杂的知识，只是喜欢演奏而已。
E: Sounds really amazing... I've never learned any of that profound knowledge. I just like to play music.

C: 所以，找到想要的灵感了吗？
E: So did you find the inspiration you wanted?

C: 路上经历了太多磨难，总算来到你生活的地方，别让我们白跑一趟！
E: We overcame so many hardships all this way, finally arriving at the place you're living in. Don't make us come all this way for nothing!

C: 倒不是不信吧，只是觉得…乐队的表现那么好，换掉你们实在太不合理了……
E: It's not that. I just think... with the band doing so well, it makes no sense to replace you...

C: 就在这里，我们兄弟三桶，对阵你们师徒三人，非得要分出个高低，为音乐正名！
E: Right here, right now, us three brothers will face off against you three. We will settle the score and restore rightful honor to music!

C: 帕姆现在就想要！！！
E: Pom-Pom wants it right now!!!

C: {NICKNAME}，电子竞技没有永远的王朝。你在「超级开拓小子」里使用诡计赢得胜利时，可曾想到本姑娘也有卷土重来的这一天？
E: {NICKNAME}, there is no eternal domination in esports. When you executed your filthy scheme to win in the Super Trailblaze Kid, did you ever fathom the day I would rise from the ashes?

C: 看我大展身手：「一边玩儿去吧，幼儿园毕业再来说话。」
E: Time to flaunt my wordsmithery: "Go play with your toys somewhere else. Come back and comment when you've graduated from kindergarten."

C: 领航员以身作则，不浪费任何废弃的咖啡渣，值得表扬。本周的「环保之星」非你莫属了！
E: The navigator leads by example in not wasting any discarded coffee grounds. That is worth commending. This week's Environmental Star award belongs to you!

C: 的确，但诸位也了解黑塔女士的性格……
E: It is, but you also know Madam Herta's personality all too well...

C: 毕竟太危险了。我们要是自己去看，也没办法保障安全嘛。没办法的事。
E: It's too dangerous, after all. We can't ensure our own safety if we go see it ourselves. It just can't be helped.

C: 十个抢票页面是手指的上限，不是本姑娘的上限！
E: Ten ticket purchase pages may be the maximum the fingers can do, but that's not my maximum!

C: 哈哈，搞不好这是「丹轮寺」的小心思——用巨量的新鲜蔬菜劝导我们多吃素。
E: Haha, it might just be subtle persuasion from the Claretwheel Temple — using a tsunami of fresh vegetables to guide us towards the vegetarian path.

C: 小家伙，你是自愿帮我们做值日的吗？如果是，你就回答「喵喵」；如果不是，你就回答「况吾与子渔樵于江渚之上，侣鱼虾而友麋鹿，驾一叶之扁舟，举匏樽以相属」。
E: Little one, you're volunteering to help us out with Express duties, yes? If yes, reply with "meow meow." If not, reply with "The still, sad music of humanity, nor harsh nor grating, though of ample power to chasten and subdue."

C: 坚持住！
E: Just hang in there!

C: 甩一甩。
E: Shake it.

C: 花火娃娃头一歪，任你们再怎么呼唤也没有回应。这位缺乏耐心的假面愚者，大概已经对即将来到的追问环节失去了兴趣。
E: Sparkle Doll tilts its head, oblivious to all your cries to summon her. This restless Masked Fool must have already lost interest in the ensuing questions.

C: 三月七模特！
E: Model March 7th!
Hmph.

C: 竟然这么重大的意义！{NICKNAME}，这张照片一定得起个好名字。
E: So it holds such deep sentiment! {NICKNAME}, you must give this photo a great name.

C: 汪！我可是货真价实的汽水狗狗哇！
E: Woof! I'm a genuine soda doggo!

C: 看了昨天大伙的评论，我总算知道该怎么选材了。
E: After reading everyone's comments yesterday, I finally know how to pick the theme.

C: 嘿，你们这照片，拍得还真有两下子。不如就叫「蓝天守望者」吧。
E: Hey, this photo isn't bad at all. Why not name it "Guardian of the Azure Sky"?

C: {NICKNAME}老师，莫要和云璃姑娘一同胡闹！
E: {NICKNAME}, please do not join in Miss Yunli's tomfoolery!

C: 激动得说不出话了…
E: She's totally tongue-tied...

C: {NICKNAME}，我还想拍些照片留念，咱们邀请一些朋友来拍合影吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, I still want to take some shots for memories. How about we invite a few friends for a group photo?

C: 那么，你的结论是？
E: So then, what is your conclusion?

C: 处理误差，是公司和博识学会的事情，我只负责把数据转交他们。
E: Handling discrepancies is the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild's business. I'm just here to deliver the data to them.

C: 这是亵渎律法！奥赫玛公民享有正当的泡澡权利，这点在云石天宫的介绍里也有记录。再说，我是队伍的管理员，我做什么，轮得到它们来指点吗？
E: This is an affront to justice! Okheman citizens have the rightful privilege to their baths. This is also recorded in the Marmoreal Palace's introduction. Besides, I'm a squad administrator — what right do they have to criticize what I do?

C: 鼓掌——
E: *applause*

C: 不是这个意思啦。园丁们原本也是学者，他们照看小奇美拉，始终在想办法为城邦解决困难。在这里，或许我可以帮上忙。
E: I don't mean it that way. The Gardeners are scholars at heart, but they look after the chimeras and are constantly thinking of ways to resolve the city's troubles. I thought maybe there was something I could do as well.

C: 我会好好管教你的。
E: I will discipline you properly.

C: 我渴望星琼。
E: I desire Stellar Jades.

C: 只要心怀对泰坦的敬畏，任何人都能通过触碰它，浏览经卷，交流学术，同历代先贤乃至瑟希斯留下的知识产生共鸣。
E: So long as one holds reverence for the Titans, any may touch it, peruse its scrolls, engage in discourse, and resonate with the knowledge left behind by sages of old or even those left by Cerces.

C: …年轻人都忙，忙点好啊，也要记得来找大哥玩啊！
E: ...Youngsters are always busy. Being busy is nice and all, but remember to come play with me!

C: o((•ω‡= )o「…我不认识你。这对你而言，是件好事」)∋
E: o((•ω‡= )o "...I don't know you. That's a good thing for you." )∋

C: …呃。「十敌」选手这一轮惜败，{NICKNAME}选手取得胜利。刚好，另一边淘汰赛的结果也已经出来了，取得胜利的选手是——山之民的厨师达利安！
E: ...Uh, okay. Yourdei has been eliminated, and {NICKNAME} advances. And it just so happens our other match has concluded as well — and the winner is Dorian, the Mountain Dweller chef!

C: 山之民达利安将比赛资格让给我了，现在本大爷就是达利安。
E: Dorian the Mountain Dweller gave me his spot — now I am Dorian.

C: 休想让我在活动里跑图！
E: No way am I doing map traversal during an event!

C: {NICKNAME}，现在不是闲聊的时候，「豹豹碰碰大作战」全部的希望都在你身上，一定要击败那位盗贼啊！
E: {NICKNAME}, no time for chit-chat. The hopes of "Seal Slammers" rest entirely on you. You have to defeat that thief!

C: 那是一场战争进程和结局的<color=#dbc291ff>预言</color>。雄鹰代表着联军，母鹿和幼崽代表敌人及其盟友，乌鸦则象征着战争的残酷和不确定性。
E: That dream was a <color=#dbc291ff>prophecy</color> of the course and outcome of a war. The eagle represented the allied forces, the doe and her fawn represented the enemies and their allies, and the crows symbolized the cruelty and unpredictability of war.

C: 教学关是吧？我懂了。
E: Time for another tutorial stage, right? Got it.

C: 这是你的梦，不是泡泡的梦。
E: This dream is yours only.

C: …我会变成一只可爱的小海豹！
E: ...That I'll turn into an adorable baby seal!

C: 这要清理起来得多麻烦啊，千万别再添堵了。
E: This is going to be a headache to clean up. Please don't make it worse.

C: 破誓是有代价的…
E: Vowbreakers will be punished...

C: 该死！上了小贼的当。拜托了，{NICKNAME}，一定要把达利安的徽章追回来啊！
E: Darn it! I fell for the sneaky thief's trick. Please, {NICKNAME}, you've got to get Dorian's badge back!

C: 太感人了！为了泡泡的良苦用心，我们举办一场隆重的转队发布会吧。赛飞儿大人，到时候我会准备好赝品，这个机会就交给你了。
E: How touching! In light of Bubbles's efforts, let's hold a grand press conference for the team transfer. Lady Cipher, I'll have prepared a replica by then. We'll leave the switch to you.

C: 哈！不瞒你说，这台机器安装了业务巩固部的「截稿日辅助处理系统」。在你玩的同时，它会<color=#dbc291ff>搜集你们过去的开拓经历</color>，发给我当作参考。
E: Ha! Truth is, it's got the Business Consolidation Department's "Deadline Assistant Processing System." It <color=#dbc291ff>captures your past Trailblazing experiences</color>, sending them to me for reference.

C: 对于一位愚者而言，人们的欢笑可是最诚挚的赞许与认可。
E: For a Fool, the laughter of people is the sincerest form of recognition.

C: 哦…你提醒我了，我这就去联系法务部——
E: Oh... you've reminded me. I'll contact legal right away —

C: 为了增加游戏的代入感，我们在正式版中使用了最新的梦境技术，能够在玩家的潜意识中「打捞」出一些印象深刻的碎片，并以此为原型生成怪物或关卡。
E: To enhance the immersion, we've used the latest Dreamscape tech in the official version, which allows us to "extract" deep impressions from the player's subconscious and use them to create monsters or stages.

C: 黑斗篷结界（低配版）——启动！
E: Black Cloak Zone (low-end edition) — Activate!

C: 「巡海大鲨鱼」号究竟发生了什么？
E: What happened to Sea Hunter Shark?

C: 就是这车吧，也不知道怎么改造的——它加装了脉冲炮，攻击性很强就算了，还自带「技能语音」，希望您不要介意。
E: It's this car, right? I don't know what modifications it has, but — it's got a pulse cannon, which is pretty aggressive, and it even has sounds for the ability. Hope you don't mind.

C: 这…报名系统是公司制作的，我们也没有权限，实在抱歉。
E: Uh... the registration system is run by the IPC, and we don't have access to it. Sorry about that.

C: （{NICKNAME}，要小心神秘仙舟力量啊！）
E: ({NICKNAME}, be careful about that Xianzhou mysticism!)

C: 哈，不愧是您，换作是我的话，我就不行，像有些球笼赛车底盘太低，我这腰可顶不住……
E: Ha, I knew you'd say that. If it were me, though, I'd be in trouble. Some of those Spheroid racers have such low chassis that I wouldn't be able to handle it...

C: {NICKNAME}贵宾，等一下！我有件紧急事项要向您汇报。
E: {NICKNAME}, please hold on. I have an urgent matter for you.

C: 我太懂她了…不急，跟她耍耍。
E: I know her too well... No rush, let's play along with her.

C: 您没事吧！我看到您的赛车跟着那辆「专业代打」开出去，就、就赶过来了。
E: Are you alright? I saw your race car follow that Professional Substitute out, so I... I rushed over!

C: …看来只能照着小鸟说的做了呢。
E: I guess we'd better do exactly what the bird wants.

C: 乱破…你应该不会变成小鸟。
E: Rappa... You're probably not going to become a bird.

C: 它说「如果我战胜了你，我将抽取你的灵魂，将你变成折纸小鸟。」
E: It said, "Had I defeated you, I would have claimed your soul and turned you into an Origami Bird."

C: 啾啾！
E: Tweet tweet!

C: 别啾啦！江湖救急！！性命攸关！！！
E: Stop tweeting! This is a full-blown emergency! Lives are on the line!!!

C: {F#你这小姑娘}{M#你小子}记得忙完了多陪藿藿她们玩，别以为我们大老远跑来一趟就是帮你们解决问题的，你还是先想想打算怎么招待我们吧！
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, once you're done with your errands, make sure to spend some time with Huohuo and the others! Don't think we traveled all this way just to fix your mess. We're expecting proper hospitality, you hear?

C: 只要，接入？现代词语还真让人不习惯。只要接入「圣杯」，就能在梦泡里重现匹诺康尼的「圣杯战争」。
E: As long as... you "connect"? It's still hard to get used to the modern terminology. Anyway, as long as you connect to the Holy Grail, you can relive the Penaconian Holy Grail War in this dream bubble.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，斯科特先生，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}多半是来找我算账的。
E: Hohoho, Mr. Skott, I'd wager {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} is here to settle a score with me.

C: 没问题！不过，角色池是什么？是和入梦池差不多的东西吗？
E: Absolutely! Though, what exactly is a character pool? Is it something like the Dreampools?

C: 投资持股考虑一下？
E: Interested in becoming an investor?

C: <size=28>举起手来小可爱们，送惊喜来了！</size>
E: <size=28>Put your hands up, muddle-fudgers! Special delivery!</size>

C: （记得配方里有份题为「情商」的调饮，或许能改善他的教育方式。）
E: (I recall there's a drink recipe named "Emotional Intelligence." Maybe it could help with his teaching style.)

C: （趁素裳打盹的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
E: (While Sushang's napping, might as well name the drink.)

C: 哼，真是精打细算呢！
E: Hmph, quite the penny-pincher, aren't you!

C: 相比于小白鼠，我更习惯当掌控一切的观察者。请吧，你可以让人偶再试试。
E: I prefer being the all-seeing observer over being a test subject. Go ahead, you can let the puppet try again.

C: 你说的这位大君，它是人吗？
E: This Overlord you're talking about... Is it even human?

C: 在匹诺康尼怎么能少了苏乐达呢。经典永不过时。
E: How could you not mention SoulGlad in Penacony? A timeless classic.

C: 真扫兴，不是谁都有机会喝到花火大人的特调哦~
E: Boo, you're no fun! Not everyone gets to taste a Sparkle original~

C: 不管那么多，先开张吧！
E: No point worrying about it. Let's open for business!

C: 哦，多么有大作潜质的名字呀！
E: Oh, what a masterpiece-worthy name!

C: 你邀请花火品尝调饮……
E: You invite Sparkle for a drink...

C: 怎么又是这样？
E: This again?

C: 都叫古代遗迹了，那当然是古代人造的呗。
E: We call it the ancient ruins because some ancient people built them.

C: 想必你已经熟悉遗迹中的环境了，更深处的区域宝物也会更多，但肯定更危险。
E: You probably get how ruins work now. All the best ruins are down there in the depths — but it's also more dangerous the deeper you go.

C: 你讲完了，西衍先生也神色一喜——这老小子和牌了。
E: You finally finish telling your story, and Mr. Xiyan looks pretty pleased, too — this old fox has apparently played a winning hand.

C: 这又是现编的吗？
E: You're just making it all up as you go, aren't you?

C: 这样塑造一个典型人物，观众老爷们也更容易情感代入，是这个道理吧？
E: Creating archetypes like this makes it easier for our audience to become emotionally involved. How about it?

C: 「一番际遇——丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝！持明族的新任首领，由此横空出世！」
E: "As fate would dictate — Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe! The new leader of the Vidyadhara has been reborn!"

C: 哎呀，这样一来，这折子戏也算是完成了……
E: Ah, if we put it like that, then this act will be complete too...

C: 我觉得吧，这个故事还缺乏一点更精彩的冒险。作为一个从业多年的老戏骨，我个人有一些建议。
E: I feel like this story is lacking for scintillating adventure. As an old theater hound, I've got a few pointers if you'd like to hear.

C: 这一击，贯穿星辰？
E: Will this blow pierce through the stars?

C: 这故事还有什么是不可以的？
E: Is there anything that can't happen in this story?

C: 恶党，纳命来吧！
E: Evildoers, meet thy maker!

C: 也是好事。像你这种局外人，没办法对我的整个大局造成影响……
E: But that's fine. An outsider like you has no way of interfering with my master plan...

C: （征得他们的录音授权）
E: (Ask their permission to make recordings.)

C: 太好啦！先前只听说过星核猎手的那位小姑娘有着这套技术——这次说不定能近距离观摩一下。
E: Awesome! I've heard that Stellaron Hunter girl uses this kind of tech — maybe we can see it in action.

C: 面具怪人——还不快快报上名来！
E: Yo, mask-face, introduce yourself.

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 你看你看，小家伙有反应了！看来它也很喜欢这个名字～
E: Look, look! They're reacting — seems like they really like this name!

C: 祝各位享受这场庆典——我们下一站再见，{M#英俊的先生和美丽的小姐}{F#两位美丽的小姐}！
E: I wish you all a memorable festival! Farewell for now, dear friends.

C: 哈，感觉已经热血沸腾起来了…我一定会把资格徽章赢到手的！
E: Hah, I can feel the adrenaline rushing through my veins... That Mastery Mark is mine!

C: 哼哼！哼！
E: Oink, oink, oink!

C: 看到那边厢墙壁上的<color=#dbc291ff>纹样</color>了不？只要用玉兆留影器记录场地里的全部纹样，咱就能见到那位冠军候补啦——
E: See the <color=#dbc291ff>markings</color> on the wall over there? All you need to do is use the Jade Abacus's image recorder to capture all of them, and you'll be able to reach this zone's contender...

C: 那么，出发吧！目的地是<color=#dbc291ff>「空间站『黑塔』的决胜乐园」</color>！
E: Come on, let's head to our next destination — <color=#dbc291ff>Herta Space Station Victory Zone</color>!

C: 调用完成——请操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」引发爆炸，驱散捣乱的员工——
E: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

C: 可、可恶…既然这样，我也不和你们硬碰硬了！
E: Fine, if that's the case then I'm outta here... Do whatever you want!

C: …能不能别这么自恋？
E: Could we tone down the narcissism just a tad?

C: 像这样子玩游戏，让我感觉自己仿佛也变年轻了......
E: Playing games like this makes me feel like I'm young again...

C: 就让你们尝尝我们的厉害！
E: Here's a taste of our full strength!

C: 入场。
E: I wish to enter.

C: 我刚才正在观众席附近巡逻——这次的庆典在贝洛伯格引起了很大的轰动…这种场合最容易发生意外，必须有人时刻盯着才行。
E: I've been keeping an eye on the crowds — this festival has created quite the buzz in Belobog... Accidents tend to happen in these situations, so it's crucial to have someone keeping an eye out at all times.

C: 当然是我们先前聊到过不少次的那件事……
E: Why, only what we've talked about many times before, of course...

C: 咦？怎么还有挑战？
E: Huh, another challenge?

C: 你一定会回来看我们的……！
E: ...I knew you'd come back to see us!

C: 会不会是看错了？
E: Maybe they were seeing things.

C: 多谢十王司为我考虑。我虽不擅长对付妖魔鬼怪，但岁阳逃逸，祸及仙舟黎庶，身为将军的我责无旁贷。
E: I appreciate the Ten-Lords Commission having such high regard for my welfare. It is true I am rather inexperienced when it comes to heliobi, but as general of the Luofu, I cannot look on while these fugitive creatures wreak havoc on the populace.

C: （尝试踢门）
E: (Try to kick the door down.)

C: 哈哈，有点怕你信不过她。总而言之不会有问题的，小桂子在她擅长的领域可是无敌的。
E: Haha, I'm worried you don't trust her plan. Just relax — Little Gui is unbeatable in her area of expertise.

C: 来都来了…
E: Well, since I'm already here...

C: 持节将兵，最重要的是对胜败的直觉。而各位令我有必胜的信心。
E: The most important thing in a soldier is one's intuition for victory or defeat. And you have given me confidence in victory.

C: 它们索偿此债，永世不忘。腾骁将军与燎原的大战，多半也是为此而起。
E: They hold claim to this debt for all time. The great battle between General Teng Xiao and Ignamar was fought largely for this reason.

C: 浮鼬飞起来灵活的很，而且警觉，身手再好也很难抓住。
E: Sky minks fly so nimbly and are so alert that even the quickest of hands will have a hard time catching them.

C: 每次看到粉丝数蹭蹭往上跳，我就兴奋得睡不着，比喝下什么浓茶咖啡都管用。
E: Every time I see our follower count increase, I get so excited I can't even sleep — it works better than any kind of tea or coffee.

C: 你们看，符太卜站在穷观阵的中心，她在做什么？
E: Look, Diviner Fu is standing at the center of the Matrix of Prescience... what is she doing?

C: （一语不发地陷入沉默）
E: (Fall into silence)

C: 时来天地皆同力，运去英雄不自由……
E: When times are good, heaven and earth work in harmony. When times are bad, even heroes struggle for freedom...

C: 她一直都心事重重的。
E: It seems like there's something weighing on her mind lately.

C: 藿藿不见了，你这坏东西一定知道点什么，对吧！
E: Huohuo is missing, and I'm willing to bet you know something about it!

C: 所以，只要让本大爷附身藿藿，把另一个碍事的家伙给吃了，就没问题了吧？
E: Hmm... So all I have to do is possess Huohuo and take out those other pesky heliobi... right?

C: 没错。要说现在谁能令它真正溃败的话，也只有那个人了……
E: Exactly. And If there's anyone who can cause Cirrus to shatter, it's him...

C: 浮烟战意瓦解，已不再能成为祸患。看来这里事情已经解决，我也该回去了。
E: Cirrus's will to fight has been shattered — they can no longer pose a threat. Considering that everything here is now under control, I'll take my leave.

C: 镇妖塔——绥园中「束形却邪阵」的一部分，用来镇伏岁阳的收容装置。
E: The Suppression Tower — part of Fyxestroll Garden's "Evil Binding Matrix" — is a containment receptacle used to restrain heliobi.

C: 别！别看我，求你了…转过身去……
E: No! Don't look at me, please... turn around...

C: 跃迁<unbreak>10</unbreak>次
E: Make <unbreak>10</unbreak> Warps

C: 这是对时间和人生价值的双重浪费！在宇宙的另一边，比你短寿的人在垂直领域采用复用打法达成持久收益，他们终日奋斗，远比你更努力！
E: This is a waste of both time and life! Across the universe, there are people with shorter lifespans than yourselves in parallel dimensions that use and reuse methods for lasting gains. They work day-in-day-out and work far harder than you ever will!

C: 小了，各位，格局小了。你们以为我在和你们谈钱吗？不，不是，不只是这样！
E: Too small, you're all thinking too small! You think I am talking to you about money? No, it's much more than that!

C: 瞧见这队伍了吗？想见青总的人已经从这儿直接排到金人巷的尽头了。去旁边取个号，等着吧。
E: Do you see this queue? The line of people that wish to meet with President Qing already stretches all the way from here to Aurum Alley. Go, take a number and wait.

C: 什么，快些提起诉讼，我要告他们侵权！
E: What? File a lawsuit, now! I'm suing them for copyright infringement!

C: 咱们现在就出发！
E: Let's head off!

C: 刃的通缉令是不是也可以？
E: What about a wanted poster for Blade?

C: 断裂的云骑阵刀轻松裁开了封箱胶带，你从箱子里杂物中找到了一把钥匙。
E: The broken Cloud Knights' devastator glaive easily tears through the packing tape, and you obtain a key from the various items inside.

C: 我叫你的名字，你敢答应吗？
E: If I call your name, do you dare to respond?

C: …有了拓片纸，是不是可以在石砖上拓下些什么？
E: ...With this rubbing paper, maybe we can try tracing the message on the stone?

C: 真的假的？
E: Seriously!?

C: …这种气息好熟悉…你是岁阳！
E: ...This stench seems familiar... Why, you're a heliobus!

C: 那怎么好意思啊…我也不过是想暂时寄居个几天，用你们的身体吃吃喝喝，休养一下，没这么麻烦。
E: The nerve... I'd just be temporarily borrowing it for a couple of days, using your body to eat and drink and rest a bit. It's no big deal.

C: 可是…且不说她的朋友愿不愿意看到一个魔阴身朝自己走来。她自己也不想以这般模样去见朋友吧？
E: But... that's not to mention whether or not her friend wants to meet up with the mara-struck. She doesn't want her friend to see her like this, right?

C: 嚣张的岁阳不再逃窜，回到了地面上……
E: The arrogant heliobus stops fleeing and returns to the ground...

C: 只是想玩玩而已。你要是被关在炉子里，你也会无聊到闲出屁来。
E: I'm just out to have fun. If you're the one being locked in the furnace, you'll find ways to escape from that boring place too.

C: 你好，我是十王司的藿藿，你刚才有没有遇到什么…嗯，奇怪的事？
E: Greetings. I am Huohuo from the Ten-Lords Commission. Did you meet any... uh, strange occurrence?

C: 岁阳的火焰…应该不怕水吧？
E: Can the flame of a heliobus... be extinguished by water?

C: 唔，这里发生的事情还历历在目。
E: Hmm, what happened here is still fresh in my mind.

C: 咳咳，职业病了抱歉。我们在这儿随便逛逛，你呢？
E: Ahem, sorry. Call me a workaholic or something. We're just strolling around here. How about you?

C: {NICKNAME}！之前骗我们出来的那个小女孩啊，我那个未成年的粉丝记得吗？
E: {NICKNAME}! Do you remember that girl who tricked us into coming out last time? That fan of mine who was still a minor?

C: …简单来说就是它们身上所散发的「食物香味」，会影响人类的感知，比如说——
E: ...Basically, the "food flavors" they radiate can affect human perception. For example...

C: 所以科员们针对「小怪物」的腺体，制作了一项专项测试，旨在计算出所有潜在风险。
E: So the researchers put together a special test for these critters' glands to calculate all of the potential risks.

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}，我知道你也很忙。但其他无名客…事发突然，我就第一时间来联系你了。
E: Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I know you're busy, but another Nameless... Everything happened so quickly that I just called you as soon as I could.

C: 相关情况我已上报给艾丝妲站长，远程通讯已连接，接下来请开启「生命烘焙箱」，我们要进行一次大胆的试验——
E: I have reported the details to Lead Researcher Asta, and a remote connection is now established. Please turn on the Lifeform Oven. We are going to try a few things out...

C: 很抱歉，这点我们也不是很清楚。不过界种科送了两只特别的造物过来，你可以利用它们进行培育实验。
E: I'm sorry, this is not well understood. However, the Department of Ecology has sent two creation species that you can use for nurturing research.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 在庭审中，越来越多的证据被提出，布洛妮娅证言的真实性开始得到验证。如果按照正常的审判流程，临时军事法庭应该能在几个月内得出结论。
E: During the trial, evidence mounted up and the veracity of Bronya's claims started to become verified. Were normal procedures to be followed, a provisional military court should be able to reach a deliberation within a few months or so.

C: …你到底是有多害怕舒翁啊。
E: ...Just how much are you afraid of Siobhan?

C: 说得好！看看，我捡回来的调饮师都这么有涵养，仆从们，都学着点啊！
E: Well said! Look, even the drinksmith I took in is well-cultured. Learn from her, my servants!

C: 行呀。人家要出题了哦——「你能不能…再表演一下那个？」
E: Alright, I'm going to ask you to do this. Can you... perform that trick again?
...That trick?

C: …滚出去。
E: ...Get out.

C: 至少到目前，我的思想无比清晰。
E: At least my mind has been unclouded so far.

C: 喏。你要的饮品，绝对符合要求。
E: Here you go, exactly what you asked for.

C: 好嘞！万众瞩目！到底是大还是大，大还是大呢……
E: Alright. All eyes are on the table! Is it big, or is it big...?

C: 若是家族势太甚~咱就卷铺盖走人~莫要乞求莫担忧，饿肚皮也好过把气受~
E: We'll just pack up and leave if The Family is too powerful~ There's no need to beg or worry. Better to be hungry than angry~

C: 哈！快乐就是如此来之不易，才分外值得珍惜。可我却一口就将它饮尽！
E: Hah! Happiness is an elusive treasure, one that needs cherishing, but I drank it all in a single gulp!

C: 愿我们能在有光的地方再次相遇。
E: May we meet again where there is light.

C: …都没有什么僻静的，可以用来约会的地方，好苦恼。
E: ...It's so frustrating. I can't find a good spot for a date.

C: 当然不行！这儿的熟人可太多了，还随时会有顾客闯进来。太难为情了！
E: No way! There are too many acquaintances here, and customers could walk in any minute. It's too embarrassing!

C: 和您聊天的感觉真畅快。在人家看来，您作为调饮师的魅力不会输舒翁太多，很厉害啦。
E: It was nice talking to you. In my opinion, you're almost as great a drinksmith as Siobhan. Impressive, indeed.

C: 你知道吗，我们是没法相互理解的。再怎么努力交流，终究会形同陌路。
E: You know, we can't understand each other. Despite our efforts to communicate, our paths are destined to remain apart.

C: 没什么意思，还是算了吧。
E: No, I don't. Let's just forget it.

C: 哎，可人家偏偏想要讲给您听，倾听客人的话不是调饮师的职责嘛，懈怠工作的话，人家要去向舒翁告状了。
E: Even so, I still want to tell you. Isn't it part of a drinksmith's job to listen to your customers? If you slack off, I might have to file a complaint with Siobhan.

C: 但又是胆怯，又是难为情的，很多话到嘴边，好几次都硬生生咽回去了。唉。
E: But then again, I'm too timid, and those words get stuck in my throat, and swallowed back. *sigh*

C: 春宵苦短啊！
E: Don't make decisions you'll regret!
Phew...

C: 你在这工作也有段时间了，是怎么看待这些怪物的？
E: You've been working here for a while. So, what do you think of those monsters?

C: 这是你现在的想法么？
E: Is that what you are thinking now?

C: 这是我对美的追求，请您谅解！
E: Please pardon me! It's my pursuit of beauty.

C: 那个蠢货很快就会过来，最后给您个忠告——和它交流，要引它说出真正的想法！
E: That fool will be here soon. Here's a piece of advice: When you're talking to them, try to make them reveal their true thoughts!

C: 看你这傻样，还是告诉你吧。是<color=#dbc291ff>纸月亮</color>。这次可别弄错了。
E: Look at how foolish you are... I'll just tell you. It's <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Don't get it wrong this time.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 你是真的很在乎这家酒吧。
E: You really care about this lounge.

C: 没有彻底的解决办法吗？
E: Can't we resolve this problem once and for all?

C: 就到这吧。你也累了，好好休息。这条路还很长，也会比你预想得更加艰难。
E: That's all for now. You must be tired too. Get some rest. The road ahead is long, and it'll be tougher than you expect.

C: 那小星星会发狂也是…
E: So that's why Starlet became frenzied...?

C: 你看起来好累的样子，有什么我能帮忙的哇？
E: You look pretty tired. Is there anything I can help with?

C: 这样吗，但我也根本不在乎你怎么想的哇！
E: Oh, is that so? But I don't care what you think anyway!

C: …你也挺疯的。
E: ...You are pretty nuts too.

C: 准备开始正式的说唱表演吧！
E: Prepare to begin the rapping performance proper!

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 噢，差点忘了，要是客人们满意的话，我会按工作量给你付酬劳的。待遇包你满意。
E: Oh, I almost forgot. I'll pay you based on your workload if the customers are happy. The pay will satisfy you for sure.

C: 就这？本想对他的节目指点一二，但你忙着去找他的宝箱，还是算了。
E: Is that it? I wanted to give him some advice on his show, but you were too busy searching for his treasure chest, so forget it.

C: 猎犬的误判吗？看来上头的人手确实不够。
E: Did the Bloodhounds miscalculate? Looks like they're really understaffed.

C: 你将翡翠小鸟摆放在街机上
E: You place the Jadebird on the arcade machine

C: 一切都是「开拓」的选择。
E: Everything is the Trailblaze's choice.

C: 那位勇者肩负着打败魔王、拯救公主的使命，四处冒险、走遍了大陆的每一个角落。
E: Tasked with the duty of vanquishing the demon lord and rescuing the princess, the hero walked every corner of the land, going on adventure after adventure.

C: 对我怎么不见你这么谦虚，待会先来与我大战三百回合！
E: You're just pretending to be humble. Later, let's have a one-on-one battle!

C: 完美！非常完美——好啦，那么眼看着本次测试就要接近尾声了，诸位要不要一起拍照留个纪念？
E: Perfect! Utterly perfect... Alright, seeing as the test is coming to an end, shall we take a group photo to commemorate this moment?

C: 你说那场「邀请赛」？为什么突然问起这个？
E: Are you referring to the invitational match? Why bring this up all of a sudden?

C: 巧了嘿，我也认识这么个剑客…
E: Interesting. I know a blade master who does that too.

C: 不许走！他不讲武德，偷袭我！我们这道理还没说清楚呢！
E: Don't go! He has no honor. He ambushed me! We haven't sorted this out yet!

C: 非常感谢，那只梦貘对我很有帮助，这些天睡眠质量变好了很多……
E: Thank you. That tuskpir has been helpful, and my sleep quality has improved a lot...

C: 呃…卢卡选手最近因为一些捕风捉影的传闻，受到了部分粉丝的敌视。
E: Ah... Luka has been subjected to some baseless hostility from a segment of his fans.

C: 托帕小姐，请留步！你…为什么要帮我解决麻烦？
E: Miss Topaz, wait! Why are you helping me solve these troubles?

C: 但要是我拒绝了他的挑战，恐怕要落个拳台上不战而逃的名声，被这位铄金先生当作大肆宣传的材料。
E: But if I refuse his challenge, I'll likely earn infamy for fleeing the ring without a fight, which Shuojin will surely use as propaganda.

C: 活动还没开始吗？
E: Has the event not started yet?

C: 还有其他办法吗？
E: Is there any other way?

C: 按照公开的说法，数千台「权杖」被学士们愚蠢的问题占满，耗尽算力，变成如今任人拍照打卡的景点，飘浮在宇宙中的垃圾。
E: According to the official report, thousands of Scepters were flooded by foolish questions from scholars, exhausting their computational power. Now, they have become mere photo-op spots for everyone, floating in space like debris.

C: 提问：这个「不可知域」是一个不经意的巧合？如蝴蝶扇动翅膀。还是一个圈套？邀你我跌落其间。
E: Question: Is this Unknowable Domain an accidental coincidence? Like a butterfly flapping its wings? Or is it a trap, luring us into its abyss?

C: 不对劲…我怎么还有点小期待呢？
E: Something's off... Why am I looking forward to this?

C: 我是一台古老的调饮机器人，由{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}修复。如今待在派对车厢，为各位调饮。
E: I am an antique robot drinksmith. My {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#} repaired me. I now work in the Party Car, mixing drinks for passengers.

C: 请不要表扬{F#她}{M#他}帕！
E: Hmph. Don't go encouraging {F#her}{M#him}!

C: 停停停，别做白日梦了！请你好好选择！
E: Enough, enough! Stop daydreaming and start thinking about your answer!

C: 稍等，现在还有别的事。
E: Hold on. I've got something else I need to do.

C: 你已经喝了4、5杯果汁了。这东西看似健康，但糖分很高的。黑咖啡没有糖分，还能改善消化系统环境，对身体很好的。喝一杯吧～
E: You've already had 4 or 5 glasses of juice. It may seem healthy, but it's actually high in sugar. Black coffee has no sugar and can improve your digestive system, making it good for your health. Have a cup!

C: （下一步，就装修玄关吧……）
E: (Next, let's decorate the entryway...)

C: 哼哼，{NICKNAME}乘客，有没有发现帕姆今天有什么不同？
E: Hmm, Passenger {NICKNAME}, have you noticed anything different about Pom-Pom today?

C: 用来看剧。
E: To watch shows.

C: 这收藏间不算小，能摆上不少纪念品。但如果没有随时保持规整的好习惯，即便收藏空间再大，也会在不知不觉间被慢慢堆满。
E: The collection room isn't small. It can hold a lot of memorabilia. But without the habit of keeping it tidy, even the largest space will gradually fill up with clutter.

C: {NICKNAME}，你更喜欢哪一种？
E: {NICKNAME}, which one do you prefer?

C: 诶诶诶？原来只是广告推销的说辞吗！
E: Eh? So it's just an advertising pitch!

C: 虽然房间建好了，但以后也要好好值日帕！列车也该启程了，要准备的事情还非常多呢！
E: Even though your room is set up, you must remember to keep up with your duties! The Express will be departing soon and there's still so many things to do!

C: 嚯，这里的空间真宽阔，比起如今的圣城都不遑多让啊。
E: Oh. It's really quite spacious here. In fact, it's comparable to the size of the holy city as it is nowadays.

C: 或许将来的某天，人们会回到故土，新生的孩子会知晓我们的一切、并在刻字石板前流泪…但我再也无法看到。
E: Perhaps someday, people will return to my birthplace once more, and newborn children will learn all about us and weep before this inscribed slate... Alas, I will not be around to witness such a scene.

C: 我听遐蝶说了，你初抵奥赫玛时曾与大地兽游戏甚欢。被大地兽所喜爱的都不是坏人。
E: Castorice mentioned you had a great time with the dromases when you first got to Okhema. Anyone the dromases like is a good person in my book.

C: 最强、最劲、最具传奇色彩的大地兽。它是所有大地兽的牧人，会带领生灵们走向更美好的未来…咳，多余的修辞就不赘述了。
E: The strongest, mightiest, most legendary of dromas-kind. The shepherd to all dromases, guiding all beings toward a better future... *Ahem* Let's leave it at that.

C: 欸？听起来好可怕……
E: Oh? That name sounds a bit scary...

C: 我懂了…下次是不是要给小海豹起名叫圆奇美拉？
E: I get it... Next time, should we name the baby seal "Round Chimera"?

C: 「乌拉诺斯」。
E: "Uranus."

C: 呜嗡！（带它长大！）
E: Grumph! (Raise me up!)

C: 「肌肉的质量」，这是曳石学派的术语。要是灰宝觉得不太好记的话，就理解成「力量」吧。
E: "Muscle constitution," it's a term from Helkolithism. If that's confusing, just think "Strength."

C: 那么，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大就托付给灰宝你啦！
E: Well then, I'm leaving Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas in your hands, Grayie!

C: 别担心，我从来就没考过试。
E: Don't worry. I've never taken a single test.

C: 大哥，你谁呀？
E: Yo bro, who do you think you are?

C: 阁下居然能猜出我们的组织架构！不过旅团的训练师等级最高只到「兽皇」，在我之下还有「兽师」和「兽者」…咳咳，扯远了。
E: You actually figured out our organizational structure? Impressive! Though the highest trainer rank in the troupe only goes up to "Beast Emperor," with "Beast Master" and "Beast Wielder" below me... Ahem, I'm getting off track.

C: 呜嗡！（没错，我会成为最强最劲的超•极•大地兽口牙……）
E: Grumph! (Absolutely! I'll be the greatest Super Dromas ever...)

C: 呜嗡嗡。（做梦而已，发生什么我都不会相信的。）
E: Grumphhhh. (It's just a dream. I wouldn't believe anything that happens anyway.)

C: 只要你一直在前进，道路就会不断延伸。所以，不要停止长大啊——
E: As long as you keep moving forward, the path will keep stretching ahead. So don't stop growing—

C: 其实在你出生之前，我就确信我家的孩子一定会闯祸，准备了两千万利衡币的赔偿款。
E: Even before you were born, I was confident my kid would stir up troubles, so I set aside <unbreak>20</unbreak> million Balance Coins for compensation purposes.

C: 它讲了什么？
E: What's it saying?

C: 我会不断成长下去，直到成为像{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}那样强大的英雄！
E: I'll keep growing stronger until I become a great hero like {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!

C: 来啦。
E: Here I come!

C: 您碰瓷？
E: Are you faking an injury?

C: 这位客人，您在这听了这么久，是对鉴宝感兴趣？
E: Dear guest, you've been observing for a while now. Are you interested in learning about artifact appraisal?

C: 哈哈哈，研究古玩很容易上瘾的，有什么需要的？
E: Ha, studying ancient artifacts is addictive, isn't it? Anything else you need?

C: 神秘人的笑点也很神秘！我们试了好几遍，战斗上表现越出色，越能使神秘人笑出声来！
E: Their sense of humor is just as mysterious! We tried several times, and the better our combat performance, the more likely it is to get them burst out laughing.

C: 那么，祝你玩得开心！
E: Well then, have fun!

C: 请给我更多糕点吧！
E: I beg you, give me more pastries!

C: 喵！我最喜欢和大家一起玩了，热热闹闹的，最后「砰」的一下——多有趣呀！
E: Meow! I love playing with everyone! It's so lively and fun, and then BOOM! Isn't that just awesome!?

C: 不过说实话我们也不太清楚这里面究竟是什么…只是按照您的战斗风格与习惯，进行了针对性的优化与微调。
E: Honestly, we're not entirely sure what's inside... we just optimized and tweaked it based on your combat style and routines.

C: 平平无奇的怪物和熟人。
E: Just some ordinary monsters and familiar faces.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>特地前来迷路迷境，帮助妖精们重建荒废的餐馆。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>For coming to Membrance Maze, to help the fairies rebuild our long-abandoned restaurant.</color>

C: 何出此言？明明几分钟前，我们还在一起。
E: Whatever do you mean? It was just a few minutes ago that we were together.

C: 确实呢，要是菜单总不更新，客人们很快也会吃腻的。
E: Absolutely. If we don't keep updating the menu, the guests will get tired of the same old dishes.

C: 身为主管，我需要依照你的想法制定经营方案。
E: As the supervisor, I'll need to plan accordingly based on your direction.

C: 哀丽秘榭社区食堂。
E: Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen.

C: 如何？若是决定了，我就记入档案里。
E: Well? If that's your final choice, I'll make it official.

C: 就用这个。
E: Let's go with that.

C: 如何？若是决定了，我就记入档案里。
E: Well? If that's your final choice, I'll make it official.

C: 太好了！
E: Yes!

C: 刚开业的餐馆，能提供如此美味的菜品实属难得。可以看出，{NICKNAME}阁下的管理无疑很出色。
E: For a newly opened restaurant to offer cuisine of this quality is rare. Clearly, your management has been outstanding, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 但…我有个疑问。为何菜单上全都是沙拉呢？
E: However... I do have one question. Why is the menu entirely made up of salads?

C: 辛苦啦。小凯撒会给你记加班！
E: You've done great. Little Imperator will mark you down for overtime!

C: 你们可得好好干啊。
E: Better bring your A-game, everyone.

C: 料理的殿堂，太美丽了！迷！
E: A culinary paradise! It's so beautiful! Mem!

C: 作为店长不能有偏袒…
E: As the owner of this restaurant, I must remain neutral...

C: 没关系。忙完后，来找我就好。
E: No worries. Just come find me when you're done.

C: 不许欺负妖精，要照常给它们回报哦！好啦，小风堇的发言结束，下一个会是谁呢？
E: No taking advantage of the fairies! Make sure they're properly rewarded! Alright, that's Cinny's turn. Who's up next?

C: 你不是假扮了妖精评审员嘛？
E: Weren't you the one who posed as a fairy food critic?

C: 哈哈哈！对对！就这个，最好玩了！
E: Hahaha! Yes, yes! That was hands down the most fun!

C: 「甜蜜蜜节」就要结束啦。究竟谁做的菜更甜，还是没能得出结论呢。
E: The Sweetie Festival is almost over. And we still haven't figured out whose dish was the sweetest.

C: 考试，通过了。小妖精，也很喜欢！
E: Test passed. The fairies are very pleased!

C: 「餐馆主管」一职目前归在我名下。此外，金织爵也会做些辅助工作。
E: The role of the Restaurant Supervisor currently falls under my purview. Dux Goldweaver assists me from time to time as well.

C: 哎，和那群小动物相处久了，感觉自己的整个节奏都慢了下来，手脚没那么利索了，连说话都染上了「迷」的口癖。
E: Well, spending time with all those little critters... I think they're slowing me down! My reflexes aren't what they used to be, and I've even picked up their little "mem" speech quirk.

C: 原来我这么厉害…
E: I had no idea I was this awesome...

C: 大家闲谈到深夜，留下了难忘的回忆。
E: Everyone chatted into the depths of night and created unforgettable memories.

C: 丹恒在智库文件夹深处发现一份装满了列车原始数据的压缩文件，其中不乏他寻觅已久的重要资料，许多问题顿时豁然开朗。
E: Dan Heng discovers a zipped file full of original data of the Express in the depths of the data bank's folders, containing some important information that he has been searching for a long time. The answers to many questions are suddenly revealed to him.

C: 丹恒在《亚空间生物学》杂志上刊登了一篇论文。丹恒老师的影响因子越来越高，提升了整个星穹列车在学术界的含金量。
E: Dan Heng published a paper in the journal Sub-Spatial Biology. Dan Heng's influence factor is rising, elevating the academic prestige of the entire Astral Express.

C: 姬子像往常一样冲泡了一杯浓郁的咖啡。
E: As usual, Himeko brewed a strong cup of coffee.

C: 结局
E: Conclusion

E: Justice

C: 相处
E: Coexistence

E: AMPHOREUS://DATA//ChrysosHeirs//*.core

E: ███//HertaSpaceStation::Entity

C: 这里因你而在
E: This Place Exists Because of You

C: 从家乡出发时，\n门径将少女吹成无数翻飞的泡泡，\n被命运之风带往各方。
E: When they left their home,\nThe passages blew the girl apart into countless turbulent bubbles,\nCarried to all corners of the world on the winds of destiny.

C: 冥界的主人塞纳托斯，\n将自己与魂灵置于月之茧中。
E: The master of the nether realm, Thanatos,\nEnshrouds themself and the souls within the Moon Cocoon.

C: 破茧而出的巨龙载着一名少女，\n逆溯冥河，于狭间上行。
E: The dragon, born from the cocoon, carries a girl,\nsoaring upstream the River of Souls, defying its eternal flow.

C: 可惜，诡计终有揭穿时，\n飞贼久违地迎来失败。
E: A pity that deceits are all eventually revealed,\nAnd the thief meets a rare defeat.

C: 自它睁开惺忪睡眼，\n便饥餐生铁、渴饮熔浆。
E: From the moment their bleary eyes blinked open from haze of slumber,\nthey hungered to feast on crude iron, and drink deep of molten lava.

C:
蛮荒的世界中，
巨龙引领着大地的兽群。
过于漫长的寿命，
给了巨龙望穿岁月的眼睛。
E:
In that wild, barren world,
The giant dragon led the beasts of the earth.
Excessively long life,
Gifted the giant dragon with eyes that could pierce the veil of years.

C: 以忆灵之躯， 伟岸的开山者与巨龙重逢。 他的口中碎语喃喃： 「…那一定不是你的选择。」
E: As a memosprite, The mighty Mountainbreaker reunites with the Giant Dragon. His voice trembles in a whisper: "...That couldn't have been your choice."

C: 功夫不负有心人。\n本姑娘每天闻鸡起舞，\n终于击败强敌无数！
E: Hard work pays off!\nThis girl's been up at the crack of dawn every day,\nAnd finally defeated countless formidable foes!

C: 独裁者的一生将以暴亡作结，\n无人为她流泪，\n世人都为推倒她的雕像拍掌欢呼。
E: The tyrant's life will end with violent death.\nNone will weep,\nAnd all will cheer as her statue topples.

C: …<color=#9e5738>「命运爵」</color>？…\n这个称呼，*我们*倒是不讨厌呢。
E: ..."Dux Fatorum"?\nWe don't exactly hate that name.

C: 因我笃定我已胜神半子，\n残局便交由后继者铺成。
E: For I am certain I have won half a move against the gods,\nAnd this unfinished game will be left to the future to reach completion.

C: 遮天的黑潮包围城墙，\n守城的将士遍体鳞伤，
E: The black tide that blotted out the sky surrounded the city walls,\nThe soldiers manning the walls battered from battle.

C:
凯撒凶险的棋招，
她早有见识；
巨兽沉闷的面容，
她也习以为常。
E:
She had already experienced
The Imperator's dangerous games.
She had long grown used to
The giant beast's silent face.

C: 但蜜酿刚一接触唇角，\n公主便栽倒在地，\n双颊泛起红润的醺意。
E: But as soon as the honey brew touched her lips\nThe princess plummeted to the ground\nAnd her cheeks became rosy in drunkenness.

C: 「既然贪欢蜃景，只能作浮沫消弭……」\n「待你洄游，能否为我留存一捧浪花？」
E: "Since the mirage of pleasures can only disappear like foam..."\n"When you return, will you save some ocean spray for me?"

C: 偶有几只萤火虫冒失闯进，\n少女却格外开心。\n「小小虫，感谢你也捎来光明。」
E: And when some fireflies wander in,\nThe girl is all smiles.\n"Little ones, thank you for your light."

C: 蒙恩众神的垂怜，\n感悟此世的哀伤。
E: receiving the gods' mercy,\nwhile realizing the sorrows of this world.

C: 在每一段思乡的回忆里，\n男人用优美的诗篇将仙境勾勒。
E: In every nostalgic reflection,\nthe man crafted a vision of paradise with his exquisite poetry.

C: 「白垩？或许你更适合当老师的助教。」\n曾有人误会他的化名，
E: "Final? Perhaps you're more suited to being a teacher's assistant."\nThere were once those who misunderstood his alias,

C: 在翁法罗斯，\n随处可见无名的造像。
E: In Amphoreus,\nUntitled statues are a prevalent sight.

C: 「黎明机器总是光芒闪闪，\n鸟儿们也总是唱个不停…」\n奥赫玛的孩子们喜欢这样的歌谣。
E: "The Dawn Device is always glittering,\nAnd birds are always chittering..."\nThe children of Okhema like these kinds of songs.

C: 昔涟
E: Cyrene

C: 他知道莉维娅烤面包的手艺有所长进，便小跑着接过面包篮子，满脸笑意并不遮掩。
E: He knew that Livia had gotten better at baking. So, he didn't hide the bright smile on his face as he jogged over and took the bread basket.

C: 「那可不行，哀丽秘榭的宁静日子可多亏了你这些年的保护。白厄大哥不就是老得慢些嘛，等我头发花白走不动路，我还管你叫大哥！」
E: "No way, you are the one who protected Aedes Elysiae's peace all these years. So what if you age slower, Mr. Phainon? Even when my hair turns gray and I can barely walk, I'll still call you that!"

C: 他不自觉地横剑于身，胸中燃起一束微薄的火焰。至少目前，这束火焰不再空洞。
E: Unconsciously, he held his sword across his body as a faint flame kindled in his chest. At least, for now, this flame was no longer hollow.

C: 「我宣布，黄金Aurum与星穹餐车的厨艺比拼，正式开始！」

C: 在初始循环中，无机个体以元胞自动机的形式进行活动，并在投入因子后开始自我学习，出现机械结构。第<unbreak>9910</unbreak>次循环，统一体在组成特定结构后，习得模块分工与自我反省功能。但统一体仍会在学习到固定阶段后，永久性中断生命活动。\n第<unbreak>12649</unbreak>次循环，模块Doril<unbreak>701</unbreak>脱离统一思维，与其对位模块进入相互绝对否定状态，二者在自我否定中熔断回路。
E: In the initial cycle, inorganic entities operated as cellular-sized automata. Upon the introduction of the factors, they began to learn on their own, leading to the emergence of mechanical structures. By the <unbreak>9,910</unbreak>th cycle, the Unified Entity had learned module specialization and self-reflection after forming specific structures. However, the Unified Entity would still permanently terminate its life functions after reaching a certain learning threshold.\nIn the <unbreak>12,649</unbreak>th cycle, Module Doril<unbreak>701</unbreak> broke away from the unified consciousness. It entered a state of absolute mutual denial with its counterpart module. The two melted out their circuits in self-negation.

C: 在永劫回归的不同循环中，这一代的电信号发挥的正向作用时有浮动，整体而言，仍极大地促进了后继者的数据迭代，成功培育出了最优秀的一代电信号。不过，在极端条件下，它们的存在是否会对实验产生负面作用，还有待观察。
E: In the various cycles of eternal recurrence, the positive impact of this generation's electrical signals fluctuates. However, overall, they have greatly facilitated the data iteration of their successors, successfully cultivating the most excellent generation of electrical signals. Nevertheless, it remains to be seen whether their existence might have a negative effect on the experiment under extreme conditions.

虚数内能聚合体，能级、性质与「毁灭」令使近似。

翁法罗斯一战中，成为摧毁铁墓实体及全部副本的关键。
战后交由螺丝星和仙舟联盟联合收容。
E:
Imaginary internal energy aggregate, whose energy level and nature are similar to those of an Emanator of Destruction.
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak> obtained it by generating a momentary burst from <unbreak>400</unbreak> million Coreflames, allowing contact with Nanook in the Path Space.

During the Battle of Amphoreus, it became key to destroying Irontomb's physical form and all its duplicates.
After the battle, it was handed over to Planet Screwllum and the Xianzhou Alliance for joint containment.

C:
一天，一颗流星坠落在了小镇中。这场灾难让鳄鱼们手足无措，也给镇民们创造了反抗的机会。面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了从中挑拨离间！
他收买了镇民中的贪婪之人，让他们背叛了带领镇民们反抗的哈努兄弟。但哈努兄弟铁面无私，并没有因此丧失自信，他冷静地处理掉了叛徒，在钟表小子一行人的帮助下转危为安。
石头老板最后失败了，镇民们把他赶出了小镇，噩梦小镇也变成了美梦小镇。
E:
One day, a meteor crashed into the town. The disaster left the crocodiles bewildered and gave the townsfolk a chance to rebel. In the face of the townsfolk's declaration of war, Boss Stone decided to turn the townsfolk against each other!
He bribed the greedy ones and incited them to betray Hanu, who was leading the resistance. Yet, Hanu remained steadfast and did not lose his confidence. He calmly dealt with the traitors and successfully turned the tide with the help of Clockie and the rest.
At last, Boss Stone was vanquished and ousted from the town, and Nightmareville was transformed into Dreamville.

C:
「死亡」的火种已被归还。

塞纳托斯是死亡和湮灭的泰坦，无人知晓其真正的形象——因为死者无法将传说告知生者。据说，它的触碰会令花朵枯萎，土壤开裂，金属锈蚀，血肉成为灰烬——所有的一切被包裹在浓黑的雾气里，解离为没有意义的碎片。

黄金裔虽然自视为半神的血脉，但也无法逃脱有机生命应有的结局，死去。冥河会寻找死亡，并在空无一物的旷野上汇聚成通往冥界的道路。当战争夺去过多的生命，众多灵魂无处安息时，冥河的潮汐便会涌上大地，而塞纳托斯则会掌船前来，向亡魂收取它们生前的财产，接引它们去往来世。人们认为，它的公正仅次于塔兰顿，因为它只取走众神手中多余之物，并不抢夺人们前往来世需要的资产。

随着世界入夜，死亡与黑夜成为了翁法罗斯的主宰，未知的黑潮已卷席着巨大的浪涛吞没凡界，将冥界与现世的平衡打破。而在诸多战场上游荡的亡灵和怪物，无法流转的生死似乎已昭示，即使是掌管死亡的塞纳托斯，也对其无能为力。
E:
The Coreflame of Death has been returned.

Thanatos is the Titan of death and annihilation, and no one knows their true form — for the dead cannot relay legends to the living. It is said that their touch causes flowers to wither, soil to crack, metal to corrode, and flesh to turn to ashes — everything shrouded in thick, dark mist and disintegrating into meaningless fragments.

Though the Chrysos Heirs consider themselves demigods by blood, they cannot escape the inevitable fate of organic life — death. The River of Souls seeks out death and forms a path to the underworld across barren fields. When war claims too many lives, and souls have nowhere to rest, the tides of the River of Souls surge onto the land, with Thanatos steering a ship to claim the wealth of the deceased and guide them to the afterlife. They are believed to be second in justice only to Talanton, as they only take the excess from the gods, without robbing the deceased of the assets they need to reach the afterlife.

As night falls upon the world, death and darkness become the rulers of Amphoreus. An unknown black tide rises in great waves, swallowing the mortal realm and shattering the balance between the nether realm and the living world. The wandering spirits and monsters across many battlefields, trapped between life and death, seem to signify that even Thanatos, the keeper of death, is powerless before this force.

C: 武艺和智谋，缺一不可！
E: Fighting skills and stratagem — you can't have one without the other!

C: 这能买多少杯苏打豆汁儿啊……
E: Wonder how much Mung Bean Soda can we buy with this...

C: 燃尽吧。
E: Burn away.

C: 有萨姆在的任务基本都是：砰砰——砰！就结束了。
E: Doing a mission with Sam is basically: Bang, bang...! Bang! And then it's over.

C: 好，等加强了再来打一次。
E: Nice, let's do it again when you're leveled up.

C: 战斗凶险，你也要小心些。
E: Combat is an unavoidable risk, but be careful.

C: 成全你们。
E: As you wish.

C: 于英灵而言，在这个世界成长，也是全新的体验。
E: Growing stronger in this world is a new experience, even for Heroic Spirits.

C: 多谢您的治疗！
E: Thank you for your healing!

C: 是云骑那边的新人？哎呀，赶紧回去吧，「罗浮」这儿干啥都竞争激烈，升不了职。
E: A newcomer with the Cloud Knights? *sigh* Just go back to where she's from. Everything is so competitive here in the Luofu. You can't get promoted.

C: 好牌不嫌晚！
E: Better late than never!

C: 知仙舟有杂书，这是乐趣之一；去「三余书肆」里淘杂书，这是乐趣之二；上班时看杂书，这是乐趣之三，也是最大的乐趣啦。
E: Fun number one, knowing there are books for leisure on the Xianzhou. Fun number two, browsing these books in the Spare Time Bookshop. Fun number three — the greatest fun — reading those books at work.

C: 每逢出行前，小女子都会留封信，锁在本家商铺的抽屉里。要是顺利返航，回来烧去便是，权当消灾。万一要是不能…就当是给大家留个念想吧。
E: Every time I head out, I leave a letter behind and lock it in the drawers of my shop. If I come back, then I'll burn it later. If I don't... then it'll be something for others to remember me by.

C: 她心中的那把剑，早已劈开了天地。但掌握了那样的力量，她也不再是一介剑士了。
E: That sword she holds in her heart has long since split heaven and earth... but having harnessed that kind of power, she is no longer a mere master of the sword.

C: 我在好多间铺子都见着停云姑娘，还当她是客人，想着这姑娘好生能买…后来才知道，那铺子是人家自己的！
E: I saw Tingyun in so many shops and just thought she was a customer who's always buying stuff... Then I heard all those shops are hers!

C: 「奇兵」在场，定是无往不利啊。
E: With you on our side, we're destined for victory.

C: 有彦卿在，将军自然用不着显名于武力啦。既然将军认可我的实力，我当然要替他多多分忧才是！
E: The general has no need to show his martial prowess with me around. Since he acknowledges my strength, I need to help shoulder his burdens that much more!

C: 幸亏我练过…
E: Glad I trained...

C: 冲呀！片甲不留！
E: Charge! Leave none standing!

C: 赏玩之余，便别无他用。
E: These are nice trinkets — but nothing more.

C: 甚是难得。此次任务，连小妹也要去吗？
E: Quite unexpected. You're also going on this mission?

C: 等等等等…寒鸦承受不住那么多信息……
E: Wait, wait, wait... That's too much information to process...

C: 啊，能在这儿站一会什么也不做真是太好了，一想到要回到因果殿翻阅如山如堵的罪业档案我就忍不住希望这一刻能永远永远永远持续下去……
E: It's so good to stand here and do nothing. The mere thought of having to return to mountains of criminal reports in the Hall of Karma makes me wish I could stand here for ever and ever and ever...

C: 你可知罪？
E: Sinful.

C: 已无需逗留此处，下一个。
E: Let us not waste time here... Onward.

C: 再来些大料。
E: Let's add more seasoning.

C: 天击之责，至死方休。
E: I'll see the general's duty through till my last breath.

C: 哦，你在这里啊。剑士就该用剑来互相问候，来吧，「老铁」。
E: Oh, here you are. Swordmasters should greet each other with their swords. Old Mettle, say hi!

C: 这星海间万千世界，我还远远未看够呢……
E: This vast universe has so many worlds I've yet to explore...

C: 卑劣，消亡。
E: Wretched... fleeting.

C: 俱乐部内的流言蜚语，无需刻意留心也略有耳闻——「科学怪人」。被他们这样评价，也不赖。
E: You don't have to listen hard to hear the gossip coming from the Genius Society — Mad Scientist. I'll take it as a compliment.

C: 存在即被感知——
E: Esse est percipi...

C: {NICKNAME}？有趣的名字，唔，还有难以看穿的命运。
E: {NICKNAME}? Intriguing name. Hmm... and a fate that's quite elusive...

C: 即便生命短暂，记忆也可永恒——也许很久以后，只要黑天鹅小姐还记得我，我在这个世界上的痕迹就不会消失。
E: Even if life is short, memories can be eternal. As long as Black Swan still remembers me, the mark I leave on this world will not disappear.

C: 了解他所经历的一切，就像读一本精彩的小说，你知道其中的人物都是虚构的，但依然忍不住为他们感到欢喜或悲哀——也许到了最后，我们都早已分不清谁是作者，谁是读者，谁又是角色了。
E: Learning about everything he experienced is like reading a brilliant novel. You know that the people are made up, but you still can't help but feel joy and sadness for them. Maybe by the end, we'll have long-lost track of who the author, the reader, and the characters are.

C: 它不以暴力而约束人、不以论证而说服人，人人都能在此收获安宁…或许我也一样，不知不觉中在梦里沉沦了自我。
E: It does not restrain people with violence or persuade them with arguments. Everyone can find peace there... Perhaps I, too, unknowingly lost myself in this dream.

C: 你心有迷茫吗？没关系，无论什么话题，我们都可以聊聊。
E: Are you feeling lost? Don't worry, we can chat about whatever you want.

C: 巧了，我们曾经有过一面之缘。要在宇宙中碰见一个品味如此相似的人可不容易…我是说，咱哥俩都是一身银甲，用的还都是「枪」…最重要的是，都一身正气。
E: Funny how fate works, we crossed paths before. Finding someone in this vast universe with such similar taste ain't easy y'know, both of us clad in silver, both packin' heat... And the cherry on top, we're both oozing with righteousness.

C: 此地的忍力甚是黯淡，就让我等来挥洒缭乱•忍法的色彩吧！
E: The power of ninjutsu here is quite dim. I shall unleash the vibrant colors of Dazzling Ninjutsu!

C: 有我们在，就不怕迷路啦。
E: With us here, you'll never get lost.

C: 论起战争的智慧，你才是众人的老师。
E: When it comes to the wisdom of war, you alone are the teacher of us all.

C: 等价交换？不，无中生有！
E: Equivalent exchange? No. Something out of nothing!

C: 诚然，大地兽愚昧无知，但它仍有诸多优点。沉稳，安静、脾气好、食量大……
E: Dromases indeed lack intelligence, but they still have many advantages. They're calm, quiet, have a good temperament... and eat lots...

C: 灰子，打完一起去淘宝啊~
E: Gray Mystery. Let's go hustle for treasures afterwards~

C: 我还是得有个大人样子，争取少让风堇小姑娘你费心~
E: I'll do my best to act like an adult so you don't have to worry about me, little Hyacine.

C: 粉霞天女…果然名不虚传！带带我呗？
E: The Rosy Celestial Maiden totally lives up to her reputation! Teach me your tricks!

C: 我这顶兜帽，小时候可以当披风用的，可破了，我又舍不得丢，最后靠那大名鼎鼎的「金织」手艺给救回来了。喏，倒是再也没破过，现在和新的一样，真怪。
E: I used to use this hood as a cloak back when it had seen better days. I didn't want to throw it away when it got all worn, and that famous Goldweaver mended it for me, see? But it's weird... it hasn't frayed or torn since, and somehow it still looks brand new.

C: 战场无情，愿灵魂都能安息于花海之中。
E: War is merciless. May all souls rest in peace in the sea of flowers.

C: 好温暖啊…西风……
E: The west wind...

C: 请小心。前方的气息使人不安。
E: Be careful. There's something unsettling ahead.

C: 每次前往那座阳光明媚的庭院，透过窗棂的微光总会让我想起故乡的麦田。在这末世之中，她所给予的希望，比药物和治疗更珍贵。
E: Every time I visit that sunlit courtyard, the gentle light through the latticed windows evokes the image of my homeland's sprawling wheat fields. In these end times, the hope she gives is far more precious than any medicine or healing.

C: 黄金的血液，不会白白流淌。
E: Golden blood will not flow in vain.

C: 那家伙很难说服…先观察再行动吧。
E: That one is hard to persuade... Let's observe first.

C: 潮汐，与我沉沦。
E: Tides, sink with me.

C: 这场永不餍足的深海欢宴中，来自各位的悲鸣。
E: In this endless revel of the abyss, your cries rise.

C: 真是出乎意料，柔弱的金线染血后竟如此锋利。圣城那摇摇欲坠的未来，需要的正是这样的年轻人。
E: Remarkable... Such a delicate golden thread, yet when stained with blood, becomes so razor-sharp. The holy city's fragile, teetering future needs exactly this kind of youth.

C: 历经黑潮侵蚀，神战肆虐，忆质淹没…翁法罗斯的「大地」承受过太多苦痛，但它从未辜负过守护众生的职责。它以此践行真正的「不朽」之道——并非独得长生，而是持存万物。
E: The black tide's corrosion, the ravages of divine wars, and the deluge of memoria... Amphoreus's Earth has endured so much pain, yet it has never failed in its duty to protect all living beings. It embodies the true way of the Permanence: not in achieving immortality alone, but in preserving all things.

C: 多亏她以史诗镌写岁月，那些过去才没有随风而逝。这些记忆，一定会在今后给予黄金裔们前行的勇气。
E: It is thanks to her that the ages were carved into an epic, preserved, not scattered to the wind. In the future, these memories will surely grant the Chrysos Heirs the courage to keep moving forward.

C: 我会记得，我会前进。一同走向群星吧，昔涟。
E: I shall remember. I shall press on. Let's walk towards the stars together, Cyrene.

C: 选择目标左
E: Select Target — Left

C: 输入
E: Enter

C: 教学目录
E: Tutorials

C: 取消
E: Cancel

C: 弃旧，恋新
E: Outgrow the Old, Espouse the New

C: 进入战斗时，大丽花恢复<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>点能量，并使自身和另一位开战的队友共同成为【共舞者】。每当场上不存在另一位【共舞者】时，使自身和击破特攻最高的队友共同成为【共舞者】。【共舞者】攻击处于<u>弱点击破状态</u>的敌方目标后，会将本次攻击的削韧值转化为1次<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>超击破伤害</u>。\n敌方目标受到另一位【共舞者】攻击后，大丽花发动<u>追加攻击</u>，造成<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>次伤害，每次对敌方随机单体造成等同于大丽花<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的火属性伤害。每次对处于<u>弱点击破状态</u>的敌方目标造成伤害后，会将本次伤害的削韧值转化为1次<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>超击破伤害</u>。\n该效果每回合最多触发1次，若<u>追加攻击</u>施放前目标被消灭则对敌方随机单体发动。
E: When entering combat, The Dahlia regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy and becomes "Dance Partners" along with the teammate that triggered combat. Whenever there is no other "Dance Partner" on the field, this unit and the teammate with the highest Break Effect become "Dance Partners" together. After a "Dance Partner" attacks a <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this attack will be converted into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u> at <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nAfter an enemy target gets attacked by the other "Dance Partner," The Dahlia launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> and deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, each dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Dahlia's ATK to one random enemy. After each instance of DMG dealt to a <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this DMG will be converted into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u> at <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nThis effect can only trigger once per turn. If the target is defeated before the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> is used, it will be launched at one random enemy instead.

C: 于梦境的深处，寰宇蝗灾以此样貌再度现世。
E: Deep within the dreamscape, the Swarm Disaster manifests once again in this form.

C: 梦主写给受其照拂的兄妹的回信，忆域中翻涌出的一叠追忆。
E: A letter from the Dreammaster to the siblings under his care, a stack of recollections surging from the Memory Zone.

C: 梦的谢幕礼
E: Dream's Curtain Call

C: 我的梦总是一片焦土……
E: My dreams were always a scorched earth...

C: 支配冥茫·难度<unbreak>03</unbreak>
E: Dominance of Netherveil: Difficulty 3

C: 堤溃蚁穴其一
E: Breached Nest (I)

E: Empty Promises

E: Fig Stew

E: Preemptive Honed Blade

E: Increase one chimera's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

E: When a companion uses an item: This unit's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>

E: At the start of battle: The strongest Gurgling Fish in the team deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the highest <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. This ability triggers again for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> companion(s) summoned.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的猫咪神偷对所有<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力</color>低于自身的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害，并从其中偷取随机1只进入召唤队列
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Master Cat-Thief in the team deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents with <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> lower than that of this unit's, and steals 1 random target among them into the summon queue.

C: 商店中会出现【遐蝶的爱心料理】
E: "Castorice's Love Cuisine" will appear in the store.

E: The Dahlia sharing her treasures.\n\n"Weary from the bounding dance steps? Come to my side. Share this drink of memory with me. Then... you shall witness a history consumed by fire."

C: 「齐响诗班」众愿之多米尼克斯，是为「同谐」希佩的众相化身之一，因「秩序」的干扰展现出不同以往的面貌。作为集群意识对愿望的回应，他指挥的颂歌能依照万千愿望重塑世界，建立新的法则，而所有许愿者都会成为其力量的来源。
E: Dominicus, the wisher of the Harmonious Choir, is one of the many embodiments of Xipe the Harmony. Due to the interferences from the Order, his appearance is different from before. Materialized as the Hive Mind's response to wishes, the hymns he conducts can reshape the world and create new laws per the wishes, and all who made this wish will become the source of his power.

C: 蚀心影魔•浑流奔涌的腐坏者
E: Corrupting Shadowfiend: Torrential Rotbringer

C: 使自身进入【尔在光明中】状态，获得护盾，造成的伤害提高，受到的伤害降低，且韧性无法被削减。
E: Enters the "If We Live In the Light" state, gains a Shield, increases the DMG dealt, decreases the DMG taken, and makes Toughness immune to reduction.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成大量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害，处于【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态时，对受到攻击的我方目标施加【<u>黑潮热</u>】，使造成的部分伤害以持续伤害形式在一定回合内扣除。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets. When in the "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state, inflicts "<u>Black Tide Fever</u>" on the targets attacked, causing some DMG dealt to be taken in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.

E: Praise Nikador

E: Light the Future

E: Insidious Agitation

E: As the Express Crew made their way to the Grand Theater, Firefly flew towards a different battle, soaring upwards with all her strength. "May we meet again in reality."

E: After "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" is attacked, a portion of the reduced HP is converted into "Corrosion." When "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" uses "Primordial Tide, Swarm of Death," this unit will restore HP equal to the amount of Corrosion.

E: Each stack reduces DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Loses 1 stack of "Resilient Armor++" each time Toughness is reduced to 0.

E: SPD Boost

E: Implant Lightning Weakness

E: Unending Refinement+

C: 她的长梦值得拥有更美好的结局，当遗憾业已存在，它也将弥补的机会永永远远地交到了你的手中。
E: Her long dream deserves a better ending. While the regret already exists, she has forever placed the chance to make things right in your hands.

C: 人们都已奔赴最后的战场，与黄泉进行道别，然后，将尽头变作起点。
E: Everyone has rushed to the final battlefield. Bid farewell to Acheron, and then, turn the end into a new beginning.

C: 前往银狼所说的房间
E: Go to the room Silver Wolf told you about

C: 登上最后的舞台
E: Step onto the final stage

C: 前往虚无的尽头
E: Head to the edge of Nihility

C: 说来，很久没和老日一起聊聊了，去看看他在干什么吧。
E: Come to think of it, I haven't chatted with Sunny in ages. Let's go see what he's up to.

C: 无论这个故事会如何结束，我都要让它…笑着开始。
E: No matter how this story ends, I want it to... begin with a smile.

C: 情况如何，能绕开家族的监视吗？
E: How's the situation? Can we avoid the Family's surveillance?

C: 所以，这片梦境果然不在家族掌控中。
E: So, this Dreamscape really isn't under the Family's control.

C: 这片噩梦…是「你」的记忆？
E: Is this nightmare... "your" memory?

C: 啊…交给我吧。
E: Ah... leave it to me.

C: 匹诺康尼的美梦本质上是由「忆质」构成的世界。只有掌握它的性质，你才能在其中自由行动。
E: Essentially, the dream of Penacony is a world formed by memoria. Only by fully understanding its nature can you move freely within it.

C: 难道她回到了现实？不应该，那里又没有出入口……
E: Did she return to reality? That can't be right. There's no entrance or exit there...

C: 不过，您怎么会来筑梦边境？是有什么吩咐么？
E: By the way, what brings you to Dream's Edge? Do you have anything you need from us?

C: 星、星期日先生？您怎么也……
E: M-Mr. Sunday? What are you doing here...

C: …怎么了？
E: ...What's the matter?

C: 在艾利欧预见的「未来」里，我们不曾拥有「结局」。但我还有机会，从命运手中…夺回「开启」的权利。
E: In the "future" that Elio foresaw, we never had an "ending". But I still have a chance... to wrestle back from fate the right to have a "beginning."

C: 嗯，相当「亲密」，别因为我那时的说法误会。
E: Yeah, we were quite "close." Don't get the wrong idea from how I phrased it back then.

C: （这里是……）
E: (Where... is this...)

C: 你们想让我成为「引子」，从忆域中打捞「过去」？我需要为此做些什么？
E: You want me to become the "conduit" to retrieve the "past" from the Memory Zone? What exactly do I need to do?

C: 星核猎手呢，那又是怎么回事？
E: And what's the deal with the Stellaron Hunter?

C: 哈，两位果然没意识到——灯下黑，说得就是现在。你们穿越忆质，不需要依赖「道路」，反而没能发觉。
E: Hah, as I thought. You two haven't noticed. The answer was right under your noses this whole time. You can traverse through memoria without relying on "roads," which is exactly why you missed it.

C: 命运真是…迷人而又残忍啊。
E: Fate is truly... fascinating yet cruel.

C: 嗯。如果没有，我就不会来到这里。
E: Yes, otherwise I wouldn't be here.

C: 不必如此紧张，流萤小姐。我不过是一段记忆凝成的思绪。你大可出手攻击，确认此事。
E: No need to be so tense, Miss Firefly. I am but a thought formed from memory. Feel free to strike me if you wish to verify this.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>星期日的正身已然脱离梦境，如星神般庞大，阿斯德纳星系也只是他的掌中之物。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Sunday's true form has broken free from the Dreamscape, becoming as vast as an Aeon. The Asdana system is no more than a plaything in the palm of his hand.</color>

C: 我也记得。而且，大家都认为，你是因此才选择了歌唱。
E: I remember that story. Everyone thought that's why you decided to sing.

C: 就算我很怕冷，总是受不了夜风，我也还是会去看星星。
E: Even though I'm sensitive to cold and can't stand the night wind, I still go stargazing.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>结果并不重要，甚至过程也不重要。重要的是：我们怎样参与这趟旅程，又如何去看待它。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The result doesn't matter, and even the process isn't important. What matters is how we take part in this journey and how we choose to view it.</color>

C: <color=#ff3a3e>只有你能知道，只有你能决定。这片银河，的确不是只为你而存在，也不是只在你的注视下流淌…但它永远等待着你的{RUBY_B#超越}拯救{RUBY_E#}。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Only you can know it and only you can decide. This cosmos certainly doesn't exist solely for you, nor does it flow only under your gaze... But it's forever waiting for you {RUBY_B#to surpass}to save{RUBY_E#} it.</color>

C: 安逸的训练终究只是训练，唯有真实的搏杀才能催人向上。你独自提剑出城，扎入被黑潮造物占领的废墟。一天结束，你蹒跚地回到了城门外，狂跳的心脏已变得更加坚韧。
E: Comfortable training is still just training. Only real combat can drive one forward. You venture out of the city alone with your sword, diving into ruins occupied by Black Tide Creatures. As the day ends, you stagger back to the city gates, your wildly beating heart now stronger and more tenacious.

C: 废话，有谁不想被爱？但我生来就是垃圾桶，又有谁会爱我呢？
E: Nonsense, who doesn't want to be loved? But I was born a trashcan, so who would ever love me?

C: 培养后继者。
E: Nurture a successor.

C: 「繁育」的力量流溢。每一根枝条、每一片叶片都因紧绷而微微翕动，迫不及待挣脱束缚自己的牢笼。
E: The power of Propagation overflows. Every branch and leaf quivers with tension, desperately yearning to break free from their cage's confinement.

C: 然后呢，考虑到小灰没有自己的奇美拉，经讨论后决定——
E: Also, considering you don't have your own chimera, we discussed and decided...

C: 确认启用
E: Confirm

C: 关于{NICKNAME}
E: About {NICKNAME}

C: 总算没有辜负我的等待。
E: At long last, my wait was worth something.
